caption:
Mexican Street Corn Sweet Potato Bowls 

The perfect easy weeknight dinner packed with seasoned beef, roasted sweet potatoes, and a creamy street corn topping you'll want to put on everything!

Ingredients:
4 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
1½ tbsp olive oil
½ tsp each salt, black pepper, paprika, and roasted garlic seasoning from @fireandsmokesociety 
1 lb ground beef
1 packet taco seasoning

For the Street Corn Topping:
2 cups corn
½ cup diced red onion
¼ cup chopped cilantro
½ cup blended cottage cheese (or sour cream)
½ cup mayonnaise
2 tbsp cotija cheese
Tajín, to taste
Elote seasoning, to taste
Juice of ½ lime

Directions:
1. Preheat your oven to 425°F.
2. Toss the cubed sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, pepper, paprika, and roasted garlic seasoning. Spread onto a baking sheet and roast for 25–30 minutes, flipping halfway through, until tender and lightly browned.
3. While the potatoes cook, brown the ground beef in a skillet over medium heat. Drain any excess grease, then stir in the taco seasoning and prepare according to the package directions.
4. In a large bowl, combine the corn, red onion, cilantro, blended cottage cheese (or sour cream), mayonnaise, cotija cheese, Tajín, elote seasoning, and lime juice. Mix until well combined. Taste and adjust the Tajín or elote seasoning as desired.
5. Assemble the bowls by layering the roasted sweet potatoes, seasoned taco meat, and a generous scoop of the Mexican street corn mixture.
6. Garnish with extra cotija cheese, cilantro, and a squeeze of fresh lime if desired. Serve immediately and enjoy!
#easyrecipe #dinneridea #tacotuesday #healthydinner #mealprep
summary: Mexican Street Corn Sweet Potato Bowls with seasoned ground beef, roasted sweet potatoes, and creamy street corn topping.

caption:
A perfect afternoon ft @halfpastchai 🥂

Potato Masala Sandwich 🥪

Ingredients
	•	3 cups boiled potatoes, mashed
	•	2 tbsp oil
	•	1 tsp cumin seeds
	•	3-4 garlic cloves, chopped
	•	2 green chilies, chopped
	•	1 onion, finely chopped
	•	A handful of curry leaves
	•	¼ tsp hing (asafoetida)
	•	½ tsp turmeric powder
	•	Salt to taste
	•	1 tsp coriander powder
	•	Sourdough bread
	•	Mint chutney
	•	Store-bought dry garlic chutney

Instructions
	1.	Heat oil in a pan and add cumin seeds.
	2.	Add garlic, green chilies, onion, and curry leaves. Sauté until the onions soften.
	3.	Stir in hing, turmeric, salt, and coriander powder.
	4.	Add the boiled potatoes and mix everything together until well combined.
	5.	Spread mint chutney and dry garlic chutney on slices of sourdough bread.
	6.	Add a generous layer of the potato masala and close the sandwich.
	7.	Toast both sides until golden and crispy.
	8.	Slice and serve hot.

Enjoy and follow for more!!🤝

#multiculturalcouple #indianfood #foodaesthetic #potatosandwich #aloosandwich
summary: Recipe for potato masala sandwich on sourdough bread with spiced mashed potatoes and chutneys.

caption:
baingan bharta - recipe below 👇🏻 

Ingredients

* 2 large aubergines
* 5–6 garlic cloves
* 2 green chillies
* 2 tbsp mustard oil or neutral oil
* 1/4 tsp hing
* 1 tsp cumin seeds
* 1 medium onion, finely chopped
* 2 medium tomatoes, finely chopped
* 1/2 tsp turmeric
* 1 tsp Kashmiri chilli powder
* 1 tsp ground coriander
* Salt, to taste
* Fresh coriander, chopped
* Optional: squeeze of lemon

Method

1. Prepare the aubergines

Make small slits all over the aubergines and press whole garlic cloves into them. Prick the aubergines a few more times with a knife so steam can escape.

2. Roast over flame

Place the aubergines directly over a gas flame and roast, turning often, until the skin is fully charred and the flesh has completely collapsed.

Roast the green chillies whole over the flame too, just until blistered and lightly charred. Set them aside.

3. Peel and mash

Let the aubergines cool slightly, then peel off the burnt skin. Keep the softened roasted garlic with the aubergine flesh. Mash everything together roughly with a fork or by hand. Do not blend it.

Chop the roasted green chillies and keep them aside.

4. Cook the base

Heat oil in a pan. Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle. Add hing and let it bloom briefly.

Add the chopped onion and cook until softened and lightly golden.

5. Cook the tomatoes

Add the tomatoes, turmeric, Kashmiri chilli powder, ground coriander and salt. Cook until the tomatoes break down properly and the mixture becomes thick and glossy.

6. Add aubergine

Add the mashed roasted aubergine and garlic. Mix well and cook for 8–10 minutes, stirring often, until the bharta thickens and the smoky aubergine absorbs the masala.

7. Finish

Stir through the chopped roasted green chillies and fresh coriander. Taste and adjust salt. Add a small squeeze of lemon only if it needs brightness.

Serve with

Roti, paratha, dal, rice, raita, or as part of a thali.
summary: A detailed recipe for baingan bharta, a roasted eggplant curry made with charred aubergines, roasted garlic, and spiced tomato masala.

caption:
Palak paneer all time classic 😋

INGREDIENTS 
* Paneer-200 gms
* Spinach -2 bunch without stem
* oil -5-10 ml
* Jeera-1/2 tsp
* Chopped garlic-5-7 cloves
* Chopped green chilli -2 no's
* Chopped Onions 🧅 -1 medium sized
* Chopped Tomatoes 🍅 -1 medium sized
* Salt- to taste
* Turmeric powder-1/4 tsp
* Kashmiri chilli powder-1/2 tsp
* Jeera powder-1/2 tsp
* Butter-5 Gms
* Fresh cream- 10 ml

METHOD 
* Cut the stem wash and Blanch the spinach in hot water put them in cold water then make a smooth paste
* Heat oil in a thick bottom pan add jeera then chopped garlic and green chilli  saute till they turn golden brown then add chopped onions 
* sauté till the onions is caramelised and brown then add chopped tomatoes and cook 
* Now season it with sufficient salt turmeric and Kashmiri chilli powder sauté till raw flavour disappears then add  the palak paste and cook further for 2 minutes on low heat
* Then add the paneer and cook further more 2-3 minutes 
* Now add butter cubes add jeera powder the mix and finish with fresh cream
* Serve hot with phulkas/chapathi or choice of your liking breads or even steamed rice

Always remember this "everybody can cook and everybody has to cook"

Happy cooking 😊

caption:
✨ I Didn't Expect a Result Like This! ✨
This easy puff pastry dessert is proof that simple ingredients can create something truly special. Buttery, flaky layers filled with a creamy cheese filling and juicy blueberries, topped with crunchy nuts and a dusting of powdered sugar. One bite, and you'll want to make it again and again! 🫐🥐💛
Perfect for breakfast, brunch, dessert, or a cozy coffee break. Save this recipe and surprise your family with a bakery-style treat made right at home!
💬 Would you choose blueberries, raspberries, or strawberries for the filling?
✅ Ingredients
* 1.5–1.75 lb (700–800 g) puff pastry, thawed
* 1¼ cups (300 g) soft cheese of your choice (ricotta, cream cheese, farmer's cheese, or cottage cheese)
* 1 large egg
* ⅓ cup (70 g) granulated sugar
* 2 tsp (8–10 g) vanilla sugar or 1 tsp vanilla extract
* 3 tbsp (25 g) cornstarch
* 1–1½ cups fresh or frozen blueberries
* 1 egg yolk, for brushing
* ¼ cup chopped nuts (almonds, walnuts, or pecans)
* Powdered sugar, for dusting
✅ Instructions
1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a bowl, combine the soft cheese, egg, sugar, vanilla sugar (or vanilla extract), and cornstarch. Mix until smooth and creamy.
3. Roll out the puff pastry and shape it as desired.
4. Spread the cheese filling evenly over the pastry.
5. Scatter the blueberries on top of the filling.
6. Fold or shape the pastry according to your preferred design.
7. Brush the surface with egg yolk and sprinkle with chopped nuts.
8. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until golden brown and puffed.
9. Allow the pastry to cool completely.
10. Dust generously with powdered sugar before serving.

Do you think @halfpastchai liked it ??

Hakka Noodles Recipe 🌶️ 

Ingredients

2 tbsp oil 
1 tbsp garlic, minced 🧄 
1 tbsp ginger, minced 🫚 
1–2 green chilies, sliced
1 small onion, thinly sliced 🧅 
1 green bell pepper, thinly sliced
1 cup cabbage, shredded
1 carrot, julienned (optional)
2 cups cooked noodles
1 tbsp light soy sauce
1 tbsp dark soy sauce
1 tsp vinegar
1 tsp green chili sauce
1 tsp red chili sauce
¼ tsp MSG (optional)
Black pepper, to taste
2 green onions, sliced

Instructions

1. Cook the noodles according to package directions. Drain, rinse with cold water, and toss with a little oil to prevent sticking.

2. Heat oil in a wok over high heat.

3. Add garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Stir-fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.

4. Add onion, bell pepper, cabbage, and carrot. Stir-fry on high heat for 2–3 minutes. The vegetables should stay crisp.

5. Add the cooked noodles and toss well.

6. Pour in the light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, vinegar, green chili sauce, and red chili sauce. Add MSG and Hakka Noodle Masala 

7. Toss everything together on high heat for 2–3 minutes until the noodles are evenly coated and heated through.

8. Garnish with green onions and serve hot!

caption:
Baked Spinach Mushroom Quesadillas
Ingredients

4 large flour tortillas

2 cups mushrooms, sliced

2 cups fresh spinach

1 cup mozzarella cheese, shredded

1/2 cup cheddar cheese, shredded

1/4 cup feta cheese, crumbled

1 tbsp olive oil

2 garlic cloves, minced

1/2 tsp Italian seasoning

1/2 tsp paprika

Salt and black pepper, to taste

Optional Toppings

Sour cream or Greek yogurt

Salsa or marinara sauce

Fresh parsley or cilantro

Instructions
1. Prepare the Filling
Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Sauté mushrooms for 5–6 minutes until browned and tender.
Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds, then stir in spinach and cook until wilted.
Season with Italian seasoning, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Remove from heat.
2. Assemble the Quesadillas
Lay tortillas flat on a clean surface.
Sprinkle mozzarella and cheddar cheese over one half of each tortilla. Add the spinach and mushroom mixture, then top with feta cheese.
Fold the tortillas over to create half-moon shapes.
3. Bake
Place quesadillas on the prepared baking sheet and lightly brush the tops with olive oil.
Bake for 10–12 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden brown and crispy with melted cheese inside.
4. Serve
Slice into wedges and serve warm with sour cream, salsa, or marinara sauce.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Tips

Freshly shredded cheese melts better and creates a creamier filling.

Add grilled chicken for extra protein.

Serve with a cucumber salad or roasted vegetables for a complete meal.
.
.
.

caption:
THE ULTIMATE KEBAB ROLL 👑🌯🔥
Golden and crispy on the outside, juicy and flavour-packed on the inside. Served with creamy garlic yogurt and spicy harissa butter for the ultimate bite. 

Ingredients

Kebab:
• 500g lean ground beef
• ½ onion, finely chopped
• ½ tomato, finely chopped
• Salt to taste
• ½ tsp black pepper
• 1 tsp paprika
• 1 tsp dried parsley
• ½ tsp chilli flakes
• Handful fresh coriander or parsley, chopped
• Lavash or tortillas
• 2 tbsp oil

Yogurt Sauce:
• 1 cup Greek yogurt
• ½ tsp garlic powder (or 1 clove minced garlic)
• ½ tsp dried dill
• Juice of ½ lemon
• Salt to taste
• ¼ tsp black pepper

Harissa Butter Sauce:
• 2 tbsp butter
• 2 tbsp harissa paste
• Salt & black pepper to taste
• 1 tsp paprika
• Splash of water

Method

1. Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F).
2. Mix all kebab ingredients until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture thinly over lavash or tortillas.
4. Roll tightly, slice into pieces, and thread onto skewers.
5. Brush lightly with oil.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden brown.
7. Broil for 2–4 minutes at the end for an extra crispy finish.

Yogurt Sauce:
Mix all ingredients until smooth.

Harissa Butter Sauce:
Melt butter in a pan, add harissa, paprika, seasoning, and a splash of water. Simmer until smooth and glossy.

Serve warm with both sauces and enjoy. 👑🔥
#kebab #turkishfood #easyrecipes #cooking #beyti
summary: A crispy baked Turkish kebab roll recipe with garlic yogurt and harissa butter sauces.

caption:
BANG BANG CHICKEN POWER BOWL

540 cals, 48g protein, 18 net carbs per serving
Makes 4 servings

I'm all about making healthy meals I genuinely look forward to eating, and this is IT. I used my high protein lowcarb @kaizenfoodco rice (it packs 20g protein and just 6 net carbs a serving!) but you can use regular or brown rice, quinoa or even cauliflower rice.

This is such a great healthy meal prep recipe, and SO good.

✅ Comment FUEL for my free ebook with 3 more powerbowl recipes.

Here is how I made it:

1.Finely dice 1lb chicken thighs into small pieces. Add to a bowl and drizzle with 1/2 tsp avocado oil, 1 tbsp soy sauce. Season with salt, pepper, 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp onion powder, 1 tbsp smoked paprika, the juice of half a large lime, 1/2 tbsp powdered monkfruit or sweetener, & optional: 1 tbsp gluten free flour or cornstarch. Mix well, then pop in the oven at 400F for 32 mins, or airfry at 400F for 22 mins. 

2.For the base, I used my Kaizen high protein lowcarb rice, but use any rice you like.

3.For the cucumber cabbage slaw, I thinly shredded 1/4 head cabbage with a mandolin, add it to a bowl with 3-4 thinly sliced Persian cucumbers, 1 thinly shredded carrot, 3 finely sliced scallions, 1 thinly sliced jalapeño (remove seeds if you like), and a large handful of roughly chopped cilantro. Add 1 tbsp sesame oil, 3 tbsp rice vinegar, 2 tbsp tamari or soy sauce, a pinch of salt and pepper, then mix really well, taste and adjust. I added 1 tbsp of toasted sesame seeds for a nice crunch.

4.For the Creamy Bang Bang Sauce, mix together 3 tbsp mayo, 2 tbsp sriracha, 1.5 tbsp unsweetened ketchup, the juice of half a lime, 1/4 tsp cayenne pepper, and 1/2 tsp powdered monkfrit. Mix well, taste, and add 2 tbsp of water to thin out the sauce if you wish.

When you're ready to eat, just assemble! I divided everything into 4 servings: I plated up 1 serving Kaizen lowcarb rice as the base, 4oz cooked chicken, a cup of slaw, drizzled some of the sauce, topped with fresh cilantro & sesame seeds.

If you make it, be sure to let me know what you think on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
.
.
#highprotein #healthyrecipes #lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #keto
summary: Bang Bang Chicken Power Bowl recipe with marinated chicken thighs, cucumber cabbage slaw, and creamy sriracha sauce, optimized for low-carb and high-protein macros.

caption:
Sheet Pan Doner Kebab 🥙🔥

Comment "Recipe" and I'll send you the full recipe for free.

This is one of my favorite takeout meals, but restaurants have gotten so expensive so I started making this popular recipe at home. It tastes like something you'd order at a restaurant, but costs a fraction of the price.

If you're like me, you don't eat out much anymore because restaurants are so expensive. That's why I share simple and affordable meals that save you time and money.

Follow for more weeknight staples.

Ingredients

Meat
• 1 lb ground beef
• 1 lb ground lamb
• 1 large onion, grated and squeezed dry
• 4 garlic cloves, minced
• ⅓ cup whole milk Greek yogurt
• 3 tsp cumin
• 2½ tsp coriander
• 1 tsp smoked paprika
• 1 tsp dried oregano
• 1 tsp salt
• ½ tsp black pepper
• ½ tsp cinnamon
• ½ tsp garlic powder
• ½ tsp onion powder

Salad
• 1 cup cherry tomatoes, quartered
• 1 small red onion, thinly sliced
• ½ cup cucumber, diced
• ¼ cup parsley, chopped
• ½ tsp dill
• Juice of ½ lemon
• 1 tsp olive oil
• 1 tsp salt
• ½ tsp pepper

Tzatziki
• 1 cup Greek yogurt
• ½ cucumber, grated and squeezed dry
• 2 tbsp mayonnaise
• 1 tbsp olive oil
• 1 tbsp lemon juice
• 1 tbsp dill
• ½ tsp salt
• ½ tsp pepper
• 1 small garlic clove, grated

For Serving
• Pita bread or naan
• Optional: feta cheese

Instructions
1.	Preheat oven to 425°F.
2.	In a large bowl, combine the beef, lamb, onion, garlic, yogurt, and spices. Mix aggressively for 3–4 minutes until it turns into a paste.
3.	Divide into 4 portions. Place one portion between parchment paper, roll it out flat, then roll it into a log.
4.	Place on a sheet pan and bake for 15–18 minutes until cooked through.
5.	While the meat bakes, make your salad and tzatziki. Mix all ingredients for each and let sit until ready to use.
6.	Let the meat cool slightly, then slice thin. Spread on a sheet pan and broil for 3–5 minutes until browned and crispy.
7.	Serve in warm pita or naan with salad and tzatziki, and top with feta cheese if using.

#easydinners #doner #kebab
summary: A homemade sheet pan doner kebab recipe made with ground beef and lamb, served with fresh salad and tzatziki sauce.

caption:
Pinterest told me that cabbage is really having a moment, so I'm finding ways to work it into my weekday rotation 🌮 These blackened shrimp tacos take 20 minutes and the slaw and crema make them feel like you got them from a really good taco spot!!

TBH, I'm not usually a shrimp person😬. Like, I like shrimp, but it's not my first protein choice for weekdays because I typically go for beef, chicken, or salmon. But THESE TACOS have me keeping shrimp in the freezer at all times.

What you need:
Blackening seasoning: 2 tsp smoked paprika, 2 tsp ground cumin, 2 tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp oregano, 1 tsp onion powder, 1 tsp kosher salt, 1 tsp black pepper, 1/2 tsp cayenne

Slaw: 3 cups shredded cabbage, 1 Tbsp lime juice, drizzle of avocado oil, finely chopped cilantro.

Crema: 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt, 1/4 cup sour cream, 1 Tbsp chipotle sauce (from adobo can), 1 tsp honey, lime juice.

Here's the method that really works:
1. Pat completely dry with paper towels
2. Cast iron on medium-high until avocado oil is shimmering
3. Cook in a single layer (no crowding)
4. Cook 2-3 min undisturbed → flip → add butter → cook until C-shape

caption:
Smashed falafel tacos are such an easy weeknight dinner 🌮🥒🍅I love falafel wraps but I also love smashing things in a hot pan until they're crispy all over! 

These are quick, satisfying, and versatile. @nutiva 's organic refined coconut oil makes shallow frying these so easy and delicious.

smashed falafel tacos
(makes 4 tacos)

for the falafel mixture:
1 can chickpeas, drained, rinsed and dried
1/2 cup parsley, packed
1/2 cup cilantro, packed
3 garlic cloves
1/4 red or white onion, cut into chunks
1 1/2 tbsp flour
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp cumin
1/4 tsp cayenne
salt & pepper

for the tacos:
1-2 tbsp @nutiva organic refined coconut oil
4 small flour tortillas (taco sized)
Shredded lettuce

tomato cucumber salad:
1 cup cucumbers, diced 
1/2 cup tomatoes, diced
1/4 cup red onion, diced
drizzle of olive oil
drizzle of red wine vinegar
salt

tzatziki:
1/4 cup grated cucumber (squeeze out moisture)
1/2 cup Greek yogurt
1 small clove garlic, grated
3 tbsp lemon juice
1 heaping tbsp dill or parsley, chopped
1-2 tsp olive oil
salt & pepper

In a food processor, blitz chickpeas, parsley, cilantro, garlic cloves, onion, flour, lemon juice, cumin, cayenne, salt, and pepper until it forms a chunky paste. Divide it into 4 balls/patties about 1/3 cup each.

Heat coconut oil in a skillet on medium heat so it forms a shallow layer. Once hot, add a falafel patty and place a tortilla on top. Use a lid or grill press to smash it down into a thin layer. Cook for 3-4 minutes. Flip and cook the other side for about 30 seconds. Repeat for 4 tacos (or do multiple at once).

Make the cucumber salad by combining cucumber, tomatoes, red onion, olives oil, red wine vinegar, and salt. Make the tzatziki by whisking together grated cucumber, Greek yogurt, garlic, dill, olive oil, salt and pepper.

Assemble the tacos with shredded lettuce, tomato cucumber salad, and tzatziki. 

#vegandinnerideas #falafelwrap #plantbasedrecipe #easyweeknightmeals
summary: A recipe for smashed falafel tacos made with chickpeas, fresh herbs, and shallow-fried in coconut oil, served with tzatziki and tomato-cucumber salad.

caption:
Baked chicken tacos 🌮 

Ingredients 

For the chicken:
1 lb boneless chicken breast, cut into small pieces 
Salt to taste
1 tbsp smoked paprika powder 
1 tsp garlic powder 
1/2 tsp black pepper 
1 tsp cajun seasoning 
1-2 cloves fresh garlic, minced 
1 cup mixed bell pepper, diced 
1/2 cup corn, boiled 
1 yellow onion, diced
1 jalapeno, chopped and seeded ( optional )
1 tbsp lemon juice 
4 tbsp cream cheese 
1/4 cup water
1 tbsp oil + more for cooking 

For the sauce :

1/2 cup mayonnaise 
1/2 cup sour cream
1 tbsp smoked paprika powder 
1 tsp garlic powder 
Salt and pepper to taste 
1 tsp cajun seasoning 
1 tbsp lime juice 
1 tsp hot sauce 
1-2 tbsp fresh cilantro, chopped 

To assemble 
1 cup mixed shredded cheese, ( i used mozzarella and cheddar )
10 mini flour tortillas 
2 tbsp oil ( for brushing the tortillas)

Instructions:

In a bowl, add the chicken pieces, salt, smoked paprika, garlic powder, black pepper, Cajun seasoning, and 1 tbsp oil. Mix well until the chicken is evenly coated.

Heat a pan over medium heat with a little oil. Once hot, add the seasoned chicken and cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally, Add the minced garlic and cook for 1–2 minutes, until fragrant. Add the diced onion, bell peppers, corn, and jalapeño (if using). Stir and cook for 3–4 minutes, until the vegetables soften slightly and chicken is cooked through.

Lower the heat and add the cream cheese, lemon juice, and water. Stir until the cream cheese melts and forms a creamy sauce that coats the chicken and veggies. If the mixture seems too thin, simmer for 1–2 minutes until thickened. Taste and adjust salt if needed. Remove from heat.

Preheat the oven to 400°F

Lightly brush one side of each tortilla with oil. Flip the tortillas over and spoon the chicken filling onto the un-oiled side. Sprinkle with cheese, then fold or gently press the tortillas closed. Arrange them on a baking sheet and bake for 10–15 minutes, or until the tortillas are crispy and the cheese is melted.

#recipe #bake #taco
summary: Baked chicken tacos with creamy cajun-seasoned filling, vegetables, and a smoked paprika sour cream sauce.

caption:
SAVE this recipe for your next meal! It's just like Papa Tea's stir fried crab but with shrimp and shrimp paste 😋

➡️ Recipe: Stir fried shrimp 🦐 

2 lbs shrimp, head-on, trimmed and deveined 
1/3 cup cornstarch 
1/3 cup cooking oil

1 medium onion 
1-2 jalapeños 
3 stalks green onions
1 inch piece ginger 
4-5 cloves garlic 

2 tbsp butter 
3 tbsp oyster sauce 
1 1/2 tbsp crab paste in soy bean oil 
1/2 tbsp fish sauce 
2 tsp sugar
2 tbsp chicken boullion 
1/4 tsp black pepper 

Trim the horns, antennae, and front legs from the shrimp using kitchen shears. Devein, then rinse and pat dry thoroughly. Coat the shrimp with cornstarch, tossing until evenly coated.

Heat 1/3 cup of cooking oil in a large pan or wok over medium-high heat. Working in small batches, arrange the shrimp in a single layer and cook for 1–2 minutes per side, until lightly golden and crispy. Remove and set aside.

Discard all but 2 tablespoons of oil from the wok, leaving the browned bits and drippings behind. Add the butter and let it melt. Sauté the onions, garlic, and ginger for about 2 minutes, until the onions are just translucent.

Add the oyster sauce, fish sauce, sugar, chicken bouillon, and black pepper. Stir well until the seasonings are fully dissolved and combined, about 1 minute.

Add the sliced jalapeños and toss for 30 seconds. Return the shrimp to the wok and toss until evenly coated in the sauce. Add the green onions and give everything one final toss.

Serve with steamed white rice and enjoy!

#easyrecipes #recipe #recipes #foodstagram #shrimp
summary: A stir-fried shrimp recipe with cornstarch-crusted shrimp, aromatics, and savory sauce served with rice.

caption:
🚨 INDIAN PARENTS OVER 60… DO THESE OR GET WEAKER EVERY YEAR 😳

Your ba, dada, mum or dad doesn't lose mobility because they're old…

They lose it because they STOP MOVING. ⚠️

If they can still walk, sit, stand and climb stairs today… GOOD.
But if they don't maintain it now, one day they'll struggle getting off the toilet, climbing stairs or even catching themselves from a fall.

These 5 simple daily exercises can literally help keep them independent for YEARS 👏🏽

1️⃣ Seated Calf Raises
3 sets x 10 reps
🦵 Helps blood flow & circulation
Your calves are basically your "second heart"

2️⃣ Sit To Stand
3 sets x 10 reps
🚽 Keeps legs strong for everyday life
No one wants help getting off the toilet in the future.

3️⃣ Wall Push-Ups
4 sets x 12 reps
💪 Helps maintain upper body strength
Pushing strength = confidence & fall prevention

4️⃣ Bird Dog ("Jugli Kutra")
3 sets x 10 reps each side
🧠 Improves balance, coordination & spine stability

5️⃣ Step-Ups
3 sets x 10 reps each leg
🪜 Helps maintain stair strength, balance & mobility

⏰ Rest 1 minute between sets if needed.

This isn't about becoming a gym athlete.
This is about staying MOBILE, STRONG & INDEPENDENT as we age ❤️

Send this to your ba, dada, mum, dad, kaka, kaki… EVERYONE needs this 🙏🏽

SAVE THIS POST 📌
SHARE THIS WITH FAMILY 📲
Because movement Is your medicine
summary: Five daily exercises designed to help seniors over 60 maintain mobility, strength, and independence in everyday activities.

caption:
470 kcal & 51g protein per serving 🔥
The TASTIEST chicken tikka I have ever had -  I'm not even kidding. 
Mushrooms blended and added to make a creamy, umami packed marinade with the usual yoghurt based tikka marinade - which keeps every bite of chicken thigh juicy — and also, a  chatpata truffle garlic butter finish is the part you'll keep coming back for.

Creamy Garlic Mushroom Chicken Tikka
Macros (approx, per serving): 470 kcal | 51g protein | 12g carbs | 24g fat

Ingredients (serves 2, ~200 g - 220 g per serving):
For the marinade —
400g boneless chicken thigh (skinless)
200g mushrooms (button + oyster mix, or any mushroom of choice)
4–5 garlic cloves, chopped
1 small onion, chopped
2 tsp ghee
100g Greek yogurt or hung curd
30g grated mozzarella
2 tsp chilli flakes
1 tsp oregano or Italian seasoning
½ tsp black pepper powder
Salt, to taste
1 tsp lemon juice 
A pinch of sugar
A drizzle of truffle oil (optional)

For the garlic butter finish —
1 tbsp butter, melted
½ tsp garlic powder or paste
1 tsp chilli flakes
¾ tsp chaat masala
A few drops of truffle oil (optional)

Method:

	1.	Sauté the chopped garlic & onion in ghee. Add the mushrooms and a pinch of salt, and cook down until the water evaporates and they soften.
	2.	Blend with a little water into a smooth, thick paste.
	3.	Mix it with yogurt, cheese, black pepper, chilli flakes, oregano, lemon juice, salt and sugar.
	4.	Add the chicken thigh, coat well, and marinate overnight in the fridge (or at least 2–3 hours).
	5.	Spread on the tray. Air fryer: 180°C for 14–15 minutes. Oven: bake at 180°C for 25–27 minutes (grill 2–3 minutes for colour), until golden and cooked through. Rest a couple of minutes. (You can also cook this a frying pan for about 7-8 minutes on both sides on a medium flame).
	6.	For the garlic butter, mix the melted butter, garlic, chilli flakes and chaat masala. Brush all over and enjoy.

(air fryer chicken recipe, garlic mushroom chicken tikka, umami chicken tikka, high protein chicken, mushroom marinated chicken, garlic butter chicken, healthy chicken thigh recipe, easy air fryer dinner)
.
#airfryerchicken #highprotein #mushroomchickentikka
summary: High-protein mushroom chicken tikka recipe with creamy umami marinade and garlic butter finish, cooked in an air fryer.

caption:
Spinach Mushroom Quinoa Recipe

A healthy, protein-rich, and flavorful one-pan dish that's perfect as a light meal, side dish, or meal-prep lunch.

Servings: 4
Prep Time: 10 minutes
Cook Time: 20 minutes
Total Time: 30 minutes

Ingredients
1 cup quinoa, rinsed
2 cups vegetable broth (or water)
1 tbsp olive oil
250 g (8 oz) mushrooms, sliced
3 cups fresh spinach
1 small onion, finely diced
3 cloves garlic, minced
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
½ tsp dried thyme
½ tsp dried oregano
1 tbsp lemon juice
2 tbsp grated Parmesan cheese (optional)
2 tbsp chopped fresh parsley
Instructions
1. Cook the Quinoa
Rinse the quinoa thoroughly under cold water.
In a saucepan, combine the quinoa and vegetable broth.
Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff with a fork.
2. Sauté the Vegetables
While the quinoa cooks, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook for 3–4 minutes until softened.
Stir in the garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Add the mushrooms and cook for 5–7 minutes until browned and their moisture has evaporated.
3. Add the Spinach
Add the spinach to the skillet.
Cook for 1–2 minutes until wilted.
Season with salt, pepper, thyme, and oregano.
4. Combine Everything
Add the cooked quinoa to the skillet.
Toss well to combine with the mushrooms and spinach.
Stir in the lemon juice.
Cook for 1–2 minutes until heated through.
5. Finish and Serve
Remove from heat.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and fresh parsley, if using.
Serve warm.
Optional Add-Ins
Crumbled feta cheese
Toasted pine nuts or almonds
Sun-dried tomatoes
Chickpeas or white beans
Grilled chicken, shrimp, or salmon
Storage
Refrigerate in an airtight container for up to 4 days.
Reheat in a skillet or microwave with a splash of water or broth.
Nutrition (Approximate per Serving)
Calories: 220
Protein: 8 g
Fat: 6 g
Carbohydrates: 34 g
Fiber: 5 g
#AntiInflammatoryLiving #antiinflammatorydiet #antiinflammatory 
#antiinflammatoryfoods #NaturalHealing #AntiInflammatoryEats #eatforhealth
summary: A one-pan spinach mushroom quinoa recipe that's protein-rich, anti-inflammatory, and ready in 30 minutes.

caption:
🥬 Cottage Cheese & Spinach Crustless Quiche
📝 Ingredients
1 cup cottage cheese
4 large eggs
1 cup fresh spinach (chopped) (or ½ cup frozen, thawed & squeezed dry)
½ cup shredded cheese (cheddar, mozzarella, or feta)
¼ cup milk (or almond milk)
¼ cup onion (finely chopped)
1 garlic clove (minced)
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
¼ tsp paprika (optional)
¼ tsp dried oregano or Italian seasoning
1 tbsp olive oil
👩‍🍳 Instructions
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Lightly grease a baking dish or pie pan.
Sauté veggies: Heat olive oil in a pan, cook onion and garlic until soft. Add spinach and cook until wilted. Let cool slightly.
Mix eggs: In a bowl, whisk eggs, cottage cheese, milk, salt, pepper, and spices.
Combine: Stir in cooked spinach mixture and shredded cheese.
Bake: Pour into prepared dish and bake for 30–35 minutes, until set and lightly golden.
Cool & serve: Let it rest 5–10 minutes before slicing.
🍽️ Serving Ideas
Pair with a fresh salad or roasted veggies
Serve with whole grain toast
Great for meal prep—stores well in the fridge for 3–4 days

caption:
these CRISPY CHICKEN TACOS are something unbelievables 🌮✨

with creamy chipotle aioli, purple cabbage slaw + pineapple mango salsa

For the chicken marinade:
1.5–2 lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs
juice of 1 orange
juice of 2 limes
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire
2 tbsp olive oil
6 garlic cloves
1/2 white onion
1 jalapeño
1/2 bunch cilantro
2 tsp smoked paprika
2 tsp chili powder
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp oregano
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Blend the marinade until smooth, then pour over the chicken. Marinate for 30 minutes to 8 hours.

In the meantime, make your creamy chipotle aioli, slaw, and salsa.

Chipotle lime crema:
1/2 cup mayo
1/4 cup sour cream or Greek yogurt
juice of 1 lime
1 garlic clove, grated
1 heaping tsp smoked paprika
1/2 tsp chili powder
1/2 tsp cumin
1/2 tsp salt
optional: hot sauce or sriracha

Mix until smooth.

Purple cabbage slaw:
1/2 head purple cabbage, thinly sliced
1/2 bunch cilantro, chopped
juice of 1 lime
1 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp honey
1/2 tsp salt

Toss together.

Pineapple mango salsa:
1 cup pineapple, diced
1 cup mango, diced
1/4 cup red onion, finely diced
1 jalapeño, finely diced
1/2 bunch cilantro, chopped
juice of 1 lime
1/2 tsp salt
optional: 1 tsp sesame oil

Grill the chicken over medium-high heat for about 5–6 minutes per side, or until cooked through and nicely charred. Let rest, chop, then add back to the pan with a little oil and crisp until the edges get golden and crunchy. 

To assemble, fry flour tortillas win a little oil with grated cheese directly on top so it melts into the tortilla. Add chicken, purple cabbage slaw, pineapple mango salsa, and lots of creamy chipotle aioli.

Makes about 8–10 tacos!

These are something unbelievables.

caption:
🧄🧀 CHEESY GARLIC ZUCCHINI STEAKS 🧀🧄

Crispy on the edges, tender in the middle, and loaded with melty garlic cheese! 🤤✨ This easy low-carb side dish is so good, you might just make it the main event! 🌿💚

✨ Ingredients:
🥒 4 medium zucchinis, cut into thick steaks
🫒 3 tbsp olive oil
🧄 4 cloves garlic, minced
🌿 1 tsp dried oregano
🧂 ½ tsp salt
⚫ ½ tsp black pepper
🧀 1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese
🧀 ¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese
🌱 Fresh basil or oregano leaves, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Directions:
1️⃣ Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2️⃣ Arrange zucchini steaks in a single layer on the baking sheet.
3️⃣ In a small bowl, mix olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
4️⃣ Brush the garlic mixture generously over each zucchini steak.
5️⃣ Top with mozzarella and Parmesan cheese.
6️⃣ Bake for 15–20 minutes, until the zucchini is tender and the cheese is golden and bubbly.
7️⃣ Garnish with fresh basil or oregano and serve warm.

💡 Perfect as a healthy side dish, light lunch, or vegetarian dinner!

caption:
💥Would you try this?? Mediterranean Steak & Crispy Chickpea Salad

If you love mediterranean food and mediterranean flavors, and want an incredible summer salad, try making this. It's one of the best flavor combinations and its SO good. The crispy chickpeas add such a nice crunch and a little more protein. You can always swap those out for crispy rice or quinoa, or if you're lowcarb, my high protein lowcarb Kaizen rice.

Here is how I made it:

1.Lets pop the chickpeas in the oven while you work the rest. Grab a jar or can of chickpeas. Rinse with water well, then strain and pat try with a kitchen towel. Add it to an oven safe dish. Drizzle with 2 tbsp olive oil, season with salt, pepper, and season with 1 tbsp thyme, 1 tbsp sweet paprika, and 1 tbsp garlic powder. Mix well then pop in the oven at 425F for 27-30 mins. Then let cool slightly.

2.Prep your salad base. I finely chopped 5oz arugula, thinly diced 4-5 Persian cucumbers, finely diced 1 large red onion, and thinly sliced half a pint of cherry tomato. You can add as many fresh herbs you want here. At a minimum I recommend finely chopping a large handful of fresh parsley (yielding about 3/4 cup), but feel free to add fresh mint and cilantro on top of it, too.

3.Cube up 1lb steak, drizzle with 1/2 tsp olive oil then season it with 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp sweet paprika, 1 tsp oregano, 1 tsp chili flakes, & generous salt+pepper. Cook on medium-high heat for 8 mins,  or until cooked to your liking.

4.For the dressing, in a jar add 1/4 cup olive oil, the juice and zest of a large lemon, 2 tbsp red wine vinegar, 1 tbsp dijon mustard, salt, pepper, 1 tsp sumac, 1 tsp oregano, and 1 tsp garlic powder. Shake really well.

5.Grab a salad bowl, add your veggies at the base, add the cooked steak, top with the fresh herbs, toss in the roasted chickpeas, then add the sauce, toss it really well and ENJOY!

If you make this, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#salads #healthyrecipes #mediterraneanfood #healthyfoodshare #lowcarbrecipes
summary: Mediterranean steak and crispy roasted chickpea salad with lemon vinaigrette dressing.

caption: Chicken Karahi traces its roots back to the bustling dhabas and trading routes of the Indian subcontinent, where travellers and workers gathered around open-fire kitchens for bold, freshly cooked meals served straight from the traditional karahi vessel it's named after. Unlike royal curries that relied on richness and slow cooking, Chicken Karahi became known for its fiery heat, fast cooking style and deep smoky character, evolving into one of the most loved comfort dishes across North India and Pakistan, celebrated for its rustic simplicity, intense flavour and the unmistakable experience of sharing it straight from the pan.
summary: Educational post about Chicken Karahi's origins in Indian subcontinent dhabas and its evolution as a beloved comfort dish.

caption:
Moroccan-Inspired Chickpea Quinoa Salad
Prep time: 10 minutes | Cook time: 20 minutes | Servings: 4

Ingredients
The Base

1 cup Uncooked quinoa, rinsed

1 can (15 oz) Chickpeas, rinsed and drained

2 cups Vegetable broth or water

Aromatics & Spices

1 medium Yellow onion, diced

1/2 tbsp Garlic, minced

1 tsp Ground turmeric

1/2 tsp Ground cumin

1/2 tsp Ground cinnamon

Sweet & Savory Mix-ins

2/3 cup Dried cranberries or raisins

1/3 cup Flat-leaf parsley, finely diced

1/2 cup Sliced toasted almonds

Optional Dressing

3 tbsp Olive oil

2 tbsp Lemon juice

To taste: Salt and black pepper

Instructions
Sauté Aromatics: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté the diced onion until translucent (about 3–5 minutes), then stir in the garlic, turmeric, cumin, and cinnamon for 30 seconds until fragrant.

Cook Quinoa: Add the vegetable broth and rinsed quinoa to the pot. Bring to a boil, then cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 15 minutes until all liquid is absorbed.

Combine & Garnish: Remove from heat and fluff the quinoa with a fork. Stir in the chickpeas, dried cranberries, and fresh parsley until well-mixed.

Finish: Garnish the salad with the toasted almonds and extra fresh herbs.

Serve: This dish can be enjoyed warm, at room temperature, or chilled.

Note: This nutrient-dense meal combines fluffy quinoa and protein-rich chickpeas with the warmth of Moroccan spices and the sweetness of dried fruit.
summary: A Moroccan-inspired chickpea and quinoa salad with warm spices, dried fruit, and almonds, ready in 30 minutes.

caption:
THE BEST Cripsy Chicken Wraps🤤🌯✨

The Full Recipe👇🏽
For the chicken:
2 chicken breasts, sliced into strips
1 egg
Splash of milk
1 tsp smoked paprika
1 tsp dried oregano
Salt & pepper, to taste

For the coating:
Breadcrumbs
2 tsp cornflour
1 tsp smoked paprika
1 tsp dried oregano
Salt & pepper

For the dressing:
2 tsp mayo
1 tbsp Greek yogurt
1 garlic clove, minced
Salt & pepper, to taste

To serve:
Romaine lettuce
Wraps of choice

Method

1. In a bowl, mix together the egg, milk, smoked paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper. Add the chicken strips and coat well.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the breadcrumbs, cornflour, smoked paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper.
3. Coat each chicken strip in the breadcrumb mixture until fully covered.
4. Place into the air fryer, spray with oil, and cook at 200°C for 12–15 minutes, flipping halfway and spraying again until golden and crispy.
5. Meanwhile, make the dressing by mixing together the mayo, Greek yogurt, garlic, salt, and pepper.
6. Add chopped romaine lettuce to half of the dressing and mix well.
7. Assemble the wraps with the creamy lettuce, crispy chicken, and extra sauce drizzled on top.
8. Wrap up and serve immediately.

#EasyRecipes #cookwithme #DinnerIdeas #wraps #cooking
summary: A recipe for crispy chicken wraps made in an air fryer with a creamy garlic dressing and romaine lettuce.

caption:
Garlic Parmesan Zucchini Fries with Yogurt Dip
These fries are breaded with a mixture of panko and Parmesan cheese, then baked or air-fried until golden and crispy.

Ingredients
Zucchini: 2 medium zucchinis, cut into fry-shaped sticks.

Breading: 1 cup panko breadcrumbs, 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 cup all-purpose flour.

Binding: 2 large eggs, beaten.

Seasoning: 1 tsp garlic powder, 1/2 tsp paprika, 1/2 tsp dried oregano (or Italian seasoning), salt, and black pepper.

Yogurt Dip: 1 cup plain Greek yogurt, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 minced garlic clove, and 1 tbsp fresh chopped dill or parsley.

Instructions
Prep: Preheat your oven to 425°F (220°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Bread: Set up three shallow bowls: one with flour, one with beaten eggs, and one with the breadcrumb-Parmesan-spice mixture.

Coat: Dredge each zucchini stick in flour, dip it in the egg, and then coat it thoroughly with the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently so it sticks.

Bake: Place the fries in a single layer on the baking sheet. Lightly spray with oil and bake for 20–25 minutes, flipping halfway through, until they are crispy and golden.

Serve: While they bake, whisk together the dip ingredients and refrigerate until ready. Serve the fries hot with the chilled dip.

Pro Tip
To prevent soggy fries, salt the sliced zucchini and let them drain in a colander for 30 minutes before breading to remove excess moisture.

#mediterraneandiet #mediterraneanrecipes #usafoodie
summary: Breaded garlic Parmesan zucchini fries baked until crispy, served with Greek yogurt dip.

caption:
One pot chicken pulao🍗- Recipe ⬇️

INGREDIENTS 
* Chicken breast -200 Gms
* Basmati rice -1 cup (150 Gms)
* Oil-5-10 ml
* Ghee -1 tbsp
* Whole spices with bay leaf
* Sliced onions 🧅 - 1 no medium size
* Cubes tomato 🍅-1 small nos
* Ginger garlic paste -1 tsp 
* Green chilli-2 nos
* Salt -to taste 
* Turmeric powder-1/4 tsp 
* Chilli powder- 1 tsp
* Garam masala-1/2 tsp
* Chopped Coriander leaves 

METHOD 
* Wash Soak the basmati rice for 30 -45 minutes 
* Heat oil add whole spices with bay leaf and followed by slit green chilli and then sliced onions 
* on a slow to medium heat  saute the onions till it becomes soft  then add ginger garlic paste and saute when the aroma comes out
* At this stage  add cubes of tomatoes 🍅  then season it with sufficient salt and sauté them add  turmeric and chilli powder
* Once raw flavour disappears add marinated chicken cubes and saute the  cover and cook it for 3-4 minutes then add the measured water for 1 cup rice i am using 2 cup water bring it to boil add  soaked basmati rice and start cooking check for seasoning if required add salt 
* When the rice and water on the same level add chopped coriander,garam masala and ghee
* Then cover and dum for 10-12 minutes by keeping a old tawa underneath on a very slow heat try to keep a bowl of water on top
* Once the time is over need to rest the pulao for 5 minutes Serve hot with raitha or any side dish

Always remember this "everybody can cook and everybody has to cook"

Happy cooking 😊

caption:
Summer Roll Chicken 🥒🥕

✨This recipe is for delicious and healthy summer rolls, made without refined sugar.✨

Ingredients
For the Summer Rolls:
Rice paper sheets
1.2 lb thinly sliced chicken breast
Cucumber, thinly sliced
Shredded carrots
Red bell pepper, thinly sliced
Thinly sliced avocado
Mint leaves
Cilantro
Shredded lettuce
Avocado oil (for cooking the chicken)

For the Chicken Seasoning:
1 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp garlic powder
⅛ tsp ginger powder
Pinch of black pepper

For the Peanut Sauce:
⅓ cup natural, unsweetened peanut butter
2 tbsp raw honey
1 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari
2 tsp lime juice
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp ginger powder
½ cup water
⅛ tsp sesame oil

Instructions
1. Cook the Chicken: Season the thin chicken fillets with ginger powder, black pepper, garlic powder, and salt. Cook them quickly in a pan with avocado oil and the low-sodium soy sauce until cooked through. Once cooked, set them aside to cool, then chop into strips.

2. Make the Peanut Sauce: In a bowl, combine all the peanut sauce ingredients. The key is to add the water little by little, whisking continuously until you achieve a creamy consistency.

3. Prepare for Assembly: Prepare all your vegetables. It's best to slice the avocado just before you are ready to assemble the rolls. Have a shallow dish of water ready for the rice paper.

4. Assemble the Rolls: Dip one sheet of rice paper in the water for just a moment. It will continue to soften as you add the ingredients. Lay the damp rice paper flat. Place a few slices of avocado first so they will be visible on the top of the finished roll. Add the rest of the ingredients: cooked chicken strips, vegetables, and fresh herbs (mint, cilantro). Carefully roll it up like a burrito. Repeat the process until you have used all your ingredients.

5. Serve: Enjoy these beautiful rolls, filled with a fresh crunch, alongside the peanut sauce which takes them to another level.
summary: A recipe for homemade summer rolls with chicken, fresh vegetables, and peanut sauce made without refined sugar.

caption:
Loaded Shrimp Taco Bowl 🦐🔥🌿

This recipe is healthy, easy to make, can be done in under 30 minutes and packed with flavor using simple ingredients! Absolutely love it for a weeknight dinner, especially during the warmer months — It's also great for meal prepping!

Find the full recipe below or on my ReciMe Page linked in my bio 🔗 

FULL RECIPE ⬇️

INGREDIENTS (2-3 servings)
- 1 lb XL peeled & deveined raw shrimp of choice (I used wild caught Argentinian red shrimp)
- 2 tbsp of extra virgin olive oil 
- Taco seasoning of choice 
- Jasmine rice (cooked)

Roasted Corn & Black Bean Salsa 
(Combine all ingredients) 
- 1 cup roasted yellow corn (cooled) 
- 1 cup canned black beans (strained and rinsed)
- 1/2 cup finely diced red onion 
- 1/2 cup finely diced poblano pepper 
- 1/2 cup finely diced tomatoes 
- 1/2 cup fresh chopped cilantro 
- Juice of 1 lime 
- Salt & garlic powder to taste 

Creamy Cilantro Lime Sauce 
(Blend all ingredients together) 
- ~1 cup light sour cream 
- ~1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil 
- Zest of 1/2 a lime 
- Juice of 1/2 a lime 
- 2 cloves of galric 
- 1/2 bunch of cilantro 
- Salt to taste 

Note(s): Measurements are estimated, adjust ingredients to your liking. For the sauce, only add 1-2 tbsp of water at a time until you reach your desired thickness.

DIRECTIONS 
1. Prepare the roasted corn and black bean salsa. Remove corn from cob and roast over high heat for 3-5 minutes mixing frequently to prevent burning, then add to a bowl and let cool. While corn is cooling, prepare other ingredients. Combine everything and place it in the fridge.
2. Prepare the creamy cilantro lime sauce and place in the fridge. 
3. Prepare the shrimp. Make sure they're clean and all the shell is removed then add to a large bowl with olive and taco seasoning. Mix till welll combined.
4. Cook shrimp in large greased skillet over medium-high heat for 2-3 min per side. Be careful to not over cook. 
5. Assemble your bowl & ENJOY! 🙌🏻

#explore #cooking #healthy #food #recipe
summary: A loaded shrimp taco bowl recipe with roasted corn and black bean salsa, creamy cilantro lime sauce, and jasmine rice, ready in under 30 minutes.

Easy Shrimp and Guacamole Tostada 

Here's the perfect dinner. It's easy, delicious, and healthy. it'll keep you fit and full! 

Shrimp seasoning:
1. One pound shrimp deveined tail OFF 
2. 1/2 teaspoon salt , oregano 
3. 1 teaspoon cumin , chili powder, paprika
4. 1 teaspoon oil 

Guacamole: mashed and mixed 
1. Two ripe avocados 
2. One teaspoon salt , black pepper and  juice of one lime 
3. Optional add - diced tomato ,1/3 onion diced, One jalapeño diced, Two tablespoons cilantro chopped 

Chipotle Crema : 
1. 1/4 cup Mexican table cream or sour cream 
2. 2-3 tablespoons of chipotle adobo sauce - depending on your spice level. 

Corn tortillas shallow pan fry or air fry for a healthy option

1. Make guacamole and set aside covered. 
2. Mix and make the chipotle crema - refrigerate 
3. Season shrimp. 
4. Add a bit of oil 3-4 tablespoons and shallow fry the corn tortillas to make tostadas and set aside. 
5. In the same pan with only 2 tablespoons of the oil cook the shrimp on medium heat. Cook shrimp flipping after one minute cooking both sides . Total cook time 2.5-3 minutes only. Do not overcook the shrimp it will be rubbery. Season with cilantro and half lime juice . Remove from heat. You can also cook in batches so that you are not steaming the shrimp.
6. Assemble the tostadas. 
7. Spread on the guacamole and top with the shrimp. 
8. Optional garnish - jalapeno slices, cotija cheese and chipotle crema.

caption:
Keto Avocado & Feta Stuffed Sweet Potato Boats
Ingredients (Serves 4)
2 medium sweet potatoes, halved lengthwise
1 avocado, sliced
1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tbsp sugar-free hot sauce
1 tsp smoked paprika
1/2 tsp garlic powder
Salt and black pepper to taste
1 tbsp chopped parsley or cilantro
Optional: sugar-free hot honey drizzle or chili oil
Instructions
Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Brush sweet potato halves with olive oil and season with paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Roast cut-side down for 30–35 minutes until tender and caramelized.
Flip the sweet potatoes and slightly mash the centers with a fork.
Top with avocado slices and crumbled feta cheese.
Drizzle with hot sauce or chili oil.
Garnish with parsley and serve warm.

caption:
💥EGGPLANT BREADWICH

This is another lowcarb bread hack thats ACTUALLY good and one of my favorites.

Makes two servings at 350 calories, 20g protein, and you can add chicken or steak to make the protein more substantial. But honestly, it was just as good without any of those - it gave me some serious Mediterranean food vibes with all these summer flavors.

If you want a low-carb sandwich that hits the spot, this one's for you. The cheese is actually baked into the eggplant, making a great flatbread like vessel that you can use to make your favorite lowcarb, keto-friendly sandwich. Top it up with whatever you want.

Full recipe below, and you can always comment "BREAD" and I'll send you my free mini lowcarb breadwhich ebook.

Here's how to make it (makes 2 servings):

1.Preheat your oven to 400F. Grab 1 large eggplant and thinly slice it using a knife, mandoline or vegetable peeler.

2.Season them with salt, lay the slices on a paper towel and pat them dry after 5 mins. 

3.Grab an oven-safe tray, line it with parchment paper, and sprinkle a thin layer (1 serving) of shredded cheese (ideally mozzarella) directly on the paper. Lay out your eggplant slices slightly overlapping to form a rectangle. then add another 2 servings of shredded cheese on top.

4.Pop it in the oven for 27-30 mins until the edges are golden and the cheese is crisp. Let it cool slightly.

5.I used 2 tbsp of pesto as the base, added 2oz of thinly sliced fresh mozzarella, a thinly sliced tomato, a handful of arugula, a couple of basil leaves, lots of fresh cracked pepper, and a nice drizzle of balsamic glaze.

6.Carefully roll it up tightly from the bottom, pressing gently as you go to keep everything compact. Then cut into it the middle like a sharp knife, and enjoy.

If you try this, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS.

And comment "BREAD" and I'll send you my free mini lowcarb breadwhich ebook.

ENJOY!

#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #healthyrecipes #keto #mediterraneanfood
summary: A low-carb eggplant and cheese flatbread recipe that serves as a sandwich base with Mediterranean toppings.

caption:
Veggie Terrine Recipe

A veggie terrine is a beautiful layered vegetable dish served chilled or warm — perfect for brunch, appetizers, or light lunches.

Ingredients
Vegetables
1 zucchini, thinly sliced
1 yellow squash, thinly sliced
2 carrots, thinly sliced or grated
1 red bell pepper, sliced
1 cup spinach
1 eggplant, thinly sliced
1 cup mushrooms, sautéed
Egg Mixture
4 eggs
1 cup ricotta or cream cheese
1/2 cup grated Parmesan
1/2 cup heavy cream or milk
2 garlic cloves, minced
1 tsp Italian seasoning
Salt and black pepper
Instructions
Prepare vegetables
Lightly roast or grill zucchini, squash, eggplant, carrots, and peppers until just tender.
Sauté mushrooms and spinach separately.
Prepare filling
In a bowl, whisk eggs, ricotta, Parmesan, cream, garlic, seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Assemble terrine
Line a loaf pan with parchment paper.
Layer vegetables in alternating colors.
Spoon a little egg mixture between layers.
Repeat until pan is full.
Bake
Cover with foil.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45–55 minutes un

caption:
If you need an easy sheet pan dinner idea make these chicken cauliflower steaks immediately. So simple, so flavorful and ready in under 45 minutes including bake time. And never ever skip the side salad with your meals🥰

Comment "LINK" and I'll send you everything I used in this video✨

Ingredients

2 white cauliflower heads
1½ pounds chicken breast, pounded thinly
Alternatively you can also use boneless chicken thighs

For the marinade
½ cup to ¾ cup olive oil
2 teaspoons paprika
2 teaspoons salt
1 teaspoon black pepper
1 teaspoon garlic powder
½ teaspoon cumin

For the salad
4 Persian cucumbers
2 Roma tomatoes
Optional jalapeño
½ red onion
1 bunch parsley

For the dressing
¼ cup tahini
⅓ cup fresh lemon juice
¼ cup olive oil
1 teaspoon salt
1–2 tablespoons water if needed to thin out the dressing

Instructions

Cut your cauliflower into about 1-inch thick steaks. I got about 3 cauliflower steaks from each cauliflower head. Save the leftover cauliflower pieces and either roast them with olive oil, salt and pepper or pickle them. Check out my pickle recipe from a previous reel.

Prepare the marinade by mixing together the olive oil and spices in a bowl. Place your cauliflower steaks directly onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper if desired and brush generously with the marinade.

Place your chicken cutlets into the same bowl with the remaining marinade and coat well. Lay each chicken cutlet directly over the cauliflower steaks. Don't worry if the chicken hangs over slightly, it will shrink a bit as it bakes. You can also trim the chicken to fit perfectly over each steak.

Bake in a preheated oven set at 375°F for about 25 minutes. After 25 minutes broil for an additional 5 minutes until beautifully golden.

While everything bakes prepare your salad. Chop the cucumbers, tomatoes, jalapeño, red onion and parsley and place into a large bowl.

Prepare the dressing in a jar and shake really well until smooth and creamy. Pour over the salad and toss.

Serve the chicken cauliflower steaks immediately with the fresh salad on the side and enjoy.

#sivanskitchen #easyrecipe #sheetpandinner #chicken #cauliflower
summary: Sheet pan chicken and cauliflower steaks with spiced marinade, served with tahini-dressed salad.

caption:
💥150 calorie Chicken Summer Rolls 

I love Vietnamese food and all the fresh flavors and love making these summer rolls. With the hotter weather coming and seeing @smaller_sam.pcos recently make some, I started craving these again big time.

These are super light, fresh, crunchy, and ridiculously satisfying. Just 90 calories each (without sauce) but even better with the peanut sauce below. As always, if you are prioritizing protein, you can swap out the shrimp for things like cooked chicken, tofu, or even steak would work great.

Here is how I made them:

🛒 Ingredients (Makes 8 Rolls)
-3/4lb chicken thighs seasoned per instructions below)
-8 Rice paper sheets (35 cals each, grab them at Asian grocery or online)
-A large handful of arugula or thinly sliced gem lettuce 
-1 Large red bell pepper, thinly sliced
-2 Persian cucumbers, thinly sliced
-1/2 large red onion, thinly sliced
-1 large avocado, thinly sliced
-Large handful of fresh cilantro

To make the Chicken:
1.Season 3/4lb chicken thighs with 1/2 tsp avocado oil, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tbsp soy sauce, salt, pepper, 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp onion powder, 1/2 tbsp dried parsley or cilantro, 1/4 tsp cayenne pepper. Mix well.

2. Pop into the oven at 400F for 32 mins, or airfry at 400F for 22 mins. 

How to Roll

1.Dip rice paper in warm water (just quick dunk!) and lay it out.
2.Add arugula, then your veggies, leaving space on the edges 
3.Fold bottom of rice paper up, pull tight and tuck it in.
4.Add 2-3 ounces of chicken, 2-3 thin avocado slices, and fresh cilantro.
5.Fold in the sides, then roll tight, mini burrito-style.
6.Repeat. This makes 8 rolls depending on how much you fill them up.

Optional Spicy Sriracha Sauce
3 tbsp mayo
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp rice vinegar
1 tbsp soy sauce
2.5 tbsp sriracha sauce
1 heaping tsp honey
Salt & pepper

And if you make them, let me know on SHREDHAPPENS. ENJOY!
.

.

caption:
Roasted Carrot, Pumpkin, and Sweet Potato Bake
Prep time: 15 minutes | Cook time: 55–60 minutes | Servings: 6 (Side Dish)

Ingredients
The Vegetable Base

3 large Carrots, thinly sliced or sliced on a bias

2 cups Pumpkin or butternut squash, peeled and cubed or sliced

2 medium Sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed or sliced

2–3 tbsp Olive oil

Seasoning: 1 tsp salt, ½ tsp black pepper, and 1 tsp dried thyme or rosemary

Optional: A pinch of cinnamon, nutmeg, or paprika

The Toppings

¾ cup (120g) Feta cheese, crumbled

½ cup Almonds, toasted and roughly chopped or sliced

Garnish: Fresh rosemary sprigs or fresh thyme

Maple Cranberry Glaze

½ cup Cranberry sauce or dried cranberries

2 tbsp Maple syrup or honey

1 tbsp Balsamic vinegar or lemon juice

1–2 tbsp Water, to thin if necessary

Instructions
Prep and Season: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Toss the carrots, pumpkin, and sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, pepper, and dried herbs in a large bowl until evenly coated.

Roast: Arrange the vegetables in a greased baking dish. Cover with foil and bake for 35 minutes. Remove the foil and bake for another 15–20 minutes until the vegetables are tender and edges are caramelized.

Prepare the Glaze: While roasting, combine the cranberry sauce, maple syrup, and balsamic vinegar in a saucepan over medium-low heat. Simmer for 5–7 minutes until smooth and glossy.

Assemble: Remove the dish from the oven and sprinkle with crumbled feta and toasted almonds. Return to the oven for 5 minutes to soften the cheese.

Drizzle and Serve: Drizzle the warm maple cranberry glaze generously over the bake. Garnish with fresh herbs and a final crack of black pepper.

Note: This savory-sweet vegetable gratin serves as a festive holiday side or a hearty vegetarian main.
summary: A roasted carrot, pumpkin, and sweet potato bake with feta, almonds, and maple cranberry glaze.

caption:
Sweet Potato Rounds with Beet, Burrata, and Pesto
Prep time: 15 minutes | Cook time: 20–25 minutes | Servings: 4–6 (Appetizer)

Ingredients
The Base & Root Layer

2 large Sweet potatoes, sliced into ½-inch rounds

2–3 medium Beets (pre-roasted or canned), sliced into rounds

As needed: Olive oil, sea salt, and black pepper

The Toppings

2 balls Fresh Burrata cheese, torn into pieces

½ cup Basil or walnut-sage pesto

½ cup Toasted walnut halves

Instructions
Roast the Rounds: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Toss the sweet potato and beet rounds (if using fresh) in olive oil, salt, and pepper.

Bake: Roast on a baking sheet for 20–25 minutes, flipping halfway through, until the sweet potatoes are tender and lightly caramelized.

Prepare the Burrata: While the vegetables cool slightly, carefully tear the Burrata. Let it sit at room temperature to ensure it is extra creamy for serving.

Assemble: On a serving platter, place a sweet potato round as the base. Top with a beet slice, followed by a piece of Burrata.

Final Touch: Spoon a dollop of pesto over the cheese and crown each stack with a toasted walnut.

Serve: This appetizer is best served slightly warm or at room temperature to maintain the best consistency of the Burrata.

Note: This sophisticated dish layers earthy root vegetables with creamy cheese and a punchy herb sauce for a vibrant flavor profile.
summary: A layered appetizer recipe combining roasted sweet potato and beet rounds with burrata cheese, pesto, and toasted walnuts.

caption:
Mediterranean Grilled Chicken and Hummus Platter
Prep time: 40 minutes (includes marinating) | Cook time: 12 minutes | Servings: 4

Ingredients
The Grilled Chicken

1.5 lbs Chicken breasts or thighs, pounded thin

3 tbsp Olive oil

Juice of 1 Lemon

3 cloves Garlic, minced

1 tbsp Dried oregano

To taste: Salt and black pepper

The Herbs & Assembly

1 cup Smooth hummus (homemade or store-bought)

1 cup Feta cheese, crumbled and dusted with paprika

1 English cucumber, sliced into rounds

1 cup Cherry tomatoes, halved

½ cup Kalamata olives, pitted

4 pieces Pita bread, cut into triangles

¼ cup Fresh parsley, finely chopped

2 tbsp Extra virgin olive oil, for drizzling

Instructions
Marinate and Grill the Chicken: Whisk the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Add the chicken, coat thoroughly, and marinate for at least 30 minutes.

Cook: Heat a grill pan or outdoor grill to medium-high heat. Grill the chicken for 5 to 6 minutes per side until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).

Rest and Slice: Transfer the chicken to a cutting board, let it rest for 5 minutes, and then slice into thick strips.

Prep the Sides: Slice the cucumbers, halve the cherry tomatoes, and cut the pita bread. Prepare the feta cheese in a bowl with a light dusting of smoked paprika.

Assemble the Platter: Spread the hummus in a large circular swirl in the center of a wooden board. Use a spoon to create a well and pour in 1–2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil.

Arrange: Place the sliced chicken and pita triangles on one side of the platter. Fill the remaining sections with the feta, olives, tomatoes, and cucumbers.

Final Touch: Scatter the fresh parsley over the chicken and hummus before serving.
summary: A Mediterranean grilled chicken and hummus platter recipe with marinated chicken, fresh vegetables, feta, and pita bread.

caption:
Mediterranean Sheet Pan Chicken & Pepper Roast

Ingredients:
*Main:* 1.5 lbs chicken breast cut into strips, 2 red bell peppers sliced, 2 green bell peppers sliced, 1 large onion sliced, 3 tbsp extra-virgin olive oil 
*Spices:* 1 tbsp smoked paprika, 2 tsp dried oregano, 1 ½ tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp sea salt, ¾ tsp black pepper, ½ tsp chili flakes 
*Finish:* 2 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tsp lemon zest, 2 tbsp fresh parsley chopped

Method:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Line sheet pan with foil.
2. Toss chicken, peppers, and onion with olive oil, paprika, oregano, garlic powder, cumin, salt, pepper, and chili flakes until coated.
3. Spread in single layer on sheet pan. Roast 20-22 min, tossing halfway, until chicken is cooked and vegetables are charred.
4. Drizzle with lemon juice, sprinkle lemon zest and parsley. Toss and serve hot.
summary: A sheet pan roasted chicken breast with bell peppers and onions seasoned with Mediterranean spices and finished with lemon and parsley.

caption:
Shrimp & Avocado Bowls with Mango Salsa & Lime Chili Sauce 🥭🍤✨

Ingredients

For the shrimp
1 lb (450g) shrimp, peeled & deveined
1 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp paprika
1/2 tsp chili powder
1/2 tsp garlic powder
Salt & black pepper to taste
Juice of 1/2 lime

For the mango salsa
1 ripe mango, diced
1/4 red onion, finely chopped
1/2 red bell pepper, diced
1 tbsp fresh cilantro, chopped
Juice of 1 lime
Pinch of salt

For the lime chili sauce
1/4 cup Greek yogurt or mayo
1 tbsp lime juice
1–2 tsp chili sauce or sriracha
1 tsp honey
Pinch of salt

For the bowls
2 cups cooked rice, quinoa, or greens
1 avocado, sliced
Extra cilantro & lime wedges for garnish

Instructions

In a bowl, combine shrimp with olive oil, paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice until evenly coated.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and cook shrimp for 2–3 minutes per side until pink and fully cooked, then set aside.

In another bowl, mix mango, red onion, bell pepper, cilantro, lime juice, and a pinch of salt to prepare the salsa.

For the sauce, whisk together yogurt (or mayo), lime juice, chili sauce, honey, and salt until smooth.

To assemble, add rice or greens to a bowl, then layer with shrimp, avocado slices, and mango salsa.
Drizzle with lime chili sauce and finish with cilantro and lime wedges.

Serving tip
Enjoy right away for the best flavor—the mix of warm shrimp, creamy avocado, and fresh, sweet salsa is amazing 😍

Pro tip
For a smoky twist, grill the shrimp or lightly char the mango instead of cooking in a pan 🔥

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie #shrimpandavocadobowls
summary: Recipe for shrimp and avocado bowls with mango salsa and lime chili sauce.

caption:
Misal Pav : This was my lunch every day in college 😅

Misal pav is a popular Maharashtrian street food of sprouts curry topped with onions, Lime, farsan (fried savory mixture) coriander leaves and served with a side of soft pav (Indian dinner rolls). The sprouts curry is made from moth bean sprouts. This misal recipe is a tasty and filling vegan dish that can be served as breakfast, lunch or brunch.
This was my favorite thing to eat during college days. I think I eat almost every day :)

1 Big Onion
2 medium Tomatoes
Curry Leaves
Blend together:-
7-8 cloves of garlic
2 inch piece of ginger
3-4 Tablespoons grated coconut
2-3 green chilies
Dry Masala:-
1 & 1/2 tsp Red chili Powder
1 & 1/2 tsp Turmeric
2 tsp coriander powder
1 & 1/2 tsp misal masala / Goda masala
Salt per taste
For Garnishing:-Chopped onion
Cilantro
Lime / Lemon

caption:
Sheet Pan Kebabs (So Easy & Delicious)

Kebab Ingredients:
2 lb ground beef
1 small white onion, grated
3 garlic cloves, minced
¼ cup fresh dill, chopped
¼ cup fresh parsley, chopped
Zest of ½ lemon
Pinch of black pepper
Pinch of salt
1 tbsp cumin
1 tbsp smoked paprika
1 tsp coriander
¼ tsp cinnamon

Yogurt Sauce:
¾ cup Greek Yogurt
Juice of ½ lemon
1.5 tbsp Olive oil
1 tsp Date syrup
Pinch of salt
Pinch of black pepper
Parsley, freshly chopped
Dill, freshly chopped

Directions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425F.
2. Add all kebab ingredients to a large bowl and mix with your hands. Once thoroughly
mixed in, spray a sheet pan with avocado or olive oil, then toss the meat onto it and
press the meat evenly across making a rough rectangle. It should be about ½-¾ inch
thick.
3. Score long vertical lines almost to the bottom (don't cut through), both vertically and
horizontally creating your kebabs. Bake for 20–22 mins.
4. While they bake in the oven, combine all your yogurt sauce ingredients in a bowl until it
becomes a creamy consistency.
5. Remove the kebabs from the oven. Spoon out excess liquid, mix with 1 tbsp tomato
paste, and brush over kebabs. Broil for 2-3 mins until browned.
6. 7. Let rest a few minutes, then cut along the score lines
Enjoy as delicious wrap with the yogurt sauce, tomatoes, and lettuce, or eat as is with the sauce.
summary: Sheet pan kebab recipe with spiced ground beef and yogurt-dill sauce, baked and broiled on one pan.

caption:
Crispy Garlic Parmesan Roasted Cauliflower

Ingredients
The Cauliflower: 1 large head of cauliflower (cut into uniform florets), 3 tbsp extra-virgin olive oil, ½ cup Parmesan cheese (grated, divided), 1 tsp garlic powder, ½ tsp onion powder, ½ tsp paprika, ½ tsp kosher salt, ¼ tsp black pepper, 2 tbsp fresh chives or parsley (chopped).

Creamy Dipping Sauce: ½ cup sour cream or plain Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp mayonnaise, 1 clove garlic (minced), 1 tbsp fresh lemon juice, 1 tbsp grated Parmesan cheese, pinch of salt and black pepper.

Instructions
Prep: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C) and line a large rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Wash the cauliflower florets and pat them completely dry with a towel.

Season: Place florets in a large bowl, drizzle with olive oil, and toss to coat. In a small bowl, mix the garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Sprinkle the spices and half of the Parmesan cheese over the cauliflower, tossing well to coat.

First Roast: Spread the florets onto the prepared baking sheet in a flat, single layer without overcrowding. Roast for 15–20 minutes.

Add Cheese & Crisp: Remove the sheet from the oven, flip the florets over, and sprinkle the remaining Parmesan cheese evenly across the top. Return to the oven for an additional 8–10 minutes until the edges are deeply golden and caramelized.

Make Sauce: While roasting, whisk together the sour cream, mayonnaise, minced garlic, lemon juice, Parmesan, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until completely smooth. Chill until ready to serve.

Finish: Pile the hot cauliflower onto a plate, drizzle with a few spoonfuls of the creamy sauce, and scatter fresh chopped chives or parsley over the top. Serve immediately with the remaining sauce on the side.

#mediterraneandiet #mediterraneanrecipes #usafood
summary: Recipe for crispy garlic Parmesan roasted cauliflower with a creamy dipping sauce.

caption:
💪🏼 HIGH PROTEIN CHICKEN & RICE POWER SKILLET 🍋

460 calories • 58g protein • 4 whopping servings!

A simple & clean go-to healthy meal that also happens to taste amazing 🤤 Macros are without the skin, but we prefer to cook with the skin on for max juiciness, then remove it before eating!

Here's what you'll need:

•5 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs 
•3 tsp olive oil, divided
•1 tbsp onion powder & dried oregano
•1 tsp sweet paprika
•zest & juice of 1 lemon
•4 garlic cloves, minced
•1 bag Kaizen high protein rice
•⅓ cup bone broth
•½ red onion, finely diced
• salt & Pepper

Express Pickled Onions
•½ red onion, very thinly sliced
•juice of 1 lemon
•3 tbsp finely chopped parsley
•salt

Herby Yogurt Spread
•1 cup thick Greek yogurt 
•1 tsp olive oil
•Juice of ½ lemon
•2 tbsp finely chopped mint & 2 tbsp parsley 
•1 garlic clove, minced
•salt & pepper

Here's how to make it:

1️⃣ Add chicken to a bowl. Drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil & season with salt, pepper, onion powder, oregano, & paprika. Add lemon zest + juice, and garlic. Toss well. Marinate 1-6 hrs if you can. If not, go straight to cooking

2️⃣ Preheat oven to 400°F. Heat a skillet over medium heat with 1 tsp olive oil. Cook chicken skin-side down for 8 mins, flip, and cook another 8 mins. Remove to a plate

4️⃣ In the same skillet, add bone broth & diced onion. Simmer 4–5 mins, scraping up the browned bits. Cook 1 bag of Kaizen rice according to package. Or use 4 servings of white or brown rice. Stir in cooked rice & nestle chicken on top

5️⃣ Transfer to oven and bake 15–20 mins until chicken is fully cooked

6️⃣ Make pickled onions by tossing onion with lemon juice, salt, and parsley. Let sit for 5 mins & toss again

7️⃣ Mix yogurt with 1 tsp olive oil, lemon juice, mint, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper

8️⃣ Remove skillet from oven and finish with dollops of yogurt sauce, pickled onions, & fresh parsley

ENJOY!

#healthyrecipes #proteinrecipes #mediterraneanfood #lowcarb #highprotein
summary: A high-protein Mediterranean chicken and rice skillet recipe with lemon, garlic, pickled onions, and herby yogurt sauce.

caption:
Coconut chia pudding with mango✨

My debut cookbook is officially out now! Order with the link in my bio or search for Maxi's Kitchen wherever you like to buy books.

▪️1 x 14 oz. Can Full-fat Coconut Milk▪️1/2 Cup Milk of Choice (or water)▪️1/4 Cup Chia Seeds▪️1 Tbsp + 1 tsp Maple Syrup▪️Pinch of Kosher Salt▪️1 Mango, peeled and sliced▪️Toasted Sesame Seeds (optional)▪️

1️⃣ In a medium bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, milk, chia seeds, maple syrup, and salt. Taste and add more maple syrup if you'd like it sweeter.
2️⃣ Cover and refrigerate for 30 mins. Stir well to break up any clumps of chia seeds, then return to the refrigerator for at least 3 more hours or overnight, until thickened.
3️⃣ Before serving, peel the mango using a vegetable peeler and slice off the cheeks around the pit. Cut into thin slices.
4️⃣ Stir the chia pudding and spoon into bowls. Top with mango and a sprinkle of sesame seeds, if using. Enjoy! 

The coconut chia pudding will keep in the refrigerator for up to 5 days. Slice the mango fresh and add it just before serving.

⏲5 minute prep time + 3 hour inactive time

Recipe serves 4-6

caption:
Our teenage athletes are always asking us to make sweet treats that are high in protein, but that don't taste it… These are it! 

We are huge fans of @bakedbymelissa and if you follow her, you know she's made this 10 times in the last week so naturally we had to try it! It did not disappoint! 

Strawberry Chia Yogurt Pudding Cups

* Calories: ~300–320
* Protein: ~14–15g
* Carbs: ~27–30g
* Fiber: ~7g
* Fat: ~15–17g

Ingredients

* 2 pounds fresh strawberries, puréed
* 24–32 oz full-fat Greek yogurt
* ½ cup canned coconut milk or coconut cream (optional)
* 1/2–1 cup chia seeds (up to you!)
* 1–3 tsp vanilla @vanillabeanproject 
* Maple syrup, to taste @runamokmaple 
* Chocolate chips, for topping
* Flaky sea salt (optional)

Instructions

1. In a large bowl, combine the puréed strawberries, Greek yogurt, and optional coconut milk or coconut cream until smooth.
2. Add vanilla extract and maple syrup to taste, depending on how sweet you'd like it.
3. Stir in the chia seeds until fully combined.
4. Pour the mixture into glasses or jars, filling almost to the top.
5. Microwave the chocolate chips in 20–30 second intervals, stirring between each round until melted and smooth.
6. Pour a very thin layer of melted chocolate across the top of each glass to create a shell. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt if desired.
7. Refrigerate the glasses for about 30 minutes, or until the chia seeds thicken and the chocolate shell is set.

Enjoy straight from the fridge! #latenight #regatta #chiaseeds #dessert #easydessert
summary: High-protein strawberry chia yogurt pudding cups with chocolate shell, designed for teenage athletes.

caption:
Rainbow Vegetable Stir-Fry
A quick, vibrant dish featuring a colorful mix of crisp-tender vegetables coated in a savory, semi-sweet garlic soy glaze.

Ingredients
Stir-Fry Vegetables

1 cup broccoli florets, cut small

1 cup cremini or white button mushrooms, sliced

½ cup sugar snap peas or snow peas

½ cup canned baby corn, cut into bite-sized pieces

½ cup red bell pepper, chopped

½ cup yellow bell pepper, chopped

½ cup red onion, cut into thick wedges

½ cup cherry or grape tomatoes, halved

1 tbsp fresh ginger, minced

3 cloves garlic, minced

2 tbsp avocado oil or vegetable oil

1 tbsp toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions (for garnish)

Glossy Stir-Fry Sauce

¼ cup soy sauce (or tamari)

2 tbsp water or vegetable broth

1 tbsp honey or maple syrup

1 tsp sesame oil

1 tsp cornstarch

Instructions
Whisk Sauce: Whisk soy sauce, water, honey, sesame oil, and cornstarch in a small bowl until the cornstarch dissolves completely.

Heat Pan: Heat oil in a large wok or deep skillet over high heat until shimmering hot.

Sauté Base Veggies: Add broccoli and red onion. Stir-fry constantly for 2–3 minutes until slightly softened but still bright.

Add Remaining Veggies: Toss in mushrooms, bell peppers, snap peas, and baby corn. Stir-fry for 2–3 minutes until crisp-tender.

Add Aromatics: Clear a small well in the center of the pan. Drop in garlic, ginger, and tomatoes. Sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant, then toss with the rest of the veggies.

Glaze: Stir the sauce mixture quickly and pour it over the vegetables. Stir-fry for 1–2 minutes until the sauce simmers, clears, and thickens into a shiny glaze.

Serve: Remove from heat immediately. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions. Serve hot over jasmine rice or noodles.
summary: A colorful vegetable stir-fry with a savory-sweet garlic soy glaze, ready in minutes.

caption:
Loaded sweet potatoes 🍠 

Ingredients 

4 medium sweet potatoes
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp salt
2 tbsp butter 

For the filling.
1 lb minced/ground beef
1 small onion, diced
4 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp smoked paprika powder 
2 tbsp tomato paste
1 diced jalapeño,optional 
1 cup spinach 
Salt & black pepper
Oil for cooking

To assemble 
1 cup shredded cheddar cheese
Sour cream or Greek yogurt
Green onions or cilantro for topping

Instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Wash and dry the sweet potatoes.
Rub with oil and sprinkle with salt.
Place on a baking tray and bake for 45–60 minutes, until soft and tender.

Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add oil once hot. 
Add the minced beef and cook for 4–5 minutes, breaking it apart.
Add diced onion and cook until softened.
Stir in garlic and jalapeño add,
cumin, smoked paprika, salt & black pepper
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1–2 minutes. Add some water and cook until it is fully cooked. Then, add the spinach and cook until it wilts.

Slice the baked sweet potatoes open lengthwise. Add 1/2 tsp butter in each potato. Lightly mash the inside with a fork. Spoon the beef filling into each potato.
Top generously with shredded cheddar cheese. Return to oven for 10-15 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.

Top with sour cream or Greek yogurt, green onions or cilantro. Serve warm

caption:
Zucchini Pizza Casserole Recipe

Ingredients
4 medium zucchinis, sliced into thin rounds
1 teaspoon salt
1 tablespoon olive oil
1 small onion, chopped
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 cup pizza sauce or marinara sauce
2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese
½ cup grated parmesan cheese
1 cup cooked ground beef or turkey (optional)
½ cup sliced pepperoni
1 teaspoon Italian seasoning
½ teaspoon black pepper
½ teaspoon chili flakes (optional)
Fresh basil or parsley for garnish

Instructions
1. Prepare the zucchini
Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F).
Place sliced zucchini in a bowl and sprinkle with salt.
Let it sit for about 10–15 minutes to release extra water.
Pat dry with paper towels.
2. Cook the filling
Heat olive oil in a pan.
Add onion and cook until soft.
Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
If using meat, add cooked ground beef or turkey.
Stir in pizza sauce, Italian seasoning, black pepper, and chili flakes.
3. Assemble the casserole
Grease a baking dish.
Spread half of the zucchini slices on the bottom.
Add half of the sauce mixture.
Sprinkle mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
Repeat layers.
Top with pepperoni slices and extra cheese.
4. Bake
Bake uncovered for 25–30 minutes until bubbly and golden.
For a crispier top, broil for 2–3 minutes at the end.

5. Serve
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with fresh basil or parsley.

#usafoodie #mediterraneandiet #zucchinipizzacasserole
summary: A layered zucchini and pizza-flavored casserole with mozzarella, parmesan, and optional meat, baked until golden.

caption:
Citrus Beet & Avocado Glow Salad
Vibrant Citrus Beet Salad with Creamy Avocado and Honey Citrus Dressing
Recipe

Ingredients:

For the Salad:

3 medium beets, cooked and sliced
1 ripe avocado, sliced or cubed
2 oranges, peeled and segmented
2 tablespoons fresh parsley or cilantro, chopped
1 tablespoon green onion, sliced (optional)

Citrus Dressing:

2 tablespoons olive oil
1 tablespoon orange juice
1 tablespoon lemon juice
1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
Salt and black pepper to taste

Directions:

Cook the beets until tender, then allow them to cool before slicing.
Peel and segment the oranges, removing any seeds and excess membrane.
Slice or cube the avocado just before assembling the salad.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, orange juice, lemon juice, honey or maple syrup, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Arrange the sliced beets, orange segments, and avocado on a serving platter or salad bowl.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley or cilantro and green onion if using.
Drizzle the citrus dressing evenly over the salad.
Serve immediately while fresh and vibrant.
