caption:
Homestyle Tandoori Chicken 🍗🧄🌶️

This oven baked tandoori chicken is what weeknight dreams are made of 🔥

Serve it with naan, rice, or a fresh kachumber salad, raita and you've got a feast without the fuss ❤️

RECIPE ⬇️
Ingredients 
1 kg chicken thigh fillets 

First Marinade (15-30mins)
2 tbsp ginger and garlic paste or chopped
Juice of 1 lemon
Salt to taste 

Second Marinade (min 30 mins - overnight)
2 tbsp mustard oil (otherwise use Ghee/melted butter or other neutral oils)
1-2 tsp Kashmiri chilli powder 
1 tsp cumin powder (roasted if possible)
2 tsp coriander powder 
1 tsp Amchur powder or chaat masala (optional) 
1/2 tsp pepper 
1 tsp turmeric powder
2 tsp garam masala 
1/3 cup Greek or thick yoghurt 
1 tbsp ginger garlic paste 
Handful of mint leaves
1 tsp kasoori methi (dried fenugreek leaves)
Salt to taste 
Fresh coriander for garnish
Butter for brushing 

Method:
Add in all the ingredients for the first marinade and massage the chicken thighs along with the ingredients. Keep aside for atleast 15 mins.

Mix together all the ingredients for the second marinade (check seasoning before adding to the chicken) and add it to the chicken and keep aside for minimum 30 mins. 

Preheat your oven to 175 C.

On a greased surface cook the chicken in the oven for about 15-20 mins until cooked through. 
Brush with some melted butter and drizzle some chopped coriander on top. 

#indianfood #delicious #tandoorichicken #chicken #foodie
summary: Homestyle oven-baked tandoori chicken recipe with two-stage marinade and serving suggestions.

caption:
Mediterranean Lentil Salad

⏱ Prep Time: 15 minutes
🔥 Cook Time: 20 minutes
🍽 Servings: 4

🛒 Ingredients
1 cup dried lentils (green or brown)
3 cups water
½ tsp salt

1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
½ cucumber, diced
¼ cup red onion, finely sliced
¼ cup Kalamata olives
¼ cup feta cheese, crumbled
2 tbsp fresh parsley, chopped

Dressing:
3 tbsp olive oil
1½ tbsp lemon juice
1 clove garlic, minced
1 tsp dried oregano
½ tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper

👩‍🍳 Instructions

1️⃣ Cook lentils:
Rinse lentils and place in a pot with water and salt. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15–20 minutes until tender but not mushy. Drain and let cool.

2️⃣ Prepare vegetables:
In a large bowl, combine cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, and olives.

3️⃣ Add lentils:
Add cooled lentils to the bowl and mix gently.

4️⃣ Make dressing:
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and black pepper.

5️⃣ Combine:
Pour dressing over the salad and toss until evenly coated.

6️⃣ Add feta & garnish:
Sprinkle feta cheese and fresh parsley on top.

7️⃣ Serve:
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

💡 Tips

• Don't overcook lentils — keep them firm for best texture
• Add avocado or roasted veggies for variation
• Great for meal prep — stays fresh for 3–4 days
• Healthy, protein-rich, and full of Mediterranean flavor 🥗✨
#usafoodie #mediterraneandiet #mediterraneanlentilsalad
summary: A Mediterranean lentil salad recipe with cherry tomatoes, cucumber, olives, feta, and lemon-oregano dressing.

caption:
💋 KISS MY GREEK GODDESS POWER BOWL

(High-Protein • Belly-Fat Burning • Women Over 40 Approved)

This is your…
"I want something fresh, filling, and actually works for fat loss" bowl.

No bun.
No bloat.
No afternoon crash.

Just lean protein, hormone-friendly fats, and flavor that hits like a vacation in Greece 🇬🇷✨

🛒 INGREDIENTS

💪 Protein Patties (aka your metabolism magic)
	•	1 lb lean ground turkey (or chicken)
	•	1 cup fresh spinach, chopped
	•	½ cup feta cheese
	•	2 cloves garlic, minced
	•	1 tsp oregano
	•	½ tsp cumin
	•	Salt + pepper
	•	1 tbsp olive oil (for cooking)

🥗 Bowl Base (aka volume without the calories)
	•	2 cups romaine or mixed greens
	•	1 cup cherry tomatoes
	•	1 cucumber, sliced
	•	½ red onion, thinly sliced
	•	½ cup kalamata olives (optional but boujee)
	•	Optional: ½ cup quinoa or brown rice (if you need extra carbs)

🥄 Creamy Tzatziki Glow Sauce
	•	½ cup plain Greek yogurt (hello protein boost 👀)
	•	1 tbsp olive oil
	•	1 tbsp lemon juice
	•	1 clove garlic
	•	1 tbsp fresh dill (or 1 tsp dried)
	•	Salt + pepper

👩‍🍳 INSTRUCTIONS

1. Build your patties:
Mix turkey, spinach, feta, garlic, and spices.
Don't overmix…we're making juicy, not hockey pucks.

2. Shape it up:
Form into 4–6 patties.

3. Cook:
Pan + olive oil + medium heat.
Cook 5–6 minutes per side until golden and cooked through.

4. Sauce it like a boss:
Mix all sauce ingredients until smooth and creamy.

5. Assemble your masterpiece:
Greens first → veggies → patties → drizzle that sauce like you mean it.

🔥 MACROS (per serving – approx, 4 servings)
	•	Calories: ~380–420
	•	Protein: 35–40g
	•	Carbs: 10–18g (lower without rice/quinoa)
	•	Fat: 18–22g

💋 KISS TIP 

This bowl hits the trifecta
✔ High protein → builds muscle + boosts metabolism
✔ Healthy fats → supports hormones
✔ Low sugar → no insulin rollercoaster

caption:
HIGH-PROTEIN + PLANT-BASED 🌿 CREAMY ZITI & BROCCOLI

When @robinnyc and @shredhappens come together to make a recipe, you just know it's gonna be good 🙌 You can find this recipe and lots more like it in Robins new high-protein, plant-based cookbook Eat To Hustle featuring yours truly, @kaizenfoodco pasta 🍝

396 CALORIES • 46G PROTEIN • 30G FIBER and makes 6 delicious servings!

Here's how to make it:

1️⃣ Preheat oven to 350F. Spread 1 (15.5oz) can of drained and rinsed chickpeas out on paper towels and pat dry, then transfer them to a rimmed baking sheet. Bake until golden brown and dry, about 50 mins. Remove from oven and let cool, but don't turn off the oven!

2️⃣ In a food processor, add the cooled chickpeas, 1 tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp dried oregano, ½ tsp kosher salt, and ½ tsp red pepper flakes (optional). Pulse 6-8 times to get fine crumbs. Return the crumbs to the same baking sheet and bake for 10 more mins. Turn the oven off and let the crumbs cool on the pain in the oven, about 1 hour.

3️⃣ Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Boil the Kaizen Ziti pasta for 4 mins (about 2 mins less than recommended cook time. 2 mins before the pasta is done, add 1 (16oz) bag of frozen broccoli to the pot. Drain the pasta and broccoli, return to the pot.

4️⃣ Add 1 (16oz) plain vegan Greek yogurt, 1/2 cup nutritional yeast, the zest & juice of 1 lemon, and 2 tsp of salt. Stir to completely coat the pasta in the sauce. Taste for seasoning. Sprinkle the chickpea breadcrumbs on top and serve immediately.

ENJOY!

#plantbasedrecipes #lowcarb #proteinrecipes #healthyrecipes #highprotein
summary: High-protein plant-based creamy ziti and broccoli recipe with roasted chickpea breadcrumbs, featuring Kaizen pasta.

caption:
Chicken Kofta Kebabs Recipe
Ingredients
For the Kebabs:
500g (1.1 lbs) minced chicken (breast or thigh)
1 small onion, grated and water strained
2 tbsp minced garlic and 1/2-inch piece of ginger
1/2 cup finely chopped red capsicum (bell pepper)
1/4 cup fresh coriander (cilantro) and fresh mint, finely chopped
Optional: Grated zucchini (200g) or carrot (100g) for extra moisture
Spices: Salt, red chili powder, cumin, and garlic powder to taste
For the Creamy Herb Sauce:
1 cup plain yogurt
1/2 cup fresh mint and 1/4 cup cilantro
Juice of 1 lemon
1 clove garlic, minced
Salt and optional green chili for heat 
Instructions
Prepare the Mixture: In a large bowl, combine the minced chicken, strained onion, garlic, ginger, chopped capsicum, and fresh herbs. Add your spices and mix thoroughly until just combined.
Shape the Kebabs: Form the mixture into approximately 10 small oval or round patties.
Cook: Heat a small amount of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Fry the patties for 5–8 minutes per side until they are golden brown and cooked through. Alternatively, you can air-fry or bake them.
Make the Sauce: Combine yogurt, lemon juice, herbs, and garlic in a blender or food processor. Pulse until smooth.
Serve: Serve the hot kebabs with the creamy sauce and a side of diced bell peppers

#mediterraneandiet #mediterraneanrecipes #usafoodie
summary: Recipe for chicken kofta kebabs with a creamy herb yogurt sauce, including preparation and cooking instructions.

caption:
🍯HIGH PROTEIN BAJA HOT HONEY CHICKEN BOWL

Macros per serving: 485 calories, 47g protein, 8 net carbs using my @kaizenfoodco lowcarb rice or 555 cals and 31 grams protein using white rice.
�This is a super high protein meal that hits all the right spots. Its a little sweet, a little spicy with all the right creamy and crunchy textures.

I used my high protein Kaizen rice here, but use regular rice, quinoa, cauliflower rice depending on your goals.

Ingredients:
1lb (~2.5 cups) grilled or air-fried chicken, diced up
1/4 cup sugar-free honey (or use regular honey)�2 tbsp sriracha sauce
1 tbsp rice vinegar
1 tbsp soy sauce

1 cup thinly shredded green cabbage
1/2 red onion, super thinly sliced
2-3 tbsp chopped cilantro
1 smallavocado, sliced

1 carton (8oz) Kaizen lowcarb rice (or regular rice)

Chipotle Lime Protein Crema:
1/2 cup greek yogurt
2 tbsp mayo
2 limes, juiced
1/2 tbsp chili lime seasoning
1/2 tsp chipotle powder
Salt & pepper, to taste

Here is how to make it:

1.For the hot honey: Use a bottled one, or make my macro-friendly one: Add 1/4 cup sugarfree honey, 2 tbsp sriracha, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, and 1 tbsp soy sauce to a pan on low heat. Stir or about a min until combined.

2.Add 2 cups cooked chicken (or rotisserie) to a bowl and dice. Toss your diced chicken in the sauce until fully coated.

3.Make the slaw: combine shredded cabbage, red onion, and chopped cilantro in a bowl. Make sure its super thinly sliced, this is important.

4.Make the protein crema: Mix the yogurt, mayo, lime juice, seasonings, and spices until smooth. Add half of it to the slaw and toss. We'll use the other half to drizzle later.

5.Cook up your base. I used my Kaizen lowcarb rice, but regular rice, quinoa, or cauliflower rice are all great options here!

6.Then build your bowl with rice, chicken, slaw, avocado, and any toppings you like.

7.Drizzle some more crema, sprinkle sesame seeds, top with extra herbs & ENJOY!

If you love this, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS! I share easy, high protein recipes that are mostly lowcarb, mediterranean, and so good!
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #highproteinmeals #healthyrecipes #goodmoodfood
summary: High-protein Baja hot honey chicken bowl with spicy sriracha-honey sauce, crispy slaw, and chipotle-lime crema.

caption:
🍋EASY LEMONY CHICKEN.
.
Follow @shredhappens for more easy lowcarb recipes 👊🏻
.
And let's be real, this tangy + lemony chicken is going to be your new favorite weeknight meal- it comes out so juicy and flavorful - and the good news is, you could technically make it all in one pan if you wanted for ultimate convenience. It's one of my most favorite creations yet.
.
Here is how I made it:
.
1.Grab 2lbs bone-in chicken thighs. I like using bone-in because it has more flavor and comes out more juicy, but you can use boneless too.
.
2.Season the thighs with sea salt, pepper, 1-2 tablespoons olive oil.
.
3.Then to add maximum flavor, we are going to load up on some super flavorful ingredients. Top the chicken with 1 finely diced shallot, about 2 tablespoons fresh dill, 4 minced garlic cloves, the zest and juice of 1 large lemon, 1.5 tablespoons Dijon mustard, and optional, 2 tablespoons of fresh pecorino or cheese of choice. You can keep it dairy free if you'd like, cheese is completely optional.
.
4.Massage everything well into the chicken, then put in an oven safe dish that will gather up all the juices at the bottom - these are going to be amazing. Then squeeze another half a lemon and put in a preheated 425F oven for 35-40 minutes. Check in on it at about 35 minutes and if you'd like, you can baste it with the drippings. put back in the oven at 450F for 5-7 more minutes.
.
5.Remove from the oven, plate it up, top it with the pan drippings, top with fresh herbs of choice, and devour.
.
If you make it, be sure to let me know what you think!!
.
ENJOY!
.
.
.
#chickenrecipes #chicken #lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #onepanmeal #keto #ketorecipes #healthyrecipes #goodmoodfood #healthyfoodshare
summary: A baked lemon and herb chicken thigh recipe made in one pan with fresh dill, garlic, and Dijon mustard.

caption:
This why I don't trust everybody at the cookout… I've seen how some of y'all treat sweet potatoes. This how they supposed to look… caramelized, rich, and doing something. Respectfully. 🤌🏾🎨

Caramelized Baked Sweet Potatoes

Ingredients

4 medium sweet potatoes, cleaned
1/3 cup olive oil
2 tbsp maple syrup
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp black pepper
1/2 tsp cinnamon
1/2 tsp vanilla extract

Instructions

Grab 3–4 medium sweet potatoes and slice them lengthwise, right down the middle.

In a bowl, combine the olive oil, maple syrup, cinnamon, salt, pepper, and vanilla extract. Whisk everything together until it forms a smooth, lightly thickened mixture.

Add the sweet potatoes to the bowl and coat them evenly, making sure the flat side is fully covered.

Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place the sweet potatoes flat side down.

Bake at 400°F for 50–55 minutes, until the bottoms are deeply caramelized and the centers are tender.

Let them cool for at least 10 minutes before moving them. This step is important as it allows that caramelized layer to set and release clean from the pan.

#sweetpotatoes #potato #healthy #food #foodstagram
summary: Caramelized baked sweet potatoes recipe with olive oil, maple syrup, and cinnamon.

caption:
💥Stop making egg salads boring. This bright & lemony egg salad is such a great with every bite, it's high protein, lowcarb, and so good!

The lemon zest completely changes things up, it cuts through the richness and makes everything taste lighter, brighter, and way more addictive.

This is the kind of high-protein, low-carb meal I've leaned on for years to lose close to 150lbs. Simple ingredients, big flavor, and something you can throw together fast and actually look forward to eating. Scoop it with crackers, load it into lettuce cups, or throw it on toasted sourdough with avocado.

✅ Comment "BANGER" below and I'll message you my FREE mini protein ebook - i also share high protein recipes on my page every week, so follow along as i share more of the meals that have helped me lose 150 lbs.

Here's how I made it:

1️⃣Add 6-8 chopped hard-boiled eggs to a large bowl and mash with a fork, or you can use this easy kitchen hack to use the lined cookie sheet and just press down on it into the bowl. Then add 1/4 finely diced red onion, 2-3 tbsp finely diced capers (or pickles), a handful of chopped cilantro, chives, and fresh basil, and 1 small cubed up avocado. If you are making this for later, save the avocado and add it in later.

2️⃣Add 3 tbsp Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp mayo, 1 tbsp Dijon mustard, the zest + juice of half a lemon, a couple pinches salt and pepper. Stir until you get your desired consistency.

3️⃣Use whatever vessel you like for this, whether thats bread, pita, lavash, or if you're lowcarb, you can make this into a lowcarb cucumber boat like I did. Just scoop out the middle of an english cucumber, and add as much of the egg salad as you want.

4️⃣Top with your favorite toppings like (chili flakes, hot sauce, everything but bagel seasoning) and enjoy!

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS 🔥
ENJOY!

#eggsalad #lowcarb #healthyrecipes #lowcarbrecipes #keto
summary: A bright lemon egg salad recipe with fresh herbs, capers, and avocado that's high-protein and low-carb.

caption:
Dumpling Smash Tacos 🌮

Makes 4 tacos 

Ingredients: 
1 lb ground organic pork
2 tsp fresh ginger, minced
2 tsp fresh garlic, minced
3 green onions, thinly sliced
1.5 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
¼ tsp Celtic salt
¼ tsp pepper
4 medium flour tortillas 

Sauce: 
3 tbsp soy sauce 
2 tsp rice vinegar 
2 tsp chili oil 
1 tsp toasted sesame oil 
½ tsp coconut sugar 
2 tsp chili flakes 
Juice from ½ lime 

Garnish:
1-2 small cucumbers, thinly sliced
½ cup thinly sliced cabbage 
1-2 Carrots, thinly sliced
Cilantro
Chives 

Directions: 
In a large bowl combine the pork, ginger, garlic, green onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, Celtic salt, and pepper. Mix well with your hands then divide into 4 portions. 
Place one portion of the pork mixture into a tortilla and press evenly from edge to edge. Repeat for the remaining 3 tortillas. 
Heat a frying pan over medium heat and add some avocado oil to the pan. Place the tortilla, meat side down on the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes. Flip then cook for another minute til nice and crispy. 
While the tacos are cooking, whip up the sauce in a medium sized bowl and set aside. 
Once the tacos are done. Garnish with cucumbers, cabbage, carrots, cilantro and chives then drizzle or dip into that sauce and enjoy!
summary: Pan-fried dumpling-style tacos with ground pork, ginger-garlic filling, fresh vegetable toppings, and a soy-chili dipping sauce.

caption:
Ultimate Anti-Inflammatory Roasted Veggies Recipe! You HAVE to know how to make roasted vegetables - it's a life skill and is a colorful side packed with anti-inflammatory ingredients. It's honestly my favorite sides for my meals!

Comment: "I want your Recipes!" And I'll DM you a link to my new recipe guides with 5, 15, 50, and 100+ recipes! 

Comment "Send me your playlist!" and I'll DM you my FREE Playlist of over 100 recipe videos from 2025!

Ultimate Anti-Inflammatory Roasted Veggies Recipe: 

INGREDIENTS
3 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil
1 tablespoon yellow mustard
1 teaspoon ground pepper
1 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon paprika
½ teaspoon salt, divided
1 medium purple sweet potato, scrubbed and cut into ¾-inch pieces (about 3 cups)
1 medium bulb fennel, cored and sliced crosswise (about 1½ cups)
3 medium carrots, peeled and diagonally sliced ½-inch thick (about 1½ cups)
2 cups cubed butternut squash 
2 cups halved Brussels sprouts
1 tablespoon thyme and parsley

DIRECTIONS
Position oven racks in uppermost and lowest positions; preheat to 450°F. Line 2 large rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper. 
Whisk 3 tablespoons oil, 1 tablespoon mustard, 1 teaspoon each pepper, garlic powder and paprika and ¼ teaspoon salt together in a large bowl. Add sweet potato pieces, fennel slices, carrot slices, 2 cups squash and 2 cups Brussels sprouts; toss to evenly coat. Divide between the prepared baking sheets; spread in an even layer.
Bake until tender and browned in spots, stirring and rotating the pans top to bottom halfway through, 20 to 25 minutes. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon herbs and the remaining ¼ teaspoon salt.
summary: A roasted vegetable recipe featuring sweet potato, fennel, carrots, butternut squash, and Brussels sprouts with mustard and herb seasoning.

caption:
I can't even explain how much I love this salad/ salat.

My mom used to make it whenever we were grilling meat, and we would stuff it inside warm pita. The smoky vegetables, the lemon, the olive oil… it's simple but so good!!

Ingredients
	•	1 sweet red pepper @windsetfarms
	•	3 hot peppers
	•	2 tomatoes 
	•	1 large eggplant
	•	1 whole head of garlic @thechristopherranch 
	•	Olive oil @costco 
	•	Juice of 1 lemon @kroger 
	•	Sea salt @traderjoes
	•	Black pepper @traderjoes
	•	Fresh parsley, chopped @boskovich_farms_inc 

Instructions
	1.	Preheat the oven to broil.
	2.	Place the red pepper, hot peppers, tomatoes, eggplant, and whole head of garlic on a baking tray.
	3.	Drizzle lightly with olive oil.
	4.	Broil for 15–25 minutes, turning the vegetables once or twice, until they are soft and the skins are nicely charred.
	5.	Remove from the oven and let them cool slightly.
	6.	Peel the skins off the tomatoes and peppers.
	7.	Cut the eggplant open and scoop out the soft inside.
	8.	Squeeze the roasted garlic cloves out of the head directly into the bowl.
	9.	Finely chop all the vegetables together.
	10.	Add olive oil, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and chopped parsley.
	11.	Mix well and adjust seasoning to taste.

Tip: Let the salad sit for 10–15 minutes so the flavors come together.

Top: @mango
Hair product: @ouidad gel for spiral curls
summary: A charred roasted vegetable salad with peppers, eggplant, tomatoes, and garlic, traditionally served with warm pita bread.

caption:
💕Ensalada de Coliflor y Garbanzos ⬇️

Ingredientes

Para el horno:
1 cabeza de coliflor, cortada en trozos pequeños
1 lata (15 oz) de garbanzos, escurridos y secos
1/2 cebolla lila, cortada en lascas gruesas
2 cdas de aceite de oliva
1/2 cdta Ajo en polvo
1/2  cdta Paprika
⅛ cdta Cilantrillo molido (Coriandro)
⅛ cdta Cúrcuma
Sal y pimienta al gusto

Para la ensalada:
1/3 taza de semillas de granada
1/3 taza de almendras laminadas
1/4 taza de hojas de menta picaditas
1/3 taza de perejil picado

Aderezo:
1/4 taza de aceite de oliva extra virgen o tahini
2 cdas de jugo de limón

Instrucciones

1. Mezcla la coliflor, los garbanzos y la cebolla con las 2 cdtas de aceite de oliva, y los sazones.

2. Espárcelos en una bandeja de hornear y ásalos a 400°F por 20-25 minutos.

3. Retira del horno y añade las semillas de granada, las almendras, la menta y el perejil.

4. Añade el aceite de oliva (o tahini) y el jugo de limón, mezcla todo bien y sirve.

caption:
🧀 CHICKEN CHEESE KEBAB 

This is one of my favorite recipes from my cookbook. 

🥣 Ingredients
	•	350 g chicken mince ( very important tip, make sure the chicken mince does not have  too much water, leave in a strainer if needed to remove excess liquid) 
	•	2 tbsp lime juice
	•	1 onion, finely chopped
	•	1 tbsp ginger & garlic paste and green chillies based on how spicy you like it. 
	•	1/3 cup cheddar cheese, grated
	•	1 tbsp cheese spread (optional, helps keep kebabs moist)
	•	1 tbsp garam masala
	•	Salt & black pepper (to taste)
	•	Handful of fresh mint & coriander, finely chopped (equal portions)

Instructions
	1.	In a bowl, combine all the ingredients thoroughly.
	2.	Shape the mixture into discs or logs (you can use cling wrap for neat shaping).
	3.	Chill in the fridge for at least 30 minutes to help them set.
	4.	Air fry or grill until fully cooked and lightly golden on the outside.

💡 Tips
	•	If the mixture feels too soft or soggy, Add breadcrumbs or egg whites to bind.
	•	Don't skip chilling it helps the kebabs hold shape and improves texture.

While using air fryer or oven always oil the foil or tray so it does not stick, grill in oven or air fry at 190-200 degree Celsius. To tell it's done, It should be brown and crusty on the outside and firm to touch. 

If pan frying pls use nonstick pan- no hassle and easy. Do not rush to turn wait till it gives a nice char before you turn to cook on all sides. 

Eid, Eid recipes, chef Sapna, cooking, recipes, easy recipes, kebab, chicken kebab #chefsapna
summary: A chicken cheese kebab recipe with ginger-garlic, mint, and coriander, cooked in an air fryer or on the grill.

caption:
The perfect green enchilada recipe. Comment "enchilada" for the recipe sent to your DMs! 

1-2 pounds of chicken, shredded
3 tsp taco seasoning
15-20 corn tortillas
1 block pepperjack or regular jack cheese
½ large white onion
1 can @roteltomatoes (Mexican style or fire roasted) 
1 can fire roasted green chiles
1 tsp each chili powder, cumin, oregano, coriander, seasoned salt
½ tsp paprika
2 10 oz cans green enchilada sauce
8 oz jar/can salsa verde (I used 1/2 jar of @herdezbrand roasted salsa verde)
1 lime
4 tsp minced garlic
2 tbsp butter
Olive oil
Cilantro, Green onions, Sour cream, for topping
 
 
1. Place your chicken in a crockpot with 1 cup water and taco seasoning. Let cook on high for 4-5 hours.
2. When your chicken is done and you are ready to make your enchiladas, begin by dicing your onion and shredding your cheese. 
3. Set both aside while you warm your tortillas.
Heat a skillet over medium-low heat and add oil.
Cook each tortilla for ~1 min on each side, until warm + pliable. Stack them on a plate or towel. You may need to add more oil to the pan as you go.
4. Remove your chicken and shred. This should require little effort… the chicken should be falling apart.
5. In either a new skillet or the same pan, add oil and cook your onions for 4-5 min.
6. Add 2 tsp minced garlic and cook an additional 3-4 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to low and add in your rotel, green chiles, spices and chicken and mix well. If this mixture becomes dry, you can add water or chicken stock. Once mixed, cut the heat.
8. Preheat your oven to 400 while you roll your enchiladas. Add cheese + chicken to each tortilla and roll. Place into a lightly oiled baking dish/es. Reserve some cheese for topping!
9. Pop them into the oven and make your sauce.
10. Heat your skillet/pan over medium low heat, add your enchilada sauce, salsa verde, 2 tsp garlic, butter and juice of 1 whole lime. Mix and heat for 10-15 minutes until warm and bubbling.
11. Remove enchiladas from the oven, sauce carefully and top with cheese. Return to oven for another 10 minutes until cheese is melted and sauce is bubbling.
12. Let cool for a few minutes before serving. Top with cilantro, green onions and sour cream.
summary: A green enchilada recipe with slow-cooked shredded chicken, roasted green chiles, and salsa verde sauce.

caption:
Honey Lime Chicken & Avocado Cilantro Rice Stack

⏱ Prep Time: 15 minutes
🔥 Cook Time: 20 minutes
🍽 Servings: 3–4

🛒 Ingredients
2 chicken breasts, diced
1 cup jasmine or basmati rice
2 cups water or chicken broth
1 avocado, diced or mashed
2 tbsp olive oil
½ tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
¼ cup fresh cilantro, chopped

Honey Lime Glaze:
2 tbsp honey
2 tbsp fresh lime juice
1 tsp lime zest
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tbsp olive oil
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper

Cilantro Lime Rice:
Cooked rice (from above)
2 tbsp fresh lime juice
2 tbsp chopped cilantro
¼ tsp salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

1️⃣ Cook rice:
Rinse the rice and cook with water or broth according to package instructions. Once cooked, fluff and mix with lime juice, chopped cilantro, and salt. Set aside.

2️⃣ Prepare avocado layer:
In a bowl, lightly mash or dice the avocado. Season with a squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of salt. Set aside.

3️⃣ Cook chicken:
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Season diced chicken with salt and pepper, then cook for 6–8 minutes until golden and fully cooked.

4️⃣ Add honey lime glaze:
In a small bowl, mix honey, lime juice, lime zest, garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Pour over the cooked chicken and cook for another 2–3 minutes until the sauce thickens and coats the chicken.

5️⃣ Assemble the stack:
Start with a layer of cilantro lime rice, then add a layer of avocado, and top with honey lime glazed chicken.

6️⃣ Serve:
Garnish with extra cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice. Serve immediately.

💡 Tips

• Use a ring mold or small bowl to create a neat stacked presentation
• Add black beans or corn for extra texture and flavor
• For a spicy kick, add chili flakes or jalapeños
• Best served fresh for the perfect balance of sweet, tangy, and creamy flavors 🍯🍋🍚🥑🍗✨
summary: A stacked rice, avocado, and honey lime glazed chicken dish with cilantro lime rice, ready in 35 minutes.

caption:
Mediterranean Cottage Cheese Veggie Bake

Servings: 4–6
Prep time: 15 minutes
Cook time: 35–40 minutes

Ingredients

2 cups cottage cheese
2 eggs
1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
1/2 cup shredded mozzarella cheese
1 small zucchini, grated (squeeze out excess moisture)
1/2 cup chopped spinach (fresh or frozen, drained)
1/2 red bell pepper, finely chopped
1/2 red onion, finely chopped
2 cloves garlic, minced
1/2 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
1/4 cup black or Kalamata olives, sliced
1 teaspoon dried oregano
1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
Salt and black pepper to taste
1 tablespoon olive oil

Optional toppings:

Extra mozzarella or feta cheese
Fresh parsley or basil for garnish

Instructions

Preheat oven
Preheat your oven to 180°C (350°F). Lightly grease a baking dish.
Prepare vegetables
Grate the zucchini and squeeze out as much water as possible. If using frozen spinach, ensure it's fully thawed and drained.
Mix the base
In a large bowl, whisk together cottage cheese and eggs until smooth.
Add ingredients
Stir in Parmesan, mozzarella, zucchini, spinach, bell pepper, onion, garlic, tomatoes, olives, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Assemble
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish. Drizzle olive oil on top and sprinkle extra cheese if desired.
Bake
Bake for 35–40 minutes until set in the center and golden on top.
Cool and serve
Let it cool for 5–10 minutes before slicing. Garnish with fresh herbs.

Serving suggestion
Serve warm with a crisp salad, whole-grain bread, or enjoy it on its own for a light, nutritious meal.

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie #veggiebake
summary: A Mediterranean cottage cheese and vegetable bake with zucchini, spinach, peppers, and olives, baked until golden.

caption:
Chickpea, Edamame & Cabbage Salad with Sesame Dressing

A vibrant mix of chickpeas, tender edamame, and crisp cabbage tossed in a rich, savory sesame dressing—perfect as a light meal or a satisfying side.

🧾 Ingredients (Serves 3–4)
For the salad:

2 cups cabbage, finely shredded (green, purple, or mix)

1 cup cooked or canned chickpeas (drained & rinsed)

1 cup shelled edamame (cooked)

1 medium carrot, grated

2 tbsp green onions, chopped

2 tbsp fresh cilantro (optional)

For the sesame dressing:

2 tbsp sesame oil

1 tbsp soy sauce

1 tbsp rice vinegar (or lime juice)

1 tsp honey or maple syrup

1 tsp grated ginger

1 clove garlic, minced

1–2 tbsp water (to thin, as needed)

🔪 Preparation
Step 1: Prep Ingredients

Shred cabbage finely for better texture

Cook edamame (if frozen), then cool

Rinse chickpeas well

Grate carrot and chop herbs

🥗 Assemble Salad
Step 2: Combine

In a large bowl, mix:

Cabbage

Chickpeas

Edamame

Carrot

Green onions

Cilantro

🥄 Make Dressing
Step 3: Whisk

In a small bowl, combine:

Sesame oil

Soy sauce

Rice vinegar (or lime juice)

Honey/maple syrup

Ginger

Garlic

Add water gradually until smooth and pourable

🌿 Finish
Step 4: Toss

Pour dressing over salad

Toss well to coat evenly

⏳ Rest (Optional)

Let sit for 10–15 minutes to allow flavors to blend

🍽️ Serve

Serve fresh or slightly chilled

Sprinkle sesame seeds on top if desired

💡 Pro Tips

Massage cabbage lightly for softer texture

Use toasted sesame oil for deeper flavor

Adjust sweetness and acidity to taste

Add a squeeze of lime for extra freshness

🔄 Variations

High-Protein Boost: Add grilled chicken or tofu

Crunch Upgrade: Add peanuts, cashews, or crispy noodles

Spicy Version: Add chili oil or sriracha

Creamy Version: Add 1 tbsp tahini or peanut butter to dressing

🧠 Why You'll Love It

Packed with plant protein and fiber

Crisp, refreshing, and satisfying

Great for meal prep

Balanced sweet, savory, and nutty flavors
summary: A chickpea, edamame, and cabbage salad with sesame-ginger dressing, suitable as a light meal or side dish.

caption:
Healthy cauliflower fried rice✨

▪️3 Eggs▪️Salt & Pepper▪️2 tsp Sesame Oil▪️2 Cloves Garlic, minced▪️3 Scallions, sliced▪️10 oz. Frozen Riced Cauliflower▪️3/4 Cup Frozen Peas & Carrots▪️1-2 Tbsp Soy Sauce (to taste)▪️1/4 tsp Garlic Powder▪️2 tsp Sesame Seeds▪️

🌱Vegan Modification: Sub in sliced mushrooms for eggs (sauté in sesame oil with salt, pepper, and soy sauce)

1️⃣ Beat the eggs with a sprinkle of salt and pepper
2️⃣ In a large pan over medium heat, cook the eggs in 1 tsp sesame oil until scrambled and then remove from the pan and set aside
3️⃣ Add 1 tsp more sesame oil to the pan along with the garlic and scallions; sprinkle with salt and pepper and cook for 1-2 mins, then add the frozen riced cauliflower and the frozen peas and carrots
4️⃣ Add the soy sauce, garlic powder, and sesame seeds, and sauté until veggies are warmed through (3-5 min)
5️⃣ Add the egg back in and mix it throughout, breaking it into small pieces; cook 1 min then taste and add more salt, pepper, or soy sauce if needed - enjoy! 

⏲15 minute total prep + cook time

Recipe serves 1 person (main dish portion) or 2-3 people (side dish portion)
summary: A 15-minute healthy cauliflower fried rice recipe with eggs, vegetables, and sesame oil, including a vegan mushroom modification.

caption:
Most people don't know that just washing your blueberries with water doesn't actually remove pesticides.

Most people just rinse their blueberries under the tap for a few seconds, thinking they are clean.

But what they don't know is that blueberries have a natural waxy coating called Bloom.

Bloom exists to protect the berry from sun damage and dehydration.

But it also acts like a waterproof shield.

Every pesticide, bacteria, and mold spore that lands on the skin gets trapped directly against it.

And water rolls right off.

The USDA has found up to 52 different pesticide residues on a single blueberry sample.

Plain water washing removes less than 10% of those.

Here is why that matters so much.

Conventional blueberries are one of the most heavily sprayed crops in the US.

They are treated with fungicides, insecticides, and herbicides at multiple points during the growing season.

That Bloom layer is holding every one of those onto the skin.
But there's an easy fix.

One part white vinegar. Three parts water.

Let them soak for 5 to 10 minutes.

The acetic acid breaks through the Bloom coating and destroys pesticide residue and mold spores on contact.

#blueberries
#pesticides
#foodsafety
#healthtips
#organicfood
summary: A guide explaining how blueberries trap pesticides under their waxy coating and how to remove them using a vinegar solution.

caption:
I like my thrillers and chilli chicken the same way. DARK. 🤓
This might be the darkest, glossiest chilli chicken you'll ever make — and the secret ingredient is roasted black sesame.

The chicken is air-fried until crisp and then tossed in a spicy Indo-Chinese style chilli gravy with garlic, chillies, onion and capsicum. The black sesame adds a deep nutty flavour and also brings in healthy fats, antioxidants and minerals like calcium and iron, adding a slightly more nourishing twist on regular chilli chicken.

Black Chilli Chicken 
Makes 3 Servings
Macros per serving: ~400 kcal | 33 g protein | 11 g carbs | 24 g fat

Ingredients
3 tbsp black sesame seeds (total), toasted and ground

Chicken Marinade
500 g boneless chicken thighs, bite-size
1 egg
1½ tbsp roasted black sesame powder
1 tbsp garlic paste
2 tbsp arrowroot / cornflour / tapioca flour
½ tsp black pepper
¾ tsp salt
Oil spray for air fryer

Sauce
1½ tbsp roasted black sesame powder
1 tbsp light soy sauce
1 tsp vinegar
1–2 tsp chilli crisp or chilli flakes
1 tsp sugar 
Salt to taste
4 tbsp hot water or hot stock

Stir Fry
1 tbsp
1 tbsp garlic paste
1–2 green chillies
½ cup onion cubes
½ cup capsicum cubes
⅓ cup water

Garnish
Spring onion greens

Method
	1.	Toast sesame seeds until fragrant and grind to a powder.
	2.	Marinate chicken with egg, sesame powder, garlic paste, starch, chilli oil, pepper and salt. Rest 15–20 minutes.
	3.	Air fry at 200°C for 13–15 minutes, shaking halfway, until crisp.
	4.	Mix sauce: sesame powder, soy sauce, vinegar, chilli crisp, sugar, salt and hot water/stock.
	5.	Stir fry: heat oil, sauté garlic paste and chillies. Add onion and capsicum; cook on high 1–2 minutes.
	6.	Add sauce + ⅓ cup water, simmer until glossy. Toss in the chicken.
	7.	Finish with spring onion greens.

.
(black chilli chicken, air fryer chicken recipe, indo chinese chicken recipe, healthy chilli chicken, black sesame chicken, high protein chicken recipe, air fryer dinner)

.
#blackchillichicken #blacksesamechicken
summary: Air-fried black chilli chicken recipe with roasted black sesame, garlic, and spices for a dark, glossy Indo-Chinese dish.

caption:
Roasted Garlic-Parmesan Zucchini and Tomato Bake

Ingredients
2 medium zucchinis (sliced into 1/4-inch rounds)

3 Roma tomatoes (sliced into rounds)

Salt and Black Pepper to taste

Fresh basil for garnish

Instructions
Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).

Toss zucchini and tomatoes in a bowl with olive oil, garlic, and seasonings.

Arrange in a greased 9x13 baking dish (tian-style or flat layer).

Top with Parmesan cheese.

Bake for 25–30 minutes until golden.

caption:
Grilled Shrimp Bowl with Avocado, Corn Salsa & Creamy Garlic Sauce

⏱ Prep Time: 15 minutes
🔥 Cook Time: 10 minutes
🍽 Servings: 3–4

🛒 Ingredients
1 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp garlic powder
½ tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
¼ tsp cayenne pepper (optional)
2 cups cooked rice or quinoa
1 avocado, sliced or diced

Corn Salsa:
1 cup corn (fresh, frozen, or grilled)
¼ cup red onion, finely diced
¼ cup cherry tomatoes, halved
2 tbsp fresh cilantro, chopped
1 tbsp lime juice
½ jalapeño, finely chopped
¼ tsp salt

Creamy Garlic Sauce:
¼ cup mayonnaise
¼ cup sour cream or Greek yogurt
1 clove garlic, minced
1 tbsp lime juice
1 tbsp fresh cilantro, chopped
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper

👩‍🍳 Instructions

1️⃣ Marinate shrimp:
In a bowl, toss shrimp with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and cayenne. Let sit for 10 minutes.

2️⃣ Prepare corn salsa:
In a bowl, mix corn, red onion, cherry tomatoes, cilantro, lime juice, jalapeño, and salt. Set aside.

3️⃣ Make creamy sauce:
In a small bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, sour cream (or Greek yogurt), garlic, lime juice, cilantro, salt, and pepper until smooth.

4️⃣ Cook shrimp:
Heat a grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat. Cook shrimp for 2–3 minutes per side until pink and slightly charred.

5️⃣ Assemble bowls:
Divide cooked rice or quinoa into bowls. Top with grilled shrimp, corn salsa, and avocado slices.

6️⃣ Drizzle sauce:
Drizzle the creamy garlic sauce generously over the bowl.

7️⃣ Serve:
Garnish with extra cilantro and a squeeze of lime. Serve immediately.

💡 Tips

• Use grilled corn for a smoky flavor boost
• Swap rice with cauliflower rice for a low-carb option
• Add black beans for extra protein and texture
• Don't overcook shrimp — they cook fast and stay juicy when tender 🍤🥑🌽🍚✨
summary: A grilled shrimp bowl with corn salsa, avocado, and creamy garlic sauce, ready in 25 minutes.

caption:
Baked chicken tacos 🌮 

Ingredients 

For the chicken:
1 lb boneless chicken breast, cut into small pieces 
Salt to taste
1 tbsp smoked paprika powder 
1 tsp garlic powder 
1/2 tsp black pepper 
1 tsp cajun seasoning 
1-2 cloves fresh garlic, minced 
1 cup mixed bell pepper, diced 
1/2 cup corn, boiled 
1 yellow onion, diced
1 jalapeno, chopped and seeded ( optional )
1 tbsp lemon juice 
4 tbsp cream cheese 
1/4 cup water
1 tbsp oil + more for cooking 

For the sauce :

1/2 cup mayonnaise 
1/2 cup sour cream
1 tbsp smoked paprika powder 
1 tsp garlic powder 
Salt and pepper to taste 
1 tsp cajun seasoning 
1 tbsp lime juice 
1 tsp hot sauce 
1-2 tbsp fresh cilantro, chopped 

To assemble 
1 cup mixed shredded cheese, ( i used mozzarella and cheddar )
10 mini flour tortillas 
2 tbsp oil ( for brushing the tortillas)

Instructions:

In a bowl, add the chicken pieces, salt, smoked paprika, garlic powder, black pepper, Cajun seasoning, and 1 tbsp oil. Mix well until the chicken is evenly coated.

Heat a pan over medium heat with a little oil. Once hot, add the seasoned chicken and cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally, Add the minced garlic and cook for 1–2 minutes, until fragrant. Add the diced onion, bell peppers, corn, and jalapeño (if using). Stir and cook for 3–4 minutes, until the vegetables soften slightly and chicken is cooked through.

Lower the heat and add the cream cheese, lemon juice, and water. Stir until the cream cheese melts and forms a creamy sauce that coats the chicken and veggies. If the mixture seems too thin, simmer for 1–2 minutes until thickened. Taste and adjust salt if needed. Remove from heat.

Preheat the oven to 400°F

Lightly brush one side of each tortilla with oil. Flip the tortillas over and spoon the chicken filling onto the un-oiled side. Sprinkle with cheese, then fold or gently press the tortillas closed. Arrange them on a baking sheet and bake for 10–15 minutes, or until the tortillas are crispy and the cheese is melted.

#bakedchicken #tacos #recipe
summary: Baked chicken tacos with seasoned shredded chicken, vegetables, and a creamy sauce, topped with melted cheese and served on crispy tortillas.

caption:
Garlic Parmesan Roasted Cauliflower. 
It features crispy, golden-brown florets seasoned with savory garlic and cheese, typically served with a creamy dipping sauce like ranch or blue cheese. 
Ingredients
Main: 1 large head of cauliflower, cut into bite-sized florets.
Seasoning & Oil: 2–3 tablespoons olive oil, 1 teaspoon garlic powder (or 3–4 cloves minced garlic), ½ teaspoon paprika, and salt and black pepper to taste.
Cheese: ½ cup grated Parmesan cheese.
Garnish: Freshly chopped parsley.
Optional Coating: For extra crunch, you can add ½ cup panko breadcrumbs and dip florets in 2 beaten eggs before seasoning. 
Instructions
Prep: Preheat your oven to 425°F (220°C) and line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season: In a large bowl, toss the cauliflower florets with olive oil, garlic (minced or powder), paprika, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Add Crunch: Toss in the Parmesan cheese (and breadcrumbs if using) to coat the florets thoroughly.
Arrange: Spread the cauliflower in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet. Avoid overcrowding to ensure they get crispy rather than steaming.
Roast: Bake for 20–30 minutes, flipping the florets halfway through, until they are tender and have deep golden-brown, crispy edges.
Serve: Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately with your favorite creamy dip.
summary: A recipe for crispy garlic Parmesan roasted cauliflower florets baked until golden brown and served with dipping sauce.

caption:
🍗 Creamy Paprika Chicken with Tender Rice (Quick Recipe)

⏱️ Ready in: 30 minutes
🍽️ Serves: 3–4

Ingredients

Chicken

500 g boneless chicken (breast or thighs), bite-size

1 tbsp oil + 1 tbsp butter

1 small onion, finely chopped

2 cloves garlic, minced

1½ tsp paprika (smoked if possible)

½ tsp black pepper

Salt to taste

½ cup cooking cream (or fresh cream)

¼ cup chicken stock or water

Optional: 1 tbsp tomato paste

Tender Rice

1 cup basmati rice, washed & soaked 20 min

2 cups water or chicken stock

1 tbsp butter or oil

Salt to taste

Instructions

1) Rice

Bring water/stock to a boil with salt & butter.

Add rice, cover, simmer on low 12–15 min until fluffy. Rest 5 min.

2) Creamy Paprika Chicken

Heat oil & butter in a pan. Sauté onion until soft.

Add garlic, cook 30 sec.

Add chicken, salt & pepper; cook until sealed.

Stir in paprika (and tomato paste if using).

Add stock/water, simmer 5 min.

Pour in cream, simmer 5–7 min until thick and creamy.

Serve

Spoon creamy paprika chicken over tender rice.
Garnish with parsley or a pinch of paprika 🌶️

💡 Tips:

For extra richness, add a little cheese at the end.

Prefer mild? Use sweet paprika; spicy? Add chili flakes.
#mediterraneandietrecipes #mediterraneanrecipes #homemadebaking #healthyrecipes #mediterraneanfood #mediterraneandiet #homemadecooking #homemadetastesbetter #tenderrice #paprikachicken
summary: A 30-minute creamy paprika chicken served over tender basmati rice, made with sour cream and smoked paprika.

caption:
🧀🥒 Crispy Parmesan Zucchini Potato Muffins

Savory, golden muffins made with grated zucchini, potato, and Parmesan cheese. They're crispy on the outside, soft on the inside, and perfect for breakfast, snacks, or a side dish.

🕒 Time

Prep Time: 15 minutes

Bake Time: 25–30 minutes

Total Time: 40–45 minutes

Servings: 10–12 muffins

🧾 Ingredients

1 cup zucchini, grated

1 cup potato, grated

2 large eggs

½ cup grated Parmesan cheese

½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese

½ cup all-purpose flour

1 tsp baking powder

½ tsp salt

½ tsp black pepper

½ tsp garlic powder

½ tsp onion powder

2 tbsp olive oil or melted butter

2 tbsp chopped parsley or chives

¼ cup finely chopped onion (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions
1. Preheat Oven

Preheat oven to 180°C / 350°F.
Grease or line a 12-cup muffin tin.

2. Prepare the Vegetables

Place grated zucchini and potato in a clean towel and squeeze out excess moisture. This step helps make the muffins crispy.

3. Mix Wet Ingredients

In a large bowl whisk together:

Eggs

Olive oil (or butter)

4. Add Vegetables & Cheese

Stir in:

Zucchini

Potato

Parmesan

Mozzarella

Onion (if using)

5. Add Dry Ingredients

Mix in flour, baking powder, salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and herbs. Stir until combined.

6. Fill Muffin Tin

Divide batter evenly into muffin cups, filling about ¾ full.

7. Bake

Bake 25–30 minutes until golden brown and crispy on top.

8. Cool & Serve

Let cool for 5–10 minutes, then remove from the pan.

🍽️ Serving Ideas

Serve with sour cream or Greek yogurt dip

Pair with eggs for breakfast

Enjoy with soups or salads

💡 Tips

✔ For extra crispiness, sprinkle extra Parmesan on top before baking.
✔ Add cooked bacon bits or diced ham for a heartier muffin.
✔ Use cheddar cheese instead of mozzarella for a sharper flavor.

caption:
*Veggie & Black‑Bean Quesadilla Recipe
1. *Ingredients* (for 4 quesadillas):
- 8 large flour tortillas
- 2 cups shredded cheese (cheddar or Mexican blend)
- 1 cup cooked black beans, drained
- 1 avocado, sliced or mashed
- 1 bell pepper (yellow & red), diced
- ½ red onion, finely chopped
- 2 tbsp fresh cilantro, chopped
- 1 tsp cumin powder
- 1 tsp chili powder (optional)
- 2 tbsp olive oil or butter
- Salt & pepper to taste
2. *Method*:
- *Mix filling*: combine beans, bell pepper, onion, cumin, chili powder, salt & pepper.
- *Assemble*: lay a tortilla, sprinkle cheese, add filling, avocado slices, cilantro, then another tortilla on top.
- *Cook*: heat 1 tbsp oil in a skillet over medium‑high heat. Place quesadilla in pan, press gently, cook 2‑3 min per side until golden & cheese melts.
- *Finish*: remove, let rest 1 min, then cut into wedges. Garnish with extra cilantro.
3. *Serve*: with salsa, sour cream, or guacamole on the side.

caption:
1. Garlic Lemon Marinade

Ingredients
 • 500 g chicken
 • 3 tbsp olive oil
 • 2 tbsp lemon juice
 • 3 cloves garlic (minced)
 • 1 tsp salt
 • 1/2 tsp black pepper

Procedure
 1. In a bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
 2. Add chicken and coat well.
 3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes (best 2–4 hours).
 4. Grill, bake, or pan-fry the chicken.

2. Honey Garlic Marinade

Ingredients
 • 500 g chicken
 • 3 tbsp honey
 • 2 tbsp soy sauce
 • 3 cloves garlic
 • 1 tbsp olive oil
 • 1/2 tsp black pepper

Procedure
 1. Mix honey, soy sauce, garlic, olive oil, and black pepper.
 2. Add chicken and mix thoroughly.
 3. Marinate 1–3 hours in refrigerator.
 4. Cook by grilling or frying.

3. Spicy Chili Marinade

Ingredients
 • 500 g chicken
 • 2 tbsp chili sauce
 • 2 tbsp soy sauce
 • 1 tbsp garlic paste
 • 1 tsp oil
 • 1 tsp chili flakes

Procedure
 1. Combine chili sauce, soy sauce, garlic paste, oil, and chili flakes.
 2. Coat chicken evenly.
 3. Refrigerate 1–2 hours.
 4. Cook on grill, pan, or oven.

4. BBQ Marinade

Ingredients
 • 500 g chicken
 • 1/2 cup BBQ sauce
 • 1 tbsp brown sugar
 • 1 tbsp apple cider vinegar
 • 1 tbsp olive oil

Procedure
 1. Mix BBQ sauce, brown sugar, vinegar, and olive oil.
 2. Add chicken and coat well.
 3. Marinate 2–4 hours.
 4. Grill or bake until cooked.

5. Yogurt Tandoori Marinade

Ingredients
 • 500 g chicken
 • 1/2 cup yogurt
 • 1 tbsp ginger garlic paste
 • 1 tsp paprika
 • 1 tsp lemon juice

Procedure
 1. Mix yogurt, ginger garlic paste, paprika, and lemon juice.
 2. Coat chicken evenly.
 3. Marinate 4–8 hours for best flavor.
 4. Grill or bake.

6. Teriyaki Marinade

Ingredients
 • 500 g chicken
 • 1/3 cup teriyaki sauce
 • 1 tbsp honey
 • 1 tsp garam masala
 • 1 tsp lemon juice

Procedure
 1. Mix teriyaki sauce, honey, garam masala, and lemon juice.
 2. Add chicken and mix well.
 3. Marinate 1–3 hours.
 4. Cook in pan or grill.

7. Ginger Teriyaki Marinade

Ingredients
 • 500 g chicken
 • 1/3 cup teriyaki sauce
 • 1 tbsp honey
 • 1 tsp grated ginger
 • 1/2 tsp salt

Procedure

caption:
Sheet Pan Fish Tacos with High-Protein Avocado Crema
Incredibly easy, packed with protein, and practically zero cleanup! By baking the spiced fish on a single sheet pan and using a brilliant cottage cheese hack for the avocado crema, you get a bright, healthy, and incredibly satisfying dinner that comes together in under 30 minutes. Whether it is for Cinco de Mayo or a busy weeknight, these tacos are absolute perfection! 🌮🐟🥑🔥

Prep time: 15 minutes
Cook time: 15 minutes
Total time: 30 minutes
Servings: 4 (8 tacos)

Ingredients
The Spiced Sheet Pan Fish

1 ½ lbs tilapia or mahi-mahi fillets

2 tbsp olive oil

1 tbsp chili powder

2 tsp cumin

2 tsp onion powder

1 tsp paprika

1 tsp salt & 1 tsp black pepper

The High-Protein Avocado Crema

2 small avocados (or 1 large), pitted and peeled

¾ cup cottage cheese (the secret to the high protein and creamy texture!)

3 tbsp avocado oil

Juice of 1 lime

½ cup fresh parsley

1 tsp cumin

The Bright Cabbage Slaw

1 cup green cabbage, shredded

1 cup red cabbage, shredded

½ cup fresh cilantro, chopped

1 tbsp olive oil

Juice of 1 lime

The Assembly

8 taco-sized tortillas of your choice (corn or flour)

Instructions
Roast the Fish: Preheat your oven to 425°F (220°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper or foil for easy cleanup. Place the fish fillets in a single layer. Drizzle with the 2 tbsp of olive oil and rub evenly with the chili powder, cumin, onion powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Bake for 12–14 minutes until the fish is opaque and flakes easily. Remove from the oven and use two forks to shred the fish directly on the pan.

Blend the Crema: While the fish bakes, add the avocados, cottage cheese, avocado oil, lime juice, fresh parsley, and cumin to a blender or food processor. Blend on high until the sauce is incredibly smooth, thick, and creamy. Taste and adjust salt if needed. Set aside.

Mix the Slaw: In a medium bowl, toss the shredded green and red cabbage with the chopped cilantro, 1 tbsp olive oil, and the fresh lime juice until well combined and slightly softened
summary: Sheet pan baked fish tacos with high-protein avocado crema made with cottage cheese, finished in under 30 minutes.

caption:
Garlic Roasted Vegetables
Ingredients

1 cup broccoli florets

1 cup cauliflower florets

1 carrot, sliced

1 bell pepper, chopped

2 tbsp olive oil

2 cloves garlic, minced

½ tsp dried oregano

½ tsp dried thyme

Salt & black pepper to taste

Instructions

Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).

Place broccoli, cauliflower, carrot, and bell pepper on a baking tray.

Drizzle with olive oil, add garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper.

Toss well so vegetables are evenly coated.

Roast for 20–25 minutes until tender and slightly golden.

Optional: Sprinkle with a little Parmesan cheese or lemon juice before serving for extra flavor. 😋

caption:
"Mediterranean Herb‑Roasted Vegetable Medley"

Ingredients:

- 400 g baby carrots, whole or halved
- 400 g small yellow potatoes, halved
- 2 medium zucchini, cut into 1‑inch rounds
- 3 tbsp extra‑virgin olive oil (divided)
- 1 tsp dried oregano
- 1 tsp fresh thyme leaves (or ½ tsp dried)
- Juice of ½ lemon
- Salt & black pepper, to taste
- 2 tbsp fresh parsley, chopped

Method:

1. Preheat oven to 200 °C (400 °F).
2. Toss carrots, potatoes & zucchini with 2 tbsp olive oil, oregano, thyme, salt & pepper.
3. Roast on a sheet 25–30 min, turning halfway, until golden & tender.
4. Mix remaining 1 tbsp olive oil with lemon juice; drizzle over hot veggies and toss for a glaze.
5. Sprinkle chopped parsley on top and serve warm.

__________________
summary: Sheet-pan roasted vegetable medley with Mediterranean herbs, olive oil, and lemon.

caption:
🥦Easy Broccoli Potato Fritters for Lunchboxes

Recipe🌱

Ingredients
- 2 cups broccoli florets
- 2 big potatoes
- 1 egg
- ½ tsp garlic powder
- ½ tsp chili flakes
- Salt to taste
- ½ cup mozzarella cheese, shredded
- 1–2 tbsp oil (for pan-frying)

Instructions
1. Microwave the broccoli florets for 8–10 minutes until tender. Mash the broccoli and place it in a mixing bowl.
2. Pierce the potatoes with a fork and microwave in a bowl with a little water for 8–10 minutes until soft.
3. Mash the potatoes and add them to the mashed broccoli. Mix well.
4. Add egg, garlic powder, chili flakes, salt, and mozzarella. Mix everything together.
5. Shape the mixture into small patties.
6. Pan-fry with a little oil on medium heat until golden and crispy on both sides.

caption:
HIGH-PROTEIN 🌿 CREAMY ZITI & BROCCOLI

Here is an EXCLUSIVE SNEAK PEAK at @robinnyc new high-protein, plant-based cookbook, Eat To Hustle featuring @kaizenfoodco pasta 🍝 

This plant based meal has 396 CALORIES, 46G PROTEIN, 30 GRAMS OF FIBER a serving and makes 6 SERVINGS and truly the definition of "so easy, so good". If you're trying to eat high-protein and don't want to overcomplicate things, this is a perfect high protein pasta option.

Here's how to make it:

1️⃣ Preheat oven to 350F. Spread 1 (15.5oz) can of drained and rinsed chickpeas out on paper towels and pat dry, then transfer them to a rimmed baking sheet. Bake until golden brown and dry, about 50 mins. Remove from oven and let cool, but don't turn off the oven!

2️⃣ In a food processor, add the cooled chickpeas, 1 tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp dried oregano, ½ tsp kosher salt, and ½ tsp red pepper flakes (optional). Pulse 6-8 times to get fine crumbs. Return the crumbs to the same baking sheet and bake for 10 more mins. Turn the oven off and let the crumbs cool on the pain in the oven, about 1 hour.

3️⃣ Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Boil the Kaizen Ziti pasta for 4 mins (about 2 mins less than recommended cook time. 2 mins before the pasta is done, add 1 (16oz) bag of frozen broccoli to the pot. Drain the pasta and broccoli, return to the pot.

4️⃣ Add 1 (16oz) plain vegan Greek yogurt, 1/2 cup nutritional yeast, the zest & juice of 1 lemon, and 2 tsp of salt. Stir to completely coat the pasta in the sauce. Taste for seasoning. Sprinkle the chickpea breadcrumbs on top and serve immediately.

This is one of 75 recipes in the Eat to Hustle cookbook, featuring Kaizen protein pasta. Find the book wherever books are sold, and grab some Kaizen for high protein meals like this!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
#plantbasedrecipes #lowcarb #proteinrecipes #healthyrecipes
summary: High-protein plant-based creamy ziti and broccoli recipe with baked chickpea breadcrumbs, featuring 46g protein per serving.

caption:
Craving dessert but still want to hit your protein goals? This high-protein coffee crème brûlée is creamy, indulgent, and comes together with just 5 ingredients in under 20 minutes.

The secret ingredient is @ozivanutrition Coffee Flavoured Clean Whey Protein, which gives this dessert its rich coffee flavour while adding over 26g protein per scoop. The makhana and cashews make it naturally creamy without needing heavy cream, and the crackly caramelized top makes it feel like a proper dessert.

Break through that glassy top and you get the creamiest, coffee-kissed brûlée that tastes indulgent but fuels your body too.

High-Protein Coffee Crème Brûlée
305 kcal | 37g protein | 32g carbs | 6g fat
Ingredients
½ cup makhana
1 tbsp cashew nuts
1 scoop Oziva Coffee Flavoured Clean Whey Protein
¾ cup skim milk
1 tsp sugar (for the brûlée topping)

Method
Blend the makhana, cashews, whey protein, and skim milk until completely smooth and creamy.
Pour the mixture into a ramekin and place it in the freezer for about 15 minutes until slightly set.

Sprinkle 1 tsp sugar evenly over the top. Heat a spoon over the flame and gently press it over the sugar until it melts and caramelizes to form a crackly brûlée layer.
Let it set for a minute, crack the top, and enjoy your high-protein dessert moment.

.

(high protein crème brûlée, protein dessert, coffee protein dessert, healthy crème brûlée, whey protein dessert, high protein sweet recipe, quick dessert) 
.
#HighProteinDessert #ProteinRecipes #cremebrulée
summary: A high-protein coffee crème brûlée recipe made with whey protein, makhana, and cashews in under 20 minutes.

caption:
SHEET PAN CHICKEN ADANA-STYLE KEBABS

460 calories, 69g protein, 12 net carbs (per serving, 4 HUGE servings)

Forget healthy food that tastes like sacrifice. These sheet pan chicken Adana-style kebabs are packed with garlic, herbs, warm spices, and just enough heat. They are so easy, so good, and the perfect high protein meal prep.

This is one of those meals that feels like it shouldn't be this easy… but it is.

Ingredients:
2 lbs ground chicken
1 small yellow onion
3-4 garlic cloves
1/2 small red bell pepper
Large handful fresh parsley
2 tbsp tomato paste
1 tbsp sumac
1 tsp Aleppo pepper or chili flakes
1 tbsp smoked paprika
1/2 tsp ground cumin
1/4 tsp turmeric
Salt & pepper
1 tbsp olive oil

Here is how I made it:

1️⃣ Preheat oven to 425°F.

2️⃣ Add the onion, garlic, bell pepper & parsley to a food processor. Pulse until finely minced.

3️⃣ Add the ground chicken to a bowl along with the onion mixture, 2 tbsp tomato paste, and the spices: 1 tbsp sumac, 1 tsp Aleppo pepper (or chili flakes), 1 tbsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tsp cumin, 1/4 tsp turmeric, salt & pepper. Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil.

4️⃣ Mix really well, and transfer to a sheet pan and spread evenly across the bottom.

5️⃣ Smooth the edges, then cut long vertical lines through the chicken to form individual kebabs with space between them. Add little indentations with the back of a spatula.

6️⃣ Bake for 18-20 mins, then move to the top rack and broil for 2-3 mins to get some color.

7️⃣ For the Smoky Paprika Yogurt Sauce: Mix 1 cup Greek yogurt, 1 small grated garlic clove, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tsp Aleppo pepper or chili flakes, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tsp olive oil, and a pinch of salt until smooth and creamy.

8️⃣ For the bright tomato salad: Combine 1 cup cherry tomatoes, quartered, 1/8 white onion thinly sliced, 2–3 tbsp fresh parsley, 1 tsp sumac, 1 tbsp lemon juice, salt, and black pepper. Mix well and let sit for a few minutes.

Plate it over rice or my @kaizenfoodco high protein low carb rice. It has 20g protein and 6 net carbs a serving!

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#highprotein #lowcarbrecipes #mediterraneanfood #lowcarb #healthyrecipes
summary: Sheet pan chicken Adana-style kebabs with spiced ground chicken, yogurt sauce, and tomato salad—high protein, low carb meal prep.

caption:
Herbed Quinoa Salad with Roasted Vegetables:

Servings: 4–6
Prep time: 15 minutes
Cook time: 25–30 minutes

Ingredients

For the quinoa:

1 cup quinoa (rinsed well)

2 cups water or vegetable broth

Pinch of salt

For the roasted vegetables:

1 medium zucchini, sliced

1 red bell pepper, sliced

1 yellow bell pepper, sliced

1 small red onion, sliced

1–2 tablespoons olive oil

Salt and pepper, to taste

For the herbs & aromatics:

2 tablespoons fresh parsley, chopped

1 clove garlic, minced

1 teaspoon dried oregano

For the dressing:

3 tablespoons olive oil

2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice

1 teaspoon lemon zest

Salt and pepper, to taste

Instructions

Cook the quinoa:

In a medium pot, combine rinsed quinoa and water (or broth) with a pinch of salt.

Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, or until water is absorbed.

Remove from heat and let it sit covered for 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork.

Roast the vegetables:

Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).

Toss zucchini, bell peppers, and red onion with olive oil, salt, and pepper.

Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20–25 minutes, stirring halfway, until caramelized and tender.

Prepare the dressing:

In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, salt, and pepper.

Assemble the salad:

In a large bowl, combine cooked quinoa and roasted vegetables.

Add minced garlic, fresh parsley, and dried oregano.

Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine evenly.

Serve:

Enjoy warm or chilled. This salad can be stored in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days.

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie #quinoasalad
summary: A Mediterranean herbed quinoa salad with roasted zucchini, bell peppers, and red onion, dressed with lemon and olive oil.

caption:
235 Kcal & 24 g of Protein 💪🏼
If you love bold, spicy flavours, this Andhra Green Chilli Chicken needs to be on your table. I've combined the OG Andhra Chilli Chicken recipe with the Bangalore restaurant version of it (soy sauce etc). 🫶🏼 

The chicken is marinated in a vibrant green paste made with coriander, green chillies, and cashews, then slow-cooked until it's juicy, aromatic, and packed with heat.

It's the kind of dish that tastes even better when you scoop it up with a hot paratha or spoon it over fried rice or noodles. Simple ingredients, big flavours, and absolutely worth making.

Andhra Style Green Chilli Chicken
Macros (per serving, serves 4):
~235 kcal | 24 g protein | 11 g fat | 6 g carbs

Ingredients
	•	500 g bone-in chicken
	•	2 green chillies
	•	1 cup coriander leaves, loosely packed
	•	15 g cashew nuts (10–12)
	•	3–4 tbsp water (for grinding)

For the marinade
	•	1 tbsp ginger–garlic paste
	•	1 tbsp dark soy sauce
	•	1 tbsp green chilli sauce
	•	1 tsp vinegar
	•	¼ tsp turmeric powder
	•	1 tsp coriander powder
	•	½ tsp garam masala
	•	Salt to taste

For cooking
	•	2 tsp ghee
	•	½ tsp cumin seeds
	•	1 medium onion, thinly sliced
	•	½–¾ cup water (as needed)
	•	2 green chillies, slit
	•	1 sprig curry leaves

Method
	1.	Blend green chillies, coriander leaves, cashews, and water into a smooth paste.
	2.	Mix the chicken with the green paste, ginger–garlic paste, soy sauce, green chilli sauce, vinegar, turmeric, coriander powder, garam masala, and salt. Marinate for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
	3.	Heat ghee in a pan. Add cumin seeds and let them splutter. Add sliced onions and sauté for 2–3 minutes until slightly softened.
	4.	Add the marinated chicken and mix well. Add a little water if needed, cover, and cook on low–medium heat for 25–30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
	5.	Check seasoning and finish with slit green chillies and curry leaves. Cook for 2 more minutes before serving.

(Andhra chicken curry, Andhra chilli chicken, green chilli chicken, spicy chicken curry, coriander chilli chicken, easy chicken curry)

#Andhrachillichicken #GreenChilliChicken #ChickenCurry
summary: A high-protein Andhra-style green chilli chicken curry recipe with marinated chicken slow-cooked in a vibrant coriander and cashew paste.

Weightloss Recipes - Sauté Veggies with Green Dressing 
.
Serves 2 
1/2 tsp oil 
120 gm carrots 
80 gm edamame 
70 gm bell peppers 
100 gm broccoli 
30 gm corns 
150 gm paneer 
Salt & pepper as taste 
1 tsp oregano & 1/2 tsp chilli flakes 

Dressing 
2 small avocado 
30 gm paneer 
10-12 cilantro stems with leaves 
4-5 mint leaves 
4 basil leaves (optional but recommended)
Salt & pepper as taste 
1/2 lemon juice 
1/4 cup water 

Method 
1. In a pan, add oil & brush the pan with oil. Add carrots and sauté for 2 to 3 minutes then add edamame, broccoli and mix bell peppers, salt and pepper, oregano as well. Mix well cover and cook for 8 to 10 minutes.
2. Then add sweet corns, which I have microwaved for 30 seconds and Indian cottage cheese aka paneer + red chilli flakes. Everything will cover again and cook for two minutes and turn off the stove.

To prepare the dressing, add all the ingredients in a blender jar and blend very well.

Plating : Spread a portion of dressing on a plate and keep one portion of sauté veggies on it. Dinner is ready. 
You can make a big batch and use it as a meal prep. It can also be used to make sauté veggie wrap.

caption:
EASY SHEET PAN CHICKEN DINNER

Say hello to one of the BEST chicken dinners you'll ever make at home. Eat it as is, or with your favorite base (tortillas, rice, quinoa, or if you're lowcarb, my high protein kaizen rice). My @kaizenfoodco rice has been a game changer in my 150lb weight loss with 20grams of protein and just 6 net carbs a serving. Its so easy to use it as a base for meals like this.

Here is how I made it:

1.Add 2lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs to a bowl. Season with 2-3 pinches salt, pepper, 2 tbsp olive oil, zest of 1 lime, juice of 1 lime, 1 tbsp sweet paprika, 1 tbsp oregano, 1 tsp kumin, 4-5 cloves crushed garlic, & 1/2 cup cilantro.

2.Mix really well, cover and ideally marinate for 2 hrs, but you can also make it right away.

3.You can grill these, airfry them, or into the oven. I placed them on an oven-safe tray, added parchment paper, placed the marinated chicken, and in the oven at 400F for 33-35 mins.

4.While chicken is in the oven, make your express pickled shallots, avocado salsa and the cilantro green onion sauce like below.

5.For the express picked shallots, super thinly slice a shallot (as thin as possible), add it to a small bowl with 3 generous pinches salt, juice of 1 lime, & 2 tbsp apple cider vinegar. Mix well then let it sit for 20 mins, stirring a few times in the process.

6.For the salsa, cube up 1  avocado, added it to a bowl with 3-4 tbsp roughly chopped fresh cilantro, the juice of half a lime, 1/2 tsp onion powder, & a generous pinch of salt & pepper. Give it a mix, taste, & adjust.

7.For a large batch of the cilantro green onion sauce, add 1/2 cup thick greek yogurt to a food processor with 2 tbsp mayo, a large handful cilantro, 2 green onions/scallions (white+green), 1/2 tsp cayenne powder, juice of 1 lime. Process well.

8.Top cooked chicken with the avocado salsa & shallots, the cilantro green onion sauce, some chipotle hot sauce & sesame seeds .Prepare some kaizen lowcarb rice, as your base.

ENJOY!!

#lowcarbrecipes #healthyfoodshare #highprotein #ketorecipes #healthyrecipes
summary: Sheet pan chicken with lime, paprika, and oregano served with pickled shallots, avocado salsa, and cilantro yogurt sauce.

caption:
Spicy Sweet Potato & Halloumi Tray Bake 🌶️

(By the way, I've put together a free guide with high-protein, high-fibre recipes just like this one. All quick to make, genuinely filling, and designed for women in midlife who want to eat well without spending all evening in the kitchen.
Drop the word GUIDE in the comments and I'll send it straight to you 💛)

This one's got everything. Spiced sweet potato, crispy-edged halloumi, black beans, roasted red pepper and onion, then a lime yoghurt drizzle over the top with fresh coriander and chilli. The colours alone are worth making it for. And the halloumi going golden at the edges in the oven is genuinely one of the best textures in cooking.

Serves 4
Macros (per portion):
~560 kcal · 27g protein · 78g carbs · 18g fat · 19g fibre

Tray:

800g sweet potato, skin on, diced
225g halloumi, sliced into 1cm pieces
1 tin black beans (240g drained)
1 red onion, sliced
1 red pepper, sliced
1 tbsp olive oil
1½ tsp ground cumin
1 tsp smoked paprika
½ tsp chilli flakes (adjust to taste)
Salt & black pepper

Lime Yoghurt:
200g 0% Greek yoghurt
Juice of 1 lime
Zest of ½ lime

To Finish:
Fresh coriander, roughly chopped
1 fresh red chilli, thinly sliced
Lime wedges to serve

Method:

Preheat oven to 200°C (fan 180°C). Toss diced sweet potato (skin on) with olive oil, cumin, smoked paprika, chilli flakes, salt and pepper. Spread in a single layer, don't overcrowd, you want proper colour. Roast for 20 minutes
Add red onion and red pepper, toss through. Back in for 10 minutes
Scatter the black beans across the tray and nestle the halloumi slices on top. Back in for a final 10–12 minutes until the halloumi is golden at the edges and the sweet potato has caught slightly
Mix yoghurt with lime juice, zest
Drizzle over the tray, scatter coriander and fresh red chilli, finish with lime wedges

Nearly 20g fibre per serving, which is brilliant for gut health, steady energy and helping your body process hormones properly. That starts to matter even more for women in midlife.

No fuss. No faff. Just proper food that does your body good 💛

👉 Save this one for an easy midweek tray that practically makes itself. You'll thank yourself.
owner_name: Alex Hall | Women's Health & Menopause Coach
summary: A spiced sweet potato and halloumi tray bake with black beans, roasted peppers, and lime yoghurt, designed as a high-protein, high-fibre meal for midlife women.

caption:
HONEY ROASTED BEETS WITH ORANGE-PECAN-GORGONZOLA CRUMBLE! Honey roasted beets like this don't happen by accident. 🫜 We roast them slowly until they're deeply caramelized — and yes, we use the stems too. They become part of the crumble with orange zest, pecans, and gorgonzola. Layered over ricotta. Finished with honey.

Nothing wasted. Everything intentional.
Textures and flavors 10/10.
Save this for when you want something earthy, bright, and balanced.
•

For the beets:
2 bunches beets (about 8 small/medium beets—stems included)
2 tbsp olive oil, plus more for the stems
1/2 tsp salt, plus more for the stems
1/4 tsp pepper 
1 tbsp honey, divided 
Fresh thyme stems (4-6)
•
For the crumble:
1/4 cup toasted pecans
2 oz Gorgonzola 
Handful arugula
1 tsp orange zest
Salt
Pepper
•
For serving:
1/2 cup Ricotta 
Honey 
•
1️⃣Preheat the oven to 425. Line a sheet pan with parchment paper and set aside. 
Peel beets and cut into small chunks, res reserving stems. Next, chop the stems into tiny pieces and set aside. 2️⃣Add the beets to a bowl with the oil, salt, pepper and 1/2 the honey. Toss and spread on a sheet pan. Drizzle the remaining honey and add the thyme throughout. Place in the oven for 30-35 minutes, tossing halfway.3️⃣Add the stems to a small sheet pan, drizzle with 1/2 tbsp olive oil and season with some salt. Roast for 15 minutes, until softened and slightly crisp. 4️⃣While everything roasts, make the crumble. Add the pecans to a cutting board and begin to chop, then add the cheese and chop again. Add the arugula and continue to chop everything together. Add the orange zest, salt and pepper and then add the roasted beet stems when they are done. Toss together to form a crumble. 5️⃣Spread the ricotta onto a plate, top with the beets, then the crumble then a drizzle of honey. 
•
#vegetableforward
#beets
#seasonalingredients
#foodreel
#homecooking
summary: Honey roasted beets with orange-pecan-gorgonzola crumble served over ricotta, using all parts of the beet including stems.

caption:
SAVE this recipe for dinner tonight and thank Papa Tea in the comments for this recipe 🤭

➡️ Recipe: Papa Tea's Black Pepper Chicken 
Serves 3-4 
* 5-6 stalks celery, cut on a bias in 1/4 inch pieces (about 4 cups) 
* 4-5 cloves garlic, roughly minced 
* 1 tbsp course ground black pepper 
* 2 tbsp cooking oil
* 1 tsp sesame oil 

Chicken—
* 1lb chicken breast or thigh, thinly sliced 
* 1/2 tbsp soy sauce 
* 1/2 tsp chicken bouillon 
* 1/4 tsp baking soda 

Sauce—
* 1/2 cup low sodium chicken broth or water 
* 2 tbsp shaoxing wine 
* 2 tbsp oyster sauce 
* 1 tbsp dark soy sauce 
* 1/2 tbsp soy sauce 
* 1/2 tsp sugar 

Slurry— 
* 1 tbsp cornstarch 
* 2 tbsp water 

1. Marinate thinly sliced chicken with baking soda, soy sauce, chicken bouillon. Mix well and set aside. 
2. Sauce: In a small bowl, combine chicken broth, shaoxing wine, oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, soy sauce, and sugar. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a wok, heat about 2 tablespoons of oil. Add garlic and sauté for a few seconds or until fragrant. Add marinated chicken and spread it out evenly and leave stove on high heat for 2-3 mins on each side or until cooked through and lightly golden. 
4. Make a pit in the center, and add celery. Sauté for 2-3 minutes.
5. Add the black pepper then pour in the sauce and bring to boil. Cook until your desired texture for the celery. About 2-5 mins.
6. Combine cornstarch and water to make slurry. Ensuring that the cornstarch is completely dissolved then add in to the wok immediately to thicken the sauce. 
7. Finish it off with a drizzle of sesame oil.  Give one last toss. Serve with rice or enjoy by itself! 

#easyrecipes #blackpepperchicken #chinesefood #recipes #takeout
summary: Papa Tea's black pepper chicken recipe with marinated chicken, celery, and savory sauce served over rice.

caption:
My mom's signature biryani 🧡
Serves 10-12 adults 

2 kgs chicken or mutton 
1.75 cups oil (2 cups if making mutton)
2.5 large handfuls finely sliced onions (about 3 medium onions)
6 pieces each green cardamoms and cloves 
3 inches cinnamon 
2-2.5 tsp red chilli powder 
1/2 tsp turmeric powder 
2 tsp coriander powder 
4 heaped tsps salt
6 tsps each ginger and garlic pastes
One handful chopped coriander 
3/4 handful chopped mint 
2-4 whole chillies 
3 medium tomatoes
1.5 cups whipped yoghurt 
6 cups rice (250 ml measure cup) 
3 limes 
2 handfuls salt for the rice water 

Method:
Heat oil and add the whole spices. Add onions and fry till golden brown. Add ginger and garlic pastes, chicken/mutton, mint, coriander, chillies and sauté. 

Add the powdered spices and salt, sauté till fragrant (3-4 mins), then add tomatoes and cook on high heat till oil rises up. Remove about 1 cup of the oil, add one lime to it and set aside. 

Add yoghurt and cook the gravy till oil rises. To avoid overcooking the chicken, remove it and reduce the gravy, then add the chicken back. (If making mutton, add 1 cup water to the mutton and cook covered on medium-low heat till tender, make sure to stir occasionally to avoid it sticking to the pot). The gravy is right when moisture has fully reduced, the oil has risen and the meat is well coated. Add the remaining limes to the gravy and adjust salt if needed.

As the gravy cooks, wash basmati rice till water runs clear and soak max 20 mins (time the soaking according to the protein you're cooking).

Alongside, set a large pot of water to boil, add fresh mint leaves, the lime peels and salt. Make sure the water is salty. When it comes to a rolling boil, add the drained rice and cook uncovered till 3/4th done, till you feel a slight bite right at the core of the rice grain. Remove lime peels and drain immediately.

Layer hot gravy at the bottom of the large pot, top with the steaming rice, and the reserved oil. Cover with a lid wrapped with a wet cloth, place something heavy on the lid, and keep a heavy pan under the pot. 

Steam on high heat for 10 minutes, and low heat for 15-25 mins till heavy steam rises through the pot.

Enjoy ❤️
summary: A detailed recipe for mom's signature biryani serving 10-12 people, featuring layered meat and rice with aromatic spices.

caption:
Oh my god! I am going to blow my own trumpet and tell you that this was finger licking, smack in the face - delicious! I'm making it again this weekend. My whole family loved it, Jabir didn't want to touch anything else on the table. Definitely worth saving for a special occasion or just a lovely weekend. The juicy chicken soaked up the spicy, aromatic sauce. Each bite was so flavourful, the thick gravy just got soaked up by my naan 🤤 

Recipe: 

In a karahi or deep pot, heat a generous amount of oil. Add 1 tbsp coarse black pepper and 1 tbsp whole cumin seeds and let them sizzle and release their aroma.

Add 5 medium onions (finely chopped) and cook until they turn beautifully golden brown. Once browned, stir in 5 cloves garlic (finely chopped) and 2 tsp ginger purée. Let that cook for a couple of minutes until fragrant.

Add your chicken pieces – I used about 20 pieces (legs and thighs) – and give everything a good mix so the chicken is coated in all that flavour.

Stir in ¼ tsp turmeric, then after a few minutes add 1 heaped tsp coriander powder.
Tip: Toast about 2 tsp coriander seeds and grind them fresh – it makes a huge difference to the depth of flavour.

Next add 1 tbsp chilli flakes and 1 tbsp Kashmiri chilli powder. Put the lid on, lower the heat and let it cook gently for about 35 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Remove the lid, turn the heat up high, and add 3 finely chopped tomatoes, a handful of fresh methi leaves (fenugreek), 1 tbsp salt (adjust to taste), and 2 frozen cubes of green chillies.

Let it bubble away for a few minutes, then place the lid back on slightly ajar. Once you see the oil rising to the top, your karahi is ready.

Serve it hot with my garlicky cheesy naan… trust me, you'll want to scoop up every last bit. 😍

#alinahomecook #reelsinstagram #chickenmethi #chickenrecipe #recipe
summary: Chicken methi karahi recipe with caramelized onions, aromatic spices, and fresh fenugreek leaves served with naan.

caption:
✅ONE PAN ROASTED CHICKEN DINNER

This is one of those healthy dinners that's so easy to make and SO good. The veggies turn out unbelievably delicious since they are roasting up underneath the chicken, and the chicken comes out super juicy and flavorful. When its done cooking, make sure to turn off the heat and let the pan continue cooking with the residual heat in the oven. It becomes soft and soaked with the chicken juices and SO good. 

Here is how I made it:

1.Preheat oven to 400F.

2.Add 4 bone-in skin-on chicken thighs to bowl. You can use 2lbs of thighs, drumsticks, or any chicken piece you like. Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil. Season with salt & pepper, the zest + juice of a large lemon, 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp oregano, 1/2 tsp cayenne pepper, & 1 tbsp sweet paprika. To add flavor and color, add 2 tbsp tomato paste and 3-4 minced garlic cloves. Mix really well, and if you have the time, let this marinate for a couple hours.

3.Next, I cut up half a butternut squash into small cubes (this is key so it cooks all the way through!) and sliced up a handful broccoli florets.Drizzle with olive oil, season with a pinch of salt, 1/2 tbsp oregano, and 1/2 tbsp garlic powder, and place at the bottom of an oven safe pan.

5.Place the chicken on top of the veggies, and if there is any leftover chicken marinate spoon it over the veggies. Pop into the oven at 400F for 40 mins. Once done, turn off the heat then let the pan sit in the oven for 30 minutes without the heat on to soften up the veggies and soak up the flavors even more.

6.While that's going, make your sauce by mixing 3 tbsp mayo, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic powder, the zest and juice of 1 small lemon, and a pinch of salt. You can add a tablespoon or two of water to thin it out, as needed.

7.Remove pan from the oven, plate it up, top with finely chopped fresh herbs, a little sauce, and enjoy. 

Eat as is, with regular rice, or if you want more protein my @kaizenfoodco high protein rice.

If you make this, and you want more healthy recipes, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#chickenrecipe #healthyrecipes #healthyfoodshare #proteinrecipes #mediterraneanfood
summary: One-pan roasted chicken thighs with vegetables and lemon-herb seasoning, served with paprika mayo sauce.

caption:
Vegetarian Mexican Lentils 🌮🥣
Hearty • Flavorful • Easy

Ingredients:

1 cup dried lentils, rinsed

1 small onion, chopped

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tbsp olive oil

1 cup canned diced tomatoes

2 cups vegetable broth or water

1 tsp cumin

1 tsp chili powder

½ tsp paprika

Salt & black pepper to taste

½ cup corn (optional)

Fresh cilantro & lime juice (optional)

Instructions:

Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat. Sauté onion for 3–4 minutes until soft.

Add garlic, cumin, chili powder, and paprika and cook for 30 seconds.

Stir in lentils, diced tomatoes, and vegetable broth.

Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 20–25 minutes until lentils are tender.

Stir in corn, season with salt and pepper, and cook 2–3 more minutes.

Serve with fresh cilantro and a squeeze of lime.

🌿 Great in tacos, rice bowls, or as a healthy main dish!
