caption:
Quinoa Salad so good it almost makes you forget it's healthy. 

Serves 4 to 6
 
For the salad:
3 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil
1.5 cups (about 300 grams) white quinoa
3 cups (750 ml) room-temperature water
3 small cucumbers, diced
1 branch green onions, diced
1 (400-gram) can chickpeas, rinsed well and drained
Handful parsley, chopped
150 grams feta cheese, crumbled
¾ cup (120 grams) pitted green or black olives, sliced
 
For the dressing:
⅔ cup (165 ml) extra-virgin olive oil
⅓ cup (75 ml) fresh lemon juice
1 tablespoon salt
 
Heat the oil in a deep pot on medium-high heat. Add the quinoa and stir well. Add the water and stir once more. Cover the pot and bring to a boil, watching it closely so it doesn't bubble over. Reduce the heat to simmer and cook, covered, until all the liquid is absorbed, about 15 to 20 minutes. Transfer to a large serving bowl and let cool.
 
In a separate bowl, combine the cucumbers, green onions, chickpeas, parsley, feta cheese and olives. Add this to the cooled quinoa.
 
Make the dressing: In a mixing cup, whisk the oil, lemon juice and salt together. Pour the dressing over the salad. Toss to mix.
summary: A Mediterranean quinoa salad with cucumbers, chickpeas, feta, and a lemon-olive oil dressing, serving 4-6.

caption:
ONE PAN TANDOORI CHICKEN + RICE 🌶️ • flavorful tandoori chicken + seasoned rice topped with a yogurt chutney. ✨Ramadan Series episode 13 of 30 ✨ 

Perfect Iftar if you ask me. It's light yet packed with flavor and comes together in one pan for easy cleanup. 

🌶️ WHAT YOU'LL NEED: chicken thighs • plain yogurt • minced garlic + spices + oil • basmati rice • lemon • your favorite chutney/sauce. 

🌶️ RECIPE + INSTRUCTIONS:
-Wash, rinse, and soak 1.5 cups rice.
-to a bowl add 1 lb boneless and skinless chicken thighs 
(i had 5 pieces)
-add 1/2 cup plain yogurt + 1 tsp minced garlic + 1/4 cup oil.
-then SPICES: 1 tsp garam masala, ground cumin, paprika, and turmeric. 1.5 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp black pepper, and the juice of 1 lemon. Mix well. If you want a more "red" color you can add food coloring or increase paprika. 

-cook chicken on both sides and set aside. 
-to the same pan with pan drippings/oil from chicken add drained rice
-season with 1 tsp salt, 1 tsp ground cumin, and 1/2 tsp turmeric. 
-toast/sear for 2-3 minutes 
-add 3 cups of water 
-place chicken back on top. let it come to a boil. lower heat to low. Cover lid and let it cook for 25 minutes. 
-once done add your garnishes and serve with a yogurt chutney. 

🌶️🌶️🌶️

caption:
Maple Sriracha Roasted Cauliflower

Servings: 4
Prep time: 10 minutes
Cook time: 25 minutes

Ingredients
1 medium head cauliflower, cut into florets
2 tablespoons olive oil
2 tablespoons maple syrup
1–2 tablespoons sriracha sauce (adjust for spice level)
1 teaspoon garlic powder
1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/4 teaspoon black pepper
1 tablespoon soy sauce or tamari
1 teaspoon lemon juice
2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley or cilantro (for garnish)
1 tablespoon sesame seeds (optional)

Instructions

Preheat your oven to 200°C (400°F). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, maple syrup, sriracha, soy sauce, lemon juice, garlic powder, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.

Add the cauliflower florets to the bowl and toss well until all the pieces are evenly coated with the sauce.

Spread the cauliflower in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet. Avoid overcrowding so the cauliflower roasts instead of steaming.

Roast for 20–25 minutes, turning halfway through, until the cauliflower is tender and the edges are slightly crispy and caramelized.

Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley or cilantro and sesame seeds if using.

Serving Suggestions
Serve as a healthy side dish, add to grain bowls, stuff into wraps, or enjoy as a flavorful vegetarian appetizer.

Tip
For extra caramelization, broil the cauliflower for the last 2–3 minutes.

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie #roastedcauliflower
summary: A maple sriracha roasted cauliflower recipe with garlic, smoked paprika, and soy sauce, ready in 35 minutes.

caption:
oven baked CHICKEN KOOBIDEH and RICE• no grill needed! oven baked, juicy on the inside, saffron butter brushed on the outside- served over saffron basmati rice + warm bread. ✨Ramadan Series episode 18 of 30✨

💛🍚 no fuss oven baked chicken koobideh
-rice thrown in the rice cooker 
-skewers made with bamboo skewers wrapped in foil 
-cooked under "high broil" for less than 20 minutes 
-saffron butter is melted butter with added saffron threads or liquid saffron 

RECIPE + INSTRUCTIONS:
-2 lbs ground chicken in a bowl
-in a processor combine: 1 white onion, 1/2 bunch cilantro, 1 green bell pepper. process/blend then squeeze all the liquid out. 
-add the mixture (without liquid) to chicken
-add 1 egg, 2 tbsp panko bread crumbs, 1 tsp minced garlic 🧂 1 tsp ground cumin, ground coriander, sumac, paprika, turmeric. 1.5 tsp salt. 1/2 tsp black pepper. Mix well. Refrigerate for minimum 30 minutes. 

-with wet hands grab the mixture and begin to form around your skewers- once even all around form indents with your fingers. 
-place onto a baking sheet with peppers and onion wedges on the side (for "grilled" veggies)
-place into the oven on HIGH BROIL for 12-15 minutes (this depends on your oven). You can flip once half way through- i left mine as is. 
-once you see the top nice and charred- remove. 
-brush with melted saffron butter 
-serve over rice with a side of warm bread 
-add those "grilled onions" to the side 
-sprinkle with sumac 
+ ENJOY! 💛🍚

#ramadan #chicken #rice #recipe #food
summary: Oven-baked chicken koobideh recipe with saffron butter and basmati rice, broiled on high for a charred exterior.

caption:
🥦 Oven-Roasted Vegetables

via @ikosun_kitchen

So flavorful and wholesome! Lightly steamed broccoli and cauliflower, roasted with potatoes, peppers, carrots, and chickpeas in a spiced olive oil sauce. Tender, aromatic, and seriously satisfying.

Ingredients
	•	1 cauliflower, florets
	•	1 broccoli, florets
	•	3–4 potatoes, thinly sliced
	•	1–2 red peppers, sliced lengthwise
	•	2 carrots, thinly sliced
	•	1½ cups pre-cooked chickpeas
	•	70 ml olive oil
	•	3 garlic cloves, grated
	•	Small spoon each: black pepper, oregano, curry powder
	•	½ tsp red pepper powder
	•	½ tsp chili flakes
	•	Salt

Optional dip: Mix yogurt with dill, parsley, garlic, black pepper, and salt

⸻

Instructions
	1.	Prep vegetables: Separate cauliflower and broccoli into florets. Optional: briefly boil, then drain. Slice potatoes, carrots, and peppers.
	2.	Season: Place vegetables and chickpeas on a baking tray. Mix olive oil, garlic, black pepper, oregano, curry powder, red pepper powder, chili flakes, and salt. Pour over vegetables and toss to coat.
	3.	Roast: Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C for 45 minutes. After 20 minutes, turn and mix vegetables once.
	4.	Serve: Optional yogurt dip on the side.
summary: Oven-roasted vegetables with chickpeas, potatoes, and spiced olive oil, served with optional yogurt dip.

caption:
Crispy Sweet Potato Toasts with Melted Brie, Cranberries & Honey Garlic Walnuts

Golden roasted sweet potato slices topped with creamy melted Brie, sweet-tart cranberries, crunchy walnuts, fresh herbs, and a glossy honey glaze. Here's the full recipe to recreate it:

📝 Ingredients (Serves 4)
🍠 Base

2 large sweet potatoes, sliced into 1-inch thick rounds

2 tbsp olive oil

½ tsp salt

¼ tsp black pepper

🧀 Topping

6–8 oz Brie cheese, sliced

½ cup dried cranberries

🌰 Honey Garlic Walnuts

½ cup walnuts, roughly chopped

2 tbsp honey

1 small garlic clove, finely minced

½ tsp chili flakes (optional)

Pinch of salt

🌿 Garnish

Fresh rosemary sprigs

Chopped parsley or thyme

👩‍🍳 Instructions
1️⃣ Roast the Sweet Potatoes

Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).

Arrange sweet potato slices on a lined baking sheet.

Brush with olive oil and season with salt & pepper.

Roast for 25–30 minutes, flipping halfway, until crispy on edges and tender inside.

2️⃣ Add the Brie

Place Brie slices on hot sweet potatoes.

Return to oven for 5–7 minutes, until Brie melts but still holds shape.

3️⃣ Make Honey Garlic Walnuts

In a small pan over medium heat, toast walnuts 2–3 minutes.

Add honey, garlic, chili flakes, and salt.

Stir for 1–2 minutes until glossy and sticky.

Remove from heat (they'll crisp slightly as they cool).

4️⃣ Assemble

Top melted Brie with dried cranberries.

Spoon honey garlic walnuts over the top.

Garnish with rosemary and chopped herbs.

Drizzle any remaining honey glaze over everything.

✨ Flavor Boost Ideas

✔ Add a splash of balsamic glaze
✔ Sprinkle orange zest for brightness
✔ Swap walnuts for pecans
✔ Use goat cheese instead of Brie
#recipeideaswelcome #mediterraneanrecipes #EasyMediterraneanRecipes #recipeideasbydes
summary: A recipe for crispy roasted sweet potato toasts topped with melted Brie, cranberries, and honey garlic walnuts.

caption:

caption:
🥗 Perfect Warm Lentil Salad with Roasted Veggies & Feta

⏱ Time

Prep Time: 15 minutes

Cook Time: 30 minutes

Total Time: ~45 minutes

🍽 Servings

4 servings

🧾 Ingredients
For the Lentils

1 cup dried green or brown lentils

3 cups water or vegetable broth

1 bay leaf (optional)

¼ tsp salt

For the Roasted Vegetables

1 zucchini, sliced

1 red bell pepper, chopped

1 cup cherry tomatoes

1 small red onion, sliced

2 tbsp olive oil

½ tsp dried oregano

½ tsp paprika

¼ tsp black pepper

Salt to taste

For the Lemon Dressing

3 tbsp extra-virgin olive oil

2 tbsp fresh lemon juice

1 small garlic clove, minced

1 tsp Dijon mustard

½ tsp honey (optional)

¼ tsp salt

¼ tsp black pepper

For Serving

½ cup feta cheese, crumbled

¼ cup fresh parsley, chopped

2 tbsp toasted pine nuts or walnuts (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions
1️⃣ Cook the Lentils

Rinse lentils under cold water.

Add lentils, water (or broth), and bay leaf to a pot.

Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 18–20 minutes until tender but not mushy.

Drain excess liquid and discard the bay leaf.

2️⃣ Roast the Vegetables

Preheat oven to 200°C / 400°F.

Spread zucchini, bell pepper, tomatoes, and onion on a baking sheet.

Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle oregano, paprika, salt, and pepper.

Roast 20–25 minutes until vegetables are tender and slightly caramelized.

3️⃣ Make the Dressing

In a small bowl whisk together:

olive oil

lemon juice

garlic

Dijon mustard

honey

salt and pepper

4️⃣ Assemble the Warm Salad

In a large bowl combine warm lentils and roasted vegetables.

Pour the dressing over the mixture and toss gently.

Top with crumbled feta and fresh parsley.

Sprinkle pine nuts or walnuts for extra crunch if desired.

🍽 Serving Ideas

Serve warm with:

grilled chicken or fish

toasted pita bread

hummus or yogurt sauce

a fresh cucumber salad

⭐ Tips for the Best Salad

✔ Roast vegetables until slightly golden and caramelized for deeper flavor.
✔ Add arugula or spinach just before serving for extra greens.
✔ A splash of balsamic glaze on top makes it even more delicious.
#recipeideasbydes #MediterraneanFlavors #mediterraneansea #mediterraneansea
summary: A warm lentil salad with roasted zucchini, bell pepper, tomatoes, and onion, topped with feta cheese and lemon dressing.

caption:
The Viral 10 minutes 
Chilli Cheese Toast Recipe

Ingredients (Makes 2 Toasts)

White bread slices – 2 (toasted)
Green chilli – 2, finely chopped
Onion – 2 teaspoons, finely chopped
Tomato – 1 teaspoon, finely diced (seeds removed preferred)
Coriander leaves – 1 teaspoon, finely chopped
Processed cheese – 150 g, grated
Cheddar cheese – 30 g, grated
Egg yolk – 1 (optional, for richness & binding)

Method
Prepare the Cheese Mixture
In a mixing bowl, combine:
• Grated processed cheese
• Grated cheddar cheese
• Chopped green chillies
• Chopped onion, tomato, and coriander
• Egg yolk (optional — adds richness and helps the mixture set)
Mix everything well until it forms a thick spreadable mixture.

Prepare the Bread

Toast the bread slices lightly so they are firm and won't get soggy.
(You can spread a thin layer of butter if you like.)
Assemble
Spread the cheese mixture generously over the toasted bread slices, ensuring even coverage right to the edges.

Cook

Choose any method you prefer:

Option A: Oven/OTG
• Preheat to 180°C
• Place toasts on a tray
• Bake for 4–6 minutes until cheese melts and edges turn golden

Option B: Tawa/Griddle
Heat on low flame
Place toast, cheese side up
Cover with a lid
Cook for 2-3 minutes till cheese melts

Option C: Air Fryer
Cook at 170°C for 3–5 minutes

caption:
🧀 Irresistibly Cheesy Zucchini Corn Tomato Bake with Parmesan Crust

This cheesy zucchini corn tomato bake is a colorful, comforting dish packed with fresh vegetables and topped with a crispy Parmesan crust. It's perfect as a side dish, vegetarian main, or potluck favorite.

⏱ Prep Time: 15 minutes
⏱ Cook Time: 30–35 minutes
🍽 Servings: 4–6

🥗 Ingredients

2 medium zucchini, sliced into half-moons

1 cup sweet corn kernels (fresh, canned, or frozen)

1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved

1 small onion, finely chopped

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese

½ cup grated Parmesan cheese

½ cup cream or half-and-half

1 tablespoon olive oil

1 teaspoon Italian seasoning

½ teaspoon salt

¼ teaspoon black pepper

For the Parmesan crust

¼ cup breadcrumbs (optional for extra crunch)

¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese

1 tablespoon melted butter

🍳 Instructions
1️⃣ Preheat the oven

Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Lightly grease a baking dish.

2️⃣ Sauté vegetables

Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and cook 3–4 minutes until softened.
Add garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.

3️⃣ Add zucchini and corn

Add zucchini and corn to the skillet and cook for 4–5 minutes until slightly tender.

4️⃣ Combine ingredients

Transfer the vegetables to the baking dish.
Add cherry tomatoes, cream, mozzarella, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Mix gently to combine.

5️⃣ Prepare the crust

In a small bowl mix:

breadcrumbs

Parmesan cheese

melted butter

Sprinkle evenly over the vegetable mixture.

6️⃣ Bake

Bake for 30–35 minutes until bubbly and the top becomes golden and crispy.

7️⃣ Serve

Let the bake rest for 5 minutes, then serve warm.

🍽 Serving Suggestions

This dish pairs well with:

Grilled chicken or steak

Roasted fish

Fresh green salad

Garlic bread

It can also be served as a light vegetarian main dish.

💡 Tips

✔ Slice zucchini evenly for consistent cooking.
✔ If using frozen corn, thaw and drain before cooking.
✔ For extra flavor, add feta cheese or cheddar.
✔ Broil for 2 minutes at the end for a crispier crust.
#MediterraneanEscape #mediterraneanfood #EasyMediterraneanRecipes #pastarecipe
summary: A baked zucchini, corn, and tomato casserole with mozzarella and a crispy Parmesan crust.

caption:
Veggie-packed baked omelette 🥕🥦

A simple oven-baked omelette loaded with vegetables and feta.
Easy to prepare and perfect for breakfast, brunch, or a light lunch. 

🧾 Ingredients
	•	4 eggs
	•	1 carrot, grated
	•	1 red onion, thinly sliced
	•	A few cauliflower florets, finely chopped
	•	A few broccoli florets, finely chopped
	•	1 tomato, sliced
	•	50 g feta cheese, crumbled
	•	1 tsp garlic powder
	•	1 tsp paprika
	•	½ tsp thyme
	•	½ tsp turmeric
	•	Salt & black pepper

👩‍🍳 Method

Preheat the oven to 180°C (356°F).

In a bowl, whisk the eggs.

Add the grated carrot, onion, cauliflower, broccoli, tomato, and feta.

Season with garlic powder, paprika, thyme, turmeric, salt, and pepper.

Mix everything well.

Pour the mixture into a round baking dish lined with parchment paper.

Bake for 30–35 minutes, until set and lightly golden.

Let it cool slightly, slice, and serve.

Enjoy warm or cold.
Perfect on its own or with a simple salad.

caption:
Quesadillas with Black Bean and Avocado:

Ingredients (for 2–3 servings):

4 large whole wheat or regular tortillas

1 cup canned black beans, rinsed and drained

1 ripe avocado, sliced or mashed

1 cup shredded cheese (cheddar, Monterey Jack, or mozzarella)

½ small red onion, finely chopped

1 small tomato, diced (optional)

1–2 tsp olive oil or cooking spray

Salt and pepper to taste

Fresh cilantro for garnish (optional)

Sour cream or Greek yogurt for serving (optional)

Lime wedges (optional)

Instructions:

Prep ingredients:

Mash or slice the avocado.

Drain and rinse the black beans.

Chop the onion, tomato, and cilantro if using.

Assemble quesadillas:

Lay one tortilla on a clean surface.

Spread a layer of shredded cheese over half the tortilla.

Add black beans, avocado, onion, and tomato evenly on top.

Season lightly with salt and pepper.

Fold the tortilla in half over the filling.

Cook quesadillas:

Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and add a small amount of olive oil.

Place the folded quesadilla in the skillet.

Cook 2–3 minutes per side, or until golden brown and the cheese is melted.

Remove from skillet and let it cool slightly before cutting.

Serve:

Cut each quesadilla into wedges.

Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with sour cream/Greek yogurt and lime wedges.

Tips:

For extra flavor, add a sprinkle of cumin, chili powder, or smoked paprika to the beans.

You can swap black beans with pinto beans or refried beans.

Use a nonstick pan or a little cooking spray to avoid sticking.

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie #quesadillas
summary: Recipe for black bean and avocado quesadillas with cheese, served with optional toppings.

caption:
🍎Cinnamon Apple Whipped Yogurt Bowl

PER SERVING (3): 205 calories, 15g protein
FULL RECIPE: 615 calories, 45g protein

Here is a simple, indulgent weeknight treat if you've got a sweet tooth, but trying to keep things healthy. This has 205 calories and 15g protein, and you can add 1/2 scoop of vanilla protein if you want to add even more protein. It has warm apples with a creamy whipped yogurt base that's so good, and some finely diced walnuts for a little bit of texture and crunch.

✅Comment "TREATS" and I'll send you my free mini healthy desserts ebook!

INGREDIENTS

APPLES:
2 small apples, finely diced
1 tbsp powdered monkfruit (or sugar)
1 tsp cinnamon

WHIPPED YOGURT:
1.5 cups 0% Fage Greek yogurt
4 tbsp whipped cream cheese
2 tbsp powdered monkfruit
1 tbsp cinnamon
Splash of vanilla extract

TOPPING:
2 tbsp finely chopped walnuts
Extra cinnamon for topping
Optional: melted white chocolate chips for a richer dessert, or vanilla protein powder for more protein

Here's how I made it:

1.Add the diced apples to a bowl and mix with the powdered monkfruit and cinnamon until evenly coated. Air fry at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, shaking halfway through, until the apples are soft and caramelized. You can also cook them down on medium heat on the stovetop if you prefer.

2.While the apples cook, add the Greek yogurt, whipped cream cheese, powdered monkfruit, cinnamon, and vanilla to a small food processor. Process for 30 seconds until smooth, thick, and creamy, adjust as you wish.

3.Divide the whipped yogurt mixture into 3 bowls or containers. Top each with a portion of the warm apples, some finely chopped walnuts, and a little extra cinnamon.

4.If you want a richer dessert, drizzle some melted white chocolate chips over the top.

It's such a good healthy dessert and a great high protein dessert combo!

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!!

#healthyrecipes #highprotein #healthydessert #easyrecipes #proteinrecipes
summary: High-protein cinnamon apple whipped yogurt bowl recipe with 205 calories and 15g protein per serving.

caption:
🥬✨ GREEN GODDESS CABBAGE SALAD

This salad is ridiculously good.

Fresh. Creamy. Crunchy. Bright with lemon and herbs.
The cabbage softens beautifully when you massage it with lemon and sea salt, then it gets tossed in the most luscious avocado green goddess dressing.

It's clean, refreshing and incredibly nourishing — the kind of salad that makes your body feel amazing.

Even better? It keeps in the fridge for up to 4 days, so it's perfect for meal prep.

You can enjoy it just as it is or turn it into a full meal by adding your favourite protein. I love folding through cannellini beans or edamame, or serving it alongside steamed fish or tender poached chicken breast.

Simple food. Real ingredients. Total wellbeing.

Full recipe with extra notes is on my website
✨ teresacutter.com

Save this one — you'll want to make it again.

🥬 GREEN GODDESS CABBAGE SALAD

Serves 4

SALAD

500 g green cabbage, finely chopped - you can also use chopped cos lettuce for a refreshing, juicy crunch..but it will only keep for a few hours.
Juice of 1 lemon
Pinch sea salt
3 spring onions, sliced
Handful cashew nuts or pine nuts

GREEN GODDESS DRESSING

1 avocado
1 bunch basil leaves
Small handful parsley
30 g baby spinach
1 spring onion
Juice of 1 lemon
60 ml extra virgin olive oil
1 tsp sea salt
2–3 tbsp nutritional yeast flakes (optional)
120 ml cold water

METHOD

Place the chopped cabbage into a large bowl. Add the lemon juice and a pinch of sea salt. Using clean hands, massage the cabbage for about 1 minute to soften the fibres and tenderise it.

Add the spring onions and cashews.

Place all dressing ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.

Pour the dressing over the cabbage and toss well until everything is beautifully coated.

Serve immediately or refrigerate for later.

Keeps well in the fridge for up to 4 days.

✨ Add cannellini beans or edamame for extra protein
✨ Also delicious with steamed fish or poached chicken

summary: A green goddess cabbage salad with massaged cabbage, avocado-basil dressing, and nuts that keeps for up to 4 days.

caption:
Crustless Quiche – Full Recipe

Ingredients (Serves 6)

6 large eggs
1 cup milk (or half-and-half for a richer taste)
1 cup shredded cheese (cheddar, mozzarella, Swiss, or feta)
1 cup cooked vegetables (spinach, mushrooms, bell peppers, onions, or zucchini)
1/2 cup cooked protein (optional: bacon, ham, or cooked chicken)
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp black pepper
1/2 tsp garlic powder
1/2 tsp dried oregano or thyme
1 tbsp olive oil or butter (for sautéing vegetables)
1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese (optional, for extra flavor)

Instructions

Preheat the oven
Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly grease a 9-inch pie dish or baking dish.

Cook the vegetables
Heat olive oil or butter in a pan over medium heat. Sauté onions, mushrooms, or any firm vegetables for about 3–4 minutes until slightly softened. If using spinach, cook until wilted.

Prepare the egg mixture
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and oregano until smooth.

Assemble the quiche
Spread the cooked vegetables and optional protein evenly in the greased baking dish. Sprinkle the shredded cheese on top.

Add the egg mixture
Pour the egg mixture over the vegetables and cheese. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top if using.

Bake
Bake for 35–40 minutes, or until the center is set and the top is lightly golden.

Cool and serve
Let the quiche cool for 5–10 minutes before slicing. Serve warm or at room temperature.

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie #crustlessquiche
summary: Full recipe and instructions for a baked crustless quiche with eggs, vegetables, cheese, and optional protein.

caption:
🥬 Cottage Cheese & Spinach Crustless Quiche

This crustless quiche is a light, protein-packed dish that works perfectly for breakfast, brunch, or a simple dinner. Using cottage cheese keeps it creamy while skipping the crust makes it lower in carbs and quicker to prepare.

⏱ Time

Prep Time: 10 minutes

Cook Time: 35–40 minutes

Total Time: ~45–50 minutes

Servings: 6 slices

🧀 Ingredients

1 cup cottage cheese

1 cup fresh spinach, chopped (or ½ cup frozen, thawed and drained)

4 large eggs

½ cup shredded mozzarella cheese

¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese

¼ cup milk (or cream for richer texture)

1 small onion, finely chopped

1 clove garlic, minced

1 tablespoon olive oil or butter

½ teaspoon salt

¼ teaspoon black pepper

½ teaspoon dried oregano or Italian seasoning

Optional: pinch of nutmeg or red pepper flakes

🍳 Instructions
1️⃣ Preheat the oven

Preheat your oven to 180°C (350°F). Lightly grease a 9-inch baking dish or pie pan.

2️⃣ Cook the vegetables

Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook for 3–4 minutes until soft.
Add garlic and spinach and cook for 1–2 minutes until wilted. Remove from heat.

3️⃣ Mix the egg base

In a large bowl whisk together:

eggs

cottage cheese

milk

mozzarella

Parmesan

salt, pepper, and oregano

4️⃣ Combine

Stir the cooked spinach mixture into the egg mixture and mix well.

5️⃣ Bake

Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Bake for 35–40 minutes, or until the center is set and the top is lightly golden.

6️⃣ Rest & serve

Let the quiche rest for 5–10 minutes before slicing. This helps it firm up.

🍽 Serving Ideas

Serve with:

Fresh tomato salad

Avocado slices

Light green salad

Whole-grain toast (optional)

💡 Tips

✔ Drain spinach well to avoid a watery quiche.
✔ For extra flavor add feta cheese or cheddar.
✔ You can add mushrooms, bell peppers, or cooked bacon.
✔ Store leftovers in the refrigerator up to 3 days.  #recipeideasbydes #EasyMediterraneanRecipes #mediterranean #fblifestylelife
summary: A crustless spinach and cottage cheese quiche that's protein-packed and quick to prepare.

caption:
You guys… this is going to be the last recipe I'll be sharing with my mom for a while 😢😭 But don't worry — we're ending it with a good one.

This is her Chicken Breyani, and trust me when I say it's better than any recipe you'll find on Google.

This whole reel series has been really special to me because the entire family got involved, and that made it even more meaningful ❤️

So here's Part 1: Marinating the Chicken 🌶️ 
Come back tomorrow for Part 2, where I'll show you how we finish and cook the breyani ✨

Chicken Breyani – Part 1: Marinade

Ingredients
• 2 kg chicken pieces 
• 2 tsp coriander seeds 
• 2 tsp cumin seeds (jeera) 
• 2 star anise 
• 2 bay leaves 
• 2 small cinnamon sticks 
• 6–8 green cardamom pods 
• 8–10 cloves 

Ground spices
• 2 tsp cumin powder 
• 2 tsp garam masala 
• 2 tsp coriander powder 
• 1 tsp turmeric 
• 4 tsp salt 
• 4 tsp Kashmiri chilli powder 

Other
• 4 tsp ginger & garlic paste 
• 1½ cups amasi 
(You can substitute with plain yogurt, or milk with a squeeze of lemon juice)

Method
Add the chicken to a large bowl. Add all the whole spices, ground spices, ginger & garlic paste, and the amasi. Mix everything well so the chicken is fully coated. Cover and marinate for a couple of hours, or ideally overnight for the best flavour.

caption:
HIGH PROTEIN MEDITERRANEAN CHICKEN PLATE

Per serving: 524 calories, 56g protein, 15 net carbs.  Makes 5 servings. If you're looking for an easy high protein recipe you'll want on repeat, this is it. And if you're a fan of Mediterranean recipes, it doesn't get any better. The chicken comes out juicy thanks to the marinade and its paired with a cool garlicky yogurt sauce, a bright tomato salad, and you can serve it over regular rice or over a bed of my high-protein Kaizen rice. It packs  20g of protein and just 6 net carbs per serving but any rice or quinoa works great too.

Here's how I made it:

1.Cut 2 lbs chicken thighs into 1.5-2 inch pieces. Toss with 1 tsp olive oil, 1 tbsp each of garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, Aleppo pepper,1/4 tsp cinnamon, 3 pinches of salt & pepper, plus 1.5 tbsp tomato paste, 2 tbsp plain yogurt, and juice of 1 lemon. Mix well and marinate for 2-6 hours, or ideally, overnight.

2.Skewer your chicken (and onions or peppers if you'd like), put them on a sheet pan into the oven at 400F for 32-35 mins, or airfare for 25 mins at 400F, or grill them up on the grill.

3.For the garlicky white Sauce, mix 3 minced garlic cloves, 1 tbsp mayo, 3 tbsp sour cream, juice of ½ lemon, the zest of a lemon, 2 tbsp chopped parsley, salt & pepper. Thin with water if needed.

4.For the tomato Salad, toss half a pint halved cherry tomatoes, 1/3 diced red onion, 3 tbsp fresh parsley, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp sumac, and a pinch of salt. Mix and adjust.

5.Then build it up! I divided this all into five servings. Just spoon your kaizen lowcarb rice at the base, add chicken and the salad, drizzle with garlic sauce, sprinkle fresh parsley and sumac, and enjoy.

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS! Comment "BANGER" and I'll message you my free mini high protein ebook.

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#highproteinmeals #healthyrecipes #lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #mediterraneanfood
summary: High-protein Mediterranean chicken skewers with garlicky yogurt sauce, tomato salad, and rice, 56g protein and 15 net carbs per serving.

caption:
Cucumber avocado crispy rice✨

MY DEBUT COOKBOOK IS OFFICIALLY OUT NOW! It's all about finding your go-to recipes, because once you have those down, cooking feels easier and much more enjoyable. Click the link in my bio to order. 

Crispy Rice:▪️Parchment Paper▪️3 Tbsp Avocado Oil▪️2 Cups Cooked Jasmine Rice (it's important to use jasmine rice not sushi rice)▪️Kosher Salt▪️

Dressing:▪️2 Tbsp Soy Sauce▪️1 Tbsp Sesame Oil▪️3 Tbsp White Vinegar▪️1/4 tsp Sugar▪️

Salad:▪️3 Medium Persian Cucumbers, diced (~1+1/2 Cups)▪️1 Medium Avocado, diced▪️1/3 Cup Shelled Edamame▪️1/4 tsp Sesame Seeds▪️

1️⃣ Preheat the oven to 450F on convection mode (or preheat air fryer to 425F)
2️⃣ Line a small baking sheet with parchment paper and add the avocado oil and rice; toss the rice in the oil and spread into one layer then sprinkle with salt
3️⃣ Convection bake for 10 mins, stir, then return to the oven for another 5-8 mins until the edges of the rice are golden brown and crisp (if you are air frying cut the bake time in half) 
4️⃣ Whisk together the ingredients for the dressing and add the ingredients for the salad to a bowl; pour on the dressing on the salad and toss
5️⃣ Transfer the salad onto plates and top with the crispy rice and a sprinkle of sesame seeds - enjoy!

⏲15 min prep time / 30 min total time

Recipe serves 2 (light lunch portion)
summary: A quick vegetarian recipe for cucumber avocado salad topped with crispy jasmine rice, ready in 30 minutes.

caption:
🍚 Instead of taking away things you love, consider just adding to it to help you hit your goals. So here's a higher fiber cilantro lime rice that also gives you extra protein thanks to the edition of edamame. A lot of different firm beans or lentils can work here too and there are a ton of variations of this idea I've suggested to clients over the years. 

The queen @nutritionbykylie already has a bunch of variations of this concept that I love in case you need more ideas. 🤍
 
Makes 6 servings, each serving provides 3g fiber and 7.7g protein.

1 1/2 cups dry white Jasmine rice
1 1/2 cups frozen edamame, thawed
1/2 cup cilantro or parsley, finely minced
2-3 scallions, thinly sliced
Juice and zest of 1 lime
Kosher salt

Rinse and drain rice 3-5 times under cold water, or until the water runs mostly clear.

Add the drained rice to a rice cooker pot or a medium saucepan (preferably a pan that has a tight fitting glass lid). For rice cooker, add the recommended amount of water suggested by the rice cooker manufacturer. For stovetop, add 1 1/2 cups water plus 3 tbsp of water plus a generous pinch of salt. Place over medium high heat until the water comes to a rapid simmer. Lower the heat to a gentle simmer, then top with the lid. Cook for 13 minutes, or until the rice has absorbed all the water. Make sure not to lift the lid while the rice is cooking.

Once cooked through, remove from heat and allow to naturally steam with the lid still firmly on for 10 minutes before fluffing with a fork or rice paddle.

To the pot add the edamame, scallions, lime zest, and juice. Use a paddle to stir all the ingredients together until well combined. Taste and add additional salt or extra lime juice as needed before enjoying. 

#highfiber #plantbasedrecipes
summary: A high-fiber cilantro lime rice with edamame and scallions that adds protein and fiber without removing favorite foods.

caption:
my go to at home Chipotle bowls 🥙

so easy to make, plus is a great meal prep! 

chicken…
- cut chicken breasts in half and add to a bowl with olive oil 
- season with — lawrys, pepper, onion powder, garlic powder, paprika, lemon pepper, chili powder, and ground cumin 
- let marinate while you prep everything else 
- once ready, cook in a pan on medium heat in olive oil 
- remove chicken from stove and let sit for 3-5 minutes before you cut it up (i feel it stays juicer this way) 

cilantro lime rice…
- in a pot on medium heat; add in olive oil, minced garlic, salt, and pepper 
- then add in your rice (i make 2 cups of rice) 
- let rice cook for a minute or 2 then add in your water (i did 3 cups of water; 1.5 cup for every cup of rice) 
- occasionally stirring until water begins to boil 
- once water begins to boil; add a lid, turn the heat down to low, and let cook for 15 minutes 
- once done, add rice into a big mixing bowl with a whole bunch of cilantro and 3-4 limes

pico…
dice and add everything to a bowl 
- 4 roma tomatoes 
- 1/2 jalapeño 
- 1/4 of a red onion 
- handful of cilantro 
- 1 lime 
- salt & pepper 

corn salsa… 
dice and add everything to a bowl 
- 1 can of white corn 
- 1/4 of a red onion 
- 1/2 jalapeño 
- handful of cilantro 
- 1 lime 
- salt, pepper, onion powder & garlic powder 

salsa…
blend up 
- 1 cup of pace salsa
- 1 cup of crushed tomatoes 
- handful of cilantro 
- 1 lime 
- salt 

serve & ENJOY 🍽️

wearing @oneractive — support link in bio! 

#recipe #mealprep #healthylifestyle #yummy

caption:
It's been a while I know, I'm sorry, but we're back and I'm showing you how to make takeaway right in your own kitchen. 🔥

Ingredients
* 3-4 boneless chicken thighs (sliced thinly)
* 2 portions of egg noodles
* 1 Tbsp each light and dark soy sauce
* 1 Tbsp oyster sauce
* 1 tsp garlic paste/fresh garlic
* 1 Tbsp sugar
* 1 onion (cut into 1/8s)
* Stir fry veg (whatever you like)
* Few tsp of crispy chilli oil (optional)
* Salt and pepper to taste

Method
* In a bowl, mix together chicken and the soy sauce, oyster sauce, garlic and sugar.
* In a hot wok/pan, heat up oil and stir fry veg for a couple of minutes. Remove from pan.
* In the same pan, add crispy chilli oil and throw the chicken in until cooked and sauce is sticky. 
* Go in with the noodles and mix until the noodles are coated. 
* Add the veg back in, salt and pepper to taste, and toss together.
* Plate it up and you can serve with freshly cut spring onions and a wedge of lime if you've got it.

Takes you no longer than it takes to order it. Go ahead, try this one at home. You won't regret it. 👊

#stirfrynoodles #fakeaway #easymeals #chickenchowmein #homecookedmeal

caption:
Would you try these she pan Mediterranean pinwheel kebabs??

If you're trying to eat high protein, this is one of those dishes that look a little fancy but are actually incredibly simple to make. It starts with a spiced beef mixture with onion, garlic, herbs, and walnuts, rolled into a lowcarb tortilla, sliced into little pinwheels, then baked on a sheet pan with tomatoes and red onions. I served them over a bright herby yogurt sauce that pulls the whole thing together. It's fun, different, and honestly a great way to switch up how you cook ground beef.

1.Add 1lb ground beef to a bowl ( I used 85/15) season with salt and pepper, 1 tbsp onion powder, 1 tbsp oregano, 1 tbsp paprika, and 1/2 tsp cayenne pepper.

2.To add a ton of flavor, process together 1 small yellow onion, 2 garlic cloves, 3 tbsp walnuts, and a handful of fresh parsley. Process really well and add to the meat mixture. Mix really well till well incorporated and ideally let sit for 1 hr to soak in the flavors.

3.I divided these into 5, so just roll the mixture into 5 equal sized balls. Then grab your favorite lowcarb or regular tortillas, top it and smash it down so it covers the entire surface area.

4.Roll up the tortilla, then using a sharp knife cut them like sushi rolls. Grab some wooden or regular skewers and skewer the sliced pin wheels

5.Add to a sheet pan lined with parchment paper and add cherry tomatoes and red onion wedges. Drizzle the veggies with olive oil, a pinch or two of salt, and top with chili flakes.

6.Pop into the oven at 400F for 25-27 minutes. If there is liquid at the bottom, just spoon it over the top, or spoon it out and reserve for later.

7.I served these over a simple yogurt spread. Just mix 1 cup Greek yogurt with 3 tbsp finely chopped parsley, 2 tbsp finely chopped mint, a pinch of salt and pepper, a tablespoon of olive oil, and a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.

8.Garnish with fresh parsley, sumac or Aleppo pepper.

You can have these as is, with regular rice, or if you're lowcarb, my high protein lowcarb @kaizenfoodco rice

If you make it, let me know on SHREDHAPPENS! 

Enjoy!
.
.
.
 
#mediterraneanfood #healthyrecipes #lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #healthyfoodshare
summary: Mediterranean pinwheel kebabs made with spiced ground beef rolled in tortillas, baked on a sheet pan, and served with herby yogurt sauce.

caption:
Back with another healthier homemade recipe! 🙌 Skip the takeout and make your own chicken shawarma at home.

The trick? Using a potato as the edible base for the skewer. It keeps the stack secure while slow-cooking and soaks up all the flavorful chicken drippings. Crispy, juicy, and the perfect side all in one.

Love this for hosting too. And be sure to follow @rosereisman for easy, healthier homemade takeout recipes. Recipe ⬇️

INGREDIENTS 
1 ½ lb boneless skinless chicken thighs
3 tbsp olive oil
Juice of half lemon
Spices
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp cumin
½ tsp turmeric
½ tsp garlic powder
¼ tsp salt
One large potato cut in half so base is flat
2 – 3 wooden or metal skewers
Garnish
Serve with flatbread of choice, chopped tomatoes, cucumbers, onions, cilantro, pita or naan bread and tzatziki

DIRECTIONS 
1. Add chicken thighs to a bowl and add oil, spices and lemon juice. Mix well.
2. Cut a large potato in half and cut off ends to make a flat bottom. (If small cut horizontally to make a bigger base.) Place one half of potato on parchment paper on a baking sheet.
3. Place 2 – 3 long wooden or metal skewers into the potato. Add marinated chicken pieces through skewers.
4. Roast at 425 F for about 35 – 45 minutes or until internal temperature reaches 155 F. let rest 10 minutes, then either remove meat and slice or slice while on potato base.
5. Pour remaining juices over chicken and serve with flatbread of choice,tomatoes, cucumber, onions, tzatziki and chopped cilantro or basil. Enjoy!
summary: A homemade chicken shawarma recipe using a potato base on skewers to keep meat secure and absorb drippings while roasting.

caption:
A Sunday night Reisman family favourite: flaky phyllo, melted cheese, toasted nuts, and a drizzle of honey. 🧀🍯

Simple ingredients, big flavour, and dangerously easy to make. Endless combinations with different cheeses and nuts — can't wait to see yours. Tag me! 🙌
And be sure to follow @rosereisman for more inspo!

Recipe👇

INGREDIENTS 
8 sheets phyllo pastry
¼ cup olive oil (extra for drizzling into bottom of muffin tin and over top)
6 oz grated cheese about 1 ½ - 2 cups) (either parmesan, mozzarella or gruyere or a combination)
3 tbsp honey
¼ cup toasted sliced almonds

INSTRUCTIONS 
1. Remove 8 sheets from phyllo packages. Brush oil over every 2nd sheet. 
2. Sprinkle with cheese and roll up tightly from longer end. 
3. Cut into 12 rounds. Drizzle a little olive oil into bottom of a 12 cup muffin tin. Place each roll into pan. Drizzle with a little more olive oil.
4. Bake at 425 F for 20 – 25 minutes or just until browned. 
5. Meanwhile in a dry skillet toast sliced almonds just until lightly browned.
6. Drizzle with honey and sprinkle with toasted sliced almonds. Enjoy!
summary: Flaky phyllo rolls with melted cheese, toasted almonds, and honey drizzle baked in a muffin tin.

caption:
Sheet Pan Chicken Thigh Fajitas are a super easy to make and so good! 

INGREDIENTS
2 1/2 lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs 
1-2 tbsp oil 
1 tsp each salt and pepper
2 tsp each cumin, dried cilantro, garlic powder
4 tsp chili powder 
1 lime, juiced 
4 bell peppers, sliced 
1 large onion, sliced 
Salt, pepper, garlic powder 
Fresh cilantro 

INSTRUCTIONS 
First, slice all of the peppers and the onion. Spray a large sheet pan with cooking spray and add the peppers and onions. Drizzle them with a little bit of oil and season them with some salt, pepper, and garlic powder. 

Next, add about 2 1/2 lbs of boneless skinlesss chicken thighs to a bowl and add some oil. Season with salt, pepper, cumin, dried cilantro, garlic powder, and chili powder. Add the juice of one lime and stir everything together well until the chicken is well coated in seasoning. 

Add the seasoned chicken thighs to the sheet pan. I like to make little holes between the peppers and onions for each chicken thigh. 

Bake in the oven at 400 degrees F for about 35 minutes, or until the chicken reaches an internal temp of at least 165 degrees F. I personally like them cooked closer to 185 degrees F. 

Pour off any extra liquid (if needed) and broil for a couple of minutes if desired. We like to get a little char on the veggies under the broiler. 

Top the sheet pan with cilantro. Serve with tortillas, homemade guac, or some pico de gallo! This is also really good served over some Spanish rice if you aren't feeling tortillas. 

#easyrecipes #sheetpanmeal #chickenthighs #fajitas
summary: Sheet pan chicken thigh fajitas with seasoned chicken, peppers, and onions baked together and finished under the broiler.

Comment "Recipe" and I'll send you the full recipe card for free!!

All the shawarma flavor, none of the extra steps… juicy spiced chicken, onion rice pilaf, refreshing salad and a creamy garlic sauce 🤌

The secret? A spoonful of @betterthanbouillon Roasted Chicken Base in both the marinade and the rice for that deep, savory, slow-cooked flavor. Everything is better with Better Than Bouillon. #EverythingIsBetter #BetterThanBouillonPartner

For the Chicken:
-1.5 lbs (680g) boneless, skinless chicken thighs
-Seasoning: 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tbsp onion powder, 2 tsp coriander, 1 tsp allspice, 2 tsp turmeric, 2 tsp pepper, 1 tsp salt
-3 tbsp olive oil + 8 garlic cloves
-½ lemon, juiced
-2 tsp @betterthanbouillon roasted chicken base

For the Rice:
-3 tbsp butter + 1 ½ cups yellow onion, diced
-1 tbsp turmeric, 2 tsp paprika, 2 tsp garlic powder, 2 tsp pepper
-1 ½ cups basmati rice
-3 cups hot water 
-3 tsp @betterthanbouillon roasted chicken base 

For the Fresh Sumac Salad:
-½ large red onion, thinly sliced
-1 cup cherry tomatoes, quartered
-1 cup cucumber, sliced then halved
-1 tsp salt, 1 tsp black pepper & 2 tsp sumac
-½ lemon, juiced

For the Garlic Sauce:
-¼ cup mayonnaise + ¼ cup plain Greek yogurt
-2 to 3 garlic cloves + 1 tbsp fresh parsley
-1 tsp salt + 1 tsp black pepper
-½ lemon, juiced + 1 tbsp olive oil

1. In a bowl, combine the chicken with the spices, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice and Better Than Bouillon. Mix well. Marinate for as long as your patience can handle.
2. Heat a large pan over medium-high heat and add a drizzle of olive oil. Once hot, add the chicken in batches. Cook for 6 to 8 mins per side until golden and cooked through. Set aside.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low. Add butter to the same pan then the onions & cook, stirring often, until translucent. Add the garlic & spices, cook for 1 to 2 mins. Add the rice and toast for 2 mins while stirring. Pour in the hot water mixed with Better Than Bouillon. Stir & bring to a boil. Once boiling, cover & reduce heat to low. Simmer for 20 mins until cooked.
4. Mix the salad ingredients in one bowl and the sauce ingredients in another bowl. Enjoy!
summary: One-pan chicken shawarma rice bowls with spiced chicken, onion pilaf, fresh salad, and garlic sauce.

caption:
My Sweet Mom's Tried + True Salmon Recipe

Perfect if you want to change up your regular salmon with something more savory and with a little spicy Indian kick! it's on regular rotation at our house 🤩

Make this marinade first:
1 tbsp chili powder (I love to use Indian Kashmiri chili powder, but you can use what you get at a regular grocery store too!)
1/2 tbsp turmeric 
1/2 tbsp black pepper
1 tbsp garlic powder
1/4 paprika
1/4 lemon pepper
1 tbsp parsley
Dash of salt and pepper to taste

Add 2/3 cup lemon juice and mix it altogether

I used a piece of fish that was 2.5 lb. If you use a smaller piece, you can save some of the marinade for another time. Let the salmon sit with the marinade for 20-30 minutes.

Once it's done marinating, pop it in the oven at 400° for 25 minutes.

In the meantime chop up a red onion, add it to a bowl with some white vinegar (let it sit for 10 mins). Strain the vinegar and sauté the onion in butter or olive oil.

At the 20 minute baking mark, pull out the fish and add your sautéed onions, and broil for 5 more minutes until juicy golden brown! *and to reheat for meal prep, just pop it in the air fryer at 350° for 5-7 minutes.

Enjoy! #salmon #dinnerideasُ #salmonrecipe #easymeal #mealprep high protein dinner, protein packed, keto friendly, low carb
summary: A spiced Indian-inspired salmon recipe with turmeric and chili powder, marinated and baked, with sautéed red onions.

caption:
If you're trying to eat more protein without eating more meat — make this.💪

HIGH-PROTEIN NACHO BLACK BEANS 🔥

Smoky. Hearty. Deeply satisfying.
Plant-based comfort that actually fuels your body.

Makes 4–6 generous serves
Keeps 4 days in the fridge
Perfect for meal prep

✨ 29g protein
✨ 18g fibre
✨ 395 calories per serve

High protein. High fibre. Gluten-free.
Serious goodness in a bowl.

RECIPE 👇

1 red onion, finely chopped
1 tbsp olive oil
1 bunch coriander (stalks chopped, leaves reserved)
1 red capsicum, chopped
1 celery stalk, chopped
1 carrot, diced
2 cloves garlic
1 tsp ground coriander
2 tsp ground cumin
1 tsp smoked paprika
3 tbsp tomato paste
2 × 400 g tins black beans, drained
2 × 400 g tins chopped tomatoes
1 cup hot water
1 tsp sea salt
1 tbsp maple syrup

CRISPY TOFU (optional but highly recommended)
400 g firm tofu
2 tbsp rice flour
3 tbsp nutritional yeast
Olive oil

Cook onion, garlic, celery, capsicum, carrot and coriander stalks in olive oil 5–7 minutes.

Add spices and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.

Add beans, tomatoes, tomato paste and water.
Simmer 20 minutes until thick and rich.

Season with salt and a spoon of maple syrup. Finish with fresh coriander, squeeze of lime.

For crispy tofu: toss tofu in rice flour and pan-fry in olive oil until golden. Add nutritional yeast in the final minute.

Serve in bowls with avocado, lime and yoghurt, or spoon generously over baked sweet potato.

Vegan. Gluten-free. High fibre. Packed with goodness.

You need this.

SAVE it.
SHARE it.
Follow @teresacutterchef for more whole-food recipes.

Full recipe + macros on my website.
Link in profile.💛
summary: High-protein nacho black beans recipe with crispy tofu, designed as a meat-free protein source with 29g protein per serving.

caption:
Trust us these Melting Beets with Feta & Pistachios are so good that it'll even win over the biggest beet haters. 🤩 To get the recipe, visit our profile and click the "likeshop" link, then click on the image that corresponds to this video. To save the recipe with MyRecipes, simply tap the heart icon. 🩷

Ingredients
 ⁃  2½ pounds medium beets, trimmed, peeled and sliced 1-inch thick
 ⁃  2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil
 ⁃  ½ teaspoon salt
 ⁃  ¼ teaspoon ground pepper
 ⁃  ½ cup lower-sodium vegetable or chicken broth
 ⁃  1 teaspoon grated orange zest, plus more for garnish
 ⁃  3 tablespoons orange juice, divided
 ⁃  2 tablespoons honey, divided
 ⁃  ¼ cup crumbled feta cheese
 ⁃  3 tablespoons salted roasted pistachios, chopped

Directions
  1.  Preheat oven to 450°F.
 2.  Toss sliced beets, 2 tablespoons oil, ½ teaspoon salt and ¼ teaspoon pepper in a large bowl. Arrange the beets in a single layer in a 9-by-13-inch metal baking pan. (Do not use a glass dish, which could shatter.) Cover with foil. Roast until tender, about 40 minutes. Remove and discard foil.
 3.  Combine ½ cup broth, 1 teaspoon orange zest, 2 tablespoons orange juice and 1 tablespoon honey in a liquid measuring cup; carefully pour into the pan. Continue roasting, uncovered, until the liquid thickens slightly and the beets are very soft, 12 to 15 minutes.
 4.  Drizzle with the remaining 1 tablespoon orange juice. Sprinkle with ¼ cup feta and 3 tablespoons pistachios. Drizzle with the remaining 1 tablespoon honey. Garnish with additional orange zest, if desired.
summary: A roasted beet recipe with feta cheese, pistachios, and orange flavors.

caption:
Roasted Aubergine, Lentil & Tahini-Yoghurt Power Tray

(By the way, I've put together a free guide with high-protein, high-fibre recipes just like this one. All quick to make, genuinely filling, and designed for women in midlife who want to eat well without spending all evening in the kitchen.
Drop the word GUIDE in the comments and I'll send it straight to you 💛)

I made this last night, loved it that much I'm making it again tonight. Smoky roasted aubergine, warming spices, green lentils, soft feta and a creamy tahini-yoghurt drizzle over the top. It looks incredible and it's ridiculously easy.

It's also brilliant for meal prep — tastes just as good cold straight from the fridge the next day.

Serves 4
Macros (per portion):
550 kcal · 31g protein · 17g fibre
Ingredients:

2 large aubergines cubed
1 red onion, sliced
1 red pepper, sliced
1 tbsp olive oil
2 tsp ground cumin
1 tsp ground coriander
1 tsp smoked paprika
½ tsp cinnamon
Salt & black pepper
250g microwave pack cooked green lentils x2
200g feta
Handful fresh parsley
pomegranate seeds

Tahini-Yoghurt Drizzle:

200g 0% Greek yoghurt
1 tbsp tahini
Juice of ½ lemon
Splash of warm water to loosen

Method:

Toss aubergine in oil and spices. Spread on a tray, roast at 200°C for 20 mins
Add onion and red pepper. Roast another 15 mins until golden
Stir through lentils and scatter the feta. Back in for 5–7 mins to warm through
Mix yoghurt, tahini, lemon juice and warm water
Drizzle over the tray. Finish with parsley and pomegranate seeds

If you're short on time, sick of overthinking what to eat, and you want something that's genuinely high in protein and fibre without turning your evening into a project... this is it.

No fuss. No faff. Just proper food that does your body good 💛

👉 Save this one. You'll thank yourself midweek.
owner_name: Alex Hall | Women's Health & Menopause Coach
summary: A roasted aubergine, lentil, and feta power tray with tahini-yogurt drizzle, designed as a high-protein, high-fiber meal for midlife women.

caption:
One-Pan Dumpling Bake 🥟

Comment "Recipe" and I'll send you the full recipe for free.

This one's quick, affordable, and perfect for busy weeknights when you still want something really good. Everything goes into one pan, straight into the oven, and dinner's ready with almost no effort.

If you're stuck rotating the same meals every week, this is exactly why I share Weeknight Staples.

Follow along to eat better and spend less.

Ingredients

• 1 can full-fat coconut milk (13.5 oz)
• 2 tbsp red curry paste
• 3 garlic cloves, minced
• 2 tsp fresh ginger, minced
• 3 tbsp soy sauce
• 1 tbsp oyster sauce
• 1 tbsp peanut butter
• 1 tbsp sesame oil
• 2 tsp rice vinegar
• Juice of 1 lime
• 4 cups chopped bok choy
• 15–20 frozen dumplings (pork, chicken, or veggie)
• Optional toppings: chili crisp, green onions, sesame seeds, cilantro, lime

Instructions
1.	Preheat your oven to 400°F.
2.	In a 9×13 baking dish, whisk together the coconut milk, curry paste, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, peanut butter, sesame oil, and rice vinegar.
3.	Add in the lime juice and mix well.
4.	Fold in the chopped bok choy.
5.	Place the frozen dumplings on top in a single layer.
6.	Cover tightly with foil and bake for 25–30 minutes, until dumplings are fully cooked.
7.	Top with chili crisp, green onions, sesame seeds, lime, and cilantro if you'd like. Serve hot and enjoy.

#dumpling #easyrecipe #dinnerideas
summary: One-pan oven-baked dumplings in a coconut curry broth with bok choy, ready in 30 minutes.

caption:
If you love lasagna but don't love all the layering and baking, this Chilli Oil Stove Top Lasagna is about to become your new favourite dinner. It's my cozy comfort food with a little kick! 

My dream is to open an Asian café one day, and I'm building the menu one dish at a time - with you right here ☺️ 

Ingredients : 
Olive Oil - 2 Tbsps
Onion - 1/2 no
Carrot - 1 no
Coconut Milk - 1/2cup
Water-1/2cup
Salt & Pepper - to Taste 
Tomato Purée - 200gm
Garlic - 2 Cloves 
Chilli flakes - 1/2 Tsp
Oregano - 1/2 Tsp
Grated Mozzarella Cheese 1Cup
Lasagna Sheets - 8 to 10 nos

Chilli oil and green onion to garnish

Process:
•In heated pan add olive oil and chopped onions. 
•Saute it for a minute and add the chopped garlic. Add a spoonful of chili oil along with chili flakes and oregano. 
•Let it cook then add in the diced carrot. Cook it for about 2-3mins. 
•Add the tomato puree and cook well. Add half cup water and coconut milk. 
•Adjust the seasoning by adding salt and pepper. 
•Break the lasagna sheets into half and place in the sauce. 
•Cook for about 8-10mins until the sheets are cooked. 
•Top it up with cheese. Let it steam until it melts. Garnish with chopped green onions and chili oil. 

#asianrecipes #easyrecipes #lasagna #stovetoplasagna

caption:
Crispy Dumplings & Garlic Chili Oil

Are we calling this a potsticker or dumpling? Repost from when I made this incredibly easy & tasty dish in under 30 minutes!

Comment DUMPLING & I'll send you what you see🔥🥟

Ingredients:

• 1 bag frozen potstickers
• Sesame oil, for frying (I'm a fan of the @traderjoes chicken ones)

Chili Garlic Sauce:

• 3 tbsp crunchy chili onion seasoning
• 1/4 cup scallions, finely sliced
• Large handful fresh cilantro, chopped
• 1 tbsp Thai basil, chopped
• 6 to 8 garlic cloves, minced
• 2 tbsp toasted sesame seeds
• 1/3 cup soy sauce
• Rice vinegar, to taste
• 1/8 cup water
• Sesame oil, heated until very hot

Instructions:

Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat. Add frozen dumplings and cook until golden, crisp, and fully cooked through. Remove and set aside. In a heatproof bowl combine scallions, cilantro, Thai basil, garlic, sesame seeds, and chili onion seasoning. Heat sesame oil until very hot and carefully pour over the aromatics to bloom. Stir in soy sauce, rice vinegar, and water. Toss dumplings in the sauce until fully coated and glossy. Serve immediately.

caption:
Healthy Thai Noodle salad that's vegan, gluten-free, and ready in under 30 minutes! This is one of my favorite simple plant-based meals when I want something fresh but filling. Perfect for meal prep, parties, or a quick weeknight dinner. Save the recipe below for your next healthy meal!

Thai Peanut Noodle Salad 🥜🍜🥗✨
Completely vegan & GF 
Makes 10 servings 

14oz to 1 lb of noodles of choice (I'm using @LotusFoods gf whide white rice ramen noodles)
1 (12oz) bag coleslaw mix 
1 large red bell pepper, thinly sliced
1 (12oz) bag frozen shelled edamame, defrosted
1 bunch green onions, sliced
1 cup unsalted peanuts, chopped or blitzed in the food processor 

Dressing:
1 cup peanut butter powder (I'm using @PBFit)
2 Tbsp chili sauce or sriracha
1/2 Tbsp extra virgin olive oil
1/4 cup low sodium tamari or coconut aminos
1/4 cup rice vinegar
2 Tbsp maple syrup or agave
4 cloves peeled fresh garlic
1/3 cup water

Cook noodles according to package instructions. 

Add the cole slaw mix, bell pepper, edamame, green onions, and peanuts to a large bowl. 

While the noodles cook, make the sauce: mix all dressing ingredients together in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth, about 30 seconds.

Rinse the noodles in cold water after straining to make sure they are cool and add them to your salad mix. Top with peanut sauce and toss to combine. 

Add some extra green onions, and chopped peanuts to the top of the dish for some extra razzle dazzle. Enjoy! 

Blender is my 10 year old @ninjakitchen

#noodles #plantbasedmeals #glutenfreerecipes #healthydinnerideas #simplemeals
summary: A vegan and gluten-free Thai peanut noodle salad recipe with fresh vegetables and homemade peanut dressing, ready in under 30 minutes.

caption:
The perfect salty appetizer idea for your New Year's big gathering.
When I shared this idea of making 7-layer dip in individual cups for large gatherings, it quickly went viral — and it's easy to see why. This was one of the most talked-about appetizer ideas of the year. Everyone gets their own cup, no scooping from a big tray, and it makes hosting so much easier. You can always serve it in small bowls for a bigger portion, but these cups are ideal for parties and larger groups. Simple, practical, and guaranteed to be a crowd favorite for your New Year's celebration 🎉✨

Start by getting everything ready — you can even prep and assemble them the day before!
I made mine with a layer of cream cheese and sour cream, then topped it with guacamole, salsa, Tex-Mex cheese, and some fresh veggies.
You can also add refried beans or taco-seasoned ground beef — feel free to get creative and customize them however you like!

7-Layer Dip Cups – Ingredients & Layers
	
•	Tortilla chips of your choice
•	40 Mini cups (wider is better than too deep)
•	Piping bags (optional, for cleaner layering)

First Layer: Cream Mix
	•	1 block cream cheese (225g)
	•	1 container sour cream (500g)
	•	1 tbsp taco seasoning

Bring the cream cheese to room temperature until soft (or microwave for a few seconds). Mix it with the sour cream and taco seasoning until smooth.

Second Layer: Guacamole
	•	2 to 3 large avocados
	•	1 tbsp lemon juice
	•	1 tsp salt
	•	1/2 tsp black pepper

Mash the avocados, then mix in the lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

Third Layer: Salsa
	•	2 cups salsa (any kind you like)

Fourth Layer: Cheese Mix
	•	2 cups Tex-Mex or marble shredded cheese
	•	1 tbsp taco seasoning

Mix the shredded cheese with taco seasoning.

Final Layer: Fresh Veggies
Top with your favorite chopped veggies. I used:
	•	Sweet bell peppers
	•	Tomatoes
	•	Green onions

You can also add sliced black olives or jalapeños for extra flavor.
summary: A recipe for 7-layer dip served in individual cups as a party appetizer, made with cream cheese, guacamole, salsa, cheese, and fresh vegetables.

caption:
🥑 Avocado Crema Sauce (Creamy, Fresh & Clean)

Ingredients:

	•	¼ cup Greek yogurt (or sour cream)

	•	Juice of ½ lime
	•	2 tbsp fresh cilantro
 •  1 jalapeño( deseeded) / 1 green chilli ( optional)
	•	1–2 tbsp olive oil
	•	2–3 tbsp water (to thin)

	•	Optional: pinch cumin or black pepper

Method:
	1.	Add everything to a blender or food processor.
	2.	Blend until smooth and creamy.
	3.	Adjust water for desired consistency.
	4.	Taste and adjust salt/lime.
👉 Use on tacos, grilled chicken, roasted veggies, wraps, salads, or as a dip.

Versatile frozen chicken! Very practical to always have on hand ❤️ #chicken #practicalrecipe

INGREDIENTS:
1 kg chicken breast, lightly chopped (2.2 lb)
1 red onion, chopped
1 small green chili pepper, chopped
3 garlic cloves, chopped
1 tablespoon smoked paprika (8 g / 0.28 oz)
Aromatic herbs to taste
Seasonings of your choice

HOW TO:
Mix all the ingredients until well combined. Place the mixture into a freezer-safe bag and spread it evenly using a rolling pin. Score the surface with a toothpick to create portions and place it in the freezer.
To prepare, simply break off the amount you want, remove the plastic, and grill until cooked through.
summary: A frozen chicken breast mixture seasoned with paprika, garlic, and chili that can be portioned and grilled directly from the freezer.

caption:
hands down one of my favorite meals and it's so easy to make! 

BLANKET DUMPLINGS! 

1 lb ground pork or protein of your choice!
1 tbsp sesame oil
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp ground ginger 
1 tsp rice vinegar
4 green onions, finely chopped
1 tsp garlic powder (honestly measure with your heart)
Dumpling wrappers (I used wonton wrappers due my store only having them at the time, works great in a pinch!)
• 2 tbsp olive oil for searing 
1/2 to 3/4 cup water (for steaming)

Mix everything together until fully combined, roll into 1-inch balls, sear in olive oil for about 1 minute, then place the wrappers on top. Add water, cover, and let them steam until cooked through.

Once cooked, remove the lid and get creative with your sauce. I used soy, chilis crunch, and LOTS of green onion. To dip I love spicy ponzu. 

Added a side of rice and voilà you have the most flavorful meal in a matter of minutes. 

Save this for your next dinner night!

Recipe from @saltnpiipa

caption:
🌯🔥 Spicy Grilled Chicken Wraps with Garlic Sauce

🛒 Ingredients (Makes 3–4 wraps)

For the chicken:
	•	2 large chicken breasts (or thighs), sliced into strips
	•	2 tbsp olive oil
	•	1 tsp paprika
	•	1 tsp chili powder
	•	½ tsp cayenne pepper (adjust for heat)
	•	1 tsp garlic powder
	•	½ tsp cumin
	•	Salt & black pepper to taste
	•	Juice of ½ lemon

For the garlic sauce:
	•	½ cup mayonnaise
	•	2–3 cloves garlic (finely minced or crushed)
	•	1 tbsp lemon juice
	•	1 tbsp plain yogurt (optional, for lighter texture)
	•	Salt to taste

For the wraps:
	•	3–4 large flour tortillas
	•	Lettuce (shredded)
	•	Tomato (diced)
	•	Red onion (thin sliced)
	•	Cucumber (optional)

⸻

👨‍🍳 Instructions

1️⃣ Marinate the Chicken
	•	In a bowl, mix olive oil, spices, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
	•	Add chicken and coat well.
	•	Let it marinate for at least 20–30 minutes (longer = more flavor).

2️⃣ Grill the Chicken
	•	Heat a grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
	•	Cook chicken for about 4–5 minutes per side until nicely charred and cooked through.
	•	Let it rest for a few minutes, then slice if needed.

3️⃣ Make the Garlic Sauce
	•	Mix mayo, garlic, lemon juice, yogurt, and salt.
	•	Taste and adjust (more garlic = stronger flavor 🔥).

4️⃣ Warm the Tortillas
	•	Heat tortillas in a dry pan for 20–30 seconds per side until soft.

⸻

🌯 Assemble the Wraps
	•	Spread garlic sauce on the tortilla
	•	Add lettuce, tomato, onion, and cucumber
	•	Top with spicy grilled chicken
	•	Drizzle extra garlic sauce
	•	Wrap tightly and toast lightly for crispy edges (optional but 🔥)

⸻

🔥 Pro Tips
	•	Add hot sauce or chili flakes for extra spice
	•	A little cheese (like mozzarella or cheddar) melts great inside
	•	Toast the wrap after folding for that street-food vibe
	•	Add fries inside for a shawarma-style twist 😏
summary: Recipe for spicy grilled chicken wraps with homemade garlic mayo sauce and fresh vegetables.

caption:
220 Kcal & 20 g Protein 💪🏼
Your new go-to mushroom & paneer stir fry… with a spicy & flavourful Kerala twist ✨
Coconut oil, curry leaves, crushed shallots, fresh coconut — simple, aromatic, high-protein comfort food.

Mushroom & Paneer Thoran
Serves 2
Macros per serving - 
220 kcal | Protein: 20g | Carbs: 10g | Fat: 12g | Fiber: 3g 
Ingredients 
	•	200g mushrooms, chopped
	•	200g high-protein, low-fat paneer, cubed
(Pro tip: Soak or lightly blanch the paneer cubes in hot water for 3-4 minutes, then drain)
	•	1 tsp coconut oil
	•	½ tsp mustard seeds
	•	1 sprig curry leaves
	•	2 tbsp fresh grated coconut
To crush (coarse):
	•	5-6 small shallots
	•	3 - 4 garlic cloves
	•  1 tsp chilli flakes
	•	1/2 tsp fennel seeds

Spices:
	•	¼ tsp turmeric
	•	½ tsp coriander powder
	•	1 tsp freshly crushed black pepper
	•	Salt to taste

Method
	1.	Coarsely crush shallots, garlic, chilli flakes, and fennel.
	2.	Heat coconut oil. Add mustard seeds and let them splutter.
	3.	Add curry leaves and the crushed mixture. Sauté until aromatic.
	4.	Add mushrooms and cook until they release water.
	5.	Add turmeric, coriander powder, pepper, and salt. Cook until the mushroom moisture mostly evaporates and the masalas coat them well.
	6.	Add paneer cubes and gently toss. Cook 2–3 minutes on low heat.
	7.	Stir in fresh grated coconut. Switch off the flame and serve.

.

(mushroom paneer thoran, Kerala style paneer recipe, mushroom paneer sabzi, high protein vegetarian recipe, paneer stir fry Indian, healthy Kerala recipe)
.
#mushroompaneerthoran
summary: High-protein mushroom and paneer stir fry with Kerala flavors, made with coconut oil, curry leaves, and fresh coconut.

caption:
Sheet Pan Tacos 🌮 Recipe below 👇

Makes 10 tacos 

Ingredients: 
1 lb ground beef
½ purple onion, diced
2 tbsp cilantro, diced
1 tsp smoked paprika
1 tsp chili powder
1 tsp cumin powder
½ tsp coriander powder 
½ tsp dried thyme
½ tsp onion powder
½ tsp garlic powder
¾ tsp salt
8 oz cheddar cheese, shredded 
Avocado oil spray 

Avocado sauce: 
2 ripe avocados 
½ cup Greek yogurt
Juice of 1 lime
2 tbsp cilantro 
Salt and pepper to taste

Directions: 
Preheat oven to 400F convection or 425F bake. 
In a large bowl add the ground beef, diced onion, cilantro, spices and salt. Mix well with your hands until combined. Set aside. 
Take a tortilla, and then a small ball of meat and place that in the center of the tortilla, then spread the meat evenly from edge to edge. Sprinkle a good amount of cheddar cheese in the center then fold the tortilla over to create a taco. 
Place the tacos on a wire rack set inside a baking sheet, making sure not to overlap them. Spray with a little avocado oil and add a little salt and pepper. 
Bake for 20-30 minutes til golden and crispy. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack for 5 minutes. 
While they bake prep the avocado sauce by putting all the ingredients into a food processor or blender, and blend until smooth. 
Enjoy with the avocado sauce and a squeeze of lime.
summary: Sheet pan baked tacos with seasoned ground beef, cheddar cheese, and homemade avocado sauce.

caption:
Pastéis de carne ao estilo coreano - rápidos, fáceis e cheios de sabor. 
Obrigada pela inspiração @alexcookjoy 
@coconutandbliss 

INGREDIENTES:
250 g de carne moída extra magra 
1/4 de xícara de molho de soja 
1 colher de sopa de açúcar mascavo
 1 colher de sopa de óleo de gergelim 
1 colher de sopa de vinagre de arroz 
1 colher de chá de gengibre ralado 
1 dente de alho picado 
1/2 colher de sopa de gochujang 
3 tortilhas grandes 
200 g de mussarela ralada 
1 cebolinha verde fatiada finamente
2 colheres de chá de óleo de pimenta (opcional)

PREPARO:
1. Aqueça uma frigideira em fogo médio-alto. Adicione a carne moída e cozinhe, desfazendo os pedaços, até dourar. 
2. Adicione o molho de soja, o açúcar mascavo, o óleo de gergelim, o vinagre de arroz, o gengibre, o alho e o gochujang. Mexa e cozinhe em fogo baixo por 3 a 5 minutos, até ficar brilhante e levemente pegajoso. Retire do fogo. 
3. Preaqueça o forno a 180°C. Forre uma assadeira com papel manteiga. 
4. Se as tortilhas estiverem rígidas, molhe-as levemente em água e corte cada uma ao meio. 
5. Coloque a mistura de carne no centro de cada metade da tortilha. Cubra com mussarela e dobre em triângulos. 
6. Disponha na assadeira, polvilhe com um pouco mais de mussarela e asse por 20 a 25 minutos, até dourar e ficar crocante. 
7. Finalize com cebolinha e um fio de óleo de pimenta antes de servir.

#tortilhas #lanche #receitafit #perderbarriga #receitaparaperderpeso #ganharmusculo #perderbarriga
summary: Korean-style beef pastels made with seasoned ground beef, cheese, and tortillas, baked until crispy.

caption:
POWER-PACKED PROTEIN BITES YOU'LL MAKE EVERY WEEK 💚

These fluffy green protein bites are light, savoury, ridiculously satisfying and packed with ~12 g protein per bite thanks to a mix of whole eggs, egg whites and creamy cottage cheese.

I swapped half the eggs for egg whites to boost the protein and keep them lighter — so you get that soft, fluffy texture without heaviness. Add spinach, spring onion and a little broccoli for fibre and goodness and you've got the ultimate meal-prep snack.

Breakfast. Lunchbox. Post-gym. Straight-from-the-fridge at 4pm. They do it all.

SPANAKOPITA PROTEIN BITES
Makes 8

3 whole eggs
8 egg whites (or 4 whole eggs)
250 g cottage cheese
100 g spinach, chopped
2 spring onions, sliced
1 small broccoli, cut small + blanched 1 min
2 tbsp feta or parmesan (optional)
½ tsp salt + pepper
Pinch oregano or dill

Blend eggs, whites + cottage cheese until smooth.
Fold through greens + seasoning.
Divide into 8 greased muffin holes.
Bake 180°C for 25 mins or until set + lightly golden.
Cool slightly, then devour.

~12 g protein per bite
Gluten free • low carb • meal-prep heaven

summary: A recipe for savory spinach and broccoli protein bites made with eggs and cottage cheese, containing 12g protein each.

caption:
CAULIFLOWER FRIED RICE ✨🥢
Low-carb. High-protein. Purely delicious.

This one is on repeat in my kitchen right now.
Fragrant garlic, ginger + turmeric… fluffy cauliflower "rice"… silky egg… golden tofu… a glossy tamari-mirin finish and crunchy cashews on top. Light but satisfying and honestly? Spectacular.

Perfect for weeknights. Brilliant for meal prep. And one of those recipes that makes healthy eating feel easy and genuinely satisfying.

I've cooked and served this dish in my Wolstead non-stick ceramic pan — everything stays fresh and cooks beautifully with less oil. A simple, more natural way to cook and so easy to clean. You can shop the Wolstead range at @kitchenwarehouse via the link in my profile.

Save this one — you'll make it on repeat.

SERVES 4

CAULIFLOWER FRIED RICE
3 eggs
1 tsp tamari
2 tbsp olive oil
3 cloves garlic, chopped
1 tbsp fresh ginger, grated
1 tbsp fresh turmeric, grated
1 red capsicum, finely diced
3 spring onions, sliced
300 g cauliflower, blitzed into "rice"
300 g tofu or tempeh, chopped
2 small bunches coriander, stems + leaves separated
60 ml water
2 tbsp tamari
1 tbsp sweet soy (kecap manis)
1 tbsp mirin
1 tsp sesame oil
30 g roasted cashews, chopped
Bean sprouts + lime to finish

METHOD
Blitz cauliflower into rice.
Scramble eggs with tamari in a hot pan → remove.
In same pan sauté garlic, ginger, turmeric + coriander stems.
Add capsicum → add cauliflower → stir-fry.
Splash in water to keep it moist.
Add tofu, egg, spring onion + sauces → toss well.
Finish with coriander leaves, sesame oil, bean sprouts, lime + cashews.
Eat straight from the pan.

Full recipe + MACROS are now on the website.
Tap the link in bio ✨
summary: A low-carb cauliflower fried rice recipe with eggs, tofu, and cashews finished with tamari-mirin glaze.

caption:
LEMON ROASTED CAULIFLOWER ✨
with creamy cannellini beans + Pecorino Romano

This is one of those dishes that looks restaurant-level… but is beautifully simple.

Caramelised lemon cauliflower piled onto silky whipped cannellini beans, finished with parsley dressing, toasted pine nuts and a generous snowfall of Pecorino.

Creamy. Bright. Fresh. Deeply satisfying.

Perfect as a vegetarian main or a stunning side for entertaining.

LEMON ROASTED CAULIFLOWER

1 large cauliflower, cut into florets
60 ml olive oil
1 tsp honey
1 tsp salt
1/4 - 1/2 tsp turmeric
Juice ½ lemon

Toss together. Roast at 200°C fan for 40 mins until golden and tender.

CANNELLINI PURÉE
2 tins cannellini beans, drained
1 tbsp cashew butter
Juice 1 lemon
Pinch salt + splash of water to blend 

Blend until silky smooth.

PARSLEY DRESSING

60 ml extra virgin olive oil
60 ml verjuice
1 bunch flat-leaf parsley

Blend until vibrant green.

To assemble:
Spread the bean purée onto a platter.
Pile over warm roasted cauliflower.
Top with rocket, toasted pine nuts, Sicilian olives, and FINISH with freshly grated Pecorino Romano.

It's honestly spectacular.

For the full recipe, detailed method and notes head to teresacutter.com (link in profile).

SAVE this recipe.
SHARE it with someone who loves good food 💛
FOLLOW for more nourishing, whole-food recipes ✨
summary: Lemon roasted cauliflower served over whipped cannellini beans with Pecorino Romano and parsley dressing.

caption:
Spicy Honey-Ginger Chicken Bowl with Yum Yum Sauce, a vibrant and flavor-packed meal that balances sweet, savory, and spicy elements. 
Ingredients
For the Chicken:
1 ½ lbs boneless, skinless chicken (breasts or thighs), cut into bite-size pieces.
Marinade/Glaze: ¼ cup honey, ⅓ cup soy sauce (or tamari), 1 tbsp fresh ginger (chopped), 2 cloves garlic (chopped), 1 tbsp orange juice, and 2–3 tbsp chili paste for heat.
For the Yum Yum Sauce:
⅓ cup mayonnaise, 2 tbsp ketchup, 1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce, and a pinch of cayenne pepper for a subtle kick.
For the Bowl:
3–4 cups cooked white rice (jasmine or basmati).
Fresh Toppings: 1 sliced avocado, 1 sliced cucumber, and fresh cilantro.
Garnish: Black and white sesame seeds. 
Instructions
Prepare the Chicken: In a bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, honey, ginger, garlic, and chili paste. Toss the chicken pieces in this marinade and let sit for at least 20 minutes (or up to 2 hours) for deeper flavor.
Cook the Chicken: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat with a drizzle of oil. Add the chicken and cook for 6–8 minutes, turning occasionally until golden brown and cooked through.
Glaze: Pour any remaining marinade into the pan during the last 2 minutes of cooking. Simmer until the sauce thickens and creates a sticky glaze over the chicken.
Make the Yum Yum Sauce: In a small bowl, whisk the mayo, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, and cayenne until smooth.
Assemble the Bowls: Start with a base of warm rice. Top with a generous serving of the glazed chicken, sliced cucumbers, and avocado.
Garnish and Serve: Drizzle the creamy Yum Yum sauce over the bowl. Finish with a sprinkle of fresh cilantro and sesame seeds.
summary: Spicy Honey-Ginger Chicken Bowl with Yum Yum Sauce recipe featuring marinated pan-seared chicken over rice with fresh toppings and creamy sauce.
