caption:
Here's a full, easy recipe for Peruvian Chicken and Rice with Green Sauce (Arroz con Pollo + Aji Verde) 🇵🇪

🍗 Peruvian Chicken & Rice

🛒 Ingredients

For the Chicken & Rice:

4–5 chicken thighs or drumsticks (bone-in, skin-on preferred)

2 cups basmati or long-grain rice (washed & soaked 20 min)

1 medium onion (finely chopped)

3 garlic cloves (minced)

1 cup cilantro (blended with ½ cup water)

1 cup green peas

1 carrot (small cubes)

1 red bell pepper (sliced)

2 tbsp oil

1 tsp cumin powder

1 tsp paprika

½ tsp black pepper

1 chicken bouillon cube (optional)

Salt to taste

3 cups chicken stock (or water)

👨‍🍳 Instructions

Season Chicken:
Mix cumin, paprika, salt & pepper. Rub onto chicken.

Brown Chicken:
Heat oil in a large pot. Fry chicken until golden brown (5–6 mins each side). Remove and set aside.

Cook Base:
In the same pot, sauté onion until soft. Add garlic and cook 1 minute.

Add Rice & Flavor:
Add drained rice, stir 1–2 minutes.
Add blended cilantro, chicken stock, bouillon cube, peas, carrots.

Cook Together:
Place chicken back into pot.
Cover and cook on low heat for 20–25 minutes until rice is tender.

Steam Finish:
Turn off heat, let sit covered for 10 minutes.

Top with Bell Peppers before serving.

🥣 Creamy Green Sauce (Aji Verde Style)

🛒 Ingredients

1 cup fresh cilantro

1 jalapeño (remove seeds for less spice)

2 tbsp mayonnaise

2 tbsp Greek yogurt

1 garlic clove

1 tbsp lime juice

2 tbsp olive oil

Salt to taste

👨‍🍳 Blend everything until smooth and creamy.

🍽 Serving Tip

Serve hot rice with chicken on top and drizzle green sauce generously.
It tastes even better the next day!

 #MediterraneanEscape #meditteranean #mediterranean #mediterraneandiet
summary: Full recipe for Peruvian Chicken and Rice (Arroz con Pollo) with creamy green cilantro sauce (Aji Verde).

caption:
SIZZLING SHRIMP WITH GARLIC GINGER SCALLION SAUCE 🍤 🧄 🫚 🍚 🥢 

My family made this weekly throughout my childhood. They bought 5lb boxes of shrimp and portioned them out for the freezer. I've tweaked the recipe over the years, using fish sauce instead of my Dad's homemade sweet soy sauce, adding cilantro for brightness, and some chili flakes, minced fresh chilies or toasty chili crunch for a kiss of heat. That's the beauty of this dish - you can adapt it to however you'd like.

1lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
Kosher salt for brining
6 garlic cloves, finely minced
2-inch piece fresh ginger, peeled and finely minced
3-5 scallions, trimmed and thinly sliced
1/2 cup fish sauce (use more if you'd like!)
2 TB chili crunch
3/4 cup neutral oil (vegetable, canola or peanut)
1/2 cup cilantro, roughly chopped

Spread the shrimp on a small sheet tray and sprinkle with about 2 TB of salt. Set aside for 15 minutes. 

Bring a pot of water to a boil. Turn off the heat and add the brined shrimp (you do not need to rinse off the salt beforehand). Stir and gently poach until the shrimp is no longer grey and opaque, about 20-30 seconds. Quickly remove the shrimp and arrange on a serving dish.

Sprinkle the garlic, ginger and scallion evenly over the shrimp. If you prefer the garlic and ginger to be more cooked, you can saute them together in a small pan with 3 TB of oil over medium heat until golden brown, about 3-5 minutes. Drizzle the fish sauce over the shrimp and add the chili crunch in small dollops.

Heat the oil in a small pan over medium-high heat until it just starts to smoke.  Carefully pour the hot oil evenly over the shrimp. Garnish with the cilantro and serve with warm white rice.

Enjoy! 
XO Irene
summary: A recipe for sizzling shrimp with garlic ginger scallion sauce that can be customized with heat and fresh herbs.

caption:
Homemade Chicken Shawarma Wraps
Prep time: 1–4 hours (for marinating)
Cook time: 15–20 minutes
Servings: 4
Ingredients
Chicken & Marinade:
Chicken: 1.5–2 lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs (best for juiciness).
Marinade Base: ¼ cup olive oil, 3 tbsp lemon juice, and 2–4 cloves minced garlic.
Spice Blend: 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tsp coriander, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp turmeric, ½ tsp cinnamon, and salt/pepper to taste. 
The Wrap & Fillings:
Flatbread: 4–6 large pita breads, tortillas, or Lebanese flatbreads.
Vegetables: Shredded romaine lettuce, diced tomatoes, sliced cucumbers, and thinly sliced red onion.
Tahini Sauce: ½ cup tahini paste, ¼ cup lemon juice, 1 clove minced garlic, and a splash of water to thin. Alternatively, use a Garlic Yogurt Sauce made with Greek yogurt, lemon, and garlic. 
Instructions
Marinate: Whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and spices. Coat the chicken thoroughly and refrigerate for at least 1 hour (up to overnight) for maximum flavor.
Cook the Chicken: Heat a large skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat. Cook the chicken for 6–8 minutes per side until charred and cooked through (internal temp 165°F/74°C).
Rest & Slice: Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing into thin strips.
Prepare Sauce: While the chicken cooks, whisk together your sauce ingredients until smooth and creamy.
Assemble: Warm the flatbread in a dry pan until pliable. Spread a generous layer of sauce in the center. Top with sliced chicken, lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and onions.
Toast (Optional): Roll the wrap tightly and place it seam-side down in a hot skillet for 1–2 minutes per side to get those characteristic golden-brown grill marks.
summary: A homemade chicken shawarma wrap recipe with spiced marinated chicken thighs, fresh vegetables, and tahini or garlic yogurt sauce.

caption:
Spicy black bean dip > any canned refried black bean. It's a next level dip experience. 

Flavor-packed, easy to make, it will elevate any Mexican-inspired dish (absolute perfection with tortilla chips, tacos, and enchiladas). The whole batch also packs in 27g protein and 32g fiber!

This black bean dip was one part of my final dish in culinary school—an array unique bean dips, each featuring a different bean. I spent months tweaking the recipe and getting feedback from chefs around campus, and it is gold.

The Elite Jalapeño Black Bean Dip:

- 1 can of black beans (drained and rinsed) (or 1.5 cups cooked beans)
- 1½ tbsp water
- 1 tbsp tahini
- 2 tsp roasted garlic
- 1 tbsp minced jalapeño (seeded)
- 2 tbsp chopped fresh cilantro
- 1 tsp fresh lime juice
- 1 tsp red wine vinegar
- 1/2 tsp cumin
- 1/4 tsp chili powder
- 1/4 tsp cayenne
- 1/2 tsp salt

Roasted garlic adds a subtle sweet, caramelized flavor. (To roast—cut head in half, completely wrap in foil, and roast at 400 for 45 minutes). If you're tight on time, you can substitute with 1 tsp raw garlic, but I highly recommend roasting!

#beandip #blackbeandip #vegandip #plantbasedcooking #beans
summary: A spicy black bean dip recipe featuring roasted garlic, jalapeño, and cilantro, developed during culinary school and packed with 27g protein and 32g fiber per batch.

caption:
Quick & Easy Snack You Must Try! | Healthy Puffed Rice Snack | Murmura | Churumuri | Air Fryer Recipes #airfryer #snack #healthy #food #recipe 
.
.
Full Recipe & Macros👇🏻

SAVE & SHARE this recipe before you scroll for more! FOLLOW for more amazing content :)

Ingredients (makes 5 servings):
Murmure (puffed rice) – 100 g
Peanuts – 20 g
Curry leaves – handful
Coriander leaves – handful
Salt – to taste
Red chilli powder – ½ tsp
Turmeric powder – ¼ tsp
Tomato – ½ (finely chopped)
Onion – ½ (finely chopped)
Lemon – ½ (to squeeze)
Oil 2-3 tsp

Instructions:
- In a bowl, add murmure, peanuts, curry leaves, coriander leaves, salt, red chilli powder and turmeric powder.
- Transfer to the airfryer basket and cover the mesh on top so the murmure don't fly up into the fan.
- Airfry at 160°C for 8–10 minutes, shaking once halfway for even roasting.
- After the timer ends, crush fresh coriander leaves with your hands and mix them into the roasted murmura.
- Add chopped tomato and onion.
- Finish with a generous squeeze of lemon and mix well.

Store the roasted base separately and add tomato, onion, and lemon only when serving if you want it crisp for longer.

Tag someone who loves guilt-free snacking.

I hope this helped!
summary: Air fryer recipe for a healthy Indian puffed rice snack (murmura/churumuri) with peanuts, fresh herbs, and spices.

caption:
@kalejunkie SHEET PAN CHICKEN ENCHILADAS for the win!!! Because idk about you, I have no patience for rolling them. The sheet pan method is so easy! To save time I'm using rotisserie chicken, store bought pico, and it's all topped with a tangy yogurt based lime crema. Make this for dinner and come back and tell me what you think! I don't think I'll be making enchiladas any other way again. ⁣
⁣
FOLLOW me @kalejunkie for easy recipes!⁣
⁣
Makes 6 servings ⁣
12 corn tortillas⁣
24 oz green or red enchilada sauce⁣
3 cups rotisserie chicken, shredded⁣
8 oz shredded Mexican blend cheese⁣
4 green onions, sliced⁣
1 jalapeno pepper, seeds removed & chopped⁣
2 tsp paprika⁣
1 tsp cumin⁣
2 tsp oregano⁣
2 tsp chili powder⁣
1 tsp garlic powder⁣
1 tsp onion powder⁣
1 tsp kosher salt⁣
⁣
Lime crema⁣
1 cup greek yogurt ⁣
1/2 lime⁣
1/2 tsp garlic powder ⁣
⁣
Serve with: pico de Gallo⁣
⁣
Preheat oven to 375F. In a large bowl, add the chicken, 1/2 of the cheese, green onions, jalapeño pepper and seasonings. Next, wrap tortillas with a damp paper towel and microwave for 30 seconds until soft and pliable. Pour and evenly spread 1/3 of the enchilada sauce on the bottom of a quarter size baking sheet. Layer 6 tortillas, as shown in the video, coating each tortilla in the sauce. Spread chicken layer evenly on top. Add another 1/3 of the enchilada sauce and then add 6 more tortillas, layering as shown. Spread remaining sauce on top along with remaining cheese. Cover with foil, tenting the top. Bake for 30 minutes. While the enchiladas are in the oven, make the crema by mixing together the crema ingredients in a small bowl. After the 30 minute mark, remove foil and bake 5-6 minutes more until cheese is golden and melty. Remove from oven. Top with pico de Gallo and lime crema. Cut into squares, serve and enjoy!
summary: Sheet pan chicken enchiladas made with rotisserie chicken, green enchilada sauce, and yogurt-lime crema.

caption:
Mediterranean Creamy Vegetable Bake

Servings: 4–6
Prep time: 15 minutes
Cook time: 35–40 minutes

Ingredients

Vegetables:

2 medium zucchinis, sliced

2 medium carrots, sliced thin

1 small butternut squash, peeled and cubed

1 red bell pepper, sliced

1 yellow bell pepper, sliced

1 small red onion, thinly sliced

1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved

2 tbsp olive oil

Salt and black pepper, to taste

Creamy sauce:

1 cup Greek yogurt

1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese

2 tbsp cream cheese (optional for extra creaminess)

1 tbsp olive oil

2 garlic cloves, minced

1 tsp dried oregano

1 tsp dried thyme

Salt and black pepper, to taste

Topping:

1/4 cup breadcrumbs (optional, for crunch)

2 tbsp Parmesan cheese

Fresh parsley or dill for garnish

Instructions

Preheat oven
Preheat your oven to 200°C (400°F). Lightly grease a baking dish with olive oil.

Prepare vegetables
Place all the sliced vegetables in a large bowl. Drizzle with 2 tbsp olive oil, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and toss to coat evenly.

Make the creamy sauce
In a separate bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, Parmesan, cream cheese, olive oil, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper until smooth.

Assemble the bake
Layer the vegetables in the greased baking dish. Pour the creamy sauce evenly over the vegetables and gently mix to combine, leaving a slightly layered effect.

Add topping
If using, sprinkle breadcrumbs and extra Parmesan on top for a golden, crunchy finish.

Bake
Bake in the preheated oven for 30–35 minutes, until vegetables are tender and the top is lightly golden.

Garnish and serve
Remove from oven, let it cool slightly, and garnish with fresh parsley or dill. Serve warm.

Tips & Variations

Swap in seasonal vegetables like eggplant, broccoli, or cauliflower.

For a vegan version, replace Greek yogurt and Parmesan with plant-based alternatives.

Perfect for meal prep — keeps well in the fridge for up to 3 days.

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie 
 #creamyvegetablebake
summary: A Mediterranean creamy vegetable bake with roasted seasonal vegetables in a Greek yogurt and herb sauce.

caption:
380 Kcal & 21 g Protein 💪🏼
Nizami Dum Ka Murgh — slow-cooked, saffron-infused and full restaurant vibes ✨🔥
Toasted whole spices, coconut-nut masala, slow-cooked till the oil separates… rich but balanced enough to enjoy without guilt. This is the kind of recipe that tastes like it came out of a royal kitchen.
Save this for a macro-friendly weekend indulgence. 💪🏼

Nizami Dum Ka Murgh
~ 380 kcal | ~21 g protein | ~29 g fat | ~12 g carbs per serving)
Serving size: 250 g cooked curry
Makes 4 servings 

Ingredients (For 500 g Bone-In Chicken)
For dry roasting - 
	•	10–12 cashews
	•	10 almonds
	•	2 tbsp desiccated coconut
	•	4 green cardamom pods
	•	4 cloves
	•	1 small cinnamon stick
	•	1 small star anise

•	500 g bone-in chicken
	•	¾ cup thick curd
	•	1½ tbsp ginger-garlic paste
	•	2–3 slit green chilies
	•	Handful mint leaves
	•	Handful coriander leaves
	•	⅓ cup saffron-infused warm milk
	•	1 tbsp ghee
	•	1½–2 tbsp Kashmiri chili powder
	•	1 tbsp coriander powder
	•	¼ tsp turmeric
	•	1 tsp freshly crushed black pepper
	•	1 tsp garam masala
	•	1 tsp shahi jeera (whole)
	•	Salt to taste
	•	1 cup browned onions (≈ 2 medium onions -  Thinly slice, toss with 1 tsp oil, microwave 12 mins, stirring every 2 mins, OR  air fry at 180°C for 10–12 mins until browned.)

To finish - 
	•	1 tbsp fresh cream
	•	Chopped coriander leaves

Method

1️⃣ Toast coconut, nuts, and whole spices lightly until fragrant. Cool and blend with a little water to a smooth paste.
2️⃣ In a large bowl, combine masala paste and all remaining marinade ingredients. Add the chicken. 
Marinate minimum 2 hours, ideally overnight.
3️⃣ Transfer entire marinated chicken into a heavy-bottomed pan. Cover and cook on low heat for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until chicken is tender and oil separates.
4️⃣ Finish with fresh cream and chopped coriander.

5️⃣ Optional: Do a quick Dhungar for smokiness (place a piece of hot charcoal in a steel katori/foil cup in the dish, add a teaspoon or two of ghee until it stays smoking, cover with lid for 3-4 mins)
.
Nizami dum murgh, dum ka murgh, Hyderabadi chicken curry, saffron chicken curry, shahi chicken recipe, Mughlai chicken curry
.
#dumkamurgh
summary: Nizami Dum Ka Murgh recipe: a slow-cooked saffron-infused Indian chicken curry with coconut-nut masala, 380 kcal and 21g protein per serving.

caption:
🥭Would you try this MANGO SHRIMP CUCUMBER ROLL??

If you're looking for a ridiculously good higher protein lunch, you've got to try this mango shrimp cucumber roll. It's got some creamy, some crunchy, a little sweet and salty, and so good!

I used an easy shrimp salad with the most amazing sauce here, but you could really swap it out for finely diced chicken if you prefer. For the sauce, I just mixed mayo with sriracha, onion powder, garlic powder, & chipotle powder, some fresh lime juice, and it was the most perfect pairing with the shrimp + mango.

Here is how to make the shrimp salad (makes 2 servings)

1.In a small bowl, mix 3 tbsp mayo, 1 tbsp sriracha, juice of half a small lime, a pinch of salt, ¼ tsp garlic powder, ¼ tsp onion powder, & ¼ tsp chipotle powder. Add a generous pinch of salt, then mix & taste for spices. Save 1 tbsp of sauce for later.

2.Grab 1/2lb cooked, peeled & deveined shrimp. And finely chop it and add it to the bowl with the sauce.

3.Add 2 tbsp super finely diced shallot or red or green onion , 2 tbsp finely diced fresh chives and mix everything well. You can eat this on its own, in bread, a lettuce wrap—or roll it up in cucumbers like I did.

Here is how to roll it up:

1.Thinly slice a large English cucumbers using a peeler.
2.Pat the cucumber slices dry with a paper towel, this is important!
3.Lay the slices on parchment paper, slightly overlapping by about a third.
4.Add 4oz of the shrimp salad about 2 inches from the bottom of the slices, leaving space on all sides. Top with thin mango slices, super thinly shredded cabbage, & fresh chives. Spread leftover sauce at the top.
5.Roll it up nice and tight. Start from the bottom, fold over the toppings, and continue to roll carefully, pressing down to pack it nice and tight.
6.Slice into individual pieces with sharp knife, then top with everything bagel seasoning and serve with more sauce if you like.

If you make it, be sure to let me know what you think on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#healthyrecipes #healthyfoodshare  #lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #goodmoodfood
summary: A low-carb mango shrimp cucumber roll recipe with sriracha-mayo sauce, layered with fresh vegetables and served as a refreshing protein-rich lunch.

caption:
CRUSTLESS SUPREME PIZZA SKILLET 🍕✨ This one is for all the pizza lovers out there 🙋🏻‍♀️! Today I am sharing sneak peek recipe from my dear friend Maxi @maxiskitchen's debut cookbook which officially comes out next week! This pizza skillet is everything you love about a supreme pizza but without the crust, making it an easy low carb, scoopable dinner that everyone will love! See below for the recipe and order Maxi's kitchen wherever you like to buy books online (or at Maxi's link in bio). We hope you love this recipe, I can confirm it is SOOOO GOOD, I made it twice in two days :)⁣
⁣
Makes 4 servings⁣
1 tb extra-virgin olive oil⁣
1 lb mild Italian chicken or pork sausage, casings removed⁣
1 medium yellow onion (~8 oz), thinly sliced⁣
1 green bell pepper (~6 oz), cut into 1/2-inch pieces⁣
3 garlic cloves, thinly sliced⁣
1 tsp dried oregano⁣
1 tsp kosher salt⁣
1/2 tsp crushed red pepper ⁣
8 oz baby bella mushrooms, sliced⁣
1 cup store-bought pizza sauce⁣
8 oz shredded mozzarella cheese⁣
1/3 cup pepperoni ⁣
Fresh basil leaves, for serving⁣
⁣
In a large ovenproof skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the sausage and cook, breaking it up, until golden brown and cooked through. Transfer to a bowl and set aside. Add the onion, bell pepper, garlic, oregano, salt, and crushed red pepper to the skillet. Cook, until starting to soften. Add the mushrooms and cook until everything is almost tender but not quite, about 4 minutes more. Return the sausage to the skillet and stir to combine. Scoop out 1/2 cup of the mixture and transfer to the bowl. Set aside. Add the pizza sauce to the skillet and cook until heated through, 1 to 2 minutes. Remove from the heat and spread the contents in an even layer. Turn on the broiler in your oven (middle rack). Sprinkle the mozzarella in an even layer over the skillet. Add the reserved sausage and vegetables on top, spacing them evenly like pizza toppings. Arrange the pepperoni on top. Transfer the skillet to the oven and broil until the pepperoni is curled and crispy and the cheese is deep golden brown, 5 to 7 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes. Top with fresh basil and serve!
summary: A crustless supreme pizza skillet recipe made with sausage, vegetables, and melted mozzarella, broiled until crispy.

caption:
#recipeideasplease⭐️ #recipeideaswelcome #recipeideasbydes 
🍆 Flavorful Eggplant & Zucchini Sauté (30 Minutes)

🛒 Ingredients

1 medium eggplant, cubed

2 medium zucchini, sliced into half-moons

3 tablespoons olive oil

3 cloves garlic, minced

1 small onion, thinly sliced

1 bell pepper, sliced (optional)

1 teaspoon paprika

½ teaspoon cumin

½ teaspoon dried oregano or Italian seasoning

Salt & black pepper to taste

1 tablespoon soy sauce or lemon juice

Fresh parsley or basil (for garnish)

Red pepper flakes (optional, for heat)

---

👨‍🍳 Instructions

1️⃣ Prep the Eggplant (5–7 minutes)

Cube the eggplant and sprinkle lightly with salt.

Let it sit for 10 minutes to reduce bitterness.

Pat dry with paper towels.

2️⃣ Cook the Eggplant (8–10 minutes)

Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.

Add eggplant and cook until golden and tender, stirring occasionally.

Remove from pan and set aside.

3️⃣ Sauté the Vegetables (7–8 minutes)

Add remaining olive oil to the pan.

Sauté onion and garlic until fragrant (about 1–2 minutes).

Add zucchini and bell pepper. Cook until slightly tender but not mushy.

4️⃣ Combine & Season (5 minutes)

Return eggplant to the pan.

Add paprika, cumin, oregano, salt, and pepper.

Stir well and cook for 3–4 minutes.

Finish with soy sauce or a squeeze of lemon juice.

5️⃣ Garnish & Serve

Sprinkle fresh parsley or basil on top.

Add red pepper flakes if you like it spicy.

---

🍽️ Serving Ideas

Serve over steamed rice or quinoa

Add feta cheese for a Mediterranean twist

Toss with pasta and parmesan

Use as a filling for wraps or sandwiches

---
 #MediterraneanEscape #meditteranean #mediterranean #recipeideas
summary: A 30-minute Mediterranean eggplant and zucchini sauté with garlic, paprika, and cumin.

caption:
Blanket Dumplings 

These cozy little dumplings are packed with flavour and so simple to make. Juicy ground chicken wrapped up and gently steamed in broth until perfectly tender.

Ingredients
-1 lb ground chicken 
-1 tbsp Soy sauce
-1 tbsp Dark soy sauce
-1 tbsp Fresh grated garlic
-1 tbsp Fresh grated ginger
-1 tbsp Oyster sauce (you can use a vegetarian one)
-2 Chopped green onions
-2 tsp White pepper

Sesame oil
24-30 Dumpling/ wonton wrappers
3/4 cup Water + chicken broth

Sauce-
- Soy sauce
- Chili crisp oil
- Green onions
 -Coriander

How to make them
1. In a bowl, mix ground chicken with soy sauce, dark soy, garlic, ginger, oyster sauce, green onions and white pepper.
2. Scoop the mixture using a small ice cream scooper and place each portion into a shallow pan drizzled with sesame oil.
3. Cover each scoop with a dumpling wrapper and gently pinch around the meat so it looks like it's tucked in a blanket.
4. Pour in a thin layer of water and chicken broth around the dumplings.
5. Cover and cook for about 10 minutes, until the chicken is fully cooked and tender.

Mix your sauce ingredients together and spoon over the dumplings before serving.
Soft, savoury, and perfect for dipping. 

Pan from @hexclad

caption:
8 Days of Prosperous Plates | EP. 2 🧧
Featuring Papa and Mama Tea— the cutest duo! I'm a lucky girl ✨ longevity is a really hard word to pronounce btw! 

➡️ Recipe: Longevity Noodles 

* 1 lb thin flat egg noodles, 1 package
* 2 cups bean sprouts, washed and drained
* 4-5 stalks green onions, cut into 2-3 in pieces 
* 2 cups green or napa cabbage, cut into 1/4 inch slices
* 1 medium onion, thinly sliced 
* 3 large eggs
* 3 tbsp of cooking oil +2 tbsp for boiling water and cooking, avocado or canola oil

Sauce— 
* 3 tbsp oyster sauce 
* 2 1/2 tbsp Soy sauce
* 2 tsp sugar
* 2 tsp chicken boullion
* 1/2/ tsp black pepper 

* Garnish, Cilantro 

1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add 1 tbsp oil, loosen and add egg noodles, stirring to separate. Cook per package instructions until just-tender with a bite.
2. Drain onto a sheet tray, drizzle with ~3 tbsp oil, and toss with chopsticks to coat evenly. Let cool to prevent sticking.
3. For the sauce: In a small bowl combine, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, chicken bouillon, and black pepper. Mix well and set aside.
4. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a wok and scramble 3 eggs. Just before fully set, add sliced onions and cabbage; toss until onions are barely translucent.
5. Add noodles and sauce, tossing well to coat evenly.
6. Finish with bean sprouts and green onions. Toss once more, garnish with cilantro, and serve.

caption:
Kerala style chicken roast 🍗 

INGREDIENTS 
* Chicken leg boneless-300 gms
* Coconut oil/sesame oil-10 ml
* Julienne Ginger - thumb size 
* Julienne garlic 🧄-3-4 cloves 
* Curry leaves 🍃 -1 sprig 
* Sliced Green chillies -1 nos
* Shallot's -8-10 nos
* Sliced onions 🧅- 1 small
* Sliced tomato 🍅-1 small
* Salt 🧂 -to taste
* Turmeric powder- 1/2 tsp
* Kashmiri chilli powder-1 tsp
* Coriander powder-1.5 tsp
* Pepper powder-1 tsp
* Garam masala- 1 tsp
* Coconut slivers

METHOD 

* Marinate the chicken with salt 🧂,chilli powder and turmeric powder rest it for 30 minutes 
* In a kadai heat oil and crackle mustard seeds followed by julienne of ginger and garlic 🧄 and sliced green chilli with coconut slivers and curry leaves and sauté 
* Then Add shallots and sliced onions on a slow heat sauté till the onions caramelise  then season it with salt and chilli/turmeric and coriander powder sauté till the raw flavour goes 
* Now add tomato 🍅 and cook for a minute then add cup of water cook the masala for 3-4 minutes the add the marinated chicken along with pepper powder and garam masala and mix 
* When the masala is mixed completely cover and cook for 6-7 minutes on a slow heat in between open and stir to prevent the chicken getting burnt
* When the chicken is cooked dry up the masala to your preferred consistency 
* Serve hot

Always remember this "everybody can cook and everybody has to cook"

Happy cooking 😊
Director, Chef and Host: Karthi and Mom
Videographer:  Karthi 
Editor: Karthi

caption:
Simple and tasty tomato rice 🍅 😋

INGREDIENTS 
* Kaima rice(jeera rice) -125-150 gms
* Oil-5-10 ml
* Ghee -1 tsp
* While spices with fennel
* Green peas -15 -20 no's
* Sliced onions 🧅 - 1 no (medium) 
* Cubes tomato 🍅-2 no's(medium)
* Ginger garlic paste -1 tsp 
* Green chilli-2 no's 
* Salt -to taste 
* Turmeric powder-1/4 tsp 
* Chilli powder- 1 tsp
* Garam masala-1/2 tsp
* Chopped Coriander and mint

METHOD 
* Wash Soak the rice for 30 minutes 
* Heat oil in a thick bottom pan then add whole spices along with fennel then sliced onions and sauté now add garlic julienne and green chilli 
* And sauté till they turn golden brown now add ginger garlic paste and sauté then sliced tomatoes and sufficient salt and cook till the tomatoes are mashed
* Add turmeric and chilli powder and sauté the raw flavour is gone then add green peas and cook on slow fire for couple of minutes and add curd and chopped mint and coriander 
* The. Add the measured water for the rice and bring it to boil and add the strained rice and cook further check for seasoning if requires add salt 
* When the water and rice are on the same level dum the rice on a slow fire for 10-12 minutes and rest it for 5 minutes before opening 
*  Serve hot

Always remember this "everybody can cook and everybody has to cook"

caption:
HIGH PROTEIN STUFFED BREAKFAST SWEET POTATOES

Here is another healthy breakfast idea thats so easy and so good.

It comes in at 402 calories, 43g protein, 28 net carbs - it keeps you full for hours with the protein, slow digesting carbs, and it's also high fiber.

✅Comment BANGER and I'll message you my free mini protein ebook.

And if you are watching carbs closely, feel free to use spaghetti squash as your base.

I pair this up with @waterboycan blue raspberry electrolytes for great post workout fuel.

Here is how I made it (makes 4 servings)

1.Pop 4 regular sized sweet potatoes (about 125g each) into the oven at 350°F for 70-80 mins. Your cook time depends on thickness, so if you're using a larger potato, just got a bit longer.

2.When the sweet potato is roasted at the end of the 70-80 mins, turn off the heat and  let them continue cooking in the oven if possible. Let them cool a bit, then cut them open. You can mash the inside with a fork, or you can eat it as is. This is where you can top it up with your fav toppings.

3.To the sweet potato I added 1.5 servings cottage cheese (2% Good Culture).

4.You can add sunny side up eggs or scrambled eggs here. I just whisked together 2 eggs and 2 egg whites, put a pan on low heat, and gently brought the eggs back and forth on low heat. Add to the sweet potato.

5.You can garnish like I did with fresh parsley (or cilantro), finely diced red onion, chipotle hot sauce, my creamy sriracha sauce, or anything else you like.

As always, modify any of the serving sizes as you wish based on your own goals. You can add more egg, more cottage cheese, use a smaller sweet potato, not add avocado. You do you!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#waterboypartner  #goodmoodfood #healthyrecipes #whatsonmyplate #lowcarbrecipes
summary: A high-protein stuffed sweet potato breakfast recipe with eggs and cottage cheese, 402 calories and 43g protein per serving.

caption:
Teriyaki Chicken Stir Fry #teriyakichicken #stirfry #asianfood #dinnerideas #easymeals 

All recipes can be found on our provecho.co/saltnpiipa

5 servings total
334 Cals/serving
23g Protein
14g Fat
16g Carbs

1.5lbs Chicken thighs
1 1/2 tbsp Olive oil
1 dash Salt
1 dash Black pepper
2 tsp Sesame oil

Veggies:
1 1/2 cups Broccoli florets
1 medium Bell Pepper (sliced)
3/4 cup Snap peas
1/2 White Onion (sliced)
1/2 cup Carrots (sliced)

Sauce:
1/3 cup Soy sauce
2 tbsp Brown sugar
1 tbsp Honey
1 tbsp Kotteri mirin (or extra honey)
1 tsp Ginger (minced)
1 tsp Garlic (minced)

Slurry:
2 tsp Cornstarch
2 tbsp Water

1. Prep
- Slice chicken
- Mix all sauce ingredients (except slurry) in a bowl.
- Mix cornstarch + water separately.

2. Cook the Chicken
- Heat oil in a large pan or wok over medium-high.
- Add chicken
- Cook through (8-10mins total).
- Remove from pan and set aside.

3. Stir Fry Veggies
- In the same pan, add a touch more oil if needed.
- Add broccoli first (cook 2 mins).
- Add remaining veggies and stir fry 5 more minutes.
- You want them tender but still crisp.

4. Sauce & Finish
- Add chicken back to the pan.
- Pour in teriyaki sauce.
- Let it simmer 1–2 minutes.
- Stir in cornstarch slurry.
- Cook until thick and glossy (about 1 minute).
- Finish with sesame oil if using.

Serve over jasmine rice. Top with green onions + sesame seeds.
summary: A teriyaki chicken stir fry recipe with broccoli, bell peppers, snap peas, and carrots, cooked in a wok with a homemade teriyaki sauce.

caption:
Five minute chili butter udon✨

▪️4 Tbsp Butter▪️2 Cloves Garlic, finely chopped▪️1 - 2 Tbsp Chili Oil Crisp (I used 2 Tbsp but we like spicy!)▪️1 tsp Soy Sauce▪️1/2 tsp Sugar▪️1 tsp Sesame Seeds▪️16 oz. Frozen Udon Noodles▪️1 tsp Rice Vinegar▪️2 Scallions, sliced▪️

🌱Vegan Modification: Sub in plant based butter for butter

1️⃣ Bring a medium pot of salted water to a boil for the udon. 
2️⃣ Meanwhile, in a separate large pan over medium heat, melt the butter then add the garlic. Cook the garlic in butter for about 1 minute until it just starts to sizzle, then add the chili oil, soy sauce, sugar, and sesame seeds. Cook for 1 more minute to combine all the flavors, then turn off the heat until the noodles are ready. 
3️⃣ Boil the noodles until al dente according to package directions (mine only needed to be boiled for 30 secs), then transfer them with a mesh skimmer into the pan with the sauce (or drain them and transfer). 
4️⃣ Turn the heat to medium and toss the noodles in the sauce for ~1 more minute until evenly coated. Stir in the rice vinegar at the end. 
5️⃣ Serve the noodles with scallions and some extra sesame seeds sprinkled on top and enjoy!

⏲5 minute cook time (plus a few more mins to bring the water to a boil hehe)

Recipe serves 2 people

If you'd like to support my channel, you can subscribe to my newsletter for all recipes delivered to your inbox weekly (w/ printable PDFs) + access to my searchable recipe archive. The link is in my bio 😘!
summary: A five-minute chili butter udon noodle recipe with garlic, sesame, and scallions.

caption: Save my recipe for Udon Stir Fry Noodle! It's basically an end of the week dump meal of all the veggies I have leftover in my refrigerator. The ingredients are 3 package of udon noodles, 2 tbsp of avocado oil, 1 small sliced onion, 1 cup julienne carrots, 1 cup sliced shiitake mushrooms, 3 cups cut up napa cabbage, 2 tbsp minced garlic, 2 tbsp sesame oil, 1 1/2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 1/2 tbsp dark soy sauce, 1 tbsp brown sugar, 1 tsp black pepper and 1 oz sliced green onions. Start by simmering the packaged udon noodles in hot water for 2-3 minutes for the noodles to separate and immediately drain and rinse under cold water. In a large pan heat avocado oil to medium heat and add onions, carrots and shiitake mushrooms. Cook for 2-3 minutes and toss in napa cabbage and garlic. Cook for another 2-3 minutes before adding udon noodles, sesame oil, soy sauces, oyster sauce, brown sugar and green onions. Cook for another 2-3 minutes and serve with a drizzle of chili oil. #stirfrynoodles #stirfryrecipe #udonnoodles #udon #veggiestirfry #asianrecipes #dinnerideas #recipevideo #cookingvideo

caption:
MAKE AHEAD EPISODE 5

BLACK BEAN SWEET POTATO BURRITOS

Welcome back to Make Ahead, where I save you time and money while showing you delicious recipes to keep your freezer fully stocked. This is episode 5, my black bean sweet potato burritos.

Follow me @frasercooks for more delicious, easy plant based recipes, perfect for meal prep and to help keep you sane all week long!

Ingredients:
2 cans of black beans, drained and rinsed
1 onion, quartered
2 garlic cloves
1 tsp salt
1 tsp cumin
1 tbsp olive oil
4 sweet potatoes, diced small
1 cup vegan cheese

Top with fresh lettuce, avocado and hot sauce

Method:
1. Preheat your oven to 425F. On a parchment lined baking sheet, place the diced up sweet potato on the pan and drizzle with olive oil and a big pinch of salt. Slightly toss to get evenly coated and then bake for 20-30 minutes, toss occasionally to prevent burning. Once tender, remove and allow to cool.
2. In a food processor, add the beans, onion, garlic, salt, cumin and olive oil. Puree until smooth. 
3. Using your 1/2 cup Souper Cubes, place 1/4 cup of the black bean filling in each, place some vegan cheese on top, and then top with the diced sweet potato. Store in the freezer for when you want a quick and healthy lunch or dinner! 
4. When ready to eat, reheat in a covered pot with a splash of water over low heat, or the microwave. Build your burrito with lettuce, avocado and hot sauce, or whatever you enjoy in your burrito!
summary: Black bean and sweet potato burrito recipe designed for meal prep and freezer storage.

caption:
you guys NEED to try these easy sweet potato chipotle bowls 🤤✨🍠 sooo yum, high protein and perfect for meal prep!!

Ingredients:
800g sweet potatoes, diced
1 tbsp olive oil
600g chicken, diced
1 packet @mingleseasoning chipotle
2 capsicums, sliced
1 onion, sliced
1 tsp balsamic glaze, optional
1/2 cup corn
1/2 cup cottage cheese (120g)
1/2 avocado, mashed
Fresh coriander, to garnish

Method:
1. Coat the sweet potato with 1 tsp chipotle seasoning, salt and 1/2 tbsp olive oil. Air fry for 20-30 minutes at 200°C until crispy.
2. Mix corn and cottage cheese together with 1/2 tsp chipotle seasoning, set aside.
3. Heat 1/2 tbsp olive oil in a fry pan, add chicken and remaining chipotle seasoning. Add a splash of water, cook for 10 minutes until browned. Remove from the pan and set aside.
4. Add the onion, capsicum, balsamic and a splash of water to the pan. Sauté for 5 minutes or until soft and caramelised.
5. Assemble bowls with sweet potato, chicken, veggies, cheese and avocado. Garnish with coriander to serve.

Macros per serve (serves 4):
455 cals
P 43.3g
C 46.7g
F 10.8g
summary: Air fryer sweet potato and chipotle chicken bowls with cottage cheese and avocado, high-protein and meal-prep friendly.

caption:
Creamy Chicken Enchiladas with White Queso Sauce

These creamy chicken enchiladas with white queso sauce are one of those indulgent, crowd-pleasing dinners my family absolutely loves. The tender chicken, soft tortillas, and silky, cheesy white sauce make my kids say, "These are the BEST enchiladas ever!" every single time. Comforting, melty, and irresistible.

Ingredients:
For the Enchiladas

2 cups cooked shredded chicken

1 cup sour cream

1 cup Monterey Jack or mozzarella cheese, shredded

1 teaspoon garlic powder

1 teaspoon onion powder

1 teaspoon cumin

1 teaspoon salt

1/2 teaspoon pepper

8–10 flour tortillas

For the White Queso Sauce

3 tablespoons butter

3 garlic cloves, minced

3 tablespoons flour

2 cups chicken broth

1 cup heavy cream or half-and-half

2 cups shredded white cheddar or Monterey Jack

1/2 teaspoon salt

1/2 teaspoon pepper

Optional: green chiles, jalapeños, cilantro

Instructions:

Preheat oven to 350°F and lightly grease a 9x13 baking dish.

In a bowl, mix shredded chicken, sour cream, cheese, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.

Fill each tortilla with the chicken mixture, roll tightly, and place seam-side down in the baking dish.

In a skillet, melt butter and cook garlic for 1 minute.

Whisk in flour to form a roux, cooking 1 minute more.

Slowly stir in chicken broth and cream, whisking until thickened.

Add cheese, salt, and pepper, stirring until the queso sauce is smooth and creamy.

Pour the sauce evenly over the enchiladas.

Bake 20–25 minutes, until hot and bubbly.

Garnish with cilantro, jalapeños, or extra cheese.

Prep Time: 15 min Cook Time: 20–25 min Total Time: 35–40 min
Servings: 6–8
Calories: ~580 per serving
#chicken #easyrecipes #comfortfood #mexicanfood
summary: A recipe for creamy chicken enchiladas with white queso sauce, baked until bubbly and served with optional toppings.

caption:
Ep: 23/101 Airfryer Recipes 💌
Aloo Gobi Sabzi (with 1 tbsp oil)
.
Ingredients:
½ kg cauliflower (gobi)
1 medium potato (chopped)
1 medium onion (chopped)
1 medium tomato (chopped)
1 tbsp ginger-garlic paste
1 tbsp coriander powder
1 tsp Kashmiri red chilli powder
1 tsp red chilli powder
1 tsp pav bhaji masala
Salt to taste
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp jeera (cumin seeds)
1–2 cloves
.
Procedure:
1. Cut the cauliflower into small florets.
2. In a bowl, add cauliflower, potato, onion, tomato, ginger-garlic paste, all spices, and salt.
3. Heat oil in a pan, add jeera and cloves, then pour this tempering into the bowl.
4. Mix everything well and air-fry at 170°C for 20–25 minutes.
5. Garnish with freshly chopped coriander and serve hot.
Tip- Cooking time may vary depending on air fryer and size of vegetables.
If needed, sprinkle 1–2 tbsp water and cook for a few more minutes.
.

caption:
Chef Michael style 
🍜 Veg Mushroom Noodles – Wohi Bachpan Wali Street Style 

"Yeh hai wohi bachpan wali noodles 😍
School ke baad gali mein jo taste milta tha…
Smoky, spicy, full street style 🔥
Ek bite aur yaadein fresh…

Agar aapko bhi yaad hai woh taste, comment karo 'Bachpan' 🍜❤️

Follow for more nostalgic recipes!"

#BachpanWaliNoodles #StreetFoodIndia #DesiChinese #NoodlesLover 

🥢 Ingredients

• 1 packet noodles
• 1 cup mushrooms sliced
• 1 onion sliced
• 1 capsicum
• 1 carrot julienne
• Spring onion
• 2 tbsp oil
• 1 tbsp garlic chopped
• 1 green chilli
• 1 tbsp soy sauce
• 1 tbsp chilli sauce
• 1 tsp vinegar
• Salt & black pepper
• Optional: butter (for childhood flavour 😍)

⸻

👨‍🍳 Method

1️⃣ Boil noodles with salt & little oil, drain and keep aside.
2️⃣ Heat oil in a wok.
3️⃣ Add garlic, green chilli – sauté till aroma.
4️⃣ Add mushrooms – cook on high flame.
5️⃣ Add all vegetables – toss on high heat (don't overcook).
6️⃣ Add soy, chilli sauce, vinegar.
7️⃣ Add noodles + butter.
8️⃣ Toss fast on high flame.
9️⃣ Finish with spring onion & black pepper.

🔥 Secret:
✔ Cook on high flame
✔ Slightly smoky
✔ Street style masala
✔ Add butter at last = childhood magic
summary: Vegetable mushroom noodles prepared street-style with a nostalgic childhood flavor profile, cooked in a wok with soy sauce and butter.

caption:
STEAMED CHICKEN DUMPLINGS 🥟

1 lb of ground chicken (use any protein of your choice)
1 tbsp Sesame oil
2 tbsp Soy sauce
~1 tbsp of ground ginger (I eyeballed)
1 tsp on rice vinegar
4 green onion (finely chopped)
1 tsp garlic powder (you can use fresh, I was lazy)

dumpling wrappers (I used wildwood wonton wraps from @wholefoods)
2 tbsp Olive oil (for frying)
1/2 cup water (for steaming)

1. Prepare your dumpling filling in a bowl and mix well.
2. Make dumpling balls. About 1" in diameter.
3. In a pan, heat up olive oil on medium heat.
4. Add in chicken balls. Cook for 1min.
5. Add on dumplings wrappers
6. Add water. Then cover and cook for 10 min or until chicken is cooked.
7. Top with soy sauce, chili oil, and green onions.
summary: Recipe for steamed chicken dumplings with ginger, soy sauce, and green onions.

caption:
🥕 Tofu Carrot Patties 
🌸Crispy outside, soft inside!
Protein + Veggies = Lunchbox Win 🥗
Save & follow for more healthy ideas!

🌿Recipe

Ingredients:

½ block firm organic tofu, crumbled
1 medium carrot, grated
1 tsp ginger-garlic paste
Salt, to taste
1 tsp chili powder (optional: reduce for kids)
½ tsp cumin powder
½ tsp coriander powder
¼ tsp garam masala
1 tsp lime juice
3 tbsp almond flour
3 tbsp besan (gram) flour
Olive oil, for cooking

Method:

1.Mix crumbled tofu, grated carrot, spices, lime juice, and flours with your hands. (Tofu's water content binds it naturally.)
2.Heat a little olive oil on a cast iron dosa tawa over low-medium flame.
3.Shape into small patties suitable for kids' lunchbox. 4.Cook until crispy outside, soft inside, flipping gently.
Let cool slightly and pack in lunchbox.

caption:
SHRIMP DUMPLINGS.🥟THAT SLAP.🔥

THE FILLING
•About  1lb of shrimp
•2 long onions aka scallions – like more? add more.)
•5 cloves garlic, minced (or garlic paste — A GOOD ONE)
 •2 tsp fresh ginger, minced (or ginger paste — again, A GOOD ONE)
•2 tbsp soy sauce (low sodium if you don't want to be a salty b*tch)
•1½ tsp sesame oil
•2 tsp chicken bouillon powder
•1 tsp white pepper
•½ tsp sugar
•2 tsp cornstarch
•Dumpling wrappers (wonton wrappers work. we're not gatekeeping.)

BOIL FIRST
Get a pot of water going.
Rolling boil. Respectable.
You'll need it later.

LET'S BUILD THESE DUMPLINGS
1. Chop the shrimp. When you think you're done — keep chopping. You want paste. Your arm will complain. Ignore it.
2. Throw the long onions directly on top of the shrimp and chop them together. This matters. The oils in the opinions get all cozy with the shrimp. Dump everything into a bowl.
3. Add garlic + ginger. 5 cloves? 10 cloves? Follow your heart. Arm tired? Buy the paste. Just don't buy trash paste.
4. Add the rest: Soy sauce, sesame oil, chicken bouillon, white pepper, sugar, cornstarch.
Mix it like you mean it. That's your filling. Done.
5. Fill your wrappers. NOT TOO MUCH. I'm serious. 
Dip your finger in water, run it around the edge, and pinch shut.
You wanna get fancy? That's on you. They taste the same.
6. Drop dumplings into boiling water. When they float??They're done. Scoop them out. Do not overthink this.
 
🔥 THE SAUCE (DON'T SKIP THIS)
•3 tbsp soy sauce (low sodium if you respect yourself)
•1½ tbsp garlic chili crisp (S&B Umami Topping — mild or hot, both slap)
•1½ tbsp water
•1 tbsp sesame oil
•1 tbsp rice vinegar
•Sesame seeds (if you want)
•Long onions (whites in the sauce. greens on top like you're a professional)

Mix everything in a bowl. That's it.

PLATE IT.
Put dumplings in a shallow bowl.
Drizzle sauce like you love yourself.
Sprinkle green onions.

YOU DID IT.
NOW EAT IT. 🥟🔥
summary: Recipe for homemade shrimp dumplings with ginger-garlic filling and soy-chili crisp dipping sauce.

caption:
Cauliflower and Chickpea Salad ⬇️

Ingredients

For the oven:
1 head of cauliflower, cut into small florets
1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and dried
1/2 red onion, cut into thick slices
2 tbsp olive oil
1/2 tsp Garlic powder
1/2 tsp Paprika
1/8 tsp Ground coriander
1/8 tsp Turmeric
Salt and pepper to taste

For the salad:
1/3 cup pomegranate seeds
1/3 cup sliced almonds
1/4 cup finely chopped mint leaves
1/3 cup chopped parsley

Dressing:
1/4 cup extra virgin olive oil or tahini
2 tbsp lemon juice

Instructions

1. Mix the cauliflower, chickpeas, and onion with the olive oil and seasonings.

2. Spread them on a baking sheet and roast at 400°F for 20-25 minutes.

3. Remove from the oven and add the pomegranate seeds, almonds, mint, and parsley.

4. Add the olive oil (or tahini) and lemon juice, mix well, and serve.
summary: A roasted cauliflower and chickpea salad recipe with pomegranate, almonds, and herb garnish.

caption:
Hallo zusammen ❤️ Merhaba herkese, 

🇹🇷Cok lezzetli ve sağlıklı bir tarif. Yemelere doyamiyorum gerçekten. Ben brokoli ve Karnabaharı çok az buharda haşladım. Bu şekilde daha lezzetli ve lokum gibi oldu 😉

🇩🇪Gemüse im Backofen 
Rezept ist in den Kommentaren fixiert 

Fırında Sebze 

Malzemeler;
1 adet karnabahar
1 adet brokoli
3-4 adet patates
1-2 adet kırmızı biber
2 adet havuç
1,5 su bardağı önceden haşlanmış Nohut 
▫️▫️▫️
Sosu için; 
70 ml zeytinyağı (yarım çay bardağından biraz fazla )
3 diş rendelenmiş sarımsak
Birer küçük tatlı kaşığı , karabiber, kekik ve köri tozu
1/2 çay kaşığı kırmızı toz biber ve  pul biber
tuz
▫️▫️▫️
Hazırlık:
Karnabahar ve brokoliyi çiçeklere ayırın. Kaynayan su içersinde çok kısa haşlayıp çıkartın. İsterseniz ön haşlama yapmadanda hazırlayabilirsiniz. 
Patatesleri ve havuçları ince dilimler halinde kesin. Biberleri uzunlamasına dilimleyin.
▫️▫️▫️
Sebzeleri ve nohutu bir fırın tepsisine koyun. Daha sonra sosu için olan malzemeleri karıştırın ve sebzelerin üzerine döküp - iyice karıştırın.
Sebzeleri önceden ısıtılmış 200 derecede fırında 45 dakika pişirin. Yaklaşık 20 dakika pişme süresinden sonra bir kez sebzeleri çevirin ve karıştırın. 

Ben yoğurt ile servis yapıyorum bunun için,dereotu, maydonoz, sarımsak ( ben eklendim) karabiber ve tuz karıştırıyorum. Afiyet olsun 😋

caption:
Turmeric Chicken and Spiced Rice

🍽 Servings

4 servings

🛒 Ingredients

1.5 lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite-sized pieces

1.5 cups basmati rice, rinsed until water runs clear

2.25 cups chicken bone broth

1 large yellow onion, diced

3 cloves garlic, minced

1 tbsp fresh ginger, grated

1.5 tsp ground turmeric

1 tsp ground cumin

½ tsp smoked paprika

2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil

2 cups fresh baby spinach

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Garnish (Optional but Recommended)

Fresh parsley, chopped

Lemon wedges

Greek yogurt

👨‍🍳 Instructions

1️⃣ Season the Chicken

Pat chicken dry.

Season with salt, black pepper, turmeric, cumin, and smoked paprika. Toss to coat evenly.

2️⃣ Sauté the Aromatics

Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat.

Add diced onion and cook 4–5 minutes until soft and translucent.

Stir in garlic and ginger; cook 30 seconds until fragrant.

3️⃣ Cook the Chicken

Add seasoned chicken to the pan.

Cook 5–7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned (it does not need to be fully cooked through yet).

4️⃣ Add Rice & Broth

Stir in rinsed basmati rice and toast for 1 minute.

Pour in chicken bone broth.

Bring to a gentle boil.

5️⃣ Simmer

Reduce heat to low.

Cover and simmer 15–18 minutes, until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.

Avoid lifting the lid while cooking.

6️⃣ Finish with Spinach

Remove from heat.

Gently fold in fresh spinach.

Cover again and let sit 5 minutes to wilt.

7️⃣ Fluff & Serve

Fluff rice gently with a fork.

Taste and adjust salt if needed.

Garnish with fresh parsley, a squeeze of lemon juice, and a spoon of Greek yogurt.
summary: One-pan turmeric chicken and spiced rice with spinach, garnished with parsley, lemon, and Greek yogurt.

caption:
My Grandma's Famous Hummus Recipe made with my MOM! Best hummus you'll ever have! 😍 (recipe 👇🏽)

Ingredients:

1 can Garbanzo beans, rinsed 
Salt, to taste
Lemon, 2 tbsp
Garlic, 2 cloves (optional)
Tahini, 1/3 cup
1-2 ice cubes
Cold water, add 1 tbsp at a time if too thick

Blitz in a food processor or blender until Thick and creamy

Taste and adjust salt/lemon levels

For the pine nuts:

Add 1 tbsp of avocado oil to a pan on medium heat
Cook pine nuts for 4-5 mins or until golden brown
Keep stirring so they DONT BURN

For the meat:

Top sirloin, 6 oz cut into cubes
Sear on high heat with 1 tbsp of avocado oil for 5-6 minutes and season with salt, pepper, and smoked paprika to taste 
Add a handful of pine nuts the last 2 minutes of cooking 

Top hummus with the meat, drizzle pomegranate molasses, olive oil, and ENJOY 🫶😌

youve gotta try this its so creamy and fluffy 🤩

caption:
Who can do this Bulgarian Split Squat Challenge? Grab a friend and give it a try! Our legs were shaking. 👀🔥
-
How to perform:
• Grab a dumbbell and use a weight that challenges you!
• Get in a bulgarian split squat position.
• Start with 5 squats, then hold the squat midway.
• While you hold, your friend does 5 squats then holds.
• Keep alternating from 5 squats all the way down to 1.
• SWITCH LEGS! You must do it on both legs to complete the challenge!
-
-
#workout #squats #legday #challenge #fitness
summary: A Bulgarian split squat partner challenge where participants alternate sets of decreasing reps while holding the bottom position.

caption:
I've been using @lailafoodsuk as my one stop shop for all these essentials, rice, ghee, spices, all of it. Makes life way easier if you just want to buy these kinds of ingredients from one place… and obviously the extra long grain rice is some of the best in the game. Definitely recommended.

For the spices used:

1/2 tbsp Turmeric

1/2 tbsp Cumin Powder

1 heaped tbsp Tomato Purée
2 tbsp Vegetable Oil

*if you do marinate the chicken, slightly drop the spices shown earlier.

Once you've added the boiling water to the chicken, bring it up to heat, drain and add the soaked rice. Stir and cook on a high heat until the water in the pa evaporates (shouldn't take too long).

Turn the heat off, cover with foil, a cloth, and lid, then fold the cloth on top of the lid. Cook on low heat for 20 minutes. Then turn the heat off and let it rest for 20 minutes before fluffing and serving.
summary: A chicken biryani recipe with detailed spice blends and marination instructions, featuring a recommendation for Laila Foods ingredients.

caption:
Sheet pan Adana kebabs with cacik & sumac onion salad.
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
One of my favourite things to order at Turkish restaurants, and SO easy to recreate at home. While the meat cooks, the sides come together, so you're ready with one epic meal in under 30 minutes. Recipe details below!
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
Adana kebabs:
- Blitz together 2 onions, 1 red pepper, 6 cloves of garlic and a handful of parsley  in a processor till finely chopped. Drain the excess liquid (optional). 
- Add to a large bowl with 1kg lamb mince (or beef/ combined), 2 tbsp red pepper paste (or tomato paste), and 2 tsp each of paprika, cumin, pul biber, salt, and black pepper. 
- Combine mixture until it turns tacky and starts sticking to the side of the bowl.
- Spread onto an oiled baking tray and press into an even layer. Use a spatula to divide the kebabs into strips. Drizzle with olive oil. 
- Bake at 210C fan for 15-18 minutes, or until browned and sizzling. 
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
Cacik:
- Mix together 500g thick Greek yoghurt, 1 crushed garlic clove, 1 large grated cucumber (drain the liquid), 1 tsp dried mint, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tbsp chopped dill (optional), 1 tbsp olive oil and 1/2 tsp salt.
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
Sumac onion salad:
- Mix together 1 finely sliced red onion, two  sliced tomatoes, a handful of chopped parsley, 1 heaped tsp sumac, 1 tbsp lemon juice, a pinch of salt and chilli flakes. Fresh pomegranate makes it even better but a drizzle of pomegranate molasses will do the trick.

Tender pieces of chicken are slow simmered in freshly roasted spices, crushed black pepper, and a rich coconut based gravy, all infused with the aroma of curry leaves spluttered in coconut oil. caption:
💥CRISPY CHEESY SMASHED B-SPROUTS

These brussel sprouts come out so good, I think they'll genuinely become one of your favorite veggies to make. The key to making them crispy and delicious is to soak them in cold water, blanch them before baking, smash them down with a cup or a bowl to maximize the surface area, and to bake at high heat.

Once you make these, you can dunk them in your favorite sauce, or even drizzle with balsamic vinegar. Use whatever toppings or sauce you want to elevate them, but they are so good good as is.

Here is how I made them:

1.First, grab 2 lbs of Brussels sprouts, thinly cut off the ends. You can cut these in half, or use them whole.

2.Get a large pot of water to boil, add a generous amount of salt, then throw in the Brussels sprouts for 7-7.5 mins. This blanching truly makes a huge difference. I wouldn't miss this step.

3.After step 2, remove, toss in a bowl of ice water, strain very well, dry them with a kitchen towel, then place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Use the bottom of a cup or bowl to smash them.

4.In a bowl, mix together 1/4 to 1/3 cup olive oil, 1/2 tbsp garlic powder, 1/2 tbsp oregano, and 1/2 tbsp smoked paprika with a couple generous pinches of salt then brush over the brussel sprouts.

5.Finely grate some parmesan cheese, and top the brussel sprouts with this. I used a cheese grater here, and put about 1 tbsp of finely shredded parm over each.

6.Pop them in a preheated oven at 430F for 25-30 mins. Time varies by oven, so keep an eye on it.

7.Remove from oven and serve as you wish. I made a simple sauce by mixing 1/2 cup yogurt with 2 tbsp mayo, the juice and zest of a small lemon, 1 minced garlic clove, 1 tbsp tomato paste, 1 tbsp sweet paprika, and a generous pinch of salt.

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS! I share high protein recipes, lowcarb food, and Mediterranean food every week. 

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #keto #ketorecipes #healthyrecipes
summary: A detailed recipe for crispy, cheesy smashed brussels sprouts made by blanching, flattening, and baking with parmesan and herbs.

caption:
Wholesome nourish bowl👇🏼😍 Crunchy chickpeas, roasted kale & cauliflower on a bed of creamy tahini.. yes please!!!🙂‍↕️

If you haven't checked out my previous nourish bowl recipes, save this video for later and go watch! Don't forget to follow @tessbegg for more recipes 🌿

Serves 2

Cauliflower and chickpeas:
1 head of cauliflower cut into smaller pieces
420g can chickpeas, drained and rinsed
Drizzle of olive oil
3 tsp garlic powder
2 tsp cumin
3 tsp smoked paprika
Pinch of salt and pepper

Kale:
2-3 big handfuls of kale
Drizzle of olive oil
Pinch of salt

Other:
1/2 red onion, sliced
1 cucumber, sliced
Sesame seeds
Tahini dip (I got store bought but you can make your own by blending hulled tahini with lemon juice, salt, dash of maple syrup and enough water to get a creamy consistency)

Preheat oven to 200°C/390°F. Add the cauliflower and chickpeas on a baking tray. Drizzle with olive oil and add the seasonings, toss to coat. Place in the oven and bake for 35 minutes.

Add the kale to a baking tray and toss in the olive oil and salt. Place in the oven on the lower rack when there's 10-15 minutes remaining for the cauliflower/chickpeas and keep an eye on it so it doesn't burn.

Add the tahini to a bowl, then the kale, cauliflower, chickpeas, cucumber, red onion and sesame seeds. Enjoy!

#vegan #plantbased #asmrfood #veganfood #veganrecipes #easyrecipes #salad #healthyrecipes
summary: Vegan nourish bowl recipe with roasted cauliflower, chickpeas, and kale on creamy tahini base.

Quick Spicy Shrimp & Pork Potstickers
2 cups ground pork
2 cups raw shrimp, peeled/deveined & minced
6 green onions, thinly sliced (for pork)
½ cup minced chives (for shrimp)
2 tbsp minced garlic
2 tbsp minced ginger
30 wonton wrappers

Marinade (mix together):
4 tbsp cornstarch
4 tbsp water
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tsp Better Than Bouillon Roasted Chicken
1 tsp sugar
1 tbsp sesame oil
¼ tsp white pepper

Divide marinade evenly between shrimp and pork.
Add chives to shrimp + half the garlic/ginger.
Add green onions to pork + remaining garlic/ginger.
Mix each just until combined (don't overmix).

Drizzle oil in skillet. Scoop slightly larger-than-golf-ball portions into pan. Place a wonton wrapper on top of each and tuck edges under.

Cover and sear 2–3 min until bottoms are golden, then add ¼–⅓ cup water, cover again and steam until cooked through (about 4–6 min).

caption:
Ramadan recipe 🌙 

Pizza Crown : complete recipe a must try for ramadan 

This Pizza Crown is golden, cheesy, and packed with flavour  and the best part is ,it's super easy and crowd-pleasing! Perfect for when you want something that looks impressive but doesn't take hours in the kitchen.

Crispy puff pastry wrapped around layers of pizza sauce, melted mozzarella, tender chicken, and your favourite veggies… every slice pulls apart beautifully and disappears even quicker 
Save this for Ramadan and give it a try your family. 

Ingredients
* 1 extra-large ready-rolled puff pastry @tesco does extra large 
* ½ cup (120–150g) pizza sauce
* 3-4 mozzarella slices
* 1 cup (100g) grated cheese (cheddar and mozerrela)
* 1/2 cup cooked chicken, shredded or diced
* 1 cup mixed vegetables (mushrooms, sweetcorn, peppers, onions)
* A handful of fresh basil leaves
* 1 egg yolk (for egg wash)

 Method
1. Fold the puff pastry in half, then make slits on one side of the pastry.
2. Spread a generous layer of pizza sauce over one side.
3. Add mozzarella slices, then your veggies and chicken.
4. Scatter over basil leaves, sprinkle grated cheese, optional chopped green chillies but you can skip it for kids and add a few extra small dollops of pizza sauce for that cheesy finish.
5. Roll it up tightly.
6. Twist and fold each of the slit sections, repeating with all the pieces to create that beautiful crown effect.
7. Bring it around to form a crown and seal the ends.
8. Brush with egg wash and bake at 180°C (fan) / 200°C (conventional) for 20–25 minutes, or until golden and puffed.

#IftarIdeas #RamadanRecipes #FamilyFriendlyMeals #easyentertaining
summary: A golden, cheesy pizza crown made with puff pastry, chicken, vegetables, and mozzarella—an impressive yet easy Ramadan iftar dish.

caption:
Mexican Pizza Recipe:
Mexican Pizza is a quick and delicious fusion dish made with crispy tortillas layered with flavorful refried beans, sauce, and melted cheese. It's baked until warm and bubbly, then topped with fresh veggies like lettuce, tomatoes, onion, and avocado for the perfect crunch. This recipe is easy to make, customizable, and perfect for lunch, dinner, or even a fun snack. Every bite is a mix of crispy, creamy, cheesy, and fresh flavors.
Ingredients:
* Flour tortillas
* Oil (for frying)
* 1 can refried beans
* Taco seasoning
* Taco or pizza sauce
* Mexican cheese blend
* Lettuce (chopped)
* Tomatoes (chopped)
* Onion (chopped)
* Avocado (chopped or sliced)
Instructions:
1. Prepare the tortillas:�You can either fry the tortillas in oil until crispy or bake them in the oven at 400°F (200°C) for 5–7 minutes until golden and crisp.
2. Prepare the beans:�Heat the refried beans in a pan and mix in some taco seasoning for extra flavor.
3. Assemble the base:�Spread a layer of seasoned refried beans on one crispy tortilla.�Place another tortilla on top to make it like a pizza base.
4. Add sauce and cheese:�Spread taco or pizza sauce on top and sprinkle a generous amount of Mexican cheese.
5. Bake:�Bake in the oven at 400°F (200°C) for 5–8 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Add fresh toppings:�Remove from oven and top with lettuce, tomatoes, onion, and avocado.
7. Serve and enjoy!
#explore #fypage #explorepage✨ #mexicanfood
summary: A recipe for crispy Mexican pizza made with fried tortillas, refried beans, cheese, and fresh vegetable toppings.

caption:
Baked Beet Salad 🫜

Ingredients
• 1 large beet (about 2–3 cups cubed)
• 1–2 garlic cloves
• 2 tbsp olive oil @iliada_olive_oil 
• 1½ tbsp fresh lemon juice
• Salt & pepper to taste
• Fresh dill, torn

Instructions
1.	Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2.	Wrap the whole beet (skin on) in parchment paper, then wrap with foil (foil on the outside)
3.	Bake for 60–75 minutes, until fork-tender.
4.	Let cool slightly, then peel — the skin should slide right off.
5.	Cut into cubes.
6.	In a bowl, mix garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
7.	Pour over the warm beets and toss.
8.	Tear fresh dill on top and mix gently.

That's it. Simple. Fresh. Powerful.

#beet #beetsalad #beetroot
summary: A roasted beet salad recipe with garlic, lemon, olive oil, and fresh dill.

caption:
Aloo Gobhi in airfryer 

The idea here to show that you can make aloo Gobhi India style in an air fryer easily. 
You can make it even lesser oil if you want to. Do give it a try. 

Ingredients: 
-2 cups gobhi cut into florets 
-1 small potato 
-1 onion 
-1 tomato 
-1/2tsp turmeric powder 
-1tsp Kashmiri red chilli powder 
-1/2tsp coriander powder 
-salt to taste 
-1-2tbsp oil 
-1/4tsp hing 
-1/2tsp cumin seeds or jeera 
-1/2tsp fennel seeds or saunf
-2 dry red chilli (optional)

caption:
Smoky Sweet Potato, Lentil & Baked Feta Power Hash
(one tray, practically makes itself, looks like you've been cooking for hours)

(By the way, I've put together a free guide with high-protein, high-fibre recipes just like this one. All quick to make, genuinely filling, and designed for women in midlife who want to eat well without spending all evening in the kitchen.
Drop the word GUIDE in the comments and I'll send it straight to you 💛)

This might be the best thing I've made this year. Sweet potatoes roasted with smoked paprika and cumin, green lentils stirred through, chunky feta going all soft and creamy, and baked eggs on top. One tray. Barely any effort. And it tastes unreal.

Serves 4

Macros (per portion):
~500 kcal · 24g protein (I got my numbers mixed up on the video 😂) · 57g carbs · 19g fat · 15g fibre

Ingredients:
800g sweet potatoes, skin on, diced
1 red onion, sliced
1 red pepper, sliced
1 tbsp olive oil
2 tsp smoked paprika
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp garlic granules
Salt & black pepper
250g cooked green lentils (drained)
100g feta
4 medium eggs
Fresh parsley or coriander
Optional chilli flakes

Method:
Preheat oven to 200°C (fan 180°C). Toss the diced sweet potatoes in olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic granules, salt and pepper. Spread in a single layer on a tray and roast for 10 minutes
Add the sliced red onion and red pepper to the tray, mix through. Back in the oven for 20 minutes until everything is caramelised and starting to go sticky round the edges
Stir through the lentils and crumble the feta over the top in chunky pieces. Back in for another 8–10 minutes until the feta softens (this is the bit I forgot to film — don't skip it)
Make four wells in the mixture and crack in the eggs. Back in the oven for a final 6–8 minutes until the whites are set but the yolks are still a bit runny
Scatter with fresh parsley or coriander and optional chilli flakes

The kind of meal that actually fills you up, keeps your energy steady, and doesn't require you to spend your whole evening in the kitchen.

No fuss. No faff. Just proper food that does your body good 💛
owner_name: Alex Hall | Women's Health & Menopause Coach
summary: One-tray roasted sweet potato, lentil, and baked feta hash with eggs, designed for quick weeknight dinners with high protein and fiber.

caption:
Greek Chicken Gyro Wraps with Spicy Cucumber Yogurt – Full Recipe

Ingredients

For the chicken
500 g boneless, skinless chicken thighs
3 tbsp olive oil
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp smoked paprika
1 tsp ground cumin
1 tsp dried oregano
½ tsp chili flakes
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
Juice of ½ lemon

For the spicy cucumber yogurt
½ cup Greek yogurt
½ small cucumber, grated and drained
1 clove garlic, minced
½ tsp chili flakes (adjust to taste)
1 tsp lemon juice
Salt and black pepper to taste

For the wraps
4–6 flatbreads or pita breads
1 small red onion, thinly sliced
1 cup chopped lettuce or mixed greens
½ cup cherry tomatoes, halved
Optional: crumbled feta, fresh parsley

Instructions

Marinate the chicken
In a bowl, combine olive oil, garlic, smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, chili flakes, salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
Add chicken thighs, coat well, and marinate for at least 30 minutes (or up to 4 hours in the fridge).

Cook the chicken
Preheat a grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook chicken 5–6 minutes per side until fully cooked and nicely charred.
Let rest for 5 minutes, then slice thinly.

Prepare the spicy cucumber yogurt
Combine Greek yogurt, grated cucumber, garlic, chili flakes, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Mix well.

Assemble the wraps
Warm the flatbreads slightly.
Spread a generous layer of spicy cucumber yogurt on each flatbread.
Add sliced chicken, red onion, lettuce, cherry tomatoes, and optional feta or parsley.
Fold and wrap tightly.

#mediterraneandiet #usafoodie #greekchickengyros
summary: A full recipe for Greek chicken gyro wraps with spicy cucumber yogurt sauce and fresh toppings.

caption:
This braised green bean and potato curry is simple, comforting, and packed with flavor. Thinly sliced green beans are cooked with onions, sesame seeds, curry leaves, and warming spices for an easy 20-minute vegetarian dinner that pairs perfectly with roti or rice.

Recipe:

Ingredients:
	•	300g green beans, thinly sliced lengthwise
	•	1/2 onion, thinly sliced
	•	1 tsp sesame seeds
	•	8–10 curry leaves
	•	1–2 green chilies, sliced
	•	1 tsp turmeric
	•	1 tsp masala
	•	1 tsp ground coriander
	•	Salt to taste
	•	1 medium tomato, chopped
	•	1 large potato, diced
	•	2–3 tbsp oil

Method:
	1.	Heat oil in a pot. Add sliced onion, sesame seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies. Sauté until fragrant and slightly softened.
	2.	Stir in turmeric, masala, ground coriander, and salt. Let the spices bloom for about 30 seconds.
	3.	Add the green beans, tomato, and potato. Mix well to coat everything in the spices.
	4.	Cover and cook on medium-low for 20–25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender.
	5.	Serve warm with roti or rice.

#GreenBeanCurry #VegetarianDinner #IndianInspired #MeatlessMeals #southafricanfood
summary: A braised green bean and potato curry with warming spices, ready in 20 minutes and served with roti or rice.

caption:
Crispy Chicken Quesadillas
 
Ingredients
The Filling:
2 cups cooked chicken breast, shredded or diced (rotisserie chicken is a popular time-saver).
1.5 to 2 cups shredded cheese, such as cheddar, Monterey Jack, mozzarella, or a Mexican blend.
Veggies: 1/2 cup red onion (thinly sliced) and 1/2 to 1 cup finely diced bell peppers.
Seasoning: 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 to 4 teaspoons taco seasoning, and a pinch of paprika, salt, and pepper.
The Base: 4 large flour tortillas.
For Garnish: Freshly chopped cilantro and optional red pepper flakes. 

Instructions
Sauté Veggies: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Sauté the red onion and bell peppers for 3–5 minutes until soft and translucent.
Season the Chicken: In a bowl, toss the shredded chicken with taco seasoning, paprika, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Combine Filling: Add the seasoned chicken to the skillet with the sautéed vegetables. Stir to combine and warm through for about 2 minutes.
Assemble: Clean your skillet and melt a small amount of butter or add a light layer of oil over medium heat. Place a tortilla flat in the skillet. Spread a layer of shredded cheese on one half, followed by the chicken-veggie mixture, and then another layer of cheese.
Cook to Crisp: Fold the tortilla in half over the filling. Cook for 2–3 minutes per side until the tortilla is golden and crispy, and the cheese is fully melted and bubbly.
Serve: Let the quesadillas rest for a minute before slicing them into wedges. Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauces.
summary: A recipe for crispy cheese and chicken quesadillas filled with sautéed peppers and onions, cooked in a skillet until golden.

caption:
Now this is the kind of baked pasta that disappears fast at Sunday dinner 🧀

Creamy, cheesy, and straight from the oven — just the way we remember it.

Save this — you'll want it again ❤️

🧀 Creamy Baked Chicken Alfredo Roll-Ups
Ingredients

12 lasagna noodles

2 cups cooked, shredded chicken

1 ½ cups ricotta cheese

1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese (plus 1 cup for topping)

½ cup grated Parmesan cheese

2 cups heavy cream

2 tablespoons butter

2 cloves garlic, minced

½ teaspoon salt

½ teaspoon black pepper

1 teaspoon Italian seasoning

1 tablespoon chopped fresh parsley

Instructions

Preheat oven to 375°F. Lightly grease a baking dish.

Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions. Drain and lay flat on a clean towel.

In a bowl, combine shredded chicken, ricotta, 1 cup mozzarella, Parmesan, salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning.

Spread a thin layer of the filling over each noodle and roll up gently. Place seam-side down in the baking dish.

In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.

Stir in heavy cream and simmer gently for 5–7 minutes until slightly thickened.

Pour the cream sauce evenly over the roll-ups.

Sprinkle remaining mozzarella over the top.

Bake for 25–30 minutes until bubbly and lightly golden.

Sprinkle with fresh parsley before serving.

Timing

Prep Time: 20 minutes
Cook Time: 30 minutes
Total Time: 50 minutes

Approximate Nutrition (per serving)

Calories: 520
Protein: 32g
Fat: 32g
Carbohydrates: 28g

#ComfortFood
#HomeCooking
#FamilyDinner
#ClassicRecipes
#EasyDinnerIdeas
summary: Creamy baked chicken alfredo roll-ups made with lasagna noodles, ricotta, mozzarella, and a homemade cream sauce.

caption:
Marry Me Jacket Potato Bake Recipe

Perfect for Iftar as it's hearty, comforting and ideal for sharing - multiple loaded jacket potatoes all made in one tray and can be served at the same time?? Count me in. The sauce recipe is super versatile and can be used for a pie too! 

Recipe: Serves 4-5
3 tbsp olive oil
2 shallots, finely chopped
4 garlic cloves, minced
500g chicken breast, cubed
2 tsp paprika
1 tsp red chilli flakes (optional)
1 tsp onion powder
1 tsp garlic granules/powder
1 tsp dried oregano
1/2 tsp black pepper
1/2 tsp salt, or to taste
30g plain flour
400ml veg or chicken stock
150ml double cream
100g baby spinach
2-3 tbsp sundried tomatoes
30g parmesan, grated 
4-5 potatoes, oiled and salted
Butter for potatoes, optional
150g mozarella/cheddar, grated

Method
1. Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan). Rub the potatoes with olive oil and salt, place on a baking tray and bake for 50-60 minutes until crisp outside and soft inside.
2. Mix all the listed seasonings in a bowl. Toss the chicken with 1 tbsp olive oil and half the seasoning; set aside to marinate while the potatoes bake.
3. Heat the remaining olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Sauté the shallots for 2-3 minutes until soft, add garlic and cook for 30 seconds, then add the chicken and cook 6-8 minutes until mostly cooked through.
4. Stir in the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes to remove the raw taste. Gradually add the stock and the remaining seasonings, simmer 3-4 minutes until thickened.
5. Add the sundried tomatoes and spinach; cook until the spinach wilts. Stir in the cream and parmesan. Mix well and remove from heat.
6. Once the potatoes are cooked, slice them open, add a little butter if using, and gently press down with a fork to flatten slightly. Sprinkle over half the mozzarella/cheddar, spoon over the chicken mixture, top with the remaining cheese and bake at 180°C (160 fan) for 15-20 minutes until melted and golden.

Jacket potato tray bake inspired by @ilhanm.a one tray cheesy beans potatoes! 

#jacketpotato #potato #chicken #ramadanrecipes #i̇ftar
summary: A loaded jacket potato bake with creamy chicken, spinach, and cheese sauce, designed for sharing during Iftar.

caption:
🌮 Your Favorite Former Taco Bell employee is back again...let's make their Chicken Quesadilla at home 🌮

If you've ever been obsessed with Taco Bell's chicken quesadilla, this is exactly how to recreate it at home, including the iconic creamy jalapeño sauce.

Creamy Jalapeño Sauce
• 1 cup mayonnaise
• 3 tablespoons pickled jalapeño slices
• A splash of jalapeño brine
• ½ teaspoon chili powder
• ½ teaspoon cumin
• ½ teaspoon onion powder
• ¼ teaspoon garlic powder
• ¼ teaspoon salt
• ½ teaspoon sugar

Blend everything until smooth and creamy, then refrigerate so the flavors can fully develop.

🍗 Chicken
Taco Bell uses a standard grilled chicken. For the most authentic method, heat it directly in the bag in simmering water.

🧀 Cheese
Their three-cheese blend is equal parts mozzarella, cheddar, and Monterey Jack.

🌯 Assembly
Warm a burrito-size tortilla, add grilled chicken, drizzle with creamy jalapeño sauce, and sprinkle on the cheese blend. Toast in a dry skillet until lightly golden on both sides.

🔪 Cut into four equal pieces and enjoy a Taco Bell chicken quesadilla

3 cups small broccoli florets (fresh or thawed from frozen, well drained)
2 cups shredded cheese (such as mild cheddar or a cheddar–mozzarella blend)
1 cup prepared creamy sauce (such as ranch dressing, Alfredo sauce, or condensed cream of chicken soup thinned with a splash of water or milk)
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste (optional but recommended)
1–2 teaspoons olive oil or nonstick spray, for the foil

Directions
Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a rectangular baking dish or sheet pan with heavy-duty aluminum foil, leaving some overhang so you can fold the edges up slightly to form a shallow tray.
Pat the chicken breasts dry with paper towels. Slice each breast crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick pieces, keeping the slices from each breast together so you can reassemble them in neat rows.
Place the sliced chicken in rows in the center of the foil-lined pan, slightly fanning the pieces so they resemble the look of whole breasts sliced but still nestled together.
Scatter the broccoli florets around and between the chicken rows, tucking some pieces gently into the gaps so the florets are nestled in close contact with the chicken.
In a medium bowl, combine the shredded cheese and the creamy sauce. Stir until you have a thick, spoonable mixture. 
Spoon the cheesy mixture evenly over the chicken slices and broccoli, focusing on coating the tops and allowing some to fall between the pieces. 
Fold up the edges of the foil slightly to contain any bubbling sauce, but leave the top fully open so the cheese can brown.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 22–28 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through (an instant-read thermometer should register 165°F/74°C in the thickest pieces) and the broccoli is tender.
For a slightly crisper, more golden top like a classic casserole, switch the oven to broil for 2–4 minutes at the end of cooking. 
Remove the bake from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes so the sauce thickens slightly.
summary: A cheesy broccoli and chicken bake cooked in foil with a creamy sauce, finished in the oven.

caption:
Mediterranean mezze platter 
 
Ingredients
Hummus: 1 cup classic hummus, drizzled with olive oil and a sprinkle of paprika or fresh herbs.
Tzatziki: 1 cup tzatziki sauce (yogurt, cucumber, garlic, dill), chilled.
Muhammara (Roasted Red Pepper & Walnut Dip): 1/2 cup (blend roasted red peppers, walnuts, pomegranate molasses, and paprika).
Feta Cheese: 1/2 cup feta cheese, cubed or crumbled, can be drizzled with olive oil and a pinch of dried oregano.
Olives: 1 cup mixed Kalamata and green olives.
Cherry Tomatoes: 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved.
Cucumber: 1 large cucumber, sliced or cut into spears.
Pickled Red Onions/Cabbage: 1/2 cup, for a tangy kick.
Flatbread/Pita: 3-4 pita breads or naan, warmed and cut into wedges.
Garnish: Fresh parsley or mint leaves. 

Directions
Prepare the Dips: Spoon the hummus, tzatziki, and muhammara into separate small bowls and place them strategically on a large serving board or platter.
Arrange Main Items: Neatly arrange the feta cheese, olives, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber slices around the dips, creating distinct, colorful sections.
Add Bread: Warm the flatbread or pita wedges and arrange them around the edges of the board for easy access.
Garnish & Serve: Sprinkle the dips and vegetables with fresh herbs and a final drizzle of extra virgin olive oil over the hummus or feta before serving immediately.
summary: A Mediterranean mezze platter recipe with hummus, tzatziki, muhammara, feta, olives, vegetables, and pita bread.

caption:
Creamy 5 Ingredient Broccoli Bake
Ingredients
 
1 1/2 cups cottage cheese
4 large eggs
1/2 cup milk
1 1/2 cups broccoli florets, finely chopped and steamed
1 cup sharp cheddar cheese, shredded
1/2 teaspoon garlic powder
Instructions
 
Steam the finely chopped broccoli for about 2 minutes until tender-crisp. Drain thoroughly and pat completely dry to remove excess moisture.
In a large bowl, whisk together the cottage cheese, eggs, milk, shredded cheddar, and garlic powder until well combined.
Gently stir the chopped broccoli into the mixture, ensuring it is evenly distributed.
Pour the mixture into a greased pie dish or small baking dish and spread evenly.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 35–40 minutes, or until the center is set and the top is lightly golden. Allow to cool slightly before slicing.
Notes
Thoroughly dry the broccoli after steaming to prevent excess moisture. Use freshly shredded cheddar for smoother melting. Avoid overbaking to keep the eggs tender. Let rest 5–10 minutes before slicing. Swap cheeses, add cooked chicken or turkey sausage, or sprinkle Parmesan on top for variation.

caption:
Sheet Pan Chicken keftas ✨
When I tell you these chicken keftas turned out insane, I'm not lying!

Chicken Marination:
700gms of minced chicken
2.5 bell peppers (red & green)
5-6 garlic cloves 
2 green chillies 
A small bunch of cilantro 
1 small onion 
1.5 tbsp tomato paste 
2 tbsp chilli powder
1.5 tbsp salt
1 tsp turmeric powder
1 tbsp black pepper 

Sumac Onion salad:
Onion slices 
Tomato slices 
Cilantro
Salt
Sumac

Method:
1. To a food processor, add belle pepper pieces, onion pieces, garlic cloves, green chillies and blend. 
2. Take a cheese cloth and strain the all the liquid from the bell pepper onion mixture as shown in the video. 
3. Add it to your minced chicken, along with tomato paste and spices. Mix everything really well and let it marinate for 30min minimum.
4. Now to an oven tray, add some oil first and then add the minced chicken and flatten it out. Section it into logs as shown and score each log. 
5. Preheat oven to 425C and bake for 20 min & then broil for 3-5 min for the nice char on top.
6. You can enjoy the keftas however you like, I wrapped it up in some lavash bread and then lightly roasted it on the pan. 

Air fryer oven used: @hauswirt_baking

caption:
Fresh & Flavorful Chicken Gyros
Ingredients

Marinated Chicken

1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasts or thighs, thinly sliced

3 tbsp olive oil

1 tbsp lemon juice

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tsp dried oregano

½ tsp ground cumin

½ tsp paprika

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Tzatziki Sauce

1 cup plain Greek yogurt

½ cup cucumber, grated and squeezed dry

1 clove garlic, minced

1 tbsp fresh dill or mint, chopped

1 tbsp lemon juice

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Assembly

4–6 warm pita breads or flatbreads

Shredded lettuce

Diced tomato

Diced cucumber

Thinly sliced red onion

Instructions

Marinate Chicken: Toss chicken with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Marinate 30 minutes to 4 hours.

Prepare Tzatziki: Mix all sauce ingredients in a bowl and refrigerate until needed.

Cook Chicken: Sauté or grill chicken over medium-high heat for 5–7 minutes until golden and fully cooked.

Assemble Wraps: Warm pita, spread tzatziki inside, layer vegetables and chicken.

Serve: Roll tightly and serve immediately, with extra tzatziki if desired.
