caption:
Level up your Taco Tuesdays with this Taco Bell Mexican Pizza! 🌮🍕 The trick here is to use this simple tortilla hack: fold the tortilla halves to look like pizza slices, pack them with filling, and bake them together in a round pan. 

Keep reading or get the full recipe in the @allrecipes bio! 🧡

Ingredients: 
1 pound ground beef
1 cup cooked beans, drained
1 (1 ounce) packet taco seasoning
1/2 cup water
4 (10 inch) tortillas
2 tablespoons sliced green onion
2 cups shredded Mexican cheese
1 Roma tomato, finely chopped
Sour cream and taco sauce for serving

Directions:
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).

Heat a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add beef and cook, crumbling with a spoon, until well browned and crumbled, 7 to 10 minutes. Stir in beans, taco seasoning, and 1/2 cup water. Cook until well combined and remove from heat. 

Cut each tortilla in half. Place about 1/2 cup beef mixture onto the center of each tortilla half and top with 1 tablespoon cheese. Fold each end of the tortilla over the filling so that it creates a triangular shape with a point at the bottom. Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling until you have 8 triangles. 

Arrange tortilla triangles in a circle in a round baking dish or pie plate and top with remaining cheese. 

Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is bubbly and tortillas are toasted around the edges, about 15 minutes. 

Top with green onions and diced tomato and serve with desired toppings.

✨ Inspo: @coconutandbliss @alexcookjoy
🎥: Nicole @nicolemcmom

#tacobell #mexicanpizza #easyrecipes
summary: A baked Taco Bell-inspired Mexican pizza made by folding seasoned beef-filled tortilla halves into triangles, arranging them in a circle, topping with cheese, and baking until crispy.

caption:
CRISPY RICE OMELETTE 🍳🔥

The kind of breakfast (or honestly… anytime meal) that feels impressive but is secretly so simple.
Crispy, golden rice on the bottom. Fluffy eggs on top. Chili oil in every bite. It's crunchy, savory, a little spicy, and wildly satisfying.

Comment "Recipe" and I'll send you the full recipe card for free!!

Ingredients:
1 tbsp chili oil – @traderjoes 
1 serving white rice (day-old works best)
4 eggs
2 tbsp green onion/scallions
2 tbsp toasted sesame seeds
1 tbsp chili flakes

Toppings:
1 tbsp chili oil
1/2 avocado
2 tbsp toasted sesame seeds
2 tbsp green onion/scallions

Pan I used – @hexclad 

How I make it:

Start with the crispy base:
Add chili oil and day-old rice to a pan over medium heat. Press it down slightly so the bottom gets golden and crisp. This is where all the texture comes from… don't rush it.

Add the eggs:
Whisk 4 eggs, then pour them evenly over the rice. Let them settle into all the little pockets.

Layer the flavor:
Top with green onion, toasted sesame seeds, chili flakes, plus salt and pepper to taste. Cover with a lid and let it cook until the eggs are fully set.

Finish strong:
Slide it onto a plate and load it up with avocado, more chili oil, sesame seeds, and green onion. (Or if you are lazy like me just eat it straight from the pan)

Crispy. Spicy. Savory. Addicting.
And somehow made from leftovers.

Save this for your next lazy-but-hungry moment 👀
Follow for more easy meals that actually hit 🫶

#recipe #easyrecipe #healthyrecipes #easyrecipes #healthyrecipe
summary: A crispy rice omelette with chili oil, sesame seeds, and avocado that's simple to make and works as breakfast or anytime meal.

caption:
Creamy Sour Cream Chicken Enchiladas

Ingredients
	•	2 cups cooked, shredded chicken (canned, rotisserie, or leftover chicken)
	•	8 small flour tortillas (6-inch)
	•	2 cups shredded Monterey Jack cheese, divided

Sauce:
	•	3 tablespoons butter
	•	3 tablespoons all-purpose flour
	•	2 cups chicken broth
	•	1 cup sour cream
	•	1 (4 oz) can diced green chilies
	•	1 teaspoon garlic powder
	•	1 teaspoon onion powder
	•	½ teaspoon cumin
	•	½ teaspoon salt
	•	¼ teaspoon black pepper

Optional garnish:
	•	Fresh cilantro

Instructions
	1.	Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a 9×13 baking dish.
	2.	Season the chicken: In a bowl, toss shredded chicken with garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
	3.	Make the filling: Stir 1 cup Monterey Jack into the seasoned chicken.
	4.	Fill tortillas: Add about ¼ cup filling to each tortilla, roll up, and place seam-side down in the dish.
	5.	Make the sauce: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Whisk in flour and cook 1 minute.
	6.	Add broth: Slowly whisk in chicken broth. Cook 3–4 minutes until thickened.
	7.	Finish sauce: Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream and green chilies. Taste and add a pinch of salt/pepper only if needed.
	8.	Assemble: Pour sauce over enchiladas. Top with remaining 1 cup cheese.
	9.	Bake uncovered 20–25 minutes, until hot and bubbly.
	10.	Garnish with cilantro if desired.

#SimpleFamilyMeals

POTATO TART 🥔🤤🍳
INGREDIENTS:
 ▪️ 4–5 large cooked potatoes (about 1.8 lb / 800g)
 ▪️ Extra virgin olive oil, for brushing
 ▪️ Mushrooms, to taste (about 3.5 oz / 100g)
 ▪️ 10.5 oz shredded chicken (300g)
 ▪️ 3.5 oz cherry tomatoes (100g)
 ▪️ Shredded cheese, to taste (3.5–5 oz / 100–150g)
 ▪️ 4 medium eggs

⏳ Time: 40 minutes
 🌡 Oven: 350°F
STEPS:
 1️⃣ Mash the cooked potatoes and press them into a round baking mold to form a base.
 2️⃣ Brush with olive oil and bake for about 10 minutes to set.
 3️⃣ Add sautéed mushrooms, shredded chicken, and sliced cherry tomatoes.
 4️⃣ Beat the eggs with milk and pour over the filling.

caption:
Peruvian Chicken and Rice with Green Sauce
Ingredients

For the Peruvian Chicken:

1 lb (450g) boneless skinless chicken thighs or breasts

2 tbsp olive oil

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tbsp lime juice

1 tsp ground cumin

1 tsp smoked paprika

½ tsp dried oregano

Salt and black pepper, to taste

For the Green Sauce (Aji-Style):

1 cup fresh cilantro (leaves and tender stems)

½ cup Greek yogurt or mayonnaise

1 jalapeño, seeds removed for mild heat

2 cloves garlic

1 tbsp lime juice

1 tbsp olive oil

Salt, to taste

For the Rice:

1 cup long-grain white rice

2 cups chicken broth or water

1 tbsp olive oil

Salt, to taste

Optional Sides & Garnish:

Sliced cucumber

Tomato wedges

Extra cilantro

Directions

Marinate & Cook the Chicken:

Toss chicken with olive oil, garlic, lime juice, cumin, paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper.

Grill, roast at 425°F (220°C), or pan-sear over medium-high heat for 6–8 minutes per side until golden and cooked through.

Rest briefly, then slice.

Cook the Rice:

Heat olive oil in a pot, add rice, and toast for 1 minute.

Add broth or water and salt, bring to a boil.

Cover, reduce heat, and simmer 15–18 minutes until fluffy.

Make the Green Sauce:

Blend cilantro, Greek yogurt or mayo, jalapeño, garlic, lime juice, olive oil, and salt until smooth and vibrant green.

Assemble the Plate:

Spoon rice onto plates or bowls.

Top with sliced Peruvian chicken.

Drizzle generously with green sauce.

Serve:

Garnish with cucumber, tomatoes, and extra cilantro.

Serve warm for a bold, comforting, and flavor-packed meal.

Nutritional Info (per serving, approx., serves 2–3)

Protein: 42g

caption:
Juicy Chicken Shawarma Wrap with Garlic Sauce

Prep Time: 15 minutes (+ marinating)
Cook Time: 15 minutes
Servings: 4 wraps

Ingredients

Chicken Marinade

1 lb boneless chicken thighs

3 tbsp olive oil

½ cup plain Greek yogurt

1 tbsp lemon juice

3–4 cloves garlic, minced

2 tsp cumin

2 tsp paprika

1 tsp coriander

1 tsp turmeric

1 tsp cinnamon

1 tsp salt

½ tsp black pepper

Optional: pinch cayenne

Creamy Garlic Sauce

½ cup mayonnaise

½ cup Greek yogurt

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tbsp lemon juice

Salt, to taste

Wrap Assembly

4 large pita breads

Shredded lettuce

Diced tomato

Diced cucumber

Thinly sliced red onion

Optional: pickles or pickled turnips

Instructions

Marinate Chicken: Mix all marinade ingredients and coat chicken. Refrigerate at least 1 hour (overnight preferred).

Make Sauce: Stir all garlic sauce ingredients until smooth. Chill.

Cook Chicken: Grill or pan-sear over medium-high heat 5–7 minutes per side until golden and cooked through (165°F / 74°C). Rest, then slice thinly.

Assemble Wraps: Warm pita, spread garlic sauce, add vegetables and chicken. Roll tightly and serve immediately.
summary: A Mediterranean chicken shawarma wrap recipe with marinated grilled chicken, vegetables, and creamy garlic sauce.

caption:
Greek Chicken Souvlaki with Maple Mustard Glaze

Ingredients

Chicken Marinade

1.5 lbs boneless, skinless chicken breasts, 1-inch cubes

3 tbsp olive oil

Juice of 1 lemon

2 garlic cloves, minced

1 tsp dried oregano

½ tsp paprika (smoked if possible)

Salt & black pepper

Maple Mustard Glaze

2 tbsp maple syrup

1 tbsp Dijon mustard

1 tbsp olive oil

Optional: ½ tsp apple cider vinegar or soy sauce

For Serving

Warm pita bread or rice

Tzatziki sauce

Sliced cucumber, cherry tomatoes, red onion

Fresh parsley or dill

Instructions

Combine marinade ingredients with chicken; refrigerate 30+ min.

Mix glaze ingredients.

Thread chicken onto skewers.

Cook 8–10 min until done, brushing with glaze in last few minutes.

Serve with pita or rice, tzatziki, fresh vegetables, and herbs.
summary: Greek chicken souvlaki recipe with maple mustard glaze and serving suggestions.

caption:
✅ PROTEIN-RICH • GLUTEN-FREE • NO FERMENTATION DOSA
Quick ✅ Healthy ✅ Weight Loss Friendly ✅

🔥 Easy to make • Delicious • Perfect for breakfast or dinner!

✅Save for later ✅ Share now 

🥣 INGREDIENTS

🌾 1 Cup – Quinoa
🌱 ¼ Cup – Urad Dal
🥣 ¼ Cup – Moong Dal
🌰 2 Tbsp – Red Masoor Dal or Chana Dal
💧 As Required – Water
🧂 As Required – Salt
🍳 A Few Drops – Oil or Ghee (Optional)

👩‍🍳 METHOD
	1.	Wash quinoa and dals 3–4 times.
	2.	Soak for 4–5 hours.
	3.	Blend with water till smooth.
	4.	Cook on a hot pan until crisp edges form.

✅ TIPS

✅ No fermentation required – cook immediately!
✅ Add salt as needed, not all at once – adjust per dosa.
✅ Keep the batter in the fridge for 1–2 days.
✅ Use red masoor dal , Tuvar dal or chana dal – whichever is available.
✅ Spread thin for extra crispness!

📊 NUTRITION INFO

✅ Total Batter → Makes 8–9 Dosas
✅ Per Dosa → ~6 g Protein
✅ Store Batter → 1–2 Days in the Fridge

caption:
@kalejunkie MIDDLE EASTERN SMASH TACOS with tahini sauce and a yummy tangy sumac salad 🌮 I'm just changing things up around here from a regular taco—this has all the vibes of arayes but as a thin taco instead, topped with a tangy salad and tahini sauce. SO SO SO FLAVORFUL and ofc like all my recipes, it's easy to make! ⁣
⁣
SHARE this post with friends, SAVE, and FOLLOW me @kalejunkie for more easy dinner ideas!⁣
⁣
Tacos⁣
1 lb ground beef (80/20 preferably)⁣
1/2 white onion, grated ⁣
1/2 cup parsley, finely chopped⁣
2 cloves garlic, minced or mashed⁣
1 tsp cumin⁣
1 tsp allspice ⁣
1 tsp paprika ⁣
1 tsp kosher salt⁣
1/2 tsp black pepper⁣
8 taco size flour tortillas⁣
⁣
Sumac salad⁣
2 persian cucumbers, chopped⁣
1/3 cup red onion, thinly sliced⁣
2 roma tomatoes, diced⁣
2 tb red wine vinegar⁣
1 tb sumac⁣
1/2 tsp kosher salt⁣
⁣
Tahini sauce⁣
1/2 cup tahini⁣
2 tb honey⁣
1 clove garlic⁣
1 lemon, juiced⁣
1/2 tsp kosher salt⁣
1/4 cup water⁣
⁣
First make the meat mixture. Add all of the ingredients to a bowl and mix to incorporate well. Set aside. Next make the sumac salad and sauce. For the salad, add the chopped cucumbers, tomatoes and sliced onions to a bowl. Toss with the vinegar, sumac, and salt and set aside. Make the tahini sauce by adding everything to a small blender and blending until smooth. Taste and adjust as needed. Finally, make the smash tacos. Spread ~3-4 tablespoons of the meat mixture into an even layer on each tortilla. Heat a pan over medium heat. Place each tortilla meat side down on the pan and cook for ~4 minutes, pressing it down with a heavy object or a press so the meat doesn't shrink up and cooks evenly. Flip to the other side and let cook one minute more. Remove from pan and repeat with remaining tortillas. Finally, assemble tacos with the sumac salad on top and lots of tahini sauce. Enjoy!
summary: Middle Eastern smash tacos with ground beef, tahini sauce, and tangy sumac salad inspired by arayes.

caption:
SPICY CUCUMBER SALAD inspired by Din Tai Fung & "oi muchim," the iconic Korean side dish.

File this Asian classic under refreshing recipes to make on repeat. It's part sweet, part spicy and part tangy , with a craveable crunch too! 

PS: if you loved this, let me know if you'd like me to share my best salad recipes with you and I'll send the full collection over via DM :)

Start by dicing 2-3 large green cucumbers into half inch thick rounds. Generously salt the cucumbers and let them sit for 20-30 minutes or so, then rinse with cold running water and pat dry completely.

To a heat proof bowl, add:
- The dried cucumbers 
- 3-4 cloves of minced garlic
- 2-3 tsp gochugaru/ chilli flakes
- 2-3 tsp sesame seeds
- 2 tbsp light soy sauce
- 2 tbsp rice vinegar / 
- 1 -2 tsp sugar/ honey

Heat 1-1.5 tbsp of sesame oil until sizzling. Then pour this over your cucumber mixture. 

Mix well and taste to adjust seasonings. Let the cucumbers marinate for at least 15 minutes and longer if you can (4-6 hours would be ideal).

For restaurant-style serving (inspired by the presentation at Din Tai Fung!), stack them on a plate, pouring the leftover marinade on top. Serve chilled & DIVE IN! Just don't forget to tag me when you try this at home. 

{cucumber salad, Asian recipes, quick recipes, salad recipes, #saladrecipe #saladrecipes #cucumbers #healthylunchideas #healthyrecipesideas }
summary: A spicy, tangy cucumber salad inspired by Korean oi muchim and Din Tai Fung, made with gochugaru, sesame oil, and soy sauce.

caption:
The Viral Green Bean Recipe Everyone Is Making

Everyone is making these viral green beans, so of course I had to try them.

They're blistered, garlicky, lemony, and seriously addictive — the perfect side dish for dinner, Shabbat, or meal prep.

If you've been seeing this string bean recipe all over your feed, here's exactly how it turned out 👇

Simple ingredients, huge flavor, and ready in minutes.  Wash and trim 1-2lbs of green beans. Place into boiling water for 6 minutes. Drain well.

Heat ¼ cup neutral oil in a skillet.
Add green beans and cook until slightly blistered.
Add 6–8 crushed garlic cloves and sauté briefly.
Stir in 1 tbsp soy sauce or tamari, mix, and remove from heat.

Transfer to a bowl and add:
• Zest + juice of 1½ lemons
• Salt, to taste

Mix and enjoy 💚

caption:
S2 Ep2 of Chaat Craving Chronicles 🌶️ 

Aloo papdi chaat board ☀️

Ingredients:

2 large boiled potatoes 
150g white chickpeas 
15 papdis
4 tbsp tamarind chutney 
4 tbsp green chutney 
5 tbsp natural yogurt
1 tsp pomegranate seeds
2 tsp chaat masala
1 tbsp cumin seeds
1/2 tsp chilli flakes 
1 tbsp coriander powder 
1 tbsp Nylon sev 
Chopped coriander 

Method: 

🌿 Begin by dry roasting the cumin seeds and coriander seeds. Once cooled down grind till a corse powder is made. Adding this into the chaat takes it to the next level! 

🌿Into a bowl add the diced potatoes, cooked chickpeas, 1 tsp of the cumin-coriander powder, chilli flakes, coriander, 1 tsp of chaat masala and 1 tbsp of tamarind chutney. Mix well. 

🌿Add the yogurt into the middle of your board. Top it off with 1/2 of the coriander and cumin masala and then potato and chickpea stuffing. 

🌿 Add the green chutney, tamarind chutney, pomegranate seeds and nylon sev. Add the papdis around the chaat to avoid getting soggy. 

Enjoy ☀️

#chaat #masala #chaatboard #tamarind #papdichaat #chilli #whattomake #whattoeat #recipe #streetfood
summary: Recipe for aloo papdi chaat board with potatoes, chickpeas, yogurt, and homemade spice powder.

caption:
If you need a last minute Super Bowl recipe, we got you with these street corn ribs 🤤 Paired with a charred jalapeño ranch, these ones are sure to go quickly 🫨 

Let us know if you want the jalapeño ranch details 😙

Street Corn Ribs 🌽 
- 5 ears of corn 
- *125g butter (melted and save 1/2) 
- 1 Tbsp smoked paprika 
- 1 Tbsp cajun seasoning 
- 1 Tbsp Mexican chili powder 
- 1 Tbsp Tajín, plus more to top
- 1 Lime
- Salt, to taste 
- Black pepper, to taste 
- 100g Cotija cheese, finely grated, to top 
- 3 Tbsp chopped cilantro, to top

To start, make sure you have a sharp knife and your cutting board is stable with a wet cloth underneath. Next, cut the base and end off the corn, this will create a stable flat base to stand the corn upright. And it's easier to cut straight down if you create a flat top to start the knife on. Hold the knife with one hand then use your other hand to hit the knife. Then, keep hitting the knife to make it move down the middle of the corn, guiding it and making little adjustments if needed to keep it on track to cut straight down the middle. Cut them in quarters lengthwise. Then, add half the melted butter and spices to a bowl. Add your corn ribs in and toss well. 

Put in the air fryer at 390 for 12-15 minutes. Works in the oven too, at 425 for 18-25 minutes. 
You want to achieve a charred color, so if using the oven, finish on broil. 

Next, you'll brush the corn with the rest of the melted butter and while they're hot and add your cheese and cilantro. I finished mine with a squeeze of fresh lime and more Tajín, because it's never enough Tajín. 

Buen provecho :)

-
#superbowlsnacks #cornribs #streetcorn #recipereels
summary: Air fryer street corn ribs with smoked paprika, cajun seasoning, cotija cheese, and charred jalapeño ranch for Super Bowl snacking.

caption:
Ok but why did I not think to make nachos in the air fryer sooner?! It takes only 5 minutes to cook, which makes them such an easy, go-to app! Thank you @thejoshelkin for letting us all know we are using an air fryer wrong 🤯

Air Fryer Nachos🥵

Customize what goes in your nachos and prep protein and toppings beforehand to save time! Here's what I used:

1/2 bag of tortilla chips
1/2 lb beef
1 block Monterey jack cheese, shredded
1 block colby jack cheese, shredded
Rotel canned tomatoes
White onion, diced
Black beans

Toppings:
Pico de gallo
Guacamole
Cilantro
Sliced black olives
Sour cream

Line the air fryer basket with parchment to hold the nachos. Layer half the chips then top with desired layers. Last layer is going to be cheese before adding more chips and repeat. I cooked mine on 360°F for 5 minutes, but depending on size and type of air fryer you may need hotter and longer. Check every couple minutes because the cheese can burn! When done, carefully remove from air fryer by grabbing the parchment. Top with desired toppings and enjoy!
summary: Air fryer nachos recipe with layered chips, beef, cheese, and customizable toppings that cook in 5 minutes.

caption:
Would you try it? This Mediterranean-inspired guacamole is so easy to make, and so good!

Guac is one of my favorite spreads and dips, so I figured it would load it up some big textures & bold Mediterranean flavors like crispy oven roasted chickpeas, some pomegranate, feta cheese, black olives, walnuts, and fresh herbs.

As with regular guac, my preference is to use cold avocados right out of the fridge. Trust me, chilling your avocados and veggies beforehand makes all the difference.

💥 By the way, you can comment "SHREDHAPPENS" below, and I'll send you the link to my cookbook with 100+ high protein, lowcarb recipes with a mediterranean twist.

Ingredients:

✅3 large avocados
✅1 large handful fresh cilantro
✅1/2 large red onion, finely diced
✅1 jalapeno, finely diced
✅ 2 garlic cloves, minced
✅ Juice of 1 large lime
✅1/2 tsp Aleppo epper
✅2 generous pinches of salt
✅Crispy chickpeas, feta, walnuts, pomegranate, olives, olive oil 

Here is how to make it:

1️⃣ Start with cold ingredients. Make sure the avocados and veggies are in the fridge for at least 2 hrs before making this.
�2️⃣ Prep the mix-ins first… Finely dice ½ red onion, 1 jalapeño (remove the seeds if you want less spicy), & 1/3 cup fresh 
cilantro. Mince 2 fresh garlic cloves.�
3️⃣ Mash the avocados. Slice open 3 avocados, remove the pit and skin, and mash with juice of 1 lime, ½ tsp Aleppo or chili pepper, and a couple generous pinches salt. I like it somewhat chunky, but you decide what you like.

4️⃣ Make the crispy chickpeas. Toss 1 can of drained chickpeas with 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp smoked paprika, and ½ tsp garlic powder. Roast at 400°F for 28-30 mins until crispy.�
5️⃣ Finally, load it up: add 2 tbsp crumbled feta, ½ cup pomegranate seeds, 2-3 tbsp crushed toasted walnuts, 2-3 tbsp finely diced olives, a handful of fresh mint or parsley, and a drizzle of GOOD olive oil.

This would be perfect with your favorite vessel of choice (chips, crackers, veggies), as a sandwich spread, or crowned over any protein. If you try it, let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!
.
.
.
.

#healthyrecipes #mediterraneanfood #healthyfoodshare #lơwcarbrecipes #mediterraneanrecipes
summary: Mediterranean-inspired guacamole recipe with roasted chickpeas, feta, pomegranate, walnuts, and olives.

caption:
7 Layer Burrito (Taco Bell Copycat)

Layers:
Refried beans (warmed)
Spanish rice (I use microwave Spanish rice)
Guacamole (I like Herdez Traditional)
Sour cream
Three cheese blend (cheddar, mozzarella, Monterey Jack or taco blend)
Shredded lettuce
Diced tomato

Assembly:
Warm a large flour tortilla until soft and pliable.
Spread refried beans in a line across the center.
Add Spanish rice directly on top of the beans.
Add a line of guacamole, then a line of sour cream.
Sprinkle on cheese, then add shredded lettuce and diced tomato.

How to wrap it (Taco Bell style):
Fold in both sides of the tortilla toward the center.
Press gently from the middle and spread outward to distribute ingredients evenly.
Fold the bottom edge up over the filling and pull back toward you to tighten.
Tuck in any side flaps that stick out.
Roll forward until sealed.

That's it! — a discontinued Taco Bell classic, right from your kitchen. Enjoy! 

Do you have a favorite discontinued Taco Bell item? Let me know in the comments

caption:
Vegetarian Stuffed Bell Peppers with Rice & Veggies

Ingredients

Peppers & Filling

4 large bell peppers, halved and seeded

1 cup cooked rice (white, brown, or quinoa)

½ cup diced onion

2 garlic cloves, minced

½ cup diced zucchini

½ cup diced mushrooms

½ cup canned diced tomatoes, drained

½ cup black beans or chickpeas (optional)

Seasoning & Topping

2 tbsp olive oil

1 tsp ground cumin

1 tsp paprika or smoked paprika

½ tsp salt

¼ tsp black pepper

½ cup shredded mozzarella or cheddar (optional)

Fresh parsley or cilantro (garnish)

Instructions

Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Arrange prepared peppers upright in a lightly oiled baking dish.

Heat olive oil in a skillet. Sauté onion and garlic until fragrant; add zucchini and mushrooms and cook until tender.

Stir in tomatoes, beans (if using), cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Combine with cooked rice.

Fill peppers with the rice mixture. Add a splash of water to the dish, cover with foil, and bake 25–30 minutes.

Remove foil, top with cheese if using, and bake uncovered 10 more minutes until melted and peppers are tender.

Garnish with fresh herbs and serve warm.
summary: A vegetarian stuffed bell pepper recipe with rice, vegetables, and optional cheese, baked until tender.

caption:
💥 Sheet Pan Kebabs (So Easy & Delicious)

Kebab Ingredients:
2 lb ground beef
1 small white onion, grated
3 garlic cloves, minced
¼ cup fresh dill, chopped
¼ cup fresh parsley, chopped
Zest of ½ lemon
Pinch of black pepper
Pinch of salt
1 tbsp cumin
1 tbsp smoked paprika
1 tsp coriander
¼ tsp cinnamon

Yogurt Sauce:
¾ cup Greek Yogurt
Juice of ½ lemon
1.5 tbsp Olive oil
1 tsp Date syrup
Pinch of salt
Pinch of black pepper
Parsley, freshly chopped
Dill, freshly chopped

Directions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425F.
2. Add all kebab ingredients to a large bowl and mix with your hands. Once thoroughly
mixed in, spray a sheet pan with avocado or olive oil, then toss the meat onto it and
press the meat evenly across making a rough rectangle. It should be about ½-¾ inch
thick.
3. Score long vertical lines almost to the bottom (don't cut through), both vertically and
horizontally creating your kebabs. Bake for 20–22 mins.
4. While they bake in the oven, combine all your yogurt sauce ingredients in a bowl until it
becomes a creamy consistency.
5. Remove the kebabs from the oven. Spoon out excess liquid, mix with 1 tbsp tomato
paste, and brush over kebabs. Broil for 2-3 mins until browned.
6. 7. Let rest a few minutes, then cut along the score lines
Enjoy as delicious wrap with the yogurt sauce, tomatoes, and lettuce, or eat as is with the sauce.
summary: Sheet pan kebab recipe with spiced ground beef and Greek yogurt sauce.

caption:
Roasted Mini Peppers are a go to side dish for me. .  I love how sweet they are when they are roasted.  When you top them with seasoned bread crumbs they really are so flavorful.  I could make a meal out of them. 
recipe below and principal version is on my website on my website www.miciamammas.com. Type in "Roasted mini peppers" in the search bar. 

Roasted Mini Peppers
2 lbs. Mini Peppers
¼ Cup, plus 3 tbsp. Olive Oil
¾ Cup Italian Style Bread Crumbs

Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.  Coat the peppers with 3 tbsp. of olive oil and put on a baking sheet.  Roast in the oven for a half hour.  In the meantime, mix up your bread crumbs with the oil.  Be sure to check out my recipe on how to make these seasoned bread crumbs.  They are a mix of plain bread crumbs, chopped parsley, chopped garlic, salt, pepper and grated Pecorino. If you don't have the time to make them just buy already prepared Italian style bread crumbs.  But, I would add even more Pecorino to them!  When mixed with the olive oil, the crumbs should have the consistency of wet sand.  Remove from the oven.  The peppers should be flat.  However, if they still have their round shape, simply press down on them with your finger.  This will flatten them so that you can sprinkle the bread crumbs on top of each pepper.  Once you do this, get them back in the oven for another 20 minutes until the bread crumbs are golden brown. Serve.
#roastedpeppers #redpeppers #vegetarianrecipes #roastedveggies #minibellpeppers
summary: Roasted mini peppers topped with seasoned Italian bread crumbs and pecorino cheese.

caption:
WARM MULTI-LAYER ENCHILADA DIP

If you want an easy, high protein, incredible dip for game day, or really any kind of day,  this is such a great healthy high protein recipe.

Its got all sorts of layers of goodness, and I topped it all off with my everyday sauce that you will want to put on EVERYTHING. It's got a little mayo & sour cream, cilantro, jalapeños, lime, and garlic. This is without a doubt one of my favorite sauces.

✅➡️Comment "YUMMY" and I will send you the full printable recipe with the full macros from my substack.

Here is how I made it:

1.Preheat your oven to 400F.

2.Bring a pan to medium heat, spray a little oil, add 1lb ground beef, 1.5 tbsp taco seasoning, and break it down continuously until it's browned and finely minced. This takes about 15 minutes. Remember, you dont want big chunks. Remove from heat & set aside.

3. Grab an oven safe dish, spread 1 can of mashed refried beans at the base. If you are lowcarb, you can skip the beans altogether or use mashed cauliflower - they both work great!

4.After the layer of mashed beans, add the layer of ground beef and top with 8oz enchilada sauce or salsa of choice. I highly recommend enchilada sauce.

5.Add a layer of healthy high protein queso. I made this by processing a 16oz tub cottage cheese with 2 adobo peppers from the can and 1 tbsp of the adobo sauce, 2  garlic cloves, 1/2 tbsp onion powder, and 1/2 tbsp paprika.  Process well.

6.Top the queso with a layer of shredded cheese and pop into the oven for 15 mins.

7.While in the oven, make the sauce by processing  3 tbsp mayo, 2 tbsp sour cream or yogurt, 2 limes (juiced), large handful of cilantro, 1 small jalapeño pepper, 1 garlic clove, and a pinch of salt of salt. Process well. Taste and adjust.

8.When the dip is out of the oven, top it with avocado chunks, sliced black olives, diced jalapeño, finely chopped cilantro, and lots of sauce.

9.Grab your vessel of choice and ENJOY!

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS. And comment "YUMMY" and I will send you the full printable recipe!
.
.
.
.
#lowcarb #highprotein #healthyrecipes #healthyfoodshare #goodmoodfood
summary: A layered enchilada dip recipe with seasoned ground beef, cottage cheese queso, and cilantro-lime crema sauce.

caption:
🌮 Sheet Pan Tofu Fajitas 🌶️
.
Vegan • Gluten-Free • One Pan
.
These cozy tofu fajitas are flavourful, colorful, and finished with the creamiest cashew cheese drizzle - no stovetop mess required 😜🌮✨

INGREDIENTS

Fajitas
• 1 block extra-firm tofu, pressed and sliced
• 3 bell peppers, sliced
• 1 small onion, sliced
• 3 tbsp avocado oil
• 1 tbsp chili powder
• 1 tsp garlic powder
• 1 tsp onion powder
• 1 tsp paprika
• ½ tsp cumin
• Pinch of salt
• 1–1½ cups vegan shredded cheese

Cashew Cheese Sauce
• 1 cup raw cashews, soaked in hot water 10 minutes, drained
• ¾ cup fresh water
• 3 tbsp nutritional yeast
• 1 tbsp lemon juice
• 1 tsp garlic powder
• 1 tsp onion powder
• 1 tsp salt

Extras
• Fresh lime juice
• Warm corn (gluten-free) or flour tortillas

DIRECTIONS
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Add tofu, peppers, and onion to a large sheet pan.
3. Drizzle with avocado oil and sprinkle on all seasonings. Toss to coat evenly.
4. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes, stirring halfway.
5. While fajitas bake, blend all cashew cheese ingredients until smooth and creamy.
6. Remove pan from oven, sprinkle vegan shredded cheese evenly over the top. Return to oven for 5–8 minutes, until cheese is melted.
7. Remove from oven and splash with fresh lime juice.
8. Warm tortillas, assemble tofu fajitas, drizzle on cashew cheese, serve hot, and enjoy.

➡️ Head to the blog for more #EasyVegan comfort food recipes 🌱
➡️ Grab your free 7-Day Easy Vegan + Gluten-Free Meal Plan in my bio 🌱

#EasyVegan #VeganDinner #SheetPanMeal #TofuRecipes GlutenFree

caption:
Zeera Aloo - A popular North Indian dish made with potatoes (aloo) sautéed with cumin seeds (zeera) and spices🤎

* 8 Red potatoes (about 2lbs) wash, peel and cut into 1 inch cubes. Boil until 3/4 done (4 minutes), drain and keep it aside. 
* 2 Tbsp Ghee  
* 1 tsp Cumin  
* Pinch of Hing  
* 1 cup Onions, chopped  
* 1 tsp Ginger, chopped  
* 1 tsp Garlic, chopped  
* 1 tsp Green Chillies, chopped  
* 1 tsp Coriander powder  
* 1/4 tsp Turmeric  
* 1/2 tsp Kashmiri mirch  
* Salt to taste  
* 1/2 tsp Mango powder  
* 1/2 tsp Chat masala  
* 1/2 tsp Cumin powder  
* Cilantro  
 
Method  
 
* Heat ghee and add cumin seeds and hing.  
* Add onions, garlic, ginger and green chilies.  
* Sauté until light brown. Add coriander powder, mirch & turmeric.  
* Add potatoes and stir on medium heat for a few minutes. Cover and cook on low heat for about 5 minutes or until done. 
* Add salt to taste.  
* Add mango powder, chat masala, cumin powder and cilantro.  
 
#jeeraaloo #spicedpotatoes #indiandish #simplerecipe #frommaskitchen

caption:
First time on internet 🤩 When kids say no to Cabbage, moms get creative.
This Non fried high protein Cabbage Paneer Manchurian is my way of sneaking veggies without complaints!

🌺 Comment an emoji , if you like the recipe 🙏 that would be so appreciated. 

🥬🧀 High proteinCabbage Paneer Manchurian with Gravy

Soft inside / Crispy outside / No maida/ No deep frying 

📝 Ingredients

For Manchurian Balls
•	Cabbage + ginger + garlic + green chilli (chopped together) – 2 cups
•	Crumbled paneer – ½ cup
•	Rice flour – ¼ cup
•	Corn flour – 2 tbsp (as needed)
 •  Almond powder- 1 tbsp 
 •  Soya Sauce - 1 tsp ( optional) 
•	Salt – to taste 
•	Black pepper – 1 tsp
•	Water – as needed (little)
•	Oil – for frying / appe pan

For Gravy
	•	Oil – 2 tbsp
	•	Garlic – 1 tbsp
	•	Ginger – 1 tsp
	•	Onion – ¼ cup
	•	Capsicum – ¼ cup
	•	Soy sauce – 1½ tbsp( or to taste)
	•	Red chilli flakes – 1 tbsp( or to taste)
	•	Homemade Tomato ketchup – 2 tbsp( or to taste) 
	•	Vinegar – 1 to 2 tsp ( or lemon juice ) as per taste 
	•	Black pepper – ½ tsp
	•	Water – 1½–2 cups( desired consistency) 
	•	Corn flour – 1 tbsp + ½ cup water (slurry)
	•	Spring onion greens – for garnish

👩‍🍳 Method (Short & Clear)

Balls
	1.	Mix chopped veggies + paneer + flours + salt & pepper.
	2.	Add little water to make soft dough.
	3.	Rest 5 min, make small balls.
	4.	Shallow fry - appe-pan cook on medium heat from all sides.

Gravy
	1.	Heat oil, sauté onion, capsicum, veggies.
	2.	Add ginger garlic stir fry 1 min.
	3.	Lower flame, add sauces & pepper.
	4.	Add water, boil.
	5.	Add corn-flour slurry, cook till glossy. ( adjust water and sauces according to your taste)
 6. Add Manchurian balls when they become cold , coat in gravy and enjoy hot . Garnish with spring onions.

#CabbageManchurian #PaneerManchurian #appepanrecipe #MomHacks nonfriedmanchurian 
usaindian madewithlove

summary: High-protein cabbage paneer manchurian recipe made in an appe pan with a gravy, designed to sneak vegetables into kids' meals.

caption:
A quick prawn starter that's spicy and irresistible

Ingredients
500 g prawns, cleaned
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
Salt to taste
4 tbsp coconut oil
1/2 tsp mustard seeds
1 sprig curry leaves
1/2 tsp ginger paste
1 tsp garlic paste
1 tsp chilli powder
1 tsp coriander seed powder
1 tsp pepper powder
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 onion, sliced
2 tbsp freshly chopped coriander

Method
Marinate the prawns with turmeric and salt.
Heat coconut oil and splutter mustard seeds and curry leaves. Add the prawns, ginger paste, garlic paste, chilli powder, coriander powder and pepper powder. Mix well and cook for 4–5 minutes till the prawns curl up and turn white. Switch off the flame and squeeze in lemon juice.
In the same kadhai, add a little coconut oil and sauté the sliced onion for a minute. Add the prawns back, sprinkle fresh coriander and mix gently. Serve hot as a starter.

caption:
ONE PAN ROASTED CHICKEN & VEGGIES

The crazy thing about this recipe is, the veggies are the best part. The key is to place the veggies below the chicken, and when it's done cooking, to turn off the heat and let the veggies continue cooking with the residual heat. It becomes soft and soaked with the chicken juices and SO good. 

✅ Comment BANGER and I'll send you the link to my FREE protein ebook!

Here is how I made it:

1.Preheat oven to 400F.

2.Add 4 chicken leg quarters to a bowl. You can use 2lbs of thighs, drumsticks, or any chicken piece you like. Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil. Season with salt & pepper, the zest + juice of a large lemon, 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp oregano, 1/2 tsp cayenne pepper, & 1 tbsp sweet paprika. To add flavor and color, add 2 tbsp tomato paste and 4 minced garlic cloves. Mix really well, and ideally 
marinade for at least 2hrs (overnight is best).

3.Next, use whatever veggies you like. I used 2 medium sweet potato, a large handful broccoli florets, and 1 large shallot.

4.Cut the sweet potato in smaller wedges (so they cook all the way through) and place them at the bottom of an oven safe dish or a pan (this is key!) Then add the broccoli and 1 thinly sliced shallot. Drizzle with olive oil, season with a pinch of salt, 1/2 tbsp oregano, and 1/2 tbsp garlic powder.

5.Place the chicken on top of the veggies, and if there is any leftover chicken marinate add all of it. Pop into the oven at 400F for 40 mins. ***At the end, turn off the heat then let the pan sit in the oven for 20-30 minutes without the heat on to soften up the veggies and soak up the flavors even more.

6.While that's going, grab a sauce or just mix 3 tbsp mayo with 1 tbsp tomato paste, 1 minced garlic clove, the zest and juice of 1 small lemon, and a pinch of salt.

7.Remove pan from the oven, plate it up, top with finely chopped fresh parsley, a little sauce, and enjoy. 

You can have this as-is, with  regular rice, or if you want more protein my @kaizenfoodco high protein rice.

If you make this, and you want more healthy recipes, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#highprotein #chickenrecipes #lowcarb #healthyrecipes #healthyfoodshare
summary: One-pan roasted chicken and vegetables with a lemon-garlic marinade, cooked with residual heat to soften the veggies.

caption:
🍠🎃🥕 Layered Sweet Potato, Squash & Carrot Bake

with Cranberry Maple Drizzle

A stunning, cozy vegetable bake with thinly sliced sweet potatoes, squash, and carrots layered together, roasted until tender, and finished with a tangy-sweet cranberry maple drizzle. Perfect for holidays, gatherings, or a nourishing vegetarian main.

⏱ Time & Servings

Prep: 20 minutes

Bake: 45–50 minutes

Serves: 6

🧾 Ingredients
Vegetable Bake

2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled & thinly sliced

2 cups butternut squash (or acorn squash), thinly sliced

3 large carrots, thinly sliced

3 tbsp olive oil

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tsp thyme (fresh or dried)

½ tsp rosemary

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Cranberry Maple Drizzle

½ cup fresh or frozen cranberries

3 tbsp pure maple syrup

2 tbsp orange juice (or water)

½ tsp orange zest (optional)

Pinch of cinnamon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Preheat oven to 190°C / 375°F. Lightly grease a baking or casserole dish.

Season vegetables: In a large bowl, toss sweet potatoes, squash, and carrots with olive oil, garlic, thyme, rosemary, salt, and pepper.

Layer: Arrange vegetables upright or slightly overlapping in layers for a beautiful pattern.

Cover & bake: Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes.

Uncover & roast: Remove foil and bake another 15–20 minutes until golden and fork-tender.

Make drizzle: Simmer cranberries, maple syrup, orange juice, zest, and cinnamon over medium heat 8–10 minutes until thickened. Mash slightly.

Finish: Drizzle warm cranberry maple sauce over the bake just before serving.

🌱 Variations

Vegan & dairy-free: Naturally vegan as written.

Nutty crunch: Add toasted pecans or walnuts on top.

Savory-sweet: Sprinkle crumbled feta or goat cheese before serving.

Spiced: Add a pinch of nutmeg or smoked paprika.

💡 Pro Tips

Slice vegetables evenly (mandoline works great) for uniform cooking.

Make the cranberry maple drizzle ahead of time—it reheats well.

Pairs beautifully with roast chicken, turkey, or as a festive vegetarian centerpiece.
#recipes #MediterraneanEscape #fblifestyle #meditteranean #recipeshare #mediterranean
summary: A layered roasted sweet potato, squash, and carrot bake with cranberry maple drizzle, serves 6.

caption:
Stop eating that same old omelette - yeh toh cardboard hai!

Look, omelets are great. Quick protein, minimal effort, gets the job done. But let's be real - how many times have you ordered one at a café and gotten that sad, rubbery, overcooked disappointment?

This isn't about hating on omelets. I have grown up eaitng them too. 
This is about showing you that something like Lucknowi Anda Korma isn't as out of reach as you think.

People assume korma = restaurant food = too hard. 
But here's what actually happens: you boil some eggs (10 mins), make a simple masala paste, temper whole spices, and let it all come together. 
60 minutes, start to finish. If you can make an omelet, you can make this.

Rich, aromatic, actually satisfying. The kind of dish that makes you feel like you cooked - not just assembled breakfast.
Omelets have their place. But so does this. Recipe below 👇
summary: A recipe for Lucknowi Anda Korma, an aromatic egg curry presented as a more satisfying alternative to basic omelets.

caption:
Viral Dumpling Bake Meal Prep

Makes 4 individual bakes

Ingredients (per container)
- 5 to 6 frozen dumplings (potstickers or gyoza)
- 1/2 cup chopped bok choy 
- 1/4 cup canned full-fat coconut milk
- 2 tbsp Trader Joe's Thai red curry sauce
- 1 tbsp Trader Joe's Soyaki sauce
- Chili crunch, for topping @momofukugoods 
- Fresh cilantro, chopped, for topping
- Green onion, for topping

Soyaki sauce swaps (if no Trader Joe's):
- 1 tbsp teriyaki sauce or 1 tbsp soy sauce + 1/2 tsp honey or brown sugar

(Totals: 24 dumplings (1 package) , 2 cups bok choy, 1 cup coconut milk, 1/2 cup red curry sauce, 1/4 cup soyaki or substitute)

Instructions
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Lightly spray 4 individual glass meal prep containers.
3. Add 1/2 cup bok choy to the bottom of each container.
4. In each container, pour in 1/4 cup coconut milk, 2 tbsp red curry sauce, and 1 tbsp soyaki (or substitute).
5. Stir gently to coat the bok choy.
6. Layer 5 to 6 frozen dumplings on top.
7. Cover containers tightly with foil or lids.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, until dumplings are tender and sauce is bubbling.
9. Remove foil, then top with chili crunch, cilantro, and green onion.

Reheat
- Microwave 1 to 2 minutes, covered.
- Stir gently before eating to coat dumplings in sauce.
summary: Viral dumpling bake recipe with coconut curry sauce and bok choy, portioned into four meal prep containers.

caption:
5-Minute Peanut Chili Noodles 🔥

Comment "Recipe" and I'll send you the full recipe card for free!!

As simple as it gets, as flavorful as it gets: sweet, savory, and just the right spice.

Protein tip: Best served with chicken, shrimp, or tofu 🫡

Ingredients:
-9 oz (250 g) hand-cut thick noodles (or any noodles you like)
-1.5 tbsp peanut butter
-1 tsp chili flakes (optional)
-1/3 cup fresh green onion, sliced
-2 tsp sesame seeds
-5 garlic cloves, minced
-1 tbsp white sugar (optional, but balances the heat)
-1 tbsp chili crisp (+ 2 more tbsp extra for garnish) 
-1 tbsp rice vinegar
-2 tbsp dark soy sauce
-1/3 cup neutral oil (I use avocado)
-3 tbsp reserved pasta water (optional)
-More sliced green onion, for garnish
-Fresh lime wedges, for garnish

I recommend "Lao Gan Ma Spicy Chili Crisp"

Instructions:
1. Bring a  pot of salted water to a boil and cook your noodles according to package instructions. Undercook them by about 30 seconds because they'll finish in the sauce. Save some pasta water (!!), then drain and rinse the noodles under cold water so they don't stick together like clingy exes.
2. In a cold pan (no heat yet), add: peanut butter, chili flakes, green onion, sesame seeds, garlic, sugar, 1 tbsp chili crisp, rice vinegar, and dark soy sauce.
3. Heat 1/3 cup neutral oil until it's really hot (like "sizzle your eyebrows off" hot), then carefully pour it over the cold ingredients in the pan. Watch the magic happen. Stir it all together.
4. Toss in your noodles and coat them in the sauce. If you want them extra silky, turn on the heat to medium-low, splash in 2–3 tbsp of the reserved noodle water and thoroughly mix together.
5. Turn off the heat, top with more green onion, extra chili crisp, and lime wedges if you're fancy.
summary: A 5-minute peanut chili noodle recipe with garlic, chili crisp, and sesame seeds, adaptable with chicken, shrimp, or tofu.

caption:
This dal makhani is my bua's special recipe — the kind that's made slowly, with patience, love and without any butter or cream. It's one of those dishes that brings everyone to the table, and honestly, our entire family is obsessed with it. 

Ingredients
* 1 cup black urad dal, soaked overnight
* 1 inch ginger
* 2 green chillies, slit
* 2 cloves
* 2 garlic pods
* 2 cinnamon sticks
* 1 black cardamom (badi elaichi)
* 1 tsp oil
* 1 tbsp red chilli powder

For the tadka:
* ¾ tbsp oil
* 2 tbsp ginger-garlic paste
* 1 tbsp red chilli powder
* 2 tomatoes, ground
* 1 tbsp garam masala

Method
1. Drain the soaked dal, remove the chilka, and boil it in an open pressure cooker until the dal starts to split.
2. Add ginger, green chillies, cloves, garlic, cinnamon, black cardamom, oil, and red chilli powder. Pressure cook again.
3. For the tadka, heat oil and sauté ginger-garlic paste. Add red chilli powder, ground tomatoes, and garam masala.
4. Add this tadka to the dal and let it simmer on low heat for at least one hour. The slower it cooks, the better it tastes.


Do you also have that one family recipe that your entire family loves? Share with me in the comments!

#AnahitaCooks 
(Anahita dhondy, dal makhani without cream, no cream dal makhani, healthy dal makhani recipe, traditional dal makhani without cream, vegan dal makhani recipe, dairy-free dal makhani, homemade dal makhani, slow cooked dal makhani, winter comfort food Indian, authentic dal makhani recipe)

caption:
Ep. 4 TAKEOUT TOUCHDOWNS 🏈🔥Fries and orange chicken?! SIGN ME UP! I totally get the hype now!

➡️ Recipe: Orange Chicken Fries 
Serves 5-6

*  1lb of fries, crinkle cut, frozen or homemade is fine 
* 4-5 cups of frying oil, peanut or canola oil

Chicken—
* 1 lb Chicken Thighs, cubed
* 1 tsp kosher salt
* 1/2 tsp garlic powder
* 1/2 tsp black pepper
* 1/4 tsp ginger powder

Batter—
* 3/4 cup corn starch 
* 3/4 cup sparkling cup water, cold
* 1/4 cup all-purpose flour 
* 1 tsp baking powder

Sauce—
* 3/4 cup orange juice
* 2 tbsp distilled white vinegar
* 1 1/2 tbsp sugar
* 1 tbsp soy sauce 
* 1 tbsp dark soy sauce
* 2 tbsp honey
* Optional: 4-6 dried chili peppers

Slurry—
1 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp water

Garnish—
* Green onions, thinly sliced

Optional spicy mayo— 
* 3 tbsp Kewpie mayo 
* 2 tbsp water (to thin out the sauce)
* 1 tbsp sriracha  or to taste

1. Season cubed chicken thighs with salt, garlic powder, black pepper, and ginger. Marinate for 15 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, whisk cornstarch, ice-cold sparkling water, AP flour, and baking powder until thick and smooth. Add chicken, coat well, and chill until ready to fry.
3. Sauce: Mix orange juice, vinegar, sugar, soy sauce, dark soy, and honey; set aside. For spicy mayo, combine mayo, sriracha, and a little water to thin.
4. Heat oil to 400°F. Fry frozen fries until golden and crispy (4–5 minutes or per package). Remove and drain.
5. In the same oil, fry battered chicken (stir batter before frying) in small batches until light golden and 165°F, about 5–6 minutes. Drain well.
6. Bring the orange sauce to a rolling boil. Add dried chilies if using, then stir in the slurry and cook until thickened. Toss in the fried chicken and fries until evenly coated.
7. Plate, drizzle with spicy mayo, garnish with sliced green onions, and enjoy!

#easyrecipes #orangechicken #fries #recipe #chinesefood 

Have you tried the original orange chicken fries from @mryoumontclair?? (It's so far from me but this is my best take on them!)
summary: A recipe for orange chicken fries combining crispy fried chicken thighs coated in a tangy-sweet orange sauce served over crispy fries.

caption:
Cottage cheese pizza crusts! 

Ingredients:
2 cups low fat cottage cheese 
2 large eggs
1/2 tsp baking powder
1/2 tsp salt
3/4 cup almond flour (or flour of your choice)

Toppings:
Tomato sauce
Shredded cheese
Italian seasoning 
(Add whatever toppings you want!)

How to:
In a blender combine cottage cheese and eggs. Mix until well combined. Stir in baking powder, salt, and almond flour. Spread batter: Make four to 6 pizza crusts on a parchment lined pan (make sure you leave space in-between them) spread out your crusts evenly. Bake at 400 degrees for 18-25 minutes until browning. 

Take out of the oven and top with tomato sauce, cheese, and Italian seasoning. Place back into the oven at 400 degrees for 5 minutes (until cheese is melted) serve! 

#pizza #protein #dinner #easyrecipe #cheese
summary: A recipe for high-protein pizza crusts made with cottage cheese and eggs, topped with sauce and cheese.

caption:
Shaved Tofu Pita Wraps👇🏼😍 If you haven't tried this method, you're missing out on the best HACK! Fluffy pita filled with garlic tahini sauce, parsley salad, shaved tofu and pickled onion.. absolutely delicious 🌯

For the perfect shaved slices, you've got to use firm tofu. @soycoaustralia Firm Tofu is my go-to, it's high in protein (20g per serve) and works perfectly for this recipe (no need to press it). You can find it at Coles! Ad/Partner

Tofu:
350g @soycoaustralia firm tofu
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp onion powder
1.5 tsp smoked paprika
2 tsp dried parsley 
1 tsp ground cumin
Pinch of salt and pepper
1.5 tbsp low sodium soy sauce or an all purpose soy seasoning
1 tbsp olive oil, plus more for pan frying as needed
1 tbsp maple syrup or coconut aminos

Garlic tahini sauce:
3/4 cup plain coconut or soy yogurt 
1.5 tbsp hulled tahini 
Pinch of salt
Juice from 1/2 lemon
1 tsp garlic powder or 1 garlic clove crushed

Salad:
1 small red onion, finely diced
1 bunch of parsley, finely chopped (roughly 2 cups chopped)
1 cucumber, finely diced
1 large tomato, finely diced
Juice from 1 small lemon
1 tsp olive oil
Pinch of salt

Other:
Pita bread
Pickled red onion

Using a vegetable peeler, peel the tofu to create thin strips. Add to a large container along with the seasonings, and give it a shake (you can also toss with hands in a large bowl).

Heat a frypan over high heat and add a dash of oil. Add the tofu and cook until lightly golden, tossing occasionally. You could alternatively bake the tofu in a pre heated oven at 200°C/400°F for 20-30 minutes (air frying should work too).

Combine the sauce ingredients together in a bowl. Toss the salad ingredients together in a large bowl.

Heat the pita in the microwave or pan to soften. Add the sauce, tofu, salad and pickled onion. Fold up and enjoy.

#vegan #plantbased #asmrfood veganfood #tofu veganrecipes #easyrecipes healthyrecipes gyro
summary: Recipe for shaved tofu pita wraps with garlic tahini sauce, parsley salad, and pickled onions.

caption:

Try my Fresh Peach Salsa — it's juicy, sweet, tangy, slightly spicy, and packed with refreshing flavors that balance perfectly with salty chips. The best part? It comes together in just 15 minutes, making it a stress-free game day recipe that still feels fancy and homemade.

caption:
ULTIMATE SPINACH DIP (Oven-Baked, Creamy, Dangerous)

Before we start — mise en place (pronounced meez-ahn-plahs).
It means everything in its place. Prep first, cook stress-free later. Trust me.

⸻

STEP 1: THE SPINACH

• 1–2 lb spinach, steamed
➡️ Reserve spinach for final assembly

⸻

STEP 2: BLEND FIRST (Creamy Base)

Blend until smooth:
• 24 oz cream cheese
• 2 cups heavy cream
• 2 chicken bouillon

⸻

STEP 3: BLEND AGAIN (Flavor Builders)

Blend until finely chopped:
• 1 tbsp garlic
• 1 medium onion
• 2 jalapeños
• 1 tsp dill
• 2 tbsp cornstarch

⸻

STEP 4: FINAL BLEND (Seasoning Stage)

Add and blend:
• 1 tsp salt
• 1 tsp chili flakes
• 1 tsp black pepper
• 1 tsp lemon pepper
• Dash cayenne
• Dash smoked paprika
• 1 tsp onion powder
• 1 tsp garlic powder

⸻

STEP 5: CHEESE + EXTRAS

• 4 cups provolone–mozzarella blend
• ½ cup cheddar (sneak it into the core 👀)
• 1 can mushrooms or artichokes

⸻

ASSEMBLY (Oven-Safe Dish)

Layer like this:
1️⃣ Spinach
2️⃣ Mushrooms/artichokes
3️⃣ Cheese sauce
4️⃣ More cheese sauce
5️⃣ Cheese on top
➕ Optional bacon because… obviously

Bake at 425°F until bubbly, golden, and unhinged.

Finish with chili flakes 🌶️
Serve with nachos (non-negotiable).

⸻

PRO TIP

This recipe makes 3–4 extra cups of sauce.
Freeze it in bags.
Next time? Just add spinach + cheese and you're back in business.

caption:
Greek Chicken Wraps with Garlic Yogurt Sauce
Ingredients
Marinated Chicken

1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasts or thighs, thinly sliced

3 tbsp olive oil

1 tbsp lemon juice

2–3 cloves garlic, minced

1½ tsp dried oregano

1 tsp paprika

½ tsp ground cumin (optional)

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Garlic Yogurt Sauce

1 cup plain Greek yogurt

½ cup grated cucumber, squeezed dry

1–2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tbsp lemon juice

1 tbsp olive oil

1 tbsp fresh dill or mint (optional)

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Assembly

4 large pita breads or flatbreads

Shredded lettuce

Diced tomato

Diced cucumber

Thinly sliced red onion

Optional: crumbled feta cheese or sliced Kalamata olives

Instructions

Marinate Chicken:
Toss chicken with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, paprika, cumin (if using), salt, and pepper. Marinate 30 minutes to 4 hours.

Prepare Sauce:
Mix yogurt, cucumber, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, herbs, salt, and pepper. Chill until needed.

Cook Chicken:
Cook chicken in a hot skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat for 5–7 minutes until golden and cooked through (165°F).

Assemble Wraps:
Warm pita lightly. Spread sauce inside, layer vegetables and chicken, and add feta or olives if desired.

Serve:
Roll tightly and serve immediately with extra sauce on the side.
summary: A Greek chicken wrap recipe with marinated chicken, garlic yogurt sauce, and fresh vegetables served in pita bread.

caption:
New York Times Top 50 Recipes of 2025 | Honey Garlic Shrimp by @nytcooking @lideylikes

Ingredients: 

- 1 lb jumbo shrimp, peeled & deveined
- ⅓ cup honey
- 3 Tbsp soy sauce
- 1 Tbsp garlic, minced
- ½ tsp grated ginger
- Red pepper flakes, to taste
- ¼ tsp cornstarch
- 1 Tbsp oil
- Scallions, to serve

Toss the shrimp with 3 tablespoons of a whisked mixture of honey, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and red pepper and marinate for at least 15 minutes. Stir the cornstarch into the remaining marinade and set aside, then pat the shrimp dry and discard the excess marinade. Heat a large skillet over medium-high with oil, cook the shrimp in a single layer until lightly browned, about 2 minutes per side, then add the reserved marinade and cook until thickened. Transfer to a serving dish, top with scallions, and serve.
summary: New York Times Top 50 recipe for honey garlic shrimp with soy sauce and ginger, pan-seared and glazed.

caption:
Gave a Thai flavor spin to the viral dumpling bake and omgggg it's SOOOOO good!!!! Customize it however you like but if you love the flavor of a Thai coconut curry you will flip for this! Took all of 5 minutes to prep (perfecttttt for a quick dinner) and so good we just love it!!Recipe below! 

1.5lb of your favorite dumplings 
13oz can of unsweetened coconut milk 
1 Tbsp of Thai curry paste (Thai kitchen brand is good and not as spicy but use two tbsp for some serious heat and the Mae ploy will blow your mind with heat so if you use that use one tbsp MAX) 
2 Tbsp of Low sodium soy 
1 Tbsp of honey 
1 tsp of toasted sesame oil (I mixed the honey and oil with the soy for ease) 
Couple handfuls of broccoli florets 
Couple handfuls of baby spinach 

Add the dumplings and broccoli to a baking dish, set aside. In a measuring cup whisk the coconut milk, curry paste, soy, honey and sesame oil, pour all over the dumplings, cover with foil and bake at 400 for 30 minutes, remove the foil, add in the spinach and pop it back in uncovered for 10 minutes. Allow to sit for about 10 minutes before serving!
summary: Thai coconut curry dumpling bake recipe with broccoli and spinach that bakes in 40 minutes.

caption:
Roasted Beet Salad 🫜 

Ingredients:
•	4-6 medium beets 
•	2 tbsp olive oil
•	¼ tsp salt
•	2 packed cups fresh spinach @earthboundfarm 
•	2 tbsp red onion, thinly sliced

For the dressing:
•	3 tbsp olive oil
•	2 tbsp balsamic vinegar
•	1 tbsp Dijon mustard @maillecanada 
•	1 tbsp honey
•	1 tbsp fresh lemon juice
•	½ tsp salt
•	¼ tsp black pepper
•	Pinch of cayenne pepper

To finish
•	¼ cup toasted walnuts 
•	⅓ cup feta cheese, crumbled @dodoni_international 

Instructions:
	1.	Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
	2.	Trim the beets, leaving the skin on. Cut into quarters or large cubes.
	3.	Toss with olive oil and salt, then spread in a baking dish.
	4.	Bake for 50–60 minutes, until fork-tender and slightly caramelized.
	5.	While beets bake, whisk together all dressing ingredients until smooth.
	6.	Let beets cool slightly, then add to a bowl with spinach and red onion.
	7.	Pour over dressing and toss gently to combine.
	8.	Transfer to a plate or serving bowl and top with walnuts and feta.

#beets #beetsalad
summary: A roasted beet salad recipe with spinach, red onion, walnuts, feta, and a balsamic-Dijon dressing.

caption:
Cheese and Spinach Cannelloni 🍝 22g Protein

A comforting vegetarian Italian classic that never disappoints. Tender pasta tubes are filled with a rich blend of creamy ricotta and earthy spinach, then baked in a vibrant tomato sauce under a blanket of melted golden cheese.

📝 Ingredients:
✦ 12 Cannelloni Pasta Tubes (approx. 250g)
✦ 10 oz Frozen Spinach, thawed and squeezed very dry
✦ 15 oz Ricotta Cheese
✦ 1/2 cup Grated Parmesan Cheese
✦ 1 large Egg, lightly beaten
✦ 1 clove Garlic, minced
✦ 2 cups Marinara Sauce
✦ 1 cup Shredded Mozzarella Cheese
✦ 1/4 tsp Nutmeg
✦ Salt and Pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions:
1- Preheat your oven to 375 F (190 C).

2- In a large bowl, combine the dried spinach, ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, beaten egg, minced garlic, nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Mix until well combined.

3- If using "oven-ready" cannelloni, skip this step. If using traditional pasta, par-boil the tubes for 2-3 minutes in salted water, then drain and cool.

4- Spread about 1/2 cup of marinara sauce on the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.

5- Fill the cannelloni tubes with the spinach and cheese mixture. You can use a piping bag or a small spoon.

6- Arrange the filled tubes in a single layer in the baking dish.

7- Pour the remaining marinara sauce evenly over the pasta, ensuring the tubes are covered so they cook properly.

8- Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese over the top.

9- Cover with foil and bake for 25-30 minutes. Remove the foil and bake for another 10-15 minutes until the cheese is bubbly and slightly browned.

10- Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the filling to set.

✅ Macros Summary:
✯ Protein: 22g
✯ Carbs: 38g
✯ Fat: 16g
✯ Calories: 390
✯ Time: 55 min ⏱️
✯ Serving: 4 Servings (3 tubes each) 🍽️

#cannelloni #vegetarian #italianfood #comfortfood #pastadinner
summary: Baked cheese and spinach cannelloni with marinara sauce and melted mozzarella, a vegetarian Italian pasta dish.

caption:
Southern Shrimp Crunchwraps with Spicy Cream Sauce 🌮🔥
Big flavor, crispy bite – your new favorite shrimp wrap hack!

📝 Ingredients:

For the Shrimp:

1 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined

2 tbsp olive oil

1 tsp smoked paprika

1/2 tsp garlic powder

1/2 tsp onion powder

1/4 tsp cayenne pepper

Salt & pepper to taste

Juice of 1/2 lime

For the Spicy Cream Sauce:

1/2 cup sour cream

1/4 cup mayo

1 tbsp hot sauce (adjust to your heat level)

2 tbsp chopped chives or green onions

1 garlic clove, finely minced

Salt to taste

Optional: a splash of lime juice for zing

Wrap & Fillings:

4 large flour tortillas

1 cup shredded lettuce

1/2 cup diced tomatoes

1/4 cup diced red onion

1/2 cup shredded cheddar or pepper jack cheese

Optional: crushed tortilla chips or crispy onions for crunch

🍽️ How to Make It:

1️⃣ Season & Sear the Shrimp:

Toss shrimp with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, cayenne, salt, pepper, and lime juice. Sear in a hot skillet 2–3 minutes per side until juicy and golden—a spicy shrimp dinner done right!

2️⃣ Mix the Sauce:

In a bowl, whisk together sour cream, mayo, hot sauce, chives, garlic, and salt—this is your flavor-packed spicy drizzle.

3️⃣ Layer & Build:

On each tortilla, spread spicy cream sauce, add lettuce, tomatoes, onions, cheese, and cooked shrimp. Sprinkle on crushed chips for extra crunch factor.

4️⃣ Fold & Grill:

Tuck and roll each wrap tightly. Toast in a dry skillet until golden brown on both sides—crispy outside, loaded inside!

5️⃣ Serve It Up:

Slice in half and serve with extra sauce or a fresh side salad. These wraps are loaded with bold flavor and Southern comfort vibes.
#chefzouheir
summary: A recipe for crispy Southern Shrimp Crunchwraps with spicy cream sauce, grilled until golden and loaded with fresh toppings.

caption:
I KNOW BEANS ARE NOT EVERYONE'S FAVOURITE …

But this quick, simple recipe changes everything.

✔️ No fancy ingredients
✔️ Healthy & everyday recipe
✔️ Perfect for people who are not a fan of beans

Save this and try it once before judging beans 😉

Follow @annapoornas.food.trail for more such quick, no fuss, homemade veg recipes!

Recipe:

Take 1/2 kilo beans wash, chop and boil it until soft. Set aside

While the beans boils, in a pan take 2-3 tbsp groundnuts, 2tsp sesame seeds, 2-3 red chillies, 1.5 tsp corriander seeds, 1.5 tsp jeera and sauté well. Next add 1/2 grated coconut and sauté till aromatic. Grind in a mixer.

In the same pan add oil, mustard seeds, chopped garlic, chopped onion and lastly add the boiled beans and mix well

Now add the ground masala and mix. Cover till the flavour blends together. Serve with chapati or rice!

#simpleindianfood #quickrecipe #nofussfood #frenchbeans #healthyindianfoods
summary: Quick Indian stir-fried french beans with roasted spice masala and coconut.

caption:
Chicken you'll ACTUALLY make episode 7JUICY GRILLED CHICKEN 

Already saved this recipe?

Recipe:

🍗🔥grilled Spiced Chicken Thighs on Rice

600 g (about 1.3 lb) boneless, skinless chicken thighs

Season with:
• 2–3 tsp homemade grill seasoning (see below)
• 1 tbsp olive oil or neutral oil
• a small pinch of salt (only if your seasoning isn't salty)

Massage the seasoning + oil into the chicken until fully coated 🔥
Marinate for at least 30 minutes (or up to 12 hours in the fridge) 😮‍💨

Heat a stainless-steel pan over medium-high heat until HOT 🔥
Add a thin film of oil, then sear the chicken 3–4 min per side until deep golden-brown crust 🤤
Lower heat slightly and cook through (internal temp ~75°C / 165°F) ✅
Rest for 2–3 minutes, slice and serve over rice 🍚✨
Drizzle with olive oil or melted butter for shine 😍
Top with fresh herbs (parsley or chives) if you want 🌿

⸻

🌶️ Homemade grill Seasoning: (makes about ½ cup)
• 2 tbsp smoked paprika (or sweet paprika)
• 1 tbsp garlic powder
• 1 tbsp onion powder
• 1 tbsp freshly cracked black pepper
• 1 tbsp coarse salt
• 2 tsp brown sugar (optional)
• 1 tsp chili flakes or cayenne
• 1 tsp dried thyme or rosemary (optional)

Mix well and store in a sealed jar ✅

caption:
@cookwithchay 's Spicy chicken in a butter, cream sauce over basmati rice 

1. 4 chicken quarters
2. 1/4 cup Greek plain yogurt
3. 1 tablespoon ginger and garlic paste - or just garlic paste
4. 1/2 teaspoon salt and turmeric
5. 1.5 teaspoons each coriander powder, cumin, paprika, garam masala
6. 1 teaspoon cayenne
7. 1 tablespoon olive oil

Butter cream sauce :
1. 4 tablespoons butter
2. 1 tablespoon garlic paste
3. 2 teaspoons paprika
4. 3 tablespoons chopped cilantro or parsley
5. 3/4 cup chicken broth
6. 3/4 cup heavy whipping cream

1. Make 4 cups of rice - I used basmati rice
2. I removed the skin of the chicken quarters.
3. Cut a few slits into the chicken so that all seasoning can go in.
4. Seasoned the chicken with the yogurt and all of the seasoning, including olive oil. Massage well.
5. Air fry 390° for 25 minutes flipping halfway through. Or oven bake at 390 F for 25 minutes. Check for doneness add few more minutes if necessary.
6. To a large skillet, add butter on low heat, add ginger, garlic paste, paprika, and cilantro, and stir. Don't burn the sauce .
7. Add the broth and let it cook for 2 to 3 minutes . Add the heavy whipping cream cook one minute and add in the chicken and let the sauce soak in to the chicken. When sauce has thickened remove from the heat and serve over rice.

caption:
Baked Eggplant Parmesan 🍆🧀🍅💪 28g Protein

Crispy baked eggplant layered with rich marinara sauce and gooey melted cheese, baked until bubbly and golden. This classic Italian comfort dish is hearty, satisfying, and lighter than the fried version — full of flavor in every bite 😍🇮🇹

📝 Ingredients: 🍆🧀
✦ 2 large eggplants, sliced into rounds
✦ 1 1/2 cups marinara sauce
✦ 1 1/2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese
✦ 1/2 cup grated parmesan cheese
✦ 1 cup breadcrumbs
✦ 2 eggs, beaten
✦ 1/2 cup flour
✦ 2 tbsp olive oil
✦ 1 tsp Italian seasoning
✦ 1/2 tsp garlic powder
✦ Salt and black pepper to taste
✦ Fresh basil or parsley for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions:
1️⃣- Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and line baking sheets with parchment paper

2️⃣- Season eggplant slices with salt and let rest 10 minutes, then pat dry

3️⃣- Dredge eggplant in flour, dip in eggs, then coat with breadcrumbs mixed with Italian seasoning and garlic powder

4️⃣- Arrange on baking sheets, drizzle lightly with olive oil, and bake 20 minutes flipping halfway

5️⃣- Spread a thin layer of marinara sauce in a baking dish

6️⃣- Layer baked eggplant, marinara sauce, mozzarella, and parmesan

7️⃣- Repeat layers and finish with cheese on top

8️⃣- Bake 20–25 minutes until bubbly and golden

9️⃣- Garnish with fresh herbs and serve hot

✅ Macros Summary:
✯ Protein: 28 g
✯ Carbs: 36 g
✯ Fat: 22 g
✯ Calories: 460 kcal
✯ Time: 55 minutes ⏱️
✯ Serving: 1 portion 🍽️

#eggplantparmesan #italiancomfort #bakednotfried #vegetariandinner #cheesylovers
summary: Baked eggplant parmesan recipe with layers of marinara sauce, mozzarella, and parmesan cheese, featuring complete ingredients and step-by-step instructions with nutritional macros.

caption:
🧄🧀 Garlic Parmesan Roasted Shrimp 🦐 

Servings: 3–4

Total Time: ~15 minutes

⸻

Ingredients
	•	1 lb large shrimp, peeled & deveined
	•	2 tbsp olive oil
	•	4 cloves garlic, minced
	•	½ tsp smoked paprika
	•	½ tsp Italian seasoning
	•	½ tsp salt
	•	¼ tsp black pepper
	•	½ cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
	•	2 tbsp chopped fresh parsley

⸻

Instructions

1️⃣ Preheat Oven
	•	Preheat to 400°F (205°C).

⸻

2️⃣ Season the Shrimp

⸻

3️⃣ Add Parmesan
	•	Sprinkle Parmesan evenly over shrimp.

caption:
5 dinner ideas that will wow your family!

When dinner feels a little boring, switch it up! Here are a few not-your-usual meal ideas everyone will enjoy.

✨Seekh Kebab Rolls
- Pour 2 tbsp oil in a pan, add in 1 tbsp cumin seeds with ½ cup onions, 1 tbsp minced ginger and 1 tbsp minced garlic. Sauté for 1-2 mins
- Now add in 1 tsp red chilli powder, 1 tsp coriander powder, 1 tsp cumin powder & 1 tbsp garam masala. Cook this for another minute
- Lastly add in ½ cup Carrots crushed, ½ cup French Beans crushed, ½ cup Corn crushed, salt and little water and keep cooking till the water dries out
- Cool down the mixture, add in ½ cup Potato boiled & mashed, 1 cup Paneer grated, ½ cup Coriander chopped, ½ cup Mint chopped, ½ cup Green Chillies chopped, chaat masala, salt if needed and very little besan for binding.
- Combine all the ingredients & your seekh kebab mixture is ready
- Grease your palms with some oil, make equal portions of the mixture to make your kebab skewers.
- Cook the kebabs on a tawa with some oil till they are golden brown on either side
- Take a cooked wrap, spread some chutney on top, two pieces of the kebab, sprinkle some chaat masala, top with onions & a dash of lemon juice.
- Wrap it up and serve!

✨One Pan Veggie Noodles
- Heat oil in a fry pan, add 2tbsp minced ginger garlic followed by 2 cups vegetables of your choice(mixed peppers, carrots, zucchini, broccoli)
- Sauté for a few minutes and add 1 cup sprouts with some noodle water and 1 tbsp chilli oil, cook till they are slightly golden and push them to the corners
- Add in salt, 1 cup boiled noodles along with1 tbsp soy sauce & 2 tbsp hot sauce
- Toss everything together and your one pan noodles are ready to be served within minutes!

caption:
Chilled Purple Cabbage Salad 🥗💜

A super simple, healthy, and refreshing salad! Crisp purple cabbage, carrots, and cucumber tossed in a flavorful garlicky chili dressing with sesame and soy. Perfect as a light lunch, side dish, or anytime you crave something fresh.

⸻ My favorite tools & products are in the link in my bio 👆

Ingredients (Serves 2–3)

Salad:
	•	1/2 small purple cabbage, shredded
	•	4 large carrots, julienned
	•	4 cucumbers, sliced (half moons or sticks)
	•	Pinch of salt

Dressing:
	•	2 cloves garlic, minced
	•	1 tsp chili powder (adjust to taste)
	•	2 tbsp white sesame seeds
	•	1/3 cup hot oil (avocado or sesame)
	•	2 tbsp light soy sauce
	•	1 tbsp balsamic vinegar
	•	1 tbsp oyster sauce
	•	1/2 tbsp sugar(optional)
	•	Pinch of salt
	•	Fresh cilantro, for garnish

⸻

Instructions
	1.	Prep the veggies:
	•	Shred the purple cabbage and julienne the carrots.
	•	Sprinkle a pinch of salt over cabbage and carrots, then let sit for 5–10 minutes to soften.
	•	Slice cucumbers and set aside; add them only just before mixing with dressing.
	2.	Make the dressing:
	•	Heat oil in a small pan until hot.
	•	Add minced garlic, chili powder, and sesame seeds; sauté briefly until fragrant.
	•	Remove from heat and mix in soy sauce, balsamic vinegar, oyster sauce, and a pinch of salt.
	3.	Assemble the salad:
	•	Drain excess liquid from cabbage and carrots if needed.
	•	Toss cabbage, carrots, and cucumbers with the dressing.
	•	Sprinkle with fresh cilantro and mix well.
	4.	Serve chilled:
	•	Enjoy immediately or refrigerate for 10–15 minutes for an extra refreshing taste.

#PurpleCabbageSalad #HealthyEats #RefreshingSalad #EasyRecipes #vegetariandelight
summary: A chilled purple cabbage salad with carrots, cucumber, and a garlicky chili sesame dressing.

caption:
Greek Chicken Souvlaki Bowls with Lemon Garlic Sauce
Ingredients
For the Greek Chicken Souvlaki
700 g (1½ lb) boneless skinless chicken thighs or breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
3 tbsp (45 ml) olive oil
Juice of 1 lemon (about 3 tbsp / 45 ml)
4 cloves garlic, minced
2 tsp dried oregano
1 tsp paprika
½ tsp ground cumin
1 tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
For the Lemon Garlic Sauce
200 g (¾ cup) plain Greek yogurt
2 tbsp (30 ml) olive oil
1½ tbsp (22 ml) fresh lemon juice
2 cloves garlic, finely grated
1 tsp lemon zest
Salt and black pepper, to taste
For the Bowl
2 cups (360 g) cooked rice, lemon rice, or orzo
1 cup (150 g) cherry tomatoes, halved
1 cup (150 g) cucumber, diced
½ small red onion, thinly sliced
¼ cup (35 g) Kalamata olives, sliced (optional)
Optional Garnish
Crumbled feta cheese
Fresh parsley or dill
Lemon wedges
Warm pita bread
Directions
Marinate & Cook the Chicken
In a bowl, combine olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Add chicken pieces and toss until evenly coated. Marinate for at least 30 minutes (up to 12 hours refrigerated).
Heat a skillet, grill pan, or outdoor grill over medium-high heat.
Cook chicken for 8–10 minutes, turning occasionally, until golden, lightly charred, and fully cooked. Set aside.
Make the Lemon Garlic Sauce
In a small bowl, whisk Greek yogurt, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, lemon zest, salt, and black pepper until smooth and creamy.
Assemble the Bowls
Divide cooked rice or orzo between bowls.
Top with grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, and olives if using.
Drizzle generously with lemon garlic sauce.
Finish with feta, fresh herbs, and lemon wedges. Serve warm.
Nutritional Information (Per Serving – Approximate, serves 4)
Calories: 540
Protein: 40 g
Carbohydrates: 45 g
Fat: 22 g
Fiber: 5 g
Calcium: 20% DV

caption:
Ramadan Series ✨ Episode 1
Sheet Pan Kebabs 
Minimal prep, maximum flavor—perfect for peaceful iftar evenings 🤍
Save & try for your Ramadan menu 

A super flavorful, juicy kebab made the easy way , all in one tray! Perfect for when you want that smoky kebab taste without skewers or grilling.

Ingredients
	•	Boneless chicken – 1 kg (half breast, half thighs)
	•	Red chili powder – 2 tsp
	•	Coriander powder – 1 tsp
	•	Roasted cumin powder – 1½ tsp
	•	Garam masala – 1 tsp
	•	Chaat masala – 2–3 tsp
	•	Black salt – 1 tsp
	•	Table salt – to taste
	•	Onions – 2 medium, finely chopped & squeezed to remove excess water
	•	Coarsely ground ginger garlic – 2 tbsp
	•	Green chilies – 2–3, finely chopped
	•	Fresh coriander – a handful, chopped
	•	Ghee or butter – 2–3 tbsp, plus extra for brushing

Method
	1.	Prepare the mince:
Grind the chicken into a fine mince.
	2.	Mix the kebab base:
Add all the spices, onions, ginger-garlic, green chilies, and coriander to the mince. Mix well until everything is evenly combined.
	3.	Shape on the tray:
Grease a baking tray generously with ghee or butter. Spread the chicken mixture evenly using your hands, pressing it down firmly.
	4.	Score the kebabs:
Use a knife or scraper to cut long strips or squares (this helps them cook evenly and look like individual kebabs).
	5.	Bake:
Brush the top with ghee or butter. Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C for 20–25 minutes, until golden and cooked through.
	6.	Broil:
Turn on the top heat (broil) for 3–4 minutes to give the kebabs a beautiful smoky, roasted finish.

Enjoy hot with saffron rice, rumali roti, or a cooling mint yogurt dip.
summary: Sheet pan chicken kebab recipe with Indian spices, designed for easy Ramadan iftar preparation.

caption:
Spinach & Feta Puff Pastry

Flaky, golden puff pastry filled with a savory spinach–feta mixture—perfect for appetizers, snacks, or a light meal.

⏱ Time

Prep: 15 minutes

Bake: 20–25 minutes

Total: ~40 minutes

🍽 Servings

6–8 pastries

🧾 Ingredients

1 sheet puff pastry (thawed)

2 cups fresh spinach (or 1 cup frozen, thawed & squeezed dry)

¾ cup feta cheese, crumbled

1 small onion, finely chopped

1 clove garlic, minced

1 tbsp olive oil

1 egg (for egg wash)

½ tsp black pepper

¼ tsp salt (adjust—feta is salty)

½ tsp dried oregano or dill

Optional: 2 tbsp cream cheese or ricotta (for extra creaminess)

Optional topping: sesame seeds or black seeds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Prepare the filling
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Sauté onion until soft. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Add spinach and cook until wilted and moisture evaporates. Remove from heat.

Mix
Let spinach cool slightly, then mix with feta, pepper, salt, oregano, and cream cheese (if using).

Assemble
Preheat oven to 200°C / 400°F.
Roll out puff pastry and cut into squares or rectangles.
Spoon filling into the center, fold, and seal edges with a fork.

Brush & bake
Place pastries on a lined baking tray. Brush with beaten egg and sprinkle seeds if desired.
Bake for 20–25 minutes, until puffed and golden.

Serve
Cool slightly and serve warm with yogurt dip or a fresh salad.

🥗 Nutrition (Approx. per piece)

Calories: ~180

Protein: 6g

Carbs: 14g

Fat: 11g

💡 Pro Tips

Always squeeze spinach dry to avoid soggy pastry

Chill filled pastries for 10 minutes before baking for extra flakiness

Air-fryer option: Bake at 180°C for 12–15 minutes

❓ Q&A

Can I freeze them?
Yes! Freeze unbaked pastries and bake straight from frozen—add 5 extra minutes.

Can I make them vegan?
Use vegan puff pastry and dairy-free feta.

What dips go well?
Garlic yogurt, tzatziki, or chili sauce.
#mediterraneansea #antiinflammatory #meditteranean #MediterraneanEscape
summary: Recipe for spinach and feta puff pastry appetizers with 40 minutes total time and optional air-fryer instructions.

caption:
Recipe 32 - Korean-style cabbage pancake (Yachaejeon) 🥬

I'll admit, cabbage was not a week i was looking forward to but this savoury pancake was a HIT and now something i'll add to my meal plan! Veg packed, perfect for using up leftovers and really, really delicious (tastes like a spring roll in pancake form!)

#TheIngredientDiaries

Recipe below, don't forget to SAVE for later! 👇🏼

Serves 2

Ingredients:
3 spring onions, roughly chopped
1 carrot
250g sweetheart cabbage (approx half)
1/2 tsp salt
65g plain flour
1 tbsp cornflour
150ml water
1 tsp korean chilli flakes
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp vegetable oils

For the dipping sauce:
1/2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp rice vinegar
½ tsp maple syrup
1 tsp furikake/sesame seeds

1. Combine flour, cornflour. salt and chilli flakes with water until you have a thin, silky batter. Finely chop and core the cabbage and slice the carrots and spring onions into matchstick. Fold through the batter.
2. Heat a non-stick frying pan on medium and add the oils. Press inn the batter and cook for 5-6 minutes on each side until golden and crisp.
3. Mix soy, sesame oil, rice vinegar and a splash of maple syrup for dipping, along with the seeds. Slice, dunk, eat immediately.

summary: Korean-style cabbage pancake (yachaejeon) recipe that's crispy, vegan, and uses up leftover vegetables.

caption:
Juicy chicken skewers that never fail

Ingredients
500 g boneless chicken
1 tsp ginger paste
1 tsp garlic paste
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp red chilli powder
2 tbsp raw onion paste
1 tsp garam masala powder
1 tsp kasuri methi powder
1/2 cup cashew nut paste
1/2 cup yogurt
Salt to taste
1/2 tsp anardana powder
1 tbsp butter (for cooking)
Chaat masala for sprinkling
Spring onions for garnish
Wooden skewers (soaked in water)

Method
Mix chicken with ginger paste, garlic paste, turmeric, red chilli powder, onion paste, garam masala, kasuri methi, cashew nut paste, yogurt, salt and anardana powder. Let it rest for at least one hour. Thread the chicken pieces onto soaked wooden skewers. Heat butter on a pan and place the skewers on it. Cook for about 2 minutes on each side till the chicken is done and lightly golden. Sprinkle chaat masala on top and garnish with spring onions. Serve hot.

caption:
Crispy shrimp, garlicky shallots, coconut oil magic. One pan Kerala comfort that hits different on a cozy afternoon .

Ingredients
For shrimp
500 g small shrimp (chemmeen)
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp Kashmiri chili powder
3/4 tsp black pepper powder

For stir fry
4–5 tbsp coconut oil
1/2 tsp mustard seeds
4–6 garlic cloves, crushed
10–12 shallots, thinly sliced
Curry leaves
1 tsp crushed red chili flakes
2 cups cooked rice (day-old works best)
A pinch of fenugreek seed powder (uluva podi)

Method
Marinate shrimp with salt, turmeric, chili powder, and pepper. Rest 30–45 minutes.
Heat coconut oil in an iron kadai and fry shrimp for 4–5 minutes until crispy. Remove and keep aside.
Keep about 2 tbsp oil in the pan. Splutter mustard seeds, add garlic and sauté till golden.
Add shallots and cook till golden brown. Add curry leaves and chili flakes.
Add cooked rice and mix well. Add fried shrimp and toss gently.
Finish with a pinch of fenugreek powder. Serve hot and enjoy.
.
