caption:
Tomato, Basil and Mozzarella Crustless Quiche - Don't LOSE this Recipe

*Light, fresh, and wonderfully simple, this crustless quiche brings together sunny tomatoes, soft mozzarella, and fragrant basil for a cozy little dish that feels both comforting and bright. It's perfect for a relaxed breakfast, an easy lunch, or a light supper when you want something homemade without much fuss.*

What You'll Need
6 eggs
1 cup milk
1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
1/2 cup shredded mozzarella cheese
1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
2 tablespoons fresh basil, chopped
Salt, to taste
Black pepper, to taste

How to Make It

1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and lightly grease a pie dish.
2. In a mixing bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
3. Stir in the mozzarella, Parmesan, cherry tomatoes, and chopped basil.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie dish and gently spread everything evenly.
5. Bake for about 30 minutes, until the quiche is set in the center and lightly golden on top.
6. Let cool for a few minutes before slicing. Garnish with a little extra basil if you like.

Prep Time: 10 minutes | Cook Time: 30 minutes | Total Time: 40 minutes | Serves: 6
Calories: 165 per serving | Protein: 11 g per serving
summary: A crustless quiche recipe with tomatoes, mozzarella, basil, and eggs baked until set.

caption:
Classic Broccoli & Cheddar Crustless Quiche - A Recipe You Can't Miss

*This is the kind of simple, cozy bake that feels just right for an easy morning or a light supper — tender broccoli, sharp cheddar, and a soft, comforting texture that brings back memories of relaxed weekend breakfasts around the table.*

What You'll Need
1 1/2 cups fresh broccoli florets, chopped small (about 6 ounces)
1 cup sharp cheddar cheese, shredded (about 4 ounces)
4 large eggs
2 cups whole milk
1/2 cup onion, finely diced
1 tablespoon olive oil
1/2 teaspoon garlic powder
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/4 teaspoon black pepper
Paprika, optional for sprinkling

How to Make It

1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and grease a 9-inch pie dish.
2. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the diced onion and cook until soft, about 3 to 4 minutes. Add the chopped broccoli and cook for another 3 minutes, just until slightly tender. Remove from heat.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
4. Stir in the cooked broccoli and onion mixture, then fold in the shredded cheddar cheese.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie dish and spread evenly. Sprinkle lightly with paprika if using.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, until the top is lightly golden and the center is set.
7. Let the quiche cool for about 10 minutes before slicing and serving.

Prep Time: 10 minutes | Cook Time: 35 minutes | Total Time: 45 minutes | Serves: 4–6
Calories: about 210 per serving | Protein: about 13 g per serving

This crustless quiche is lovely served on its own or alongside fresh fruit or a simple green salad — an easy, comforting dish that fits any time of day.
summary: A crustless broccoli and cheddar quiche recipe with step-by-step instructions and nutritional information.

caption:
Methi Moong Dal Curry 🌿🥬🥬

Ingredients
	•	Moong dal – ½ cup
	•	Fresh methi leaves – 1 cup (chopped)
	•	Onion – 1 small (optional)
	•	Tomato – 1 medium
	•	Dry red chilli – 1–2 (broken) 🌶️
	•	Garlic – 3–4 cloves (optional)
	•	Turmeric powder – ¼ tsp
	•	Red chilli powder – ½ tsp (optional)
	•	Mustard seeds – ½ tsp
	•	Cumin seeds – 1 tsp
	•	Oil or ghee – 1–2 tbsp
	•	Salt – to taste
	•	Water – as needed
. Tamarind water

Method
	1.	Pressure cook moong dal with turmeric and water till soft.
	2.	Heat oil/ghee. Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds.
	3.	Add broken dry red chilli; sauté till aromatic.
	4.	Add garlic and onion; sauté till light golden.
	5.	Add tomato and cook till mushy.
	6.	Add methi leaves; sauté till they shrink and bitterness reduces.
	7.	Add red chilli powder & salt.
	8.	Add cooked dal and required water and tamarind water Simmer 5 minutes and switch off.

Tip:
Finish with a little ghee on top for extra flavour 🤍

caption:
Loaded Cheesy Pocket Tacos 🌮🧀🔥💪 32g Protein

Crispy, golden taco pockets stuffed with juicy seasoned beef, melty cheese, and bold flavors in every bite. These handheld tacos are cheesy, comforting, and perfect for quick dinners, parties, or satisfying cravings 😍

✦ 1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese

✦ 1 tbsp olive oil

caption:
Spicy pepper chicken😍

It's a quick, fuss-free recipe where the freshness of the ground pepper makes all the difference, giving the chicken a smoky, earthy taste that pairs beautifully with rice, chapati or even as a starter❤️

For Pepper Masala (dry roast + grind):
	•	1 tbsp coriander seeds
	•	1 tsp black peppercorns
	•	1 small cinnamon piece
	•	3–4 cloves
	•	2 cardamom
	•	4–5 dry red chillies

Others Ingredients:
	•	500 g chicken
	•	1 onion, finely chopped
	•	1 tbsp ginger–garlic paste
	•	Salt to taste
	•	½ tsp turmeric

	•	2–3 green chillies
	•	Curry leaves
	•	Coriander leaves
	•	Oil

Preparation:
	1.	Dry roast coriander seeds, peppercorns, cinnamon, cloves, cardamom and dry red chillies.
	2.	Cool down and grind into a fine pepper masala.
	3.	Heat oil and fry onions until light brown.
	4.	Add ginger–garlic paste, salt and turmeric. Mix well.
	5.	Add chicken and cook till fully done.
	6.	Add the pepper masala and mix.

	8.	Fry on high flame for 2–3 minutes.

caption:
Creamy Mexican Street Corn in a Cup (Esquites) Delight 🌽✨

All the bold, smoky, creamy flavors of elote—served warm and spoonable in a cup. This classic Mexican street food is quick, comforting, and wildly addictive.

📝 Ingredients (Serves 3–4)

3 cups corn kernels (fresh, frozen, or canned—drained)

1 tbsp butter

1 tbsp olive oil

½ small onion, finely chopped

2 cloves garlic, minced

¼–⅓ cup mayonnaise

¼ cup Mexican crema or sour cream

½ cup crumbled cotija cheese (or feta)

1 tsp chili powder or tajín (to taste)

1–2 tbsp fresh lime juice

Salt, to taste

Fresh cilantro, chopped

Optional: smoked paprika, hot sauce, or jalapeño

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Sauté base: Heat butter and olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion; cook until soft (2–3 min).

Char the corn: Add corn and cook 5–7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly charred and fragrant. Add garlic; cook 30 seconds.

Make it creamy: Lower heat. Stir in mayonnaise and crema until glossy and well coated.

Season: Add chili powder/tajín, lime juice, salt, and half the cheese. Mix well.

Serve: Spoon into cups. Top with remaining cheese, cilantro, extra chili, and a squeeze of lime.

🥗 Nutrition (approx. per serving)

Calories: ~240

Protein: ~7 g

Carbs: ~26 g

Fat: ~14 g

💡 Pro Tips

For authentic street flavor, char the corn hard—don't rush it.

Balance is key: creamy + tangy (lime) + salty (cheese) + spicy.

If using frozen corn, pat dry first to help it char.

🌱 Variations

Lighter: Swap half the mayo with Greek yogurt.

Vegan: Use vegan mayo/cream and dairy-free feta.

Protein boost: Add black beans or grilled chicken.

Extra heat: Chipotle powder or adobo sauce.

summary: A recipe for Creamy Mexican Street Corn in a Cup (Esquites), a quick charred corn dish served warm with mayo, crema, cotija cheese, and lime.

caption:
Beans Week Day 5: Chickpea Street Corn Salad 🌽🌶️🥗😋 Completely Dairy-free, Vegan, GF & addicting! Save the recipe below!

Recipe

Chickpeas
2 (15oz) cans garbanzo bean (chickpeas), drained
2 tsp smoked paprika
1 tsp chili powder
1 tsp cumin
1/2 tsp sea salt
1/4 tsp ground black pepper

Salad
1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil
5 cups frozen corn
1 green bell pepper, diced
1 jalapeno, diced (DON't ADD IF YOU DON"T LIKE SPICE)
1/2 cup plant-based feta
2/3 cup cilantro
2 avocados, diced

Chipotle Dressing
1/2 cup plant-based mayo
2 tbsp unsweetened plant-based yogurt
2 cloves garlic, grated or very finely chopped
3 tbsp chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, chopped
1/2 tsp salt
the juice from 1 lime
2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil

1. Add all the chickpea ingredients to a large bowl and mix well to combine. Set aside to marinate while you ptep the remaining ingredients.

2. Heat olive oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet. Add the corn and cook for 2-3 minutes undisturbed until charred. Stir and cook another 1-2 minutes until warmed through. Remove and set aside to cool.

4. Meanwhile, make the dressing by whisking or blending all ingredients until smooth and creamy.

5. Add the salad ingredients to a large salad bowl and toss in half of the dressing. Add the chickpeas and top with remaining dressing to serve.

#streetcorn #streetcornsalad #mexicanstreetcorn #mexicanstreetcornsalad #chickpeas #recipe #salad #plantbased #dairyfree #easyrecipes #healthyrecipes #healthyfood #comfortfood
summary: A dairy-free vegan Mexican street corn salad with charred corn, chickpeas, and chipotle dressing.

caption:
Mediterranean Taco Bell–Style Mexican Pizza

Crispy • Cheesy • Mediterranean Twist

A bold fusion of Taco Bell's iconic Mexican Pizza with Mediterranean flavors—crispy tortillas layered with hummus-spiced sauce, herby veggies, olives, feta, and melty cheese. Fun, fast, and totally addictive.

⏱️ Time & Yield

Prep: 15 minutes

Cook: 15 minutes

Serves: 2–3 (makes 2 large pizzas)

📝 Ingredients

Base

4 flour tortillas (or whole-wheat)

Olive oil spray or brush

Mediterranean "Pizza Sauce"

½ cup hummus

2 tbsp tomato paste

1 tsp smoked paprika

½ tsp ground cumin

½ tsp garlic powder

Salt, to taste

Toppings

½ cup shredded mozzarella or Monterey Jack

¼ cup crumbled feta

½ cup cherry tomatoes, chopped

¼ cup kalamata olives, sliced

¼ cup red onion, finely sliced

½ cup spinach or arugula

Optional protein: chickpeas, grilled chicken, or falafel crumbles

Finish (optional but 🔥)

Tzatziki or garlic yogurt drizzle

Fresh parsley or oregano

Chili flakes

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Crisp the tortillas
Preheat oven to 200°C / 400°F. Lightly brush tortillas with olive oil and bake directly on rack or tray for 4–5 minutes per side until crisp.

Mix the sauce
Stir hummus, tomato paste, paprika, cumin, garlic powder, and salt until smooth.

Assemble layers (Taco Bell–style)

Spread sauce on 1 tortilla

Sprinkle mozzarella

Place a second tortilla on top

Spread more sauce

Add tomatoes, olives, onion, spinach, protein, and feta

Bake
Return to oven for 7–10 minutes until cheese melts and edges are golden.

Finish & slice
Drizzle tzatziki, sprinkle herbs & chili flakes. Slice like pizza and serve hot.

🔥 Nutrition (Approx. per slice)

Calories: ~230

Protein: ~9 g

Carbs: ~26 g

Fat: ~10 g#fblifestylelife #RecipeShare #mediterranean #recipeshare #recipe #recipeideas #recipes
summary: Mediterranean-inspired Mexican pizza recipe with hummus sauce, feta, olives, and crispy tortilla layers.

caption:
Broccoli savoury pie 🥦
Have been baking this on repeat 😋
Soft, savoury, and packed with vegetables —
perfect for lunch, dinner, or even the next day.

Ingredients
	•	Raw broccoli, finely chopped
	•	1 carrot, finely chopped
	•	1 leek, thinly sliced
	•	100 g feta cheese, crumbled
	•	250 g cooked chicken breast, chopped
	•	2 eggs
	•	250 ml milk
	•	150 g flour
	•	10 g baking powder
	•	Olive oil
	•	Salt & pepper
	•	Garlic powder

Method
Preheat the oven to 180°C (356°F).

In a large bowl, combine the broccoli, carrot, leek, add the eggs, feta, milk, flour, baking powder a drizzle of olive oil, and chicken.
Season with salt, pepper and garlic powder.

Mix until well combined.

Pour the mixture into a baking dish lined with parchment paper.

Bake for 30–40 minutes, until golden and set in the centre.

Let cool slightly, then slice and serve.

caption:
Layered Mediterranean Eggplant, Zucchini, Yellow & Red Bell Pepper Lasagna 🌿🍆🫑

A vibrant, meatless Mediterranean-style lasagna layered with roasted vegetables, herbed ricotta, and rich tomato sauce. Light yet comforting—perfect for family dinners or meal prep.

📝 Ingredients (Serves 6–8)

Vegetables

1 large eggplant, thinly sliced

2 zucchini, thinly sliced

1 yellow bell pepper, sliced

1 red bell pepper, sliced

2–3 tbsp olive oil

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Sauce & Cheese

2½ cups marinara or crushed tomatoes

1½ cups ricotta cheese (or cottage cheese, blended)

1½ cups shredded mozzarella

½ cup grated Parmesan

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tsp dried oregano

1 tsp dried basil

Optional: chili flakes

Layers

9–12 lasagna sheets (regular or no-boil)

Fresh basil or parsley, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Roast the vegetables
Preheat oven to 200°C / 400°F. Toss eggplant, zucchini, and peppers with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast 20–25 minutes until tender and lightly golden.

Prepare the cheese layer
In a bowl, mix ricotta, garlic, oregano, basil, a pinch of salt, and pepper.

Assemble the lasagna

Spread a thin layer of marinara in a greased baking dish.

Add lasagna sheets.

Layer roasted vegetables, ricotta mixture, marinara, mozzarella, and Parmesan.

Repeat layers, finishing with sauce, mozzarella, and Parmesan on top.

Bake
Cover with foil and bake at 190°C / 375°F for 30 minutes.
Uncover and bake 10–15 minutes more until bubbly and golden.

Rest & serve
Let rest 10 minutes before slicing. Garnish with fresh herbs.

🥗 Nutrition (Approx. per serving)

Calories: ~320

Protein: ~16 g

Fiber: ~6 g

Healthy fats: from olive oil & cheese

summary: Layered vegetable lasagna with roasted eggplant, zucchini, bell peppers, ricotta, and tomato sauce.

caption:
Thai drunken noodles ✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order now. Link in bio 🤍.

Beef + Marinade:▪️8 oz. Flank Steak (or sub chicken, shrimp, or tofu), sliced into thin bite sized pieces▪️1 Garlic Clove, minced▪️1 Tbsp Soy Sauce▪️1 Tbsp Oyster Sauce▪️1 Tbsp Sesame Oil▪️1/4 tsp Black Pepper▪️

Sauce:▪️2 Tbsp Oyster Sauce▪️1 Tbsp Soy Sauce▪️1 tsp Dark Soy Sauce▪️1 tsp Fish Sauce▪️1 tsp Sugar▪️

Stir Fry:▪️16 oz. Fresh Wide Rice Noodles (or sub 8 oz. Dry Rice Noodles)▪️3 Tbsp Avocado Oil, divided▪️2 Eggs▪️1/2 Yellow Onion, sliced in 1/2-inch strips▪️2 Large Stems Gai Lan (or sub broccolini), sliced on a bias▪️1 Jalapeño Pepper, thinly sliced▪️1 Fresno Chili, thinly sliced▪️4 Garlic Cloves, finely chopped▪️1 Cup Thai Basil Leaves▪️

1️⃣ Place the beef in a bowl with all marinade ingredients. Mix well and marinate in the fridge for at least 15 mins.
2️⃣ In a small bowl, mix together all sauce ingredients and set aside.
3️⃣ If using fresh noodles, gently separate by rolling the stacks on a cutting board, then pulling apart with your fingers. If using dry noodles, cook according to package directions, drain, and toss lightly with oil.
4️⃣ Heat a wok or large pan over medium high heat. Add 1 Tbsp avocado oil. Add the beef and stir fry 2 to 3 mins until just cooked through. Remove and set aside.
5️⃣ Add the eggs and scramble until just set. Remove and set aside with the beef.
6️⃣ Add 1 Tbsp more avocado oil along with the onion, gai lan, sliced chiles, and garlic. Stir fry 1 to 2 mins until fragrant and the greens are bright and slightly tender, then remove from the wok. 
7️⃣ Add the remaining 1 Tbsp avocado oil and the noodles. Spread into an even layer and cook undisturbed 2 to 3 mins until lightly charred. Toss and char for another 2  to 3 mins. Add the sauce and toss 1 to 2 mins until glossy and well coated.
8️⃣ Add the beef and eggs back in and toss to combine. Turn off the heat, add the Thai basil, and toss just until wilted. Enjoy!

⏲️ 20 min prep time / 35 min total time

Serves 2 to 3
summary: Thai drunken noodles recipe with marinated beef, eggs, vegetables, and Thai basil.

caption:
Bhindi fry| bhujiya 😋

Ingredients 
* Bhindi(okra/vendaikai) julienne-150 gms
* oil -10 ml
* Cumin-1/2 tsp 
* Dry red chilli -1 nos
* Garlic sliced-5 cloves
* Sliced green chilli-1-2 nos
* Sliced onions 🧅-1 nos medium sized 
* Chopped coriander leaves 
* Salt-to taste
* Turmeric powder -1 tsp

Method
* Clean and  julienne the bhindi(okra/vendaikkai) 
* In a pan add your preferred oil add cumin and red chilli followed  by sliced garlic and julienne green chilli and sauté
* Add sliced onions and start cooking season it with sufficient salt and cook then add turmeric powder and sauté till the raw flavour is gone 
* After that add your julienne bhindi( okra/vendaikkai) and mix nicely and cover them to get steamed
* Open them in between mix them nicely and cover and cook till its Well done and the bhindi(okra/vendaikkai) is crispy on the sides 
* keep on a slow fire  and stir in between this will prevent the okras getting burnt 
* Finish it with chopped coriander leaves
* Serve hot 

Always remember this "everybody can cook and everybody has to cook"

Happy cooking 😊

caption:
I promise you are going to want to make these. SAVE this recipe for later! 

I like to pair them with something with a crunchy texture like chips, a fresh salad and black beans. Let me know when you make them and check out the book Bread and Wine by Shauna Niequist to dig deeper into the community that is built around the dinner table 🫶🏼 

1 C Sour Cream 
1 28-oz can green enchilada sauce 
2 4-oz cans green chilies, diced
3 C cooked chicken, shredded 
2 C Monterey Jack cheese, shredded
18 corn tortillas
1 C chicken broth
Cilantro

Instructions: 

Mix green sauce with chilies and sour cream.
Smooth 1 spoonful of the sauce around the bottom of a pan. 

Simmer the chicken broth in a skillet, and before placing each tortilla in the 9×13 pan, use tongs and pass the tortilla through the broth for just a few seconds. 

Layer 6 tortillas over the first layer of sauce.

Layering order: 
🌮 tortillas 
🍗 1/2 chicken 
🧀 1/3 of the cheese 
🫕 1/3 of the sauce 

Repeat. 

Finish with  final layer of tortillas, sauce and cheese. 

Bake 350 for 30-35 mins uncovered until bubbly.
summary: Green chicken enchilada recipe with sour cream sauce, Monterey Jack cheese, and layered corn tortillas.

caption:
Cheesy, herby cauliflower bake 🧀🥦

A cozy, fragrant cauliflower dish with herbs, spices and a golden cheesy top.
Perfect to share with someone who says they don't like cauliflower 😉

Ingredients
	•	1 medium cauliflower, cut into florets
	•	2 carrots, grated
	•	1 onion, thinly sliced
	•	Fresh parsley, chopped
	•	Fresh spring onion, chopped
	•	2 eggs
	•	400 ml milk
	•	60 ml olive or vegetable oil
	•	4 tbsp flour
	•	1 tsp baking powder
	•	Salt
	•	Black pepper
	•	Cumin
	•	Chili flakes
	•	Grated melting cheese (mozzarella, emmental, etc.)

Method

Boil the cauliflower in salted water until just tender (but not mushy). Drain well and spread in a baking dish.

Sauté the onion and grated carrots in a little oil until soft and lightly golden. Spread over the cauliflower.

In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, oil, flour, baking powder, salt and spices.
Stir in the chopped parsley and spring onions.

Pour the sauce evenly over the vegetables.

Bake at 200°C conventional oven (390°F) for 25–30 minutes, until set and lightly golden.

Remove from the oven, top with grated cheese and return to the oven until bubbly and golden.

Serve hot and enjoy the fragrant, herby, cheesy goodness ✨

#caulifloweratitsbest

caption:
When I'm tired and dinner still has to happen 🥲
This tofu veggie stir fry comes together in 10 minutes and tastes way better than effort suggests.

No planning. No prep. Just cook.

Ingredients
	•	200–250 g firm tofu, cubed
	•	1½ cups mixed veggies (capsicum, beans, carrots, broccoli or frozen mix)
	•	1½ tbsp oil
	•	2 cloves garlic, finely chopped and 4 green chillies finely chopped
•	4-5 green chilies finely chopped

Sauce
	•	1½ tbsp oyster sauce
	•	1 tbsp soy sauce
	•	1 tsp Rice Vinegar
 •	2 tsp sugar
	•	2–3 tbsp water

⸻

Method
	1.	Heat oil in a wide pan on high heat. Once hot, add onion, garlic and chillies. Fry well. 
	2.	Crumble Tofu & add corn flour, salt and pepper.  Pan fry tofu or put in oven 400c for 15min .Remove and keep aside.
	3.	In the pan, add veggies. Stir fry on high for 2–3 minutes.
	4.	Add oyster sauce, soy sauce, vinegar, and water. Mix well.
	5.	Add tofu back, toss everything together, and cook 1–2 minutes till glossy.

Serve hot with rice, noodles.

Save this for busy nights 🤍
summary: A 10-minute tofu and vegetable stir fry with oyster sauce for busy evenings.

caption:
Crunchy Sesame Carrot Salad

Fresh, crisp carrots tossed in a light sesame-honey dressing with ginger, garlic, and scallions. Simple, healthy, and full of flavor — perfect as a side or quick salad.

I used my mandoline to slice the carrots into matchsticks — I've linked it here 👉 https://www.amazon.com/shop/bayanbites/list/3NVHBX9LPCE0N

Ingredients
	•	3–4 large carrots, cut into matchsticks
	•	2–3 scallions, thinly sliced
	•	2 tbsp cilantro, chopped 
	•	2 tbsp sesame oil
	•	1 tbsp honey
	•	1 tbsp lemon juice
	•	1 tsp grated ginger
	•	1 clove garlic, grated
	•	2 tsp toasted sesame seeds
	•	1–2 tsp chili crisp (optional)
	•	Kosher salt, to taste

Instructions
	1.	Toss carrots with a pinch of salt. Let sit 5–10 minutes, then drain excess liquid.
	2.	In a bowl, mix sesame oil, honey, lemon juice, ginger, garlic, sesame seeds, and chili crisp.
	3.	Add carrots, scallions, and cilantro. Toss well.
	4.	Taste, adjust salt, and serve.

Fresh, crunchy, ready to eat 🥕✨

#CarrotSalad
#HealthyRecipes
#SesameFlavors
#EasySalad
#HomemadeWithLove 🥕✨
summary: A simple sesame-honey carrot salad with ginger, garlic, and scallions made with a mandoline.

caption:
A quick, simple and delicious Indian trail mix that is perfect for snacking on at tea time or you can take it on hikes and picnics! 

What would you add to this trail mix?

Ingredients  
* 4 cup Puffed rice 
* 1 cup Raw peanuts 
* 2 Tbsp Olive oil 
* Handful curry patta  
* 1/2 cup Coconut pieces 
* 1/2 cup Raw cashews 
* 1/2 tsp Turmeric  
* 1 tsp Cayenne pepper or to taste 
* 1 tsp Chat masala  
* 1 tsp Mango powder 
* 1/2 tsp Black salt 
* 1 cup Roasted Chana 
* 1 cup Sev 
* 1/2 cup Moong dal, fried 
* 1/2 cup Thin sev 
* 1/2 tsp Salt 
* 1 tsp Sugar 
 
Method  
 
* Put puffed rice in 250 degrees F. oven for a few minutes until little crisp.  
* Put raw peanuts in microwave oven on high for one minute, stir and repeat it three times until crisp.  
* Heat oil on medium heat, add curry patta, stir for couple of minutes until crisp.  
* Add coconut and cashews and stir for a minute or so until light brown.  
* Add spices and mix.  
* Add rest of the stuff starting with puffed rice so it gets all the spice flavor.  
* Let it cool down and store it in a tight lid container.
owner_name: From Ma's Kitchen - Authentic Indian Recipes
summary: An Indian spiced trail mix recipe with puffed rice, nuts, and traditional seasonings for snacking or picnics.

caption:
Chicken Fajita Sliders Recipe

Reminding you that these exist and are so easy to make on busy weeknights!! 

Recipe: 
- 500g chicken breast or thigh
- 2 tbsp oil
- 2 cloves garlic
- 1 tsp ground cumin
- 1 tsp ground coriander
- 1 tsp smoked paprika
- 1 tsp paprika
- 1/2 tsp red chilli powder
- 1 tsp onion powder
- 1/2 tsp garlic powder
- 1 tsp oregano
- 3/4 tsp salt or to taste
- 1/2 tsp white pepper
- 1 tbsp tomato purée
- 1 red pepper
- 1 green pepper
- 1 red onion
- 1/2 lemon, juiced
- 1/4 cup water
- 20g coriander or parsley
- 200g shredded mozzarella
- 12 mini or 6 large brioche buns 

Method
1. Soften onions in oil
2. Add garlic and saute 1-2 minutes
3. Add chicken and the fajita spice mix, cook for 5-6 minutes until chicken is cooked through
4. Add peppers and onions, sauté for a further 2-3 mins on high heat continually mixing
5. Add lemon juice and water, turn heat to low and allow to simmer for 4-5 mins until peppers softened
6. Add coriander and remove from the heat
7. Slice brioche buns and place bottom halves on a baking tray. Make spicy mayo by mixing mayonnaise, chilli sauce and pickle juice to thin it out. Put spicy mayo on buns with a sprinkle of mozarella cheese
8. Add chicken fajita filling to buns and sprinkle shredded mozarella generously
9. To make garlic butter, melt butter, garlic and parsley or coriander together. Place top of brioche buns and brush with garlic butter
10. Place in preheated oven at 180C for 10 mins until cheese has melted and serve! #chickenfajitas #sliders #easydinner #easyrecipe
summary: A recipe for chicken fajita sliders with spiced chicken, peppers, and melted cheese on brioche buns.

caption:
Creamy mushroom bisque ✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order now. Link in bio to order and get tickets to the book tour 🤍!

▪️3 Tbsp Butter▪️1/2 Yellow Onion, diced small▪️1 lb. Mushrooms, thinly sliced (8 oz. cremini + 8 oz. mixed mushrooms, such as cremini, white, shiitake, etc.)▪️1+1/2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1/4 tsp Freshly Ground Black Pepper▪️1 Pinch Nutmeg▪️2 Garlic Cloves, finely chopped▪️2 Tbsp Flour▪️2 Cups Chicken Stock▪️2 Cups Whole Milk▪️1 Tbsp Balsamic Vinegar ▪️2 Tbsp Finely Chopped Fresh Parsley, plus more for serving▪️High Quality Olive Oil, for serving▪️

1️⃣ In a large pot over medium heat, melt the butter then add the onion. Cook, stirring often, until the onion softens and becomes translucent, 3-5 mins. Add the mushrooms, salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Cook, stirring, until the mushrooms are tender, 7-10 mins. (Option to remove a few mushroom slices to serve on top of the soup at the end.) 
2️⃣ Mix in the garlic and flour. Cook for 1 min, then add the chicken stock 1 cup at a time, stirring to incorporate before adding more. Bring to a simmer, then stir in the milk 1 cup at a time. Bring back to a simmer and cook for 3-5 mins until the broth thickens slightly.
3️⃣ Remove from the heat and transfer about three quarters of the soup to a blender (or use an immersion blender). Blend until smooth, then return the soup to the pot. Stir in the parsley and balsamic vinegar, taste, and add more salt or pepper if desired. 
4️⃣ Serve warm with a reserved mushroom slice on each bowl (if using), a sprig of parsley, and a drizzle of high quality olive oil. Enjoy!

⏲10 min prep time / 30 min total time

Serves 2 as a main or 4 as an appetizer
summary: Step-by-step creamy mushroom bisque recipe with butter, cream, and mixed mushrooms.

caption:
High Protein Chicken & Rice Power Skillet 🍋

460 cals & 58g protein per serving (4 servings)

This is one of my go-to healthy meals during my 150lb weight loss, and perfect with the blue raspberry @waterboycan electrolytes to fully recover after a workout.

Macros are without the skin. I cook the chicken with the skin on for max juiciness, then usually remove it before eating. I also used my high protein low carb kaizen rice, but you can do this with regular or brown rice.

Here's how I made it:

INGREDIENTS
5 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs 
3 tsp olive oil, divided
1 tbsp onion powder & dried oregano
1 tsp sweet paprika
Zest & juice of 1 lemon
4 garlic cloves, minced
1 bag Kaizen high protein rice (or 4 servings rice of choice)
1/3 cup bone broth
1/2 red onion, finely diced
Salt & Pepper

Express Pickled Onions
1/2 red onion, very thinly sliced
Juice of 1 lemon
3 tbsp finely chopped parsley
Salt

Herby Yogurt Spread
1 cup thick Greek yogurt 
1 tsp olive oil
Juice of 1/2 lemon
2 tbsp finely chopped mint & 2 tbsp parsley 
1 garlic clove, minced
Salt & pepper

1.Add chicken to a bowl. Drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil & season with salt, pepper, onion powder, oregano, & paprika. Add lemon zest + juice, and garlic. Toss well. Marinate 1-6 hrs if you can. If not, go straight to cooking.

2.Preheat oven to 400°F. Heat a skillet over medium heat with 1 tsp olive oil. Cook chicken skin-side down for 8 mins, flip, and cook another 8 mins. Remove to a plate.

4.In the same skillet, add bone broth & diced onion. Simmer 4–5 mins, scraping up the browned bits. Cook 1 bag of Kaizen rice according to package. Or use 4 servings of white or brown rice. Stir in cooked rice & nestle chicken on top.

5.Transfer to oven and bake 15–20 mins until chicken is fully cooked.

6.Make pickled onions by tossing onion with lemon juice, salt, and parsley. Let sit for 5 mins & toss again.

7.Mix yogurt with 1 tsp olive oil, lemon juice, mint, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper.

8.Remove skillet from oven and finish with dollops of yogurt sauce, pickled onions, & fresh parsley.

ENJOY!
.
.
#waterboypartner #healthyrecipes #proteinrecipes #lơwcarbrecipes #mediterraneanfood
summary: High-protein chicken and rice skillet recipe with lemon, herbs, and yogurt sauce, 460 calories and 58g protein per serving.

caption:
Lifestyle change can start at ANY age. It's never too late and disease does not discriminate and can affect anyone and at anytime. 

Pillars: 
➡️ avoid processed food and refined sugar
➡️ prioritize protein, and fibre at every meal
➡️ drink water for hydration. Electrolytes while working out and black coffee two or three times a day if you enjoy it.
➡️ 150 minutes a week of cardiovascular exercise
➡️ strength training 2 to 3 times a week
➡️ minimize alcohol intake. None is best.
➡️ women: speak to your healthcare provider about menopause hormone therapy
➡️ vit D, omega 3, mg, consider creatine if you're now incorporating strength training to get maximum benefits 

Planning and training through life is essential to maintain and build health. 

Thank you @doc_afmc_1984 for sharing your effort and progress! 

#fitness #fitnessatanyage #strong #metabolichealth #doctor
summary: A doctor shares eight foundational pillars for lifestyle change and disease prevention at any age, covering diet, exercise, hydration, and supplementation.

caption:
350 Kcal & 37 g of Protein 💪🏼
If Malai Tawa Boti and Iffa Chicken had a healthier crossover … it would be this creamy, juicy Malai Tawa Iffa Chicken. 🤍
Creamy, garlicky, and protein-packed—perfect with a hot roti or flaky paratha.

Recipe ⬇️
MALAI TAWA IFFA CHICKEN
Makes 4 Servings
1 serving = ~150 g cooked chicken
~350 kcal • 37 g protein • 5 g carbs • 22 g fat per serving

Ingredients
For the Chicken Marinade
	•	Boneless chicken thigh – 500 g, cubed
	•	Thick curd / Greek yogurt – 150 g
	•	Ginger garlic paste – 1½ tbsp
	•	Green chilli paste – 1½ tsp
	•	Coriander stems & leaves – 3 tbsp chopped
	•	Coriander powder – 1½ tsp
	•	Garam masala – 1½ tsp
	•	Chilli flakes – 1 tsp
	•	Salt – to taste
	•	Black pepper – ¾ tsp
	•	Lemon juice – 1½ tbsp
For the Creamy Iffa Sauce
	•	Boiled egg whites – 3 egg whites
	•	Grated cheese (mozzarella + cheddar mix) – 30 g
(or 1 cheese slice)
	•	Garlic – 2 cloves
	•	Skim milk – 5–6 tbsp
	•	Hot water – as needed to blend
	•	Honey – 1 tsp
	•	Salt – pinch
For Cooking
	•	Oil spray or 1 tsp oil total
	•	Onion – 1 medium, thinly sliced
	•	Green chillies – 2 slit
	•	Fresh coriander – for garnish

Method
1️⃣ Marinate the chicken
	1.	Mix curd, ginger garlic paste, green chilli paste, coriander stems/leaves, all spices, salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
	2.	Add chicken cubes and mix well.
	3.	Marinate minimum 1 hour (overnight = best flavour).
2️⃣ Make the creamy Iffa sauce
	4.	Blend egg whites, cheese, garlic, skim milk, hot water, honey, and salt.
	5.	Keep it thick but pourable. Set aside.
3️⃣ Cook the chicken
	6.	Heat a pan with oil spray or 1 tbsp oil.
	7.	Add chicken and cook on medium heat.
	8.	Let water release, then cook till oil separates and you get malai tikka-style thick gravy.
	9.	Add sliced onions and slit green chillies. Mix well.
	10.	Drizzle half the creamy sauce on top.
	11.	Cover and cook 30 seconds on low flame.
	12.	Switch off heat and garnish with coriander.
5️⃣ Serve
	13.	Serve hot with roti or paratha.
	14.	Add extra sauce while serving or eating 🤍
.
(Malai tawa chicken, Iffa chicken recipe, creamy chicken tikka, high protein chicken, creamy garlic chicken, meal prep)
.
#malaitawaiffachicken #iffachicken
summary: A high-protein, creamy Malai Tawa Iffa Chicken recipe combining two Indian chicken dishes with 350 kcal and 37g protein per serving.

caption:
Greek Chicken Gyro Wraps with Mint Yogurt
Ingredients

For the gyro chicken:

500 g (1 lb) boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breasts

3 tbsp olive oil

Juice of 1 lemon

3 garlic cloves, minced

1½ tsp dried oregano

1 tsp paprika

½ tsp ground cumin

Salt and black pepper, to taste

For the mint yogurt sauce:

1 cup Greek yogurt

2 tbsp fresh mint, finely chopped

1 tbsp lemon juice

1 tbsp olive oil

1 small garlic clove, grated

Salt, to taste

For serving:

4 pita breads or flatbreads

Sliced tomatoes

Sliced red onion

Shredded lettuce or sliced cucumber

Directions

Marinate the chicken: In a bowl, whisk olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper. Add chicken and marinate at least 30 minutes (up to 12 hours).

Cook the chicken: Heat a skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 5–6 minutes per side until golden, lightly charred, and cooked through. Rest 5 minutes, then slice thinly.

Make mint yogurt: In a bowl, mix Greek yogurt, mint, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and salt until smooth and creamy.

Warm pitas: Lightly warm pita breads in a pan or oven.

Assemble wraps: Fill pitas with sliced chicken, tomatoes, onion, lettuce or cucumber, and generous spoonfuls of mint yogurt sauce.

Serve: Fold and serve immediately, with extra mint yogurt on the side if desired.

Nutritional Information (per wrap, serves 4)

Calories: 515 kcal

Protein: 36 g

Fat: 22 g

Carbohydrates: 38 g

Fiber: 3 g

Sodium: 730 mg

 #usafoodie #mediterraneandiet #mediterraneanrecipes #greekwrap
summary: Recipe for Greek Chicken Gyro Wraps with homemade mint yogurt sauce and fresh vegetables.

caption:
This is my favorite way to make cabbage and everyone in my family loves it. The garlic Parmesan adds familiar flavors to the cabbage. To make this an easy family dinner serve with some roasted chicken bites you can make in the oven at the same time and some microwave rice. The tastiest way to get more veggies in your diet.

d'EATS
1 head of cabbage
1 stick of butter
5 gloves of garlic minced (I used more)
1/3 cup of Parmesan, shredded 
Olive oil
salt
pepper

Preheat oven to 400°

Remove loose leaves from cabbage head and slice into disc shapes. Place on a baking sheet with a lip. Drizzle with olive oil and seasoned with salt and pepper.

Bake for 20 to 25 minutes until center of cabbage is soft.

While cabbage is baking, melt one stick of butter in a microwave-safe bowl. Mince garlic and add two melted butter. Stir in Parmesan cheese and season with salt and pepper.

Remove cabbage from oven and spread garlic butter Parmesan mixture over top of cabbage slices. Return to oven and bake an additional five minutes.

Serves 4

Check out this recipe - The Best Garlic Parmesan Roasted Cabbage https://www.chefadora.com/adietitiansdinner/the-best-garlic-parmesan-roasted-cabbage-runqw2iulr

#healthyrecipes #easyrecipes #cabbage #parmesan #sidedish
owner_name: Whitney Hegedus MS RD | Easy Healthy Recipes
summary: Roasted cabbage slices topped with garlic Parmesan butter, baked in the oven for an easy vegetable side dish.

caption:
Wonton noodle soup✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order now, and my mom and I would love to meet you on the book tour! Link in bio 🤍.

Wontons (or sub frozen wontons):▪️1 lb. 96/4 Ground Chicken or Ground Pork▪️4 Small Dried Shiitake Mushrooms, soaked until tender and diced small (or sub with fresh shiitakes)▪️ 2 Tbsp Fresh Ginger, minced▪️8 oz. Can Water Chestnuts, drained and chopped small▪️3 Scallions, sliced▪️1 Egg▪️1 Tbsp Soy Sauce▪️1 Tbsp Sesame Oil▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1/2 tsp Sugar▪️1/2 tsp Black Pepper▪️2 Tbsp Cornstarch (mixed with 1/4 cup water)▪️2 Packages Wonton Skins▪️

Noodle Soup:▪️1 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️1 Tbsp Ginger, minced▪️2 Cloves Garlic, minced▪️3 Scallions, sliced▪️8 Cups Chicken Broth▪️5 Shiitake Mushrooms, sliced▪️1 x 8 oz. Can Sliced Water Chestnuts, drained▪️2 Tbsp Soy Sauce▪️1 Tbsp Sesame Oil▪️1+1/2 tsp Kosher Salt (to taste)▪️1/4 tsp Pepper▪️2-3 Baby Bok Choy, cut in quarters then chopped in large pieces▪️2 Tbsp Cornstarch (mixed with 1/4 cup water)▪️8 oz. Shrimp, peeled and tail removed, cut in half▪️8 oz. Thin Wonton Noodles or Ramen Noodles▪️

1️⃣ If you are making your own wontons, mix together all the ingredients listed for the wontons except for the wonton skins (NOTE: This amount of wonton filling + skins will yield 3x what you need for the soup; you can freeze extra wontons on a parchment lined cookie sheet then transfer into a freezer bag and boil from frozen)
2️⃣ Fill a small bowl with water; orient the wonton skin in your palm in a diamond shape, and place ~1 tsp of the meat mixture in the bottom corner of the skin; roll the corner up and over the meat mixture about half way and then wet the skin to the right of the meat; holding the skin on both sides of the meat between your thumbs and pointer fingers (fingers facing towards you), pinch your fingers together and tuck the damp skin on the left onto the right to seal shut (the water will act as an adhesive); repeat until you have ~20 wontons made for the soup

‼️Recipe continued in comments (it was too long to fit in the caption 😘)
summary: Homemade wonton noodle soup recipe with chicken or pork wontons, shiitake mushrooms, bok choy, and shrimp in broth.

caption:
😮‍💨 270 Cal Spicy Elote Chicken Chalupas

📍 My high protein chalupa series has been super viral and I think this might be the best one yet!

✅ Macros for each Chalupa:
270 Cals, 17g Carbs, 8g Fat, 35g Protein

✅ Macros per 2 Tbsp (32g) Elote Sauce:
28 Cals, 3.5g Carbs, 0.5g Fat, 2.5g Protein

✳️ 28 Cal Elote Sauce:
170g Plain Non Fat Greek Yogurt
113g 2% Cottage Cheese
40g Sriracha
30g Honey
5g Low Sodium Soy Sauce
Juice and Zest from ½ Lime
½ tsp Sea Salt
¼ tsp Black Pepper
¼ tsp Garlic Powder
¼ tsp Smoked Paprika

✳️ Ingredients for Elote Pico:
1 Bag Frozen Corn (16oz)
100g Red Onion
40g Jalapeno
10g Cilantro
15g Minced Garlic
20g Cotija Cheese (Parmesan if you don't have it!)
½ tsp Sea Salt
½ tsp Smoked Paprika
¼ tsp Garlic Powder

✳️ Elote Sauce Romaine:
150g Romaine
Spoonful of Elote Sauce

✳️ Ingredients for Elote Sauce Chicken Dip:
16oz Chicken Breast
Cajun Seasoning (for Chicken)
1/6th Batch Elote Sauce

✳️ Ingredients for 1 Chalupa:
1 Josephs Pita
14g Part Skim Mozzarella
1/4th Batch of Chicken tossed in Sauce
Cooking Spray (added 1g fat to macro per chalupa)

❇️ Directions:
1️⃣ Pat chicken breast dry, flatten and season both sides with a cajun seasoning. Air fry on 400 degrees F for 9-10 minutes.
2️⃣ Blend all elote sauce ingredients until smooth.
3️⃣ Sauté corn on 7/10 heat until lightly charred. Season with sea salt and then combine with remaining elote ingredients in a bowl.
4️⃣ Once chicken cools for 10 minutes, chop and toss in 1/6th of the elote sauce.
5️⃣ Chop 150g of romaine and mix with a spoonful of the elote sauce (just enough to coat lightly).
6️⃣ Assemble chalupas by laying your pita flat. On one side of pita, 7g mozzarella, 1/4th of your elote chicken, a spoonful of the elote, and 7g mozzarella.
7️⃣ Fold tightly, spray both sides with non stick cooking spray and air fry on 400 degrees F for 4 minutes (used ramekins on top to hold them closed).
8️⃣ Once done, open them up, add your romaine and enjoy!

caption:
Sukhi Bhel 👇🏻 recipe below 

I often make this with papdi, roasted split chana and even boiled potato for extra texture and substance. Use what you have!! 

Ingredients

Dry green chutney:

Handful fresh mint
Handful fresh coriander
2 green chillies
Small piece ginger
4 tbsp roasted chickpeas
1 tsp chaat masala
Salt to taste

Bhel:

2 cups puffed rice
1 cup roasted chickpeas
1/2 cup peanuts (roasted in pan)
1/2 cup tomato, finely chopped
1/2 red onion, finely chopped
1 tsp chaat masala
Fresh coriander, chopped
1/2 green mango, finely chopped
Juice of 1 lemon or lime
Salt to taste

Method:

Blend the dry chutney ingredients into a coarse, fragrant mix. Set aside.

In a large bowl, combine puffed rice, roasted chickpeas, roasted peanuts, tomato, onion and green mango.

Add chaat masala, a spoonful of the dry green chutney, lemon juice and salt.

Toss well so everything is evenly coated while keeping the puffed rice light and crisp.

Serve immediately.

caption:
Butter garlic prawns are a celebration of simplicity done right - a dish where timing, heat, and restraint matter as much as flavour. Originating from coastal kitchens where fresh catch met hot pans, this preparation lets the prawns lead, cooked just until they turn tender and succulent, never rubbery. The butter melts into a glossy sauce that clings to each piece, carrying the warmth of garlic without overpowering the natural sweetness of the seafood. The result is rich yet clean, indulgent yet light, with a silky texture and a lingering savoury finish that feels timeless, comforting, and effortlessly elegant.

Recipe Ingredients 
Serves 2-3
500g large prawns (cleaned, deveined)
2 tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp Kashmiri red chilli powder
1 tsp cracked black peppercorns 
1/4 tsp salt
1/4 lemon (juice)

3 tbsp butter
1 tbsp oil (prevents butter from burning)
1 tbsp butter 
1 tsp cumin seeds
2 tbsp ginger, garlic and chilli paste (coarse consistency)
1 tsp cracked black peppercorns
2 tbsp coriander leaves (leaves only)
1/2 lemon (juice)
Salt to taste

#prawn #indianfood #seafood #prawnrecipe #scottish
summary: A butter garlic prawn recipe with turmeric and spices, designed to highlight the natural sweetness of fresh seafood.

caption:
Roasted Veggie Sheet Pan with Feta, Walnuts & Cranberries

A colorful, sweet-savory sheet-pan meal that's crispy, cozy, and bursting with flavor. Perfect as a healthy dinner, festive side, or meal-prep favorite—minimal effort, maximum taste.

⏱️ Time & Yield

Prep: 15 minutes

Roast: 30–35 minutes

Serves: 3–4

📝 Ingredients

Vegetables (mix & match):

1 cup broccoli florets

1 cup cauliflower florets

1 medium sweet potato, cubed

1 red bell pepper, sliced

1 red onion, thick slices

1 zucchini, sliced

Seasoning & Toppings:

3 tbsp olive oil

1 tsp garlic powder

1 tsp paprika

½ tsp dried thyme or oregano

Salt & black pepper, to taste

⅓ cup feta cheese, crumbled

¼ cup toasted walnuts, roughly chopped

3 tbsp dried cranberries

Optional: lemon zest or balsamic glaze

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Preheat oven to 200°C / 400°F. Line a large sheet pan with parchment paper.

Add vegetables to the pan. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle all seasonings. Toss well to coat evenly.

Spread in a single layer (important for crisp edges).

Roast for 30–35 minutes, flipping halfway, until veggies are tender and caramelized.

Remove from oven and immediately sprinkle feta, walnuts, and cranberries over hot veggies.

Finish with lemon zest or balsamic glaze if using. Serve warm.

🔥 Nutrition (Approx. per serving)

Calories: ~320

Carbs: ~32 g

Protein: ~9 g

Healthy Fats: ~18 g

Rich in fiber & antioxidants

💡 Pro Tips

Extra crunch: Add walnuts in the last 10 minutes of roasting so they don't burn.

Protein boost: Add chickpeas or white beans before roasting.

Vegan option: Swap feta for vegan feta or tahini drizzle.

Meal prep: Keeps well in the fridge for 3–4 days.

❓ Q & A

Q: Can I use frozen vegetables?
A: Yes, but thaw and pat dry first to avoid sogginess.

Q: What can I serve this with?
A: Great with grilled chicken, salmon, quinoa, couscous, or as a warm salad base.

Q: Can I make it spicy?
A: Absolutely—add chili flakes or drizzle hot honey on top
#recipe #meditteranean #mediterranean #mediterraneanfood #MediterraneanEscape #foodie #food #foodlover #todayrecipe #fblifestyles #fblifestylechallenge #fblifestyletyleシ゚viralシ
summary: A sheet-pan roasted vegetable recipe with feta, walnuts, and cranberries that's ready in under an hour.

caption:
Chicken Zucchini Poppers

Ingredients

Poppers:
1 lb ground chicken
(450 g)
1 medium zucchini, finely grated and squeezed dry
(200 g raw / ~120 g drained)
½ cup breadcrumbs or panko
(30 g)
¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese
(25 g)
1 large egg
(50 g)
2 cloves garlic, minced
(6 g)
1 teaspoon Italian seasoning
(2 g)
½ teaspoon salt
(3 g)
¼ teaspoon black pepper
(1 g)
1 tablespoon olive oil (for brushing or frying)
(15 ml)

Optional Dipping Sauce:
½ cup Greek yogurt or sour cream
(120 g)
1 tablespoon lemon juice
(15 ml)
1 tablespoon chopped fresh parsley or dill
(4 g)
Salt to taste

Directions

Preheat oven to 400°F / 200°C. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or lightly grease.

In a large bowl, combine ground chicken, grated zucchini, breadcrumbs, Parmesan, egg, garlic, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Mix gently until just combined.

Scoop tablespoon-sized portions and roll into small balls. Place evenly spaced on the baking sheet and lightly brush with olive oil.

Bake for 18–22 minutes, turning once halfway, until golden and cooked through (internal temperature 165°F / 74°C).

For extra crispiness, broil for the final 2–3 minutes if desired.

Mix all dipping sauce ingredients in a small bowl and chill until ready to serve.

Prep Time: 15 minutes
Cooking Time: 22 minutes
Total Time: 37 minutes
Calories: ~260 kcal per serving
Servings: 4

caption:
Greek Chicken Wraps with Creamy Feta Sauce
Ingredients
For the Chicken

1 lb (450 g) boneless, skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced

2 tbsp olive oil

2 cloves garlic, minced

1 tsp dried oregano

1/2 tsp smoked paprika

Juice of 1/2 lemon

Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

Creamy Feta Sauce

1/2 cup feta cheese, crumbled

1/2 cup Greek yogurt

1 tbsp olive oil

1 tsp lemon juice

1 clove garlic, minced

Black pepper, to taste

Wrap Ingredients

4 large flatbreads or tortillas

1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved

1/2 cucumber, thinly sliced

1/4 red onion, thinly sliced

1/2 cup shredded lettuce or baby spinach

Directions
Cook the Chicken

In a bowl, combine olive oil, garlic, oregano, smoked paprika, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

Toss chicken in the marinade and let sit for 15–20 minutes.

Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and cook chicken for 4–5 minutes per side until fully cooked and lightly golden.

Prepare the Creamy Feta Sauce

In a small bowl, blend feta, Greek yogurt, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and black pepper until smooth and creamy. Chill until ready to serve.

Assemble the Wraps

Warm flatbreads slightly.

Spread a generous layer of creamy feta sauce on each flatbread.

Layer with cooked chicken, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, and lettuce or spinach.

Roll tightly and slice in half if desired.

Serve

Serve immediately for a fresh and flavorful Mediterranean lunch or dinner.

Nutritional Information (Per Wrap)

Calories: ~420 kcal

Protein: 34 g

Fat: 18 g

Carbohydrates: 32 g

Fiber: 4 g

Sugar: 4 g
summary: Recipe for Greek chicken wraps with creamy feta sauce, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and fresh vegetables.

caption:
BANG BANG TOFU BOWLS🌶 If you're looking for a saucy high protein meal packed with goodness you're going to want to save this recipe and share it with someone you love 💚💚

The recipe makes two bowls

Ingredients
1 (12oz) pack extra firm tofu
2 tbsp cornstarch 
1/2 cup vegan mayo
2 tbsp chili sauce
1/2 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tbsp agave 
1 tbsp low-sodium tamari or soy sauce
1/2 tsp sea salt
1/4 tsp ground black pepper
red chili, sliced
cilantro, chopped
For the Bowl
1 cup cooked brown rice
1 medium cucumber, sliced
1 large avocado
Carrots, julliended

Instructions
1. Pre-heat the oven to 450 and line a sheet pan with parchment paper. Cut the tofu into cubes, and place in a mixing bowl. Sprinkle with cornstarch and toss well to coat the tofu.
2. Bake until browned and crisp, about 20 to 25 minutes. 
3. Add all sauce ingredients into a mixing bowl and stir until well combined.
4. Once tofu is crispy, remove it from the oven and toss it with the sauce.
5. Garnish with chilli slices and cilantro, and serve with sliced cucumbers, carrots, and warm brown rice. Drizzle on extra bang bang sauce and enjoy!

caption:
10 Minute Chili Peanut Noodles 🍜

This is one of my go-to noodle meals. Takeout has gotten so expensive lately, so I started making it at home for a fraction of the cost. It's creamy, spicy, full of flavor, and makes plenty for the whole family.

Follow to eat better and spend less.

Ingredients
• 9 oz noodles
• 2.5 tbsp peanut butter
• 1 tsp red pepper flakes
• ⅓ cup green onion
• 2 tsp sesame seeds
• 5 garlic cloves, minced
• 1 tbsp sugar
• 1 tbsp chili crisp
• 1 tbsp rice vinegar
• 2 tbsp soy sauce
• 3 tbsp coconut milk
• ⅓ cup avocado oil
• 3 tbsp pasta water
• Green onions, chopped peanuts, julienned cucumbers, chili crisp (garnish)

Instructions
1.	Cook your noodles al dente. Rinse under cold water and save some pasta water.
2.	Add everything except the noodles, oil, and pasta water to a cold pan.
3.	Heat the avocado oil until very hot.
4.	Carefully pour the hot oil over the sauce ingredients and stir until smooth.
5.	Add the noodles and toss until everything is coated.
6.	Add the pasta water if needed and mix until the sauce turns glossy and silky.
7.	Garnish with green onions, chopped peanuts, julienned cucumbers, and more chili crisp.
summary: A 10-minute creamy chili peanut noodle recipe made at home as an affordable alternative to takeout.

Ingredients

For the Salad:

2 lbs baby potatoes (red, yellow, or mixed), halved or quartered

½ small red onion, thinly sliced

½ cup pitted Kalamata olives, halved

½ cup crumbled feta cheese

¼ cup fresh parsley, chopped

¼ cup fresh dill, chopped

For the Dressing:

¼ cup extra virgin olive oil

⅓ cup fresh lemon juice

2 tsp Dijon mustard (optional)

1 tsp dried oregano (optional)

Salt and black pepper, to taste

Instructions

Cook potatoes: Place potatoes in salted water, boil, then simmer 10–15 min until fork-tender. Drain and cool slightly.

Make dressing: Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, oregano, salt, and pepper.

Combine salad: In a large bowl, mix potatoes, red onion, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, olives, parsley, and dill.

Toss & serve: Pour dressing over salad and toss gently. Sprinkle crumbled feta on top. Serve warm or chilled.

caption:
Roasted Beet, Sweet Potato & Avocado Salad
with Whipped Ricotta and Lemon–Tahini Drizzle
Mediterranean-style, nourishing and elegant

Serves
2–3

Time
Prep: 15 minutes
Roast: 30–35 minutes

Ingredients

For the roasted vegetables
2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
2 medium beets, peeled and cubed
2 tablespoons olive oil
½ teaspoon sea salt
¼ teaspoon black pepper
½ teaspoon ground cumin or smoked paprika (optional)

For the whipped ricotta
1 cup ricotta cheese (whole milk preferred)
1 tablespoon olive oil
1 tablespoon lemon juice
Pinch of salt

For the lemon–tahini drizzle
3 tablespoons tahini
2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
1 small garlic clove, grated
2–4 tablespoons warm water (to thin)
Salt to taste

For the salad
1 ripe avocado, sliced
2 tablespoons toasted walnuts or almonds (optional)
Fresh parsley or dill, chopped
Optional add-ins: arugula, baby spinach, or mixed greens

Instructions

Roast the vegetables
Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Place sweet potato and beet cubes on a baking tray. Drizzle with olive oil, salt, pepper, and cumin or paprika. Toss well.
Roast for 30–35 minutes, flipping halfway, until tender and lightly caramelized. Let cool slightly.

Make the whipped ricotta
Add ricotta, olive oil, lemon juice, and salt to a blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth, creamy, and airy. Set aside.

Prepare the lemon–tahini drizzle
In a small bowl, whisk tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and salt.
Gradually add warm water until smooth and pourable.

Assemble the salad
Spread whipped ricotta on a serving plate or bowl.
Top with roasted sweet potatoes and beets.
Add avocado slices and greens if using.
Drizzle generously with lemon–tahini sauce.
Finish with nuts and fresh herbs.

#roastedbeets #sweetpotato #usafoodie
summary: A Mediterranean roasted beet and sweet potato salad with whipped ricotta and lemon-tahini drizzle.

caption:
🥕 GLOW UP IMMUNITY CARROT SALAD 
If you love easy, healthy salads, you've got to give this a try. It's crunchy, bright, a little spicy, and wildly addictive. Probably one of the best salads I've made recently. To make it high protein you can always add some chicken or shrimp. 

INGREDIENTS:

1 lb carrots, peeled and ribboned
1/2 English cucumber, thinly sliced into half moons
4 scallions, thinly sliced
A large handful of fresh cilantro, roughly chopped
Juice of 1/2 large lemon
Salt, to taste

Chili Sesame Oil
5 tbsp toasted sesame oil
1/2 tbsp honey (or low sugar honey)
4 garlic cloves, minced
1 tbsp fresh grated ginger
1.5 tbsp toasted sesame seeds
1/2 tsp chili flakes

Here is how I made it:

1️⃣ Peel and ribbon 1 lb of carrots. Add to a bowl with a couple generous pinches of salt and let sit for 10-15 minutes to soften.

2️⃣ Thinly slice 1/2 English cucumber into half moon, 3-4 scallions diagonally, and a large handful of cilantro. Add to the carrots.

3️⃣ Squeeze in the juice of half a large lemon.

4️⃣ In a heat-safe bowl, add 1/2 tbsp honey, 4 minced garlic cloves, 1 tbsp grated ginger, 1.5 tbsp toasted sesame seeds, and 1/2 tsp chili flakes.

5️⃣ Warm 5 tbsp toasted sesame oil over low-medium heat, then carefully pour it over the chili mixture. Let it bloom  and cool for 10 minutes.

6️⃣ Toss everything really well with your hands. Taste and adjust with more salt or lemon if needed.

And enjoy! 

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS.

Protein-Packed No-Rice Dal Idlis
You asked for it! These protein-packed, no-rice dal idlis are made entirely with dals and are perfect for a healthy lunchbox.
Ingredients
* 1 cup urad dal
* 1 cup moong dal
* Salt, to taste
* Water, as needed
Method
1. Wash and soak urad dal and moong dal together for 6–8 hours or overnight.
2. Drain and grind into a thick, smooth idli batter, adding water as needed.
3. Add salt and mix well.
4. Transfer the batter to the Instant Pot and ferment on Yogurt mode for 10 hours (use a glass lid or keep the lid on venting).
5. Once fermented, gently mix the batter.
6. Pour into greased idli molds.
7. Steam for 10–12 minutes until the idlis are soft and fluffy.
8. Serve hot with sambar or chutney.
Perfect for kids' lunchboxes, meal prep, or a light protein-rich meal.

Spicy Chicken 65 🌶️ 

To download the Osta app, search "Osta Recipes" on the App Store or Google PlayStore 🫶🏻

*you'll find the green and red chilli sauces at any indian grocery store. the are fusion indo-chinese sauces
don't use sriracha etc 

Ingredients
• 500g boneless chicken, small cubes
• 1 tsp red chilli powder
• 1/2 tsp turmeric powder
• 1/2 tsp black pepper powder
• 1 tbsp ginger garlic paste
• 1/2 tsp garam masala
• Salt to taste
• 1 tsp lemon juice
• Pinch red food colour
• 2 tbsp corn flour
• 1 tbsp all-purpose flour
• 1 egg white
• 1/4 tsp baking soda
• 1/2 cup oil (for shallow frying)
• 1/2 tsp cumin
• 2 tbsp chopped garlic
• 2 tbsp chopped ginger
• 2–3 slit green chillies
• Curry leaves
• 1/2 tsp black pepper powder
• 1/2 tsp red chilli powder
• 2 tbsp red chilli sauce
• 1 tbsp green chilli sauce
• 1/4 tsp vinegar
• 1/2 tsp soy sauce
• Lemon juice (to taste)
• 3 tbsp plain yoghurt
• Chopped cilantro

Method
	1.	Combine chicken with red chilli, turmeric, black pepper, ginger garlic, garam masala, salt, lemon juice and food colour. Marinate for as long as you can in the fridge.
	2.	Add corn flour, all-purpose flour, egg white and baking soda.Mix and rest 20 minutes.
	3. Shallow fry chicken in oil until cooked and golden. Remove chicken and reserve leftover oil.
	4.	In the same oil, sauté cumin, garlic, ginger, green chillies and curry leaves. Add salt, black pepper, red chilli, red chilli sauce, green chilli sauce, vinegar, soy sauce, lemon juice and yoghurt. Cook briefly until combined.

• Add fried chicken, toss to coat with the sauce. 
• Garnish with cilantro and enjoy with naan 🫓 or rumali roti!!

Baked Blueberry Almond Cottage Cheese Breakfast Bowls 🫐🌰 – Fluffy, Sweet & Protein-Rich

Ingredients:

1 cup cottage cheese
2 large eggs
2 tbsp honey or maple syrup
1 tsp vanilla extract
½ cup oat flour (or finely blended oats)
½ tsp baking powder
½ cup fresh or frozen blueberries
2 tbsp chopped almonds
Cooking spray or a little oil

Nutrition info (per serving, serves 2):
Approx. 300 kcal | 22g protein | 8g fat | 32g net carbs | Naturally sweet & high-protein

Directions:
Step 1: Preheat & Prep
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two small oven-safe bowls or ramekins.

Step 2: Mix the Base
In a bowl, whisk together cottage cheese, eggs, honey, and vanilla until smooth. Add oat flour and baking powder, stirring until fully combined.

Step 3: Add Blueberries & Almonds
Gently fold in blueberries and chopped almonds, reserving a few for topping.

Step 4: Bake
Divide the batter evenly between the prepared bowls. Sprinkle remaining blueberries and almonds on top. Bake for 20–25 minutes until set and lightly golden.

Step 5: Cool & Serve
Let cool slightly before serving. Enjoy warm for a fluffy, sweet, protein-rich breakfast.

Tips:

Frozen blueberries can be used directly without thawing.
Add a pinch of cinnamon or a drizzle of honey for extra flavor.
Store leftovers in the fridge for up to 3 days and reheat before serving.

caption:
3-Ingredient Cottage Cheese Garlic Flatbread 🧄🧀 – Soft, Cheesy & Quick
Ingredients (Makes 1–2 flatbreads)

1 cup cottage cheese

1 cup flour (all-purpose or oat flour)

1–2 teaspoons minced garlic

Optional: pinch of salt or dried herbs

Instructions
1) Mix the Dough

Add the cottage cheese, flour, and garlic to a bowl. Stir until a soft, sticky dough forms. If needed, add a little more flour to bring it together.

2) Shape the Flatbread

Lightly flour your surface. Press or roll the dough into a flat round shape, about ½ cm thick.

3) Cook

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Place the flatbread in and cook for 2–3 minutes per side, until golden spots appear and the bread feels soft but cooked through.

4) Finish

Brush lightly with extra garlic or herbs if you like. Serve warm.

Tips

Add a little flour if the dough is too wet.

Lower heat if it browns too fast.

You can make mini flatbreads instead of one large one.

Time

Prep: 5 min

Cook: 6–8 min

Total: 10–12 min
summary: A 3-ingredient cottage cheese and garlic flatbread recipe that's ready in under 15 minutes.

caption:
Next year my daughter is going to be in a college apartment with a kitchen and an Oven!! So I'm teaching her the "deli-style" chicken breast I always meal prep 😊 because having protein READY in the fridge = easy lunches, easy dinners, and way less "I have nothing to eat" moments.

🍗 Roasted Chicken Breast (Meal Prep / Deli Style)
Ingredients (6–8 servings):
• 4–6 boneless, skinless chicken breasts
• 3 tbsp olive oil (or avocado oil)
• 2 tsp salt
• 1 tsp black pepper
• 1 tsp garlic powder
• 1 tsp paprika
• 1 tsp dried Italian herbs (or oregano/thyme/rosemary mix)
• Optional: juice of 1 lemon 🍋

Instructions:
	1.	Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C)
	2.	Pat chicken dry + place on a lined sheet pan (or baking dish)
	3.	Rub with oil, then season with salt, pepper, garlic, paprika, and herbs (add lemon if using)
	4.	Roast uncovered 22–28 min (depending on thickness) until internal temp is 165°F (74°C)
	5.	Remove + cover loosely with foil
	6.	Rest 10 minutes
	7.	Slice thinly against the grain once cooled

How we use it (instead of deli meat):
🥪 sandwiches & wraps • 🥗 salads • 🧀 snack plates • 🍚 grain bowls • 🍝 pasta

Can last in fridge up to 4 days! 

Save this for your weekly meal prep 💛

#mealprepideas #homemadedeli #mealprepsunday

summary: Roasted deli-style chicken breast recipe for meal prep that lasts up to 4 days in the fridge.

caption:
These masala chickpea puffs are full of protein and flavor! 🤎 A perfect and healthy snack that takes only 15 minutes to make.

You can save these chickpeas in an air tight container to last all week!

Ingredients  
 
* 1 can chickpeas (1 1/2 cup, drain, wash and dry with a towel) 
* 1 Tbsp Olive oil 
* 1 tsp Cayenne pepper  
* 1/2 tsp Paprika   
* 1/2 tsp Chat masala  
* 1/2 tsp Black salt  
* 3/4 tsp Kosher salt 
* 1 Tbsp Gram flour( besan) 
 
Method 
 
* Preheat air fryer at 300 F  for about 10 minutes.  
* Put chickpeas in a mixing bowl  
* Add oil and stir.  
* Add all the spices and mix. 
* Line the air-fryer basket with non stick foil and spread the chickpeas on top of it in one layer.  
* Cook it at 300F for 15 minutes. 
* Stir every few minutes.  
* Leave the chickpeas in the warm oven for next 10 minutes after you turned it off to get it crispier.  
* Could use the regular oven too.  
* To serve, either serve it like this or squeeze little lime juice and chopped cilantro and enjoy it with a cup of hot Chai!

caption:
Chipotle chicken burrito bowls✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order now, and I'd love to meet you on the BOOK TOUR 🤍! Tickets + pre-order info at the link in my bio.

Chicken + Marinade:▪️1 lb. Boneless Skinless Chicken Thighs▪️1 Lime, juice▪️2 Tbsp Finely Chopped Fresh Cilantro▪️1+1/2 tsp Chili Powder▪️1+1/2 tsp Cumin▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1/4 tsp Pepper▪️2 Tbsp Olive Oil, plus more for cooking the chicken▪️

Beans:▪️15 oz. Can Black Beans, drained▪️1/2 tsp Cumin▪️1/4 tsp Chili Powder▪️1/4 tsp Kosher Salt▪️

Rice:▪️1 Cup Long Grain White Rice, uncooked▪️1+1/2 Cups Water▪️1/2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️3 Tbsp Finely Chopped Fresh Cilantro▪️1 Lime, juice▪️1 Tbsp Butter▪️

Bowls (options):▪️Romaine Lettuce, sliced thin▪️Shredded Cheese▪️Salsa▪️Guacamole or Avocado▪️Sour Cream▪️

1️⃣ Add the chicken to a bowl with the rest of the ingredients for the marinade. Mix until chicken is evenly coated and then cover and refrigerate for at least 20 mins. 
2️⃣ Wash the rice until the water runs clear, and then drain it with a fine mesh sieve. Transfer to a medium pot and add the water and salt. (If you skipped washing the rice, add 2 more Tbsp water). Bring to a  boil over high heat, then cover and simmer on low heat for 15 mins. Remove the pot from the heat and let rest, covered, for 10 mins, then stir in the cilantro, lime, and butter.
3️⃣ In a small pot over medium heat, add the black beans, cumin, chili powder, and salt. Mix and cook until warmed through (~5 min).
4️⃣ Preheat a large pan over medium high heat. Add 1 Tbsp oil and sear chicken 5-6 mins per side (10-12 mins total) until internal temp reaches 165F. Let rest 5 min then cut in small cubes
5️⃣ Build your bowls with rice, beans, romaine, and chicken, then top with your favorite toppings such as guacamole, salsa, cheese, and sour cream. Enjoy!

⏲10 minute total prep + 45 minute cook time

Recipe serves 4
summary: A chipotle chicken burrito bowl recipe with marinated chicken thighs, cilantro lime rice, black beans, and customizable toppings.

caption:
This baked cauliflower with cheese is tender on the inside and golden on top – a simple and delicious dish that everyone will love! 🧀✨ 
Perfect as a side dish, healthy lunch, or quick dinner. Easy to make and packed with flavor!
 🥦 Ingredients 
 • Cauliflower – about 1.5 pounds (700 g)
 • Eggs – 2 (optional)
 • Sour cream – 4 tbsp (¼ cup)
 • Mayonnaise – 1 tbsp (optional)
 • Mustard – 1 tbsp
 • Hard cheese – 7 oz (about 2 cups shredded)
 • Salt and pepper – to taste
 • Paprika – 1 tsp
 🍳 Instructions
 1. Separate the cauliflower into florets. Boil in salted water for 2 minutes.
 2. In a bowl, mix the sour cream, mayonnaise, mustard, salt, pepper, paprika, and 1 tbsp of grated cheese. Optionally, you can add eggs for a firmer texture, similar to a casserole.
 3. Place the cauliflower in a baking dish and pour the sauce over it. Sprinkle with the remaining grated cheese.
 4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 20 minutes, until golden and crispy on top.

#BakedCauliflower #CheesyCauliflower #EasyRecipe #HealthyEating #QuickMeals Vegetarian HomeCooking Tasty SimpleRecipes DinnerIdeas

caption:
One-pot Punjabi Style Rajma that needs No Bhunai, No Extra Efforts❤️
Perfect for busy days when you want comfort food without spending hours in the kitchen.

Save it and try it soon! 😍🍛

👉🏼 Ingredients & Method:
In a pressure cooker add:
250gm Rajma (overnight soaked) 🌙
3 roughly chopped onions 🧅
4 tomatoes 🍅
10 garlic cloves 🧄
3" grated ginger ✨
Whole spices (1 tsp cumin seeds, 1 black cardamom, 1" cinnamon & 1 bay leaf) 🌿
2 tbsp @emami mantra Kashmiri Lal Mirch 🌶️
1/4 tsp @emami mantra haldi powder 💛
2 tbsp coriander powder 🌱
1/4 tsp garam masala 🥄
1 tbsp desi ghee 🧈
Salt to taste 🧂
3 cups hot water 💧
Mix it well
1 whistle on high flame then on a medium flame cook 15 minutes
After pressure release remove skin of tomatoes 🍅
Mix everything, add hot water to adjust consistency, cover & cook 10–12 minutes
Then add more ghee, kasuri methi & coriander leaves 🌿💛

Rich, creamy, perfect Punjabi-style rajma is ready 😋🍛

#rajma #onepotmeal #easyrecipe #comfortfood #rajmachawal
summary: One-pot Punjabi-style rajma (kidney beans) recipe made in a pressure cooker without extra effort.

caption:
🍓✨ Strawberry Vanilla Cottage Cheese Pancake Bites – Fluffy, Sweet & Protein-Rich

Ingredients:

1 cup cottage cheese

2 large eggs

½ cup oat flour (or almond flour for low-carb)

1–2 tbsp honey or maple syrup (optional)

1 tsp vanilla extract

½ tsp baking powder

Pinch of salt

½ cup chopped fresh strawberries

Directions:

📌 Super easy steps 👇👇

Step 1: Preheat & Prep

Oven: Preheat to 350°F (175°C) and grease or line a mini muffin tin.

Air fryer: Preheat to 320°F (160°C).

Step 2: Mix the Batter
In a blender or bowl, mix cottage cheese, eggs, honey, and vanilla until smooth. Add oat flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir until combined.

Step 3: Add Strawberries
Fold in chopped strawberries.

Step 4: Bake or Air Fry

Oven: Divide into muffin cups and bake for 18–22 minutes, until golden and fluffy.

Air Fryer: Spoon into silicone molds and cook 10–12 minutes until set.

Step 5: Cool & Serve
Let cool slightly before serving. Enjoy warm or chilled — naturally sweet and protein-packed!

Tips:

Use ripe, juicy strawberries for the best flavor.

Add a sprinkle of cinnamon or extra vanilla for a flavor boost.

Store in the fridge for up to 3 days or freeze for later.
summary: A recipe for fluffy strawberry vanilla cottage cheese pancake bites that can be baked in the oven or air fryer.

caption:
New York Times Top 50 Recipes of 2025 | Honey Garlic Shrimp by @nytcooking @lideylikes

Ingredients: 

- 1 lb jumbo shrimp, peeled & deveined
- ⅓ cup honey
- 3 Tbsp soy sauce
- 1 Tbsp garlic, minced
- ½ tsp grated ginger
- Red pepper flakes, to taste
- ¼ tsp cornstarch
- 1 Tbsp oil
- Scallions, to serve

Toss the shrimp with 3 tablespoons of a whisked mixture of honey, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and red pepper and marinate for at least 15 minutes. Stir the cornstarch into the remaining marinade and set aside, then pat the shrimp dry and discard the excess marinade. Heat a large skillet over medium-high with oil, cook the shrimp in a single layer until lightly browned, about 2 minutes per side, then add the reserved marinade and cook until thickened. Transfer to a serving dish, top with scallions, and serve. 

What do you think higher or lower than 4?

caption:
Easy, Healthy Crispy Rice Chicken Salad that is packed with protein, lower in calories and full of flavour. Make it in under 20 minutes, so worth the hype!👇🏽
-
Crispy Rice:
• 400g cooked rice
• 2 tbsp soy sauce
• 2 tsp sesame oil
• 1/2 tsp chili flakes
-
Salad:
• 1 large cucumber, thinly sliced
• 1/2 cup green onions
• 1 cup edamame
• 1 avocado, chopped
• 1/4 cup cilantro, chopped
• 2 chicken breast, cubed
-
Dressing:
• 3/4 cup fat free greek yogurt, plain
• 1/4 cup light mayo
• 2 tbsp hot sauce
• 1 lime, squeezed
• 1/2 tsp salt and garlic powder
• water (to thin out sauce)
• optional: 1 tbsp any sweetener
-
Directions:
• in a baking sheet, add rice, soy sauce, sesame oil and chili flakes. Mix well, spread evenly and bake at 450F for 10-12 minutes until crispy.
• meanwhile, add all salad ingredients to a large bowl and set aside
• add all dressing ingredients to a small bowl, mix until smooth.
• add crispy rice on top of salad, then pour the dressing on top. mix well and enjoy!
-
-

summary: A crispy baked rice and chicken salad with yogurt-based dressing, ready in under 20 minutes.

caption:
✅ HEALTHY LUNCH IDEA, PART 10

510 cals, 41g protein, 19 net carbs 

I've lost 140+lbs and this is one of my favorite healthy meal prep options. It's keeps you full with the slow digesting carbs, protein, health fats, and fiber.

Plus, the creamy sriracha sauce is SO good you'll want it all over everything.

If you are watching your carbs, sub in spaghetti squash, eggplant, or even zucchini!

Here is how I made it (makes 4 servings)

1.Finely dice 1 medium sweet potato. You'll want this finely diced so it cooks faster. Drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil, season with salt, pepper, 2 tsp onion powder, 1 tsp chipotle powder, and 1/2 tsp sweet paprika. Add to a tray, pop in the oven for 20-25 mins at 400F.

2.Cook 1 lb lean ground beef (I used 93/7)) in 1 tsp olive oil. Season your beef with salt, pepper, 1 tbsp chipotle powder, 1 tbsp onion or garlic powder, 1 tbsp oregano, & 1 tbsp sweet paprika. Use a spoon or a spatula to mince it down to small pieces. I like to get the meat browned up really nicely, almost crispy, should take about 15-17 mins.

3.When your sweet potato is roasted, divide it up in to 4 different serving bowls or meal prep containers. Add a large handful of finely shredded lettuce, 1/3 cup cottage cheese), 4oz of cooked beef, half a small avocado, finely diced red onion, a handful of chopped cilantro, and your favorite sauce. You can use hot sauce, or my creamy sriracha sauce. It's in a FREE ebook on my substack if you want to check it out. Or you can use the recipe in step 4 below.

4.For the sauce (this normally makes 4 servings, but I stretched it to all 6)… mix 2 tbsp mayonnaise with 1/4 cup sriracha, 2 tbsp rice vinegar, 1/2 tsp soy sauce, 2 tsp powdered monk fruit sweetener, the juice of 1 solid lime, 1 grated garlic clove, and 1 thinly sliced scallion or a handful of chopped cilantro. Season with salt and pepper, mix it up, taste and adjust as you wish.

5.Top with any other veggies you like, some chili flakes, sesame seeds, and ENJOY! 

This is a great healthy lunch recipe, and perfect for meal prep.

If you try it, let me know what you think on SHREDHAPPENS!
.
.
.
.
.
#highprotein #healthyrecipes #goodmoodfood #lowcarbrecipes #healthyfoodshare
summary: High-protein, low-carb beef and sweet potato bowl with creamy sriracha sauce, designed for meal prep and weight loss.

caption:
Cottage Cheese Veggie Bake is creamy, protein-rich, and loaded with colorful vegetables that support gut and joint health. Cottage cheese adds a light, fluffy texture while herbs, olive oil, and turmeric bring powerful anti-inflammatory benefits. It's an easy, nourishing dish perfect for breakfast, lunch, or a light dinner.

🛒 Ingredients (Serves 4)

1½ cups cottage cheese (full-fat or low-fat)

2 eggs

1 cup broccoli florets (finely chopped)

½ cup bell peppers (diced)

½ cup zucchini (grated, excess water squeezed out)

¼ cup red onion (finely chopped)

1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil

1 tsp turmeric powder

½ tsp black pepper

½ tsp dried oregano or thyme

Salt to taste

¼ cup shredded mozzarella or feta (optional)

Fresh parsley or dill (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Lightly grease a baking dish.

In a bowl, whisk cottage cheese and eggs until smooth.

Add olive oil, turmeric, black pepper, herbs, and salt. Mix well.

Fold in broccoli, bell peppers, zucchini, and onion.

Pour mixture into the baking dish.

Sprinkle cheese on top if using.

Bake for 30–35 minutes, until set and lightly golden.

Rest 5 minutes before slicing. Garnish and serve warm.

🥗 Nutrition (Per Serving – Approximate)

Calories: 230 kcal

Protein: 18 g

Fat: 14 g

Carbohydrates: 8 g

Fiber: 2.5 g

Sugar: <3 g

Sodium: Moderate #recipes #recipes #recipeshare #recipesharing #recipesoftiktok #recipesforyou #quickrecipes #plantbasedrecipes
summary: A protein-rich cottage cheese and vegetable bake with turmeric and herbs, suitable for any meal.

caption:
Tomato Basil Soup @jacquelinethoma ⬇️ Recipe ⬇️

Roasted Tomato Basil Soup:
6 larger vine tomatoes, quartered 
2 cups grape tomatoes
1 large red onion, quartered 
1 red bell pepper, chunked 
2 bulbs garlic 
2 tbsp olive oil
2 tbsp tomato paste
1 tsp oregano
1 tsp thyme
3 tbsp fresh basil (more or less depending on desired potency)
1 cup vegetable broth 
1 cup heavy cream
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 cup parmesan cheese
salt to taste 
pepper to taste

On a baking sheet, add tomatoes, onion, red pepper and bulbs of garlic. Drizzle with olive oil, salt, pepper, oregano and thyme (or of course my back 9 seasonings) Roast at 400F for 35-40 minutes. Remove from oven and place in blender (don't forget all the juices on the baking sheet). If you have an immersion blender that also works. Squeeze garlic out of bulbs. Add basil and blend to your desired consistency. Pour into a large pot on medium heat. Add vegetable broth, heavy cream, tomato paste, sugar, parmesan cheese. Stir and reduce to simmer once bubbling. Simmer for 15 minutes. Serve.

#cooking #recipe #food #dinner #dinnerideas #husbandandwife
summary: Roasted tomato basil soup recipe with fresh vegetables, cream, and parmesan.

caption:
Get my meal plan for weight loss and most popular recipes. Link in bio ❤️

TRYING THE VIRAL CARROT WRAPS! 🥕 

I saw this low calorie tortilla wrap and had to make it! I think @soufiane.haloui first made it!☺️

This is an easy tortilla or wrap hack that's low calorie and super delicious! 🤤 

Ingredients: 
3 large carrots 
2 eggs 
1/2 cup mozzarella cheese 
Onion powder 
Garlic powder 
Salt & pepper 

Directions: 
1. In a medium sized bowl, grate your carrots.
2. Squeeze the shredded carrots to get the excess juice out. 
3. Add your eggs, mozzarella cheese, and seasonings and mix until it's well combined. 
4. Divide it into 4 parts and place onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. 
5. Flatten it into the shape of a circle. 
6. Bake at 375F for 20-25 minutes. 
7. Let it cool for 10 minutes, add your favorite toppings, and enjoy! 

You guys… it's super easy to make and it's honestly worth all the hype!! It's so good! 🥰
summary: A viral low-calorie carrot and egg wrap recipe that uses grated carrots, eggs, and cheese baked into tortilla-like wraps.

caption:
Say "YUM" if you would eat these Healthy Blueberry Bagels 🥯🫐😋

What you need: 
3/4 cup Greek yogurt 
3/4 cup almond flour
1/4 cup blueberries
2 tsp baking powder 

How to make them: 
1. Combine your almond flour & baking powder.
2. Mix with your yogurt until a dough forms. Add extra almond flour as needed until firm. 
3. Mix your blueberries into the dough, roll into a log, slice & shape into bagels.
4. Air fry @ 350F for 8-10 mins (or bake for 20). Take them out & enjoy!

Pro tip: One way to really improve the texture of these without taking the carbs too high, is to mix in 2-4 tbsp white flour. Just a little bit of regular flour goes a long way!
summary: A keto-friendly blueberry bagel recipe using Greek yogurt and almond flour, made in an air fryer.

caption:
3 Chicken Marinades - perfect for meal prep and Ramadan prep! 

I usually prepare around 600g of chicken to serve 4 people, each getting at least 35g of protein per serving. I usually split this into 6 bags with 300g of chicken per bag, perfect for serving 2 people each. You can adjust based on how many you're prepping for.

*best to use full fat Greek yoghurt or labneh/strained yoghurt, as this releases the least amount of liquid (whey) when defrosting*

Pepe's Style Chicken:

* 600g chicken breast or thighs
* 2 tbsp yogurt
* 2 tsp garlic ginger paste
* 1 tbsp oil 
* Juice of 1/2 lemon
* 1.5 tbsp tomato puree
* 2 tsp red Kashmiri chili powder*
* 1 tsp paprika
* 1 tsp onion powder
* 1 tsp ground cumin
* 1 tsp ground coriander
* 1 tsp oregano
* 1 tsp salt (or to taste)

Greek Chicken:

* 600g chicken breast or thighs
* 4 tbsp olive oil
* 2 tbsp yogurt
* 2 tsp garlic paste (or 4 cloves)
* Juice of 1 lemon
* 2 tsp oregano
* 1 tsp paprika
* 1 tsp salt (or to taste)
* 1/2 tsp black pepper
* 1 tsp garlic granules (optional)

Hariyali Chicken Tikka:

* 600g chicken breast or thighs
* 3 tbsp yogurt
* 1 cup fresh coriander
* 8-9 fresh mint leaves
* 1-2 green chilies**
* 3 cloves garlic
* Juice of 1/2 lemon
* 1 tsp ground cumin
* 1 tsp ground coriander
* 1 tsp salt (or to taste)

I marinate the chicken for 6 hours or overnight in the fridge, for maximum flavour, then freeze them flat for easy defrosting later. To defrost just place at room temperature for 2 hours or overnight in the fridge. When it's time to cook, you can pan-fry, air-fry or oven-bake. My favorite combos:

* Hariyali Chicken Tikka on naan or either rice and raita/salad or in a wrap.
* Pepe's Style Chicken in a rice bowl with garlic sauce, or a wrap.
* Greek Chicken goes with just about anything - skewers over rice, on naan, in a wrap or stuffed in a pita.

*Note: Kashmiri chili powder is mild but gives great color. If using regular chili powder, cut it to 1 tsp
**Adjust the number of green chilies based on your spice tolerance!
.
.#mealprep #ramadanprep #ramadanrecipes #easyrecipe
summary: Three chicken marinade recipes for meal prep and Ramadan preparation with serving suggestions and freezing instructions.

caption:
CRISPY GLAZED TOFU 😋 
If you don't like tofu, you just have to prepare it differently! So here are a few easy hacks PLUS my favorite tofu recipe EVER.🤭
RECIPE easy, quick, glazed tofu (2 servings, 30min prep time):
-200g (1 block) tofu
Tear into chunks and boil in salted water for 10mins.
Then drain and let it steam-dry for 3-5mins.
-1 Tbsp corn starch
-1 Tsp chicken spice
Toss the tofu in there and either pan-fry in oil on medium heat until crispy or spray with oil and air fry for 12mins at 190C (I prefer the pan option).
Glaze:
-2 Tbsp soy sauce
-1 Tsp gochujang
-1 Tbsp vinegar
-1 Tbsp agave
Mix everything in a pan and heat up until thickened.
Add the sauce to the tofu, shake well and enjoy. 😊 
-
CRISPY GLAZED TOFU 😋 
Wenn du Tofu nicht magst, musst du ihn einfach anders zubereiten! Hier kommen ein paar einfache Hacks PLUS mein allerliebstes Tofu-Rezept.🤭
REZEPT einfacher, schneller, glasierter Tofu (2 Portionen, 30 Min. Zubereitungszeit):
-200g (1 Block) Tofu
In Stücke reißen und 10 Min. in gesalzenem Wasser kochen.
Dann abgießen und 3–5 Min. abdampfen lassen.
-1 EL Speisestärke
-1 TL Hähnchengewürz
Den Tofu darin wenden und entweder in Öl bei mittlerer Hitze in der Pfanne knusprig braten oder mit Öl besprühen und 12 Min. bei 190°C in der Heißluftfritteuse backen (ich bevorzuge die Pfanne).
Glasur:
-2 EL Sojasauce
-1 TL Gochujang
-1 EL Essig
-1 EL Agavendicksaft
Alles in einer Pfanne vermischen und erhitzen, bis es eindickt.
Die Sauce zum Tofu geben, gut durchschwenken und genießen. 😊
summary: A crispy glazed tofu recipe with gochujang sauce, pan-fried or air-fried, ready in 30 minutes.

caption:
Greek Salad Cottage Cheese Flatbreads

Serves: 2–4 | Difficulty: Easy | Active Time: ~20 minutes

Ingredients

2 flatbreads or naan

Cottage Cheese Base

½ cup cottage cheese

½ cup plain Greek yogurt

½ cup crumbled feta (plus more for garnish)

1 clove garlic, minced

1 tbsp capers, chopped

Salt & black pepper, to taste

Salad Topping

1 English cucumber, sliced or diced

1 yellow bell pepper, diced

1 tomato, diced

⅛ cup Kalamata olives, chopped

Fresh dill, minced

Cooked chicken breast, sliced (optional)

Vinaigrette

1 tsp extra virgin olive oil

1 tsp red wine vinegar

¼ tsp dried oregano

Instructions

Bake flatbreads: Heat oven to 450°F (232°C). Bake flatbreads 8–10 minutes until lightly crisp.

Make base: Mix cottage cheese, Greek yogurt, half the feta, garlic, capers, salt, and pepper.

Prepare salad: Toss vegetables with olive oil, vinegar, oregano, dill, salt, and pepper.

Assemble: Spread cheese mixture on flatbreads. Top with salad and optional chicken.

Serve: Garnish with remaining feta and herbs. Slice and serve.
