caption:
EP - 2 - Kurkuri Baked Bhindi (Okra)
Indian Cooking in the Oven.

1. Bhindi - 500 g
2. Besan (Gram Flour) - 4 tbsp
3. Rice Flour - 3 tbsp
4. Kashmiri Chili Powder (Mild) - 2 tsp
5. Amchur (Dry Mango Powder) - 2 tsp
6. Turmeric Powder - 1 tsp
7. Saunth (Dry Ginger Powder) - 2 tsp
8. Jeera (Cumin) - 2 tsp
9. Salt - 2 tsp (or to taste)
10. Black Pepper Powder - 2 tsp (or to taste)
11. Onion Powder - 1.5 tbsp /
Or use 1 large finely Chopped Onion.
12. Mustard Oil - 5-6 tsp
13. Chopped Coriander for top.

Procedure -
1. Wash and pat dry Bhindi.
2. Cut them into 1"-2" bite sized pieces.
3. Mix together all the dry masala (no.2 - 11)
4. Mix bhindi with Masala, Oil till evenly coated.
5. Bake in a Pre heated oven at 160°C (Convection) or 170°C (OTG / Air Fryer) for 25-30 mins. Everyone's ovens are different, so keep an eye on it.
Note - If using OTG, bake with both rods and fan on in the middle rack.
7. Add Chopped Coriander on top and serve.

Use this method with any other vegetable and masala mix to make various different sabzi.

[smritisspecial, ARCHstudio, Kitchen, Oven, Baking, Indian Cooking, Oven Cooking, Education, Teaching]
summary: Baked bhindi (okra) recipe with gram flour and spices, cooked in an oven or air fryer.

caption:
ROASTED BROCCOLI & CHICKPEA SALAD WITH TAHINI-PARMESAN DRESSING! SO many remakes of this ☝️ Reminding you that this salad exists & it is flavorful & super easy to make 👊 Perfect for summer or fall!!
•
For the broccoli & salad:
2 large heads broccoli, chopped
2 1/2 tbsp olive oil
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp garlic powder
1/2 tsp dried oregano 
1/2 cup chopped dates
1/2 cup chopped cashews
1/2 cup chopped cilantro
1/2 cup finely chopped red onion
•
Fore the chickpeas:
1 15-oz can chickpeas, rinsed and drained 
1/2 tbsp olive oil 
1/2 tbsp maple syrup 
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp paprika
•
For the dressing: 
6 tbsp tahini
1/4 cup grated Parmesan
1/2 tbsp maple syrup
1/4 tsp salt, or more to taste 
Pepper to taste 
Juice of 1 lemon
1 clove minced garlic
3-4 tbsp water
•
1️⃣Preheat the oven to 425. Add a large sheet pan to the oven while it preheats. 2️⃣Add the broccoli to the sheet pan, add the olive oil, salt, garlic powder and oregano and toss to coat. Place it in the oven for 25-30 minutes, tossing halfway. 2️⃣Place the chickpeas on a parchment lined sheet pan and place in the oven to dry roast for 10 minutes. Remove them from the oven, add the oil, salt, paprika and maple syrup and toss to coat. Place them back in the oven for 8-10 minutes. 3️⃣Make the dressing. Add the tahini, Parmesan, maple syrup, salt, pepper, lemon juice, garlic and water. Mix until smooth. 4️⃣ Add the broccoli, dates, onion, cashews and cilantro to a large bowl. Add a few spoonfuls of dressing then toss to combine. 5️⃣Add the chickpeas and more dressing and toss to combine. 
•

caption:
Broccoli mac and cheese✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order now! Link in bio 🤍.

▪️12 oz. Medium Shell Pasta▪️4 Tbsp Butter▪️1/4 Cup Flour▪️4 Cups Whole Milk▪️2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1 tsp Black Pepper▪️1 Dash Cayenne Pepper (optional)▪️1/2 tsp Garlic Powder▪️1/2 tsp Mustard Powder▪️1/2 tsp Paprika▪️1 lb. Broccoli Florets (6 Cups), roughly chopped▪️2 Cups Sharp Cheddar Cheese▪️

1️⃣ Bring a pot of generously salted water to a boil. Boil the pasta 2 minutes less than the package directions (because it will finish cooking in the sauce), then drain. 
2️⃣ Meanwhile, in a pot preheated over medium heat, melt the butter and then add the flour. Cook the flour while whisking constantly for 1 minute, then start gradually adding the milk 1 cup at a time, whisking so that the milk gets fully incorporated before adding more.
3️⃣ Once all of the milk is added, turn the heat up to medium high and continue whisking until the white sauce starts to bubble and thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon (3-5 mins). Add the kosher salt, pepper, cayenne, mustard powder, garlic powder, and paprika.
4️⃣ Add the broccoli and cook for 3-5 minutes, stirring often, until the broccoli is almost tender. Add the pasta and cheddar cheese and cook for about 2 more minutes, stirring often, until the pasta is your desired tenderness. Enjoy!

⏲20 minute total prep + cook time

Recipe serves 4
summary: A 20-minute broccoli mac and cheese recipe made with a from-scratch cheese sauce and pasta.

🌟 Cutlets Ingredients:
1. 1/2 cup boiled black-eyed beans
2. 1 cup cooked quinoa
3. 1 cup mixed veggies (onions, carrots, cabbage, bell peppers)
4. Crushed ginger, garlic, and green chilies
5. 3-4 tbsp roasted gram flour
6. Spices (salt, red chili powder, chaat masala, roasted cumin powder, garam masala)

🌟 Instructions:
1. Mash black-eyed beans and mix with quinoa, veggies, spices, and gram flour.
2. Shape into cutlets, coat with oats, and air fry at 190°C for 15 minutes.

🌟 Tzatziki Dip Recipe:

🌟 Ingredients:
1. 150g Greek yogurt
2. 1/2 cup grated cucumber
3. 1/4 cup chopped fresh mint/coriender
4. 1 clove garlic, minced
5. 1 lemon zest 
6. Salt, to taste
7.Black pepper powder 

🌟 Instructions:
1. Mix all ingredients and refrigerate until serving.

caption:
SWEETS & BEETS SALAD WITH LEMON-FETA DRESSING! Simple, fresh & delish 👌
•
For the sweet potatoes and beets:
¾ lb. beets, trimmed/peeled/sliced into 6 pieces
2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled, halved then sliced into thirds 
3 tbsp olive oil, divided
1 tsp salt, divided
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp dried thyme 
•
For the dressing:
½  cup feta cheese 
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tbsp lemon juice 
1/2 tbsp honey 
1 tsp lemon zest
Fresh black pepper to taste 
•
For the salad:
1 15-oz can white beans 
1/2 cup chopped cilantro
1/2 cup chopped parsley 
1/2 cup sunflower seeds 
•
1️⃣Preheat the oven to 425. Line a sheet pan with parchment paper.
2️⃣Add the sweet potatoes and beets to the sheet pan, placing them on separate sides. Drizzle with the olive oil then season with the salt, paprika and thyme. Toss each veggie separately then place in the oven for 35-40 minutes, until tender. 
3️⃣While they roast, make the dressing. Add the feta, olive oil, lemon juice, honey, lemon zest and pepper to a small bowl. Mix to combine and set aside. 
4️⃣Make the salad. Add the veggies, white beans, cilantro, parsley, sunflower seeds and dressing to a medium bowl. Toss to combine.

caption:
Giant garlic bread pizza with sausage, onion & parsley✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order now! Link in bio 🤍.

▪️1 tsp Olive Oil▪️2 Mild Italian Sausages▪️4 Tbsp Salted Butter, room temperature▪️4 Garlic Cloves, finely chopped▪️1 Large Baguette (~12 oz.)▪️1/4 of a Red Onion, sliced thin▪️1 tsp Italian Seasoning▪️2 Tbsp Grated Parmesan Cheese▪️2 Cups Shredded Mozzarella Cheese▪️Chopped fresh Parsley▪️Crushed Red Pepper Flakes or Chili Oil▪️

1️⃣ Preheat the oven to 425F.
2️⃣ Remove the sausage from the casings. In a skillet over medium heat, heat the olive oil and add the sausages. Cook, breaking them into crumbles, until browned and cooked through, 5-7 mins.
3️⃣ In a small bowl, mix together the butter and garlic until combined. 
4️⃣ Cut the baguette in half lengthwise like you would for a sandwich, and spread the garlic butter on the cut sides of the bread. 
5️⃣ Transfer to a large baking sheet. Top with mozzarella, the cooked sausage, sliced red onion, Italian seasoning, and grated parmesan.
6️⃣ Bake 12-15 mins until cheese is melted and the bread is golden brown and crispy on the bottom. 
7️⃣ Sprinkle with chopped parsley and top with crushed red pepper flakes or a drizzle of chili oil. Slice and enjoy!

⏲ 15 minute prep time / 30 minute total time

Recipe serves 4-6
summary: Easy garlic bread pizza recipe with sausage, onion, and parsley that takes 30 minutes total.

caption:
Sabudana Khichdi Recipe💛 - A tapioca based dish that's perfect for children or adults! Only took me 10 minutes to make. 

This dish is so refreshing, light and so fun to eat. Since my granddaughter loves boba so much, I knew I had to get her to try my version of tapioca. 

Comment below if you love tapioca as well and want to try this! 

Ingredients:
* 1 cup sabudana, medium (Tapioca), wash few times and soak it in 3/4 cup of water for at least 4 hours or overnight, drain.  
* 2Tbsp Ghee 
* 1tsp Cumin seeds  
* 1/2 cup Peanuts, dry roasted  
* 2-3 Green chilies, chopped  
* 1 tsp Ginger, chopped  
* 8-10 curry leaves  
* 2Tbspccoconut, grated  
* 2Tbsp Lime juice  
* 1 medium potato, cubed and cooked  
* 2Tbsp Peanuts, ground  
* 1tsp Sugar 
* 1/2 tsp black pepper  
* Salt to taste  
 
Method: 
* Heat ghee, add cumin seeds, peanuts , green chilies, ginger, curry patta. Stir 
* Add coconut, lime juice, potatoes.  
* Add drained sago(tapioca), stir  
* Add ground peanuts, stir 
* Add salt, sugar and black pepper  
* Mix lightly, cover and cook on medium heat until sago pearls are transparent, about 2 minutes  
* Garnish with cilantro and coconut.

caption:
HIGH PROTEIN CHICKEN ENCHILADA BAKE

This is an easy high protein meal you can pop in the oven for easy meals. This packs 42g protein a serving as is. Save time by using frozen vegetables and leftover chicken, or use fresh, up to you. And to make it more substantial and higher protein, you can  even add rice, quinoa, or pasta to the mix. You can also use my low carb @kaizenfoodco pasta or rice for 20g more protein a serving, though its perfect without.

The ingredients: 
-1 tbsp avocado oil
-1 finely diced yellow onion
-1.5 heaping cups finely chopped broccoli
-1 to 2 cups chopped baby spinach
-2 cups pre-cooked or rostisserie chicken
-15oz red enchilada sauce 
-3/4 cups plain Greek yogurt
-1 to 2 cups shredded Mexican cheese blend
-1 tsp chili powder
-salt & pepper to taste
-Optional garnish: sour cream, avocado, cilantro, green onion, jalapeño 

Directions:

1. Preheat your oven to 400F.

2. Heat an oven-safe skillet over medium heat and drizzle with oil. Add the chopped onion & broccoli. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3-4 mins to let the veggies soften. If the veggies appear too dry, add a splash of water or chicken broth.

3. Toss in the chopped spinach, salt, pepper, chili powder, and pre-cooked chicken. 

4. Transfer chicken and veggie mixture to a casserole dish. 

5. In a bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt and enchilada sauce, then pour over casserole dish. Top with 1 to 2 cups cheese. I went lighter, but you can always add however much you want.

6. Pop in the oven for 10–15 mins and cheese is nice and bubbly.

7. Let rest for 5 mins, top with cilantro, avocado, sour cream or yogurt, and jalapeño.

ENJOY!!
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #keto #lowcarbrecipes #healthyrecipes
summary: A high-protein chicken enchilada bake made with Greek yogurt, vegetables, and cheese that delivers 42g protein per serving.

caption:

Is this the best way to make cauliflower? 👀

RECIPE (2-3 servings, 1h prep time):

Then let it steam dry while making the marinade.
Marinade:
-4 Tbsp unsweetened vegan yogurt

-1 Tsp each garam masala, cumin, ground coriander

-salt to taste 
-1 Tbsp oil

-1/2 Tsp chili powder
-1 Tsp maple syrup
-4 Tbsp vegan yogurt

This Asian-style crispy paneer & rice salad is crunchy, spicy, and creamy and perfect for a quick healthy meal that doesn't compromise on flavor. 🫶🏼

Full recipe ⬇️
Asian Style Crispy Rice and Paneer Salad
(Makes 3 servings - 320 kcal | 11.5g Protein | 30g Carbs | 14.5g Fat per Serving)
Ingredients
	•	1 cup cooked rice
	•	100g paneer (crumbled) or firm tofu (crumbled)
	•	1 tsp Kashmiri chili powder
	•	1 tsp soy sauce
	•	Salt – to taste
	•	Oil spray
	•	½ cup sliced purple cabbage
	•	½ cup shredded purple cabbage
	•	½ cup sliced cucumber
	•	½ cup shredded carrot
	•	½ cup sliced red bell pepper
	•	1 tsp ginger garlic paste
	•	1 tsp chili oil or ½ tsp chili flakes
	•	1 tsp honey
	•	3 tbsp crunchy unsweetened peanut butter
	•	1 tbsp chopped coriander leaves

Method:
	1.	Prepare the crispy base the same way:
	•	Mix rice, paneer or tofu, Kashmiri chili powder, salt, and soy sauce.
	•	Spread on a tray, spray oil, and air fry or bake until golden and crispy - bake at 180 C for 25-30 mins or air fry at 200 C for 12-14 mins. 
	•	Crumble after cooling.
	2.	Assemble the jar:
	•	Layer all the veggies, ginger garlic paste, chili oil, honey, peanut butter, and coriander.
	•	Close the lid and shake well.

caption:

Made this in my trusted cast iron pan from @arth_cookware and honestly, there's something about the cast iron cookware which makes this dish so much better.

Kerala Style Tawa Chicken Roast
Makes 4 servings - 320 kcal | 28g protein | 12g fat | 8g carbs per Serving

✅ Ingredients:
	•	1 tbsp coconut oil
	•	2 tsp fennel seeds
	•	2 large onions, sliced
	•	1 sprig curry leaves
	•	2 chopped green chilies
	•	1 tbsp ginger-garlic paste
	•	500g boneless chicken/curry cut, cut small chunks
	•	Salt – to taste
	•	½ tsp turmeric powder
	•	3 tsp Kashmiri chili powder
	•	1 tsp garam masala
	•	1 tsp pepper powder
	•	1.5 tbsp coriander powder
	•	1 large tomato, sliced
	•	Fresh coriander leaves, chopped (for garnish)
	•	Lemon – 1 wedge

✅ Method:
	1.	Heat coconut oil in a cast iron tawa.
	2.	Add fennel seeds and let it splutter.
	3.	Add sliced onions, curry leaves, green chilies, and ginger-garlic paste → sauté until golden brown.
	4.	Add boneless chicken and salt → cook for 5 mins until golden brown.
	5.	Add turmeric, Kashmiri chili powder, garam masala, pepper powder, coriander powder → cook until well combined and brown.
	6.	Add sliced tomato, mash gently and mix well → cook until soft and integrated.
	7.	Check seasoning → finish with chopped coriander leaves + squeeze of lemon juice.
	8.	Serve hot with rice or roti.

caption:
Chicken Bhunna

Ingredients:
1/3-1/2 cup oil 
1 tsp cumin seeds 
1/2 red onion, finely chopped
1 lb chicken 
1/2 tsp salt
2 tsp ginger and garlic paste
Stage 1 spices: 1/2 tsp ground cumin, 1/2 tsp ground coriander, 1/2 tsp Kashmiri red chili, 1/2 tsp black pepper
5 tomatoes, halved
Stage 2 spices: 1 1/2 tsp coriander, 1 tsp cumin, 1/2 tsp Kashmiri red chili
Stage 3 spices: 1/2 tsp cumin, 1/4-1/2 tsp Kashmiri red chili, 1/2 tsp black pepper 
Garnishes: 1 Serrano chili chopped, julienned ginger, cilantro

Method: 
Let cumin seeds splutter in hot oil then add onions and cook till brown. 
Next add the chicken and sauté till no longer pink, about 3-4 mins, then add salt and ginger garlic paste. 

Add your first set of spices, then add all the tomato halves skin side up, add a little water about 1/4 cup and cover to cook on low to medium heat for 10 mins. 

After 10 mins, remove the lid and peel the tomato skin (it should come right off). With a spatula mash down the tomatoes and cook covered for another 10 minutes on medium heat. 

After 10 mins, your curry should look quite liquidy. At this point add your Stage 2 spices and cook the curry on high heat. This will evaporate the excess liquid and separate the oil. 

Once the oil starts to separate (can take 10-15 mins), add your stage 3 spices (adjust for heat!) and fry the curry on low to medium heat for 5-6 mins. Then lower your heat, add the garnishes and cover the pan for another 3-4 mins.

Serve with naan, roti or rice. 

#curry #chickencurry #chickendish
summary: A detailed recipe for chicken bhunna, an Indian curry made with chicken, tomatoes, and aromatic spices cooked in stages.

caption:
Sheet Pan Chicken Kefta Wraps 🔥

Find the full recipe on my free recipe app "Osta Recipes" on the App Store or Google Play store ‼️

Comment "Recipe" and I'll send you the  full recipe card for free!!

Inspo from the recipe king: @cheffinwithzach 

For the Chicken Kefta:
-1.5–2 lbs ground chicken (700-900 g)
-2 tbsp tomato paste
-8 garlic cloves, minced
-2 tsp smoked paprika, 2 tsp cumin, 2 tsp salt, 2 tsp black pepper, 1 tsp turmeric, 2 tsp garlic powder
-1/3 cup fresh parsley, chopped
-1/3 cup fresh cilantro, chopped (optional)
-1 large or 2 medium yellow onions, grated + squeezed dry*
-On top before baking: 4 tbsp olive oil
For the Roasted Garlic:
-2 garlic heads, 1 tbsp olive oil and 1 tsp salt
For the Fresh Salad:
-1/2 large red onion, thinly sliced
-1 cup cherry tomatoes, quartered
-1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
-1 tsp salt, 1 tsp pepper & 2 tsp sumac
-Juice of 1/2 lemon
Roasted Garlic Paprika Sauce:
-Roasted garlic cloves, 1/4 cup mayo, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, juice of 1/2 lemon, 1 tsp paprika + 1 tsp pepper

1. Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Slice the tops off two garlic heads, drizzle with olive oil and salt, wrap in foil, and roast for 45–60 minutes until golden and soft. While the garlic roasts, prep the kefta.
2. Grate the onion, squeeze out all liquid with paper towel or cheesecloth. (This prevents watery kefta.) In a large bowl, combine chicken, tomato paste, minced garlic, spices, parsley, cilantro (if using), and the grated onion. Mix with your hands for 2–3 minutes until sticky and well combined.
3. Spread onto the sheet pan in a 1/2-inch (1.25 cm) thick rectangle. With a knife, score into 1-inch strips (2.5 cm). Drizzle evenly with 4 tbsp olive oil.
4. Bake for 12–15 minutes, then broil 2–5 minutes until golden and slightly crisp on top.
5. While baking, toss onion, tomatoes, parsley, salt, pepper, sumac, and lemon juice in a bowl.
6. Squeeze roasted garlic cloves into a bowl, mash, then mix with mayo, yogurt, lemon juice, paprika, and pepper until smooth.
7. On lavash or pita, slather sauce, add 1–2 strips of chicken kefta, top with salad. Roll tight. For extra magic, crisp the wrap in a lightly oiled skillet for 1-2 mins per side.
summary: Sheet pan chicken kefta wraps with roasted garlic sauce and fresh salad, served in lavash or pita bread.

caption:
HEALTHY GREEK CHICKEN & RICE BOWL

I've lost over 120lbs eating high-protein, low-carb meals like this, so I know what it's like to want healthy food that tastes GOOD! After you make this, you'll realize eating healthy can taste amazing and still be super filling.

I made this one extra high protein and low carb with my @kaizenfoodco rice, but you can use regular rice, quinoa, cauliflower rice, or brown rice depending on your own goals.

Here's how I made it:

1️⃣ Add 2 lb boneless chicken thighs to a bowl. Mix with 2 tbsp Greek yogurt, 1 tbsp olive oil, juice and zest of 1 lemon, 3 minced garlic cloves, 1 tbsp oregano, 1 tsp sweet paprika, 1 tsp garlic powder, salt and pepper. Cover and marinate at least 2 hrs or overnight if you can.

2️⃣ Heat a pan over medium with 1/2 tbsp olive oil. Cook chicken about 4-5 minutes per side with the lid on then flip back and forth 1–2 minutes each side until cooked through.

3️⃣ Make a quick Greek salad by finely dicing 1-2 Persian cucumbers, 1 green bell pepper, and 1/2 red onion. Add a small handful of quartered cherry tomatoes, 2 tbsp chopped Kalamata olives and 1 oz crumbled feta. Toss with 1-2 tbsp olive oil, juice of 1 lemon or small splash of red wine vinegar, a small pinch oregano, salt, pepper, and a handful of chopped flat-leaf parsley.

4️⃣ For the tzatziki, grate 1 cucumber and squeeze out liquid (optional). Mix with 1 cup Greek yogurt, 1 tbsp olive oil, juice of 1/2 lemon, 1 grated garlic clove, 2 tbsp fresh dill, salt and pepper until creamy.

5️⃣ Cook or prep your base. I cooked up my Kaizen lowcarb rice, or make your rice of choice.

6️⃣ Assemble the bowl: rice on the bottom, 4-5oz chicken, a big scoop of the Greek salad, and a generous dollop of tzatziki. Sprinkle extra parsley or dill to finish.

If you make it, be sure to let me know what you think on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY! 🙌

#lowcarb #keto #lowcarbrecipes #healthyrecipes #mediterraneanfood
summary: A low-carb Greek chicken and rice bowl with marinated chicken thighs, Greek salad, and tzatziki sauce.

caption:
Pan con tomate avocado toast✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order now. Link in bio 🤍.

▪️1 Baguette▪️3 Tbsp Olive Oil, divided▪️3 Ripe Tomatoes (~ 1 lb.), sliced in half▪️1 Small Garlic Clove, grated or minced (use half if you prefer it milder)▪️1/4 tsp Kosher Salt (or more to taste) ▪️1/4 tsp Freshly Ground Black Pepper ▪️2 Ripe Avocados, sliced ▪️Microgreens, for garnish (optional)▪️Flaky Salt▪️

1️⃣ Preheat the oven to 425F. Slice the baguette in half lengthwise, then cut each half into 3-inch pieces. Place cut-side up on a baking sheet, drizzle lightly with 1 Tbsp olive oil, and toast for 8-10 mins until golden and crisp.
2️⃣ Using the coarse side of a box grater set over a bowl, grate the cut side of the tomatoes until only the skin remains (discard skin). You'll end up with a fresh tomato pulp. If it looks very watery, tilt the bowl and spoon off a bit of liquid, but don't drain fully, you want it juicy. Stir in the remaining 2 Tbsp olive oil, garlic, kosher salt, and black pepper. Taste and adjust seasoning if desired.
3️⃣ Spread a spoonful of the tomato mixture over each piece of toasted baguette. Top with sliced avocado and microgreens, if using. Sprinkle with flaky salt and enjoy!

⏲10 minute prep time / 25 minute total time

Recipe serves 4-6

Get all my recipes delivered to your inbox each week, complete with printable PDFs, when you subscribe to my newsletter (link in bio) 😘
summary: A Spanish-inspired pan con tomate avocado toast recipe with fresh tomato pulp, avocado, and crispy baguette.

caption:
AVIAL
A delicious mix of vegetables, the Avial is simply one of the most healthiest dish. So easy to make too. Whether it is for Onam or regular days, this dish is a must try . It is a great side dish and your family is sure to enjoy it👍🏻 If making for Onam Pooja, you can skip shallots. Adjust spice as per taste. There is no tempering in Avial. Just drizzle coconut oil and switch off. 
Vegetables you can use:
Drumstick
Yellow Pumpkin 
Ash Gourd
Carrot
Beans
Yam
Raw Banana
Brinjal
Potato
1 green chilli 
1/8 tsp turmeric powder
Salt to taste
1/2 cup whisked curd
2-3 tsp coconut oil
1 sprig curry leaves
To grind:
1/2 cup coconut(adjust as per taste)
1-2 green chilli

caption:
BismiLlah. DAY 26 - KEEMA CURRY 

🌸 30 DAYS OF EASY & DELISH 🌸 

Ghee 
1 kg lamb mince 
3 medium onions chopped finely
1 bulb garlic crushed
1 large 2 inch piece ginger grated
6 small bay leaves 
8 green cardamoms 
6 cloves 
2 cinnamon sticks 2 inches each
1 tsp cumin seeds
2 tsp salt or to taste 
1.5 tbsp tomato puree 
2.5 tsp bassar masala
2 tsp kashmiri chilli powder 
1 tsp freshly ground black pepper 
2 tsp freshly ground coriander powder
1.5 tsp freshly ground cumin powder 
1 tsp paprika 
1 tbsp kasuri methi
350g tomato passata 
300 ml to 500 ml water 
3-4 small potatoes, peeled and cubed to preference 

Method:
- Heat a good amount of ghee in a pan and add in the whole spices. Saute for 30 seconds on medium low heat or until the aroma releases. 
- Add the ginger, garlic and chillies and saute for 30 seconds, stirring continuously. 
- Add the onions and salt. Saute on medium low heat until soft and golden. This can take between 10 to 15 mins. Add splashes of water if needed. 
- Turn the heat to medium and pour in the spices, tomato puree, 1 tbsp of ghee and a splash of water. Stir well and cook on medium low, stirring frequently, until the oil separates from the masala. 
- Add the lamb mince and break it up. Cook on medium high for about 8 minutes, stirring frequently. The oil should release and we are almost stir frying the mince. 
- Once the mince has changed colour and sauted for this time, pour in the passata, kasuri methi and fresh coriander. Mix everything thoroughly and continue to cook on high 5 mins stirring frequently. 
- Cover and simmer for 10 mins. 
- Uncover and at this point, if you like softer potatoes, add them, mix well and cook on medium high for 5 mins stirring frequently. If you like firmer potatoes, add them 20 mins before the end of the final simmer time. 
- Pour in the water, bring to a boil, then cover and simmer on low for 30 mins. If you want the curry more saucier, add 500ml water, if you want a more bhuna style keema, add 300ml water. 

#keemacurry #alookeema
summary: Detailed recipe for keema curry with lamb mince, potatoes, and aromatic spices cooked in ghee.

caption:
Rose's CRISPIEST roasted potatoes 🥔✨ 

My husband is obsessed with these—especially when they're hot and fresh! He couldn't resist sneaking into the kitchen to grab a taste.

Be sure to follow @rosereisman for more recipe inspo!

INGREDIENTS
2 ½ lb Yukon gold potatoes (unpeeled)
½ tsp baking soda
2 tsp salt
¼ cup olive oil
Your favourite seasoning

INSTRUCTIONS
1. Cut potatoes into large chunks. Add to boiling water with baking soda and salt. Bring back to a boil and cook for about 10 minutes, just until fork-tender but still slightly firm.
2. Drain and return to the pot. Drizzle with olive oil and toss with your favourite seasoning.
3. Spread evenly on a parchment-lined baking sheet and roast at 425°F for about 30 minutes, turning occasionally, until golden and crispy.

Enjoy! I bet you won't be able to stop at just one! 😋
summary: Rose Reisman's recipe for crispy roasted potatoes using baking soda and high-heat roasting.

caption:
Besties Series Episode 3! Creamy French Onion White Beans 😋This is one of the best recipes I've ever posted! You have to make this!!!

Ingredients 
3 large yellow onions, sliced
3 large sprigs fresh thyme
½ cup sun dried tomatoes chopped with oil saved 
1 tsp sea salt
1 tsp ground black pepper
1 tbsp smoked paprika
1 head garlic
½ cup coconut milk
2 (15oz) cans white beans such as cannellini, drained 
1 cup fresh parsley, chopped
1 tbsp sherry vinegar

Garnish
fresh thyme or chives, chopped 

1. Preheat the oven to 400F. Add the onions, fresh thyme leaves, sun dried tomatoes, salt, pepper and paprika, to an oven safe dish and toss to combine well.

2. Slice off the top of the garlic head and place it in the middle of the onions. Drizzle the entire dish with the leftover sun dried tomato oil, cover and bake for for 45mins, tossing halfway through. 

3. Remove the pan from the oven and squeeze out the garlic gloves, using tongs to avoid burning your hands. Add the coconut milk, beans, parsley, and sherry vinegar and gently toss to combine. 

4. Return the pan to the oven and bake for 15 more mintues until the beans are warmed through and the sauce is creamy, Enjoy!

caption:
Over 900+ healthiER recipes to satisfy your cravings. 🫰🏼
And to keep BOTH your body & mind happy. 

Air-Fried Chili Garlic Potatoes
(Makes 3 servings of approx 225 g each ~ 252 kcal | 4.3g protein | 49.5g carbs | 4.7g fat per Serving)

Ingredients
For the crispy potatoes:
	•	4 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into batons
	•	2.5 tbsp arrowroot powder or cornstarch
	•	½ tsp aromat powder
	•	Salt & pepper to taste
	•	A pinch of baking soda or baking powder
	•	Oil spray

For the chili garlic sauce:
	•	1 tsp oil (or just spray)
	•	6–8 garlic cloves, finely chopped
	•	1 small onion, finely chopped
	•	1 green chili, finely chopped
	•	1 tsp Kashmiri chili powder
	•	½ tsp chili flakes
	•	½ vegetable stock cube 
	•	2 tbsp tomato puree
	•	Salt to taste
	•	2–3 tbsp water (as needed to loosen the sauce)
	•	1 tsp vinegar
	•	1.5 tsp honey (or any sweetener of choice)
	•	1 tsp light butter
	•	Optional: 1 tsp chili oil

To finish:
	•	Chopped spring onion greens
	•	Sesame seeds

Method:
	1.	Peel and cut the potatoes into even batons. Soak them in water for at least 1 hour to remove excess starch. Then drain and pat dry completely using a towel.
	2.	Toss the dried potato batons with arrowroot/cornstarch, aromat, salt, pepper, and a pinch of baking soda/powder. Spread out on a greased airfryer tray, spray with oil, and airfry at 180°C for 8 minutes.
Then spray again, increase to 200°C, and airfry for another 7–8 minutes or until golden and crisp.
	3.	In a nonstick pan, heat a little oil or use a few sprays. Add chopped garlic, onion, and green chili. Sauté until translucent.
Add Kashmiri chili powder, chili flakes, crushed stock cube, tomato puree, and salt. Stir and cook for a couple of minutes.
Add water to loosen the sauce if needed. Then add vinegar, honey, and light butter. Optionally stir in some chili oil. Let it simmer until slightly thickened and glossy.
	4.	Add the hot airfried potatoes into the pan and toss to coat evenly with the sauce.
	5.	Finish with chopped spring onion greens and sesame seeds. Serve hot!

.
(sustainable weight loss, healthy comfort food, easy Indian fusion recipe, healthy cheat meal, air fryer snacks, diet friendly recipe)
summary: Air-fried chili garlic potatoes recipe with detailed nutritional information and step-by-step instructions.

caption:
43 g of Protein in this Spaghetti a la Jugaad 🤓
Full recipe ⬇️

Creamy Tomato Sauce Spaghetti
(Makes 2 Servings - 465 kcal | 43g protein | 49g carbs | 11g fat per serving)

Ingredients
	•	Oil spray – 3g (few sprays)
	•	Tomatoes – 3 medium (~300g), sliced
	•	Garlic – 4 cloves (~12g)
	•	Salt – to taste
	•	Low-fat paneer – 75g
	•	Stock cube – 1 (veg/chicken as per choice)
	•	Water – ~1 cup (adjust for consistency)
	•	Onion – 1 small (~50g), sliced
	•	Mixed vegetables – 1 cup (~100g: mushrooms, bell peppers, sweet corn, etc.)
	•	Chicken breast – 160g, diced (or swap with tofu/soya/prawns/paneer)
	•	Kashmiri chili powder – ½ tsp
	•	Red chili flakes – 1 tsp
 •  Italian seasoning - 1 tsp
	•	Soy sauce – 1 tsp
	•	Sugar – ½ tsp
	•	Coriander leaves or basil – 2 tbsp, chopped
	•	Boiled Whole wheat spaghetti – 70g uncooked
	•	Grated cheese – 10g
Salt and pepper to taste 
Method
	1.	Spray oil in a pan, add tomatoes, garlic, and a pinch of salt. Roast until soft.
	2.	Peel tomato skins, then blend with paneer, stock cube, and water into a smooth sauce. Set aside.
	3.	In the same pan, spray oil again, sauté onion and mixed vegetables. Add diced chicken and cook until done.
	4.	Stir in the tomato-paneer sauce, season with Kashmiri chili powder, chili flakes, soy sauce, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper and sugar. Let it simmer gently.
	5.	Add coriander or basil. Toss in cooked spaghetti and mix well to coat.
	6.	Finish with grated cheese, serve hot.

.

caption:
CREAMY HIGH PROTEIN TOMATO BASIL SOUP 🍅

Can you believe this whole pot has 79 grams of protein?

If you love a great healthy soup, this is an easy soup recipe you can make at home that's so easy and so good. You can divide it into 3, 4, or 5 servings. For 4 BIG bowls, each one has 20g protein with just 230 calories.

To add protein, I used bone broth that has 20g protein on its own, then cottage cheese to make it creamy and smooth while adding another big protein boost. The best part is it's loaded with fresh veggies and flavor, and it tastes so good. It's an easy healthy recipe that's lowcarb and high in protein.

Here is how I made it:

1️⃣ Preheat your oven to 400F.

2️⃣ Add 4.5 pints cherry tomatoes (or about 3lbs of any GOOD tomato) to a large sheet pan. We had lots of tomato in my parents' garden so I used those.

3️⃣ Roughly chop 1 large yellow onion and 1 large bell pepper and add them to the tray.

4️⃣ Smash and peel 6-10 garlic cloves and scatter them across the tray.

5️⃣ Drizzle with 2 tbsp olive oil and sprinkle with 1 tsp onion powder, 1 tsp chili flakes, 1 tsp sweet paprika, salt, and pepper. Toss everything to coat.

6️⃣ Roast at 400F for 60-70 mins until tomatoes are blistered and everything is caramelized.

7️⃣ Transfer the roasted veggies into a blender or large pot. Add 17-20oz  chicken bone broth (I used a full 17oz container of @kettleandfire ) and 3 servings 2% good culture cottage cheese, along with a large handful of fresh basil.

8️⃣ Blend or use an immersion blender until silky smooth. Taste and adjust with more salt, pepper, fresh basil, or chili flakes as needed. Salt is key here to bringing out the flavor, so don't forget it!

9️⃣ Pour into bowls and enjoy hot, or save for meal prep.

For toppings, I like a drizzle of hot sauce, cream, olive oil, extra chili flakes, or fresh basil. 🌿

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!
.
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #souprecipe #healthyrecipes
summary: A creamy high-protein tomato basil soup made with roasted vegetables, bone broth, and cottage cheese—79g protein per pot, 230 calories per serving.

caption:
You'd never guess that the secret to super crispy roasted potatoes is...

Baking soda! Thank you @kenjilopezalt for inspiring this method 🤍

▪️2 lbs. Yukon Gold or Russet Potatoes, peeled and cut in ~1" bite size chunks▪️1/2 tsp Baking Soda▪️3 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️1/2 tsp Garlic Powder▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt ▪️1/2 tsp Pepper▪️3 Tbsp Fresh Parsley, finely chopped▪️

1️⃣ Preheat the oven to 450F.
2️⃣ Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the baking soda and the potatoes. Stir and boil uncovered for 10 minutes (or until a fork penetrates easily) and then drain. 
3️⃣ Place the potatoes in a bowl and add the olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Toss until the potatoes are evenly coated and their surface breaks down into a mashed potato consistency (this is what will crisp up). 
4️⃣ Transfer the potatoes onto a large baking sheet and separate them so they're not touching each other. Bake undisturbed for 20 minutes on the first side (until deep golden brown), then flip and bake for an additional 15-25 mins (depending on the size of the potatoes) until golden brown and crispy on the second side. Sprinkle with fresh parsley and enjoy!

⏲10 minute prep time / 1 hour total time

Recipe serves 4

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order. Link in bio ❤️!
summary: A recipe for extra crispy roasted potatoes using baking soda boiling technique before oven roasting.

caption:
save this Creamy White Bean Corn Dip recipe below! 😋🫘🌽 & share it with someone who loves delicious healthy comfort foods! 💚

dairy free, gluten free, vegan 

2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
1 medium yellow onion, chopped
4 cloves garlic, chopped
1 green bell pepper, diced
1 jalapeno, diced (DON't ADD IF YOU DON'T LIKE SPICE)
1/2 tsp sea salt 
1/4 tsp ground black pepper
3 cups fresh or frozen corn
1 (14oz) can white beans such as cannellini 
1/2 cup plant-based mayo
2 tbsp unsweetened plant-based yogurt
3 tbsp chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, chopped
the juice from 1/2 a lime

For garnish chopped cilantro, 
scallions or green onions, 
avocado, diced 

Tortilla Chips for Serving 

1. Preheat the oven 400° F. Heat the olive oil in an oven safe skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until fragrant, about 5 minutes. Stir in the garlic,green pepper, jalapeno, salt, and pepper. Cook until tender and fragrant, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat. 

2. Add the corn and beans to the skillet and stir to combine. 

3. In a small mixing bowl, stir together the plant-based mayo, yogurt, chopped chipotle peppers and sauce, and lime juice. 

4. Add the sauce into the skillet and stir well to combine. 

5. Bake until warm and bubbly, about 15-20 minutes. Top with cilantro, scallions, and avocado.  Serve with tortilla chips. Enjoy!!

caption:
What my Maa makes me on Sunday. 3 LENTIL DOSA 🌱🥰 

We've been seeing these lentil-based dosas floating around the internet. My favorite is rava dosa, which is also a non-fermented type of dosa compared to its OG cousin. This dosa is all lentil based, doesn't require fermenting and is SO easy to make! Hope you enjoy. 

3 LENTIL DOSA: 
- 1/2 cup masoor dal 
- 1/2 cup urad dal
- 1/2 cup moong dal
- 2 inch piece fresh ginger
- 1 stalk fresh curry leaves
- 3-4 green chilies 
- salt 
- 1/2 two cumin powder 
- 1/2-1 cup water 

1. Thoroughly rinse lentil until water is clear and soak 4/6 hours or overnight. Drain (can't reuse that water) and rinse. 
2. Place in food processor with remaining ingredients. Blend until smooth. 
3. Heat large nonstick skillet and coat with neutral cooking oil. Pour in 1/3 cup batter and swirl into a circle. Cover for 2 mins. 
4. Drizzle sides with oil and cook until edges are golden brown then flip into a half moon shape. 
5. Serve with chutney and potato. 

#lentildosa #dosas #dosa #southindianfood #southindia #masoordal #moongdal #uraddal #lentils #proteinpacked #veganfood #veganism #veganchef #veganlife
summary: Recipe for three-lentil dosa made with masoor, urad, and moong dal that doesn't require fermenting.

caption:
Say "YUM" if you would eat these Crispy Ranch Chicken Thighs 🐔🔥🙌

How to make them:

Toss chicken thighs in melted butter. Add ranch seasoning to the meat side and underneath the skin. Only season the skin with salt, pepper and about 1-2 tsp baking powder per thigh.

Air fry @ 380F for 13 minutes, skin side down. Then flip them and air fry another 12-14 mins. Take them out & enjoy!

Pro tip: I avoid putting seasoning directly on the skin because it tends to burn a little more than I'd prefer in the air fryer 👍

caption:
Crispy Chilli Chicken 🐓 

Ingredients (2 servings):
360g chicken breast
1 egg
2 tbsp cornflour
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp onion powder 
1 tsp paprika
1/2 tsp white pepper 
Salt
1/2 onion
1/2 red pepper
1/2 green pepper 
1/2 red chilli
2 spring onions
1 tsp sesame seeds
Spray oil 

For the sauce:
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp rice vinegar
1 tbsp sweet chilli sauce 
1 tbsp no added sugar ketchup 
1 tsp honey 
2 garlic cloves
1 tsp ginger 
Splash of water

———

Method:

1. Slice the chicken into thin strips. Beat the egg in a bowl, then add the chicken. In another bowl, add the cornflour, garlic powder, paprika and salt. Remove excess egg from the chicken, then coat in seasoned cornflour.
2. Place the chicken in your air fryer, spray with oil, air fry for 12-15 minutes at 200 degrees celcius until golden and crispy.
3. Slice the pepper and onion into strips, slice the chilli, finely grate the garlic and ginger.
4. Fry the peppers and onion for 5 minutes, add the chilli, garlic and ginger, cook for 1 minute. Add all the sauce ingredients, mix well, then bring to a light simmer.
5. Add the crispy chicken, mix until it's fully coated, then garnish with sliced spring onion and sesame seeds. Then enjoy, lovely!

#chinesefood #lowcalorierecipes #familymeals #dinnerideas
summary: Air fryer crispy chilli chicken with peppers and homemade sauce for two servings.

caption:
SUMMERY MEDITERRANEAN SALAD

If you're looking for a delicious, light, refreshing salad, this is one of my favorites. It packs a ton of flavors, textures, and everything just comes together so great here. I love eating cauliflower like this… skip store-bought and just process it finely into snowflakes like this for a great texture. I also have a low carb tabbouleh inspired recipe like this in my cookbook where I use cauliflower, so check it out if you have my cookbook!

The dressing and feta take this to the top, so I hope you give it a try if you're looking for a light healthy salad, or a simple healthy dinner. You can top it with chicken or shrimp for a lighter meal.

Here is how I made it:

1. I started with 1/2 a small cauliflower that I turned into snowflakes in the food processor. Just separate the florets and toss into a food processor. This is key to make it super fine (you want it to be like snowflakes). Dont skip this, and dont use bagged cauli. Add the processed cauliflower  to a bowl.

2.Finely dice or shred 1/2 small purple cabbage. The key here is super fine so you dont have to exert a lot of energy chewing the cabbage, otherwise, it won't work. Add it to a bowl.

3. Finely dice 3 persian or Japanese cucumbers and add them to the bowl with a large bunch of fresh flat parsley super finely chopped, and a large cubed up avocado.

4.To take this to the top, I added 1/3 cup toasted walnuts (pistachios or pine nuts work great, too!), and crumble up about 2oz of fresh feta over everything.

5. Finally, for the dressing, shake together 1/4 cup of a GREAT olive oil, zest & juice of 1 large lemon, 1 tbsp dijon mustard, 1 tsp aleppo pepper or chili flakes, 1 tsp oregano, 1 tsp garlic powder, a couple pinches sea salt, fresh ground pepper.

6.Pour dressing over salad, toss well, taste, and modify however way you want.

If you make it, be sure to let me know what you think on SHREDHAPPENS!

This is a great way to enjoy a healthy salad with lots of Mediterranean flavors. ENJOY!
summary: A summery Mediterranean salad with finely processed cauliflower, purple cabbage, cucumber, avocado, walnuts, feta, and a lemon-olive oil dressing.

caption:
🥕Warm Carrot & Avocado Salad

This is one of those easy salads (or healthy appetizer??) that will make you love eating your veggies. Instead of carrots, you can also use your favorite kind of squash if you're watching carbs, and if you aren't watching carbs too closely, this would also be amazing with sweet potatoes.

You can serve this up as an appetizer, as a warm salad of sorts, or even as your main paired up with shrimp. 

Here is how I made it:

1. Peel 6-8 medium carrots. Cut them into thirds, then cut them again in half. Toss the cut carrots into a bowl.

2.Drizzle them with 2-3 tbsp olive oil and season with a couple generous pinches salt, pepper, 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp oregano, and 1 tsp cumin. Mix and coat everything well.

3.Lay out your carrots on a baking tray or dish and make sure they are not overly crowded. This is important Optional: drizzle with a little more olive oil.

4.Roast in the oven at 400F for 45 mins. Time may vary by oven, so keep an eye. Flip at the end so it roasts on the opposite side for another 5 mins.

5.Make your yogurt feta sauce by mixing 1 cup thick plain yogurt, 2 ounces crumbled feta, 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp Aleppo pepper or chili flakes of choice, and salt. Mix, taste, and adjust to your liking.

6.Spread this sauce on the bottom of a plate and top it with the roasted carrots out of the oven, 1/2 cubed avocado, a handful of finely chopped pistachios for a little crunch, 2 tbsp fresh finely chopped parsley, 1 tbsp fresh finely chopped mint, some more pepper flakes, and squeeze lime juice over everything.

As always, feel free to top with whatever you like. I feel like this the perfect Mediterranean salad, it's so easy, and so good!

If you make it, be sure to let know me on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
#mediterraneanfood #healthyrecipes  #lowcarbrecipes
summary: A warm roasted carrot and avocado salad with yogurt-feta sauce, fresh herbs, and pistachios.

caption:
How I increased the protein ⬇️
1. Using homemade low fat paneer from skim milk
2. Using Amul High Protein Dahi/Epigamia Turbo Greek Yoghurt
Still tasted FANTASTIC. 

And of course , OG recipe is from the bestest @mygardenofrecipes ❤️

High Protein Dahi Shimla Mirch Paneer Sabzi 
(Makes 3 servings ~ 248 kcal | 21 g protein | 12.2 g fat | 14.2 g carbs per serving)

Ingredients
	•	1.5 cups onion, thinly sliced (150g)
	•	1.5 cups capsicum, thinly sliced (150g)
	•	2 tbsp crushed roasted peanuts (20g)
	•	1.5 tsp Kashmiri chili powder
	•	1 tsp amchur powder
	•	1 tsp garam masala
	•	1.5 tsp kasuri methi, crushed
	•	2 tbsp chopped coriander leaves
	•	Salt, to taste
	•	1/2 tbsp oil
	•	1/2 tsp cumin seeds
	•	2 garlic cloves, finely chopped
	•	1 green chili, finely chopped
	•	1 cup (240 g) + 2 tbsp high-protein thick curd/Greek yogurt (~24 g protein) 
	•	160 g grilled low-fat paneer (cubed)
	•	1/2 tsp honey (optional)

⸻

Method
	1.	Mix onion, capsicum, peanuts, chili powder, amchur, garam masala, kasuri methi, coriander, and salt in a bowl. Rest 5 minutes.
	2.	Heat oil in a kadhai, add cumin seeds to crackle.
	3.	Add garlic and green chili. Sauté 1–2 minutes.
	4.	Add onion-capsicum mixture, stir-fry 5–6 minutes until softened.
	5.	Add grilled paneer cubes, toss gently.
	6.	Switch off heat, stir in whisked high-protein curd to prevent curdling. Mix well.
	7.	Taste, adjust seasoning, add honey if you like.
	8.	Garnish with coriander and serve hot.

.

caption:
Pulihora 

a truly special rice dish popular in the south of India. This is an Andhra Pradesh style using toasted sesame seeds. There are a few variations the dish, cumin seeds aren't necessary in all.

Try it out if you haven't already 🫶

Ingredients
2–3 cups cooked day-old rice
3 tbsp sesame seeds
4 tbsp peanuts
150 ml tamarind water
1 tsp mustard seeds
1 tsp cumin seeds
½ tsp turmeric
¼ tsp hing
2–3 dried red chillies
2 green chillies, split in half
1 tbsp urid dal
1 tbsp chana dal
5–6 curry leaves
1 tbsp jaggery
2–3 tbsp oil (gingelly is best)

Directions

1. Toast sesame seeds, then blend or crush them in a mortar and pestle to a coarse powder.

2. Toast peanuts and set aside.

3. Soak tamarind in boiling water for 10–15 minutes.

4. Heat oil in a large pot, add mustard and cumin seeds, then add hing and turmeric.

5. Fry urid and chana dal, then add dried and green chillies. Add curry leaves, let them pop, and fry for a minute.

6. Add soaked tamarind water and jaggery, boiling until syrup-like.

7. Season with salt, add 2 tbsp sesame powder and peanuts, mix with cooked rice, fry briefly, and serve.

#andhrapradesh #rice #outdoors
summary: Recipe for Pulihora, an Andhra Pradesh-style tamarind rice dish with toasted sesame seeds and peanuts.

caption:
Is this cold weather feeling extra brutal ? So many of you made my White Bean Vegetable Soup after I posted on stories and it's been such a hit ! Sharing the recipe below so hit save and make it this weeeek !!

INGREDIENTS: 
1 tbsp oil
2 jalapeños, diced small
1 small white onion, diced small
1 red bell pepper, diced small
1 green bell pepper, diced small
1 zucchini, diced small
2 carrots, peeled and diced small
2 tbsp minced garlic
2 tsp grated ginger
2 tsp salt
2 tsp coriander powder
2 tsp cumin powder
1/4 tsp turmeric powder
3 (14 oz) cans white beans like cannellini, rinsed and drained (I like @jovialfoods )
1 (14 oz) can Fire Roasted Tomatoes like @muirglen 
4 cups Vegetable Broth (I like @bonafideprovisions brand)
1/2 cup pecorino romano, grated
1/4 cup parsley, finely chopped

DIRECTIONS:
Put your Instant Pot on sauté mode & once hot, add the oil then jalapeños.

Cook for 20 seconds & add the onions. Cook until translucent.

Add the rest of the veggies & garlic, ginger, salt, spices & cook for 5 more minutes while stirring.

Toss in beans, broth, tomatoes & hit cancel on the IP. Set to High Pressure & cook for 5 minutes. Let the IP 
Natural Release or open after 10 minutes.

Stir in the pecorino, parsley & enjoy hot! You can add a pinch of red chili flakes on top for more spice or squeeze of lemon! Depending on the brand of your broth, you may need to adjust the salt. Whatever you do...don't skip the pecorino! 

Send this to someone who could use an easy, cozy Instant Pot recipe !!
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
soup recipes, instant pot recipes, white bean soup, vegetable soup recipes, vegetarian recipes

caption:
One-skillet creamy chicken & broccoli orzo✨

This easy dinner is made with whole milk for a creamy, comforting flavor that also helps support your immune system, perfect for keeping you healthy and energized as the weather cools. Hope you love this one! @gonnaneedmilk #gonnaneedmilk #ad

▪️1 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️1 lb. Boneless Skinless Chicken Breasts, cut into bite-size pieces▪️2+1/2 tsp Kosher Salt, divided▪️1/2 tsp Black Pepper▪️2 Tbsp Butter, divided▪️1 Small Yellow Onion, diced small▪️3 Garlic Cloves, finely chopped▪️1 Cup Orzo▪️2+3/4 Cups Whole Milk, divided▪️1/2 Cup Chicken Stock▪️10 oz. Broccoli Crowns, chopped small (4 Cups)▪️1 Tbsp Lemon Juice▪️Freshly Grated Parmesan Cheese, for serving▪️Chopped Fresh Parsley, for serving▪️

1️⃣ In a large skillet over medium heat, heat the olive oil until shimmering. Add the chicken and season with 1 tsp of the salt and all the pepper. Spread the chicken into one layer and let cook undisturbed for 2-3 mins until golden brown, then continue cooking while stirring for 2-3 more mins until cooked through. Transfer into a bowl and set aside.
2️⃣ In the same pan, melt 1 Tbsp of the butter, then add the onion and cook, stirring, until softened (3-5 mins). Stir in the garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
3️⃣ Stir in the orzo and toast for 1 min, then add 2+1/2 cups of the whole milk, the chicken stock, and remaining 1+1/2 tsp salt. Bring to a gentle simmer, stirring often to prevent sticking.
4️⃣ Cook uncovered for 8-10 mins, stirring often, until the orzo is al dente and the liquid has thickened into a creamy sauce. Stir in the chopped broccoli, and cook 4-6 more mins. 
5️⃣ Once the broccoli is tender and the orzo is creamy, stir the cooked chicken back into the pan and let it warm through for 1-2 mins.
6️⃣ Stir in the remaining 1 Tbsp of butter and 1/4 cup of milk. Turn off the heat and stir in the lemon juice.
7️⃣ Serve hot, topped with freshly grated parmesan cheese and chopped fresh parsley. Enjoy!

⏲15 min prep time / 45 min total time

Recipe serves 4
summary: One-skillet creamy chicken and broccoli orzo pasta made with whole milk, ready in 45 minutes.

caption:
Healthy shrimp tacos with cilantro lime Greek yogurt slaw✨

My debut cookbook is here! Preorder now via the link in my bio ❤️

For the Pickled Onions:▪️1/2 of a Red Onion, sliced in thin strips▪️1/2 Cup Distilled White Vinegar▪️1/2 Cup Water▪️1 Tbsp Sugar▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt▪️

For the Sauce + Slaw:▪️3/4 Cup Plain Greek Yogurt▪️1/4 Cup Light Sour Cream▪️3 Tbsp Fresh Cilantro, finely chopped▪️1 Clove Garlic, minced▪️1-2 Limes, juice (to taste)▪️ 2 Tbsp Water▪️1/4 tsp Salt▪️3 Cups Thinly Sliced Red Cabbage▪️

For the Tacos:▪️1 lb. Large Shrimp, peeled and deveined▪️1+1/2 tsp Chili Powder▪️1+1/2 tsp Cumin▪️1/2 tsp Garlic Powder▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️6-8 Cassava Flour Tortillas▪️1 Avocado, sliced▪️1/2 Jalapeño, diced▪️

1️⃣ Make the pickled onions: Place the sliced onions in a heat safe bowl. Add the vinegar, water, sugar, and salt to a small pot and bring to a gentle boil over high heat. Mix and cook until the liquid just starts bubbling, then carefully pour the hot liquid into the bowl with the onions. Let sit at room temp while you prep the other ingredients. (If you can wait an hour, that's best.)
2️⃣ Make the slaw: Mix together all the ingredients for the sauce + slaw *except* the cabbage. Set 1/4 cup of the sauce aside (to serve on top of the tacos), then mix the rest of the sauce with the cabbage.
3️⃣ Make the shrimp: Place the shrimp in a bowl and toss with the chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, and salt. Preheat a large pan over medium high heat and add 1 Tbsp olive oil. Sear the shrimp for 1-2 mins per side until pink and opaque (internal temp should be 145F).
4️⃣ Assemble the tacos: In a clean pan preheated over medium high heat, toast the tortillas for ~30 seconds per side until they have little golden brown spots. (I like to toast the tortillas one at a time before eating each taco so they're super fresh!) Top each tortilla with some slaw, shrimp, pickled onions, jalapeño, a slice of avocado, and yogurt sauce on top - enjoy!

⏲35 minute prep time + 10 minute cook time

Recipe serves 3-4 (makes 6-8 tacos)
summary: Recipe for healthy shrimp tacos with cilantro lime Greek yogurt slaw and pickled onions.

caption:
Beginner and Bachelor friendly Payasam recipe that can be made within 10 minutes. This Rava Payasam needs just 3 basic ingredients. #happyjanmashtami
#ravapayasam #quickpayasam #indiandessert
Rava Payasam by Masterchefmom:
1 cup= 250 ml cup
1/4 cup rava/sooji
1/2 cup sugar( adjust)
3 cup milk (adjust)
1/8 tsp cardamom powder or 3-4 green cardamom( coarsely crushed)
10 saffron strands ( optional)
Dry fruits of your choice 
Some important Chef Tips to make Tasty Rava Payasam:
1. This payasam can be enjoyed hot or cold. However, when you cool it, it will absorb all the extra milk. So, add milk accordingly.
2. You can add jaggery powder instead of sugar after you add water. Allow the jaggery to melt completely. Add the cardamom and saffron and switch off . Once it cools a little, add milk and then heat on low flame for 1 minute and switch off . 
3. You can easily make a Vegan Version by using any plant milk of your choice. You can dry roast the dry fruits and rava.
Even if you have never tried payasam before, do give this recipe a try . Waiting to hear your feedback.
Happy Cooking!
Love,
Masterchefmom
summary: A 10-minute rava payasam recipe with 3 basic ingredients, suitable for beginners and bachelor cooking.

caption:
Life-changing bean and cheese burrito✨

My debut cookbook Maxi's Kitchen is available for pre-order! Link in bio 🥰

Beans:▪️ 2 Tbsp Butter ▪️ 1/2 a Yellow Onion, diced small▪️2 Garlic Cloves, finely chopped▪️1 tsp Chili Powder ▪️1/2 tsp Ground Cumin▪️1/2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️2 x 15 oz. Cans Pinto Beans, drained▪️1/2 Cup Mild Green Salsa▪️ 1/4 Cup Water▪️

Burritos:▪️4 Large Flour Tortillas (12-inch)▪️1/4 Cup Finely Chopped Yellow Onion▪️1/4 Cup Mild Green Salsa▪️1+1/3 Cups Shredded Oaxaca Cheese (or shredded cheese of choice)▪️1 Tbsp Butter▪️

1️⃣ Make the beans: In a large skillet over medium heat, melt the butter then add the onion. Cook until softened, 3-5 mins, then stir in the garlic, chili powder, cumin, and salt. Cook 1 min.
2️⃣ Add the pinto beans, green salsa, and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium and simmer uncovered for 10-15 mins, stirring often and lightly mashing the beans with your spatula, until the liquid reduces and the mixture thickens. You'll know it's ready when swiping your spatula across the bottom of the pan leaves a clear streak. Remove from the heat. 
3️⃣ Spread 1/2 cup of the bean mixture across the center of a large tortilla, leaving about 2 inches of space on each side. Sprinkle with 1 Tbsp chopped onions, 1 Tbsp green salsa, and about 1/3 cup shredded cheese. Fold up the bottom edge over the filling, then fold the sides of the tortilla in toward the center, and roll tightly into a burrito, keeping the seam side down. Tuck a little extra cheese under the seam so it melts and helps seal the burrito as it cooks.
4️⃣ Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add a small pat of butter and swirl to coat. Place the burrito seam side down and cook without moving for 2–3 mins, until golden brown. Turn and cook the other side for another 2–3 mins, pressing gently with a spatula for even browning.
5️⃣ Repeat with the remaining burritos, slice in half, and enjoy!

⏲10 min prep time / 35 min total time

Recipe makes 4 burritos
summary: Step-by-step recipe for pan-fried bean and cheese burritos with homemade seasoned pinto beans.

SUCH A GREAT DINNER RECIPE. I refuse to count how many times I said back to school!!! 

🌿Chicken broccoli pasta bake 
1.5 lbs of chopped chicken tenderloin
Fry the chicken in 1 tbsp of butter, 1 tsp of minced garlic and 1 tbsp of olive oil with the following spices 
- [ ] Salt
- [ ] Pepper
- [ ] Crushed dried parsley 
Fry till the chicken is white and the juices come out. Turn off flame

✨In a 9x13 casserole dish, you can place your choice of venerables. I'm using a 16 oz bag of frozen broccoli which is thawed. Add 3/4th cups of frozen corn, 1.5 cups of any choice of uncooked pasta. I did spiral. Choose whole wheat if being carb conscious. Mix in the chicken. 
✨In the same pot the chicken was fried in, mix together 2 cups of half and half (half milk half heavy cream), 2 cups of chicken broth. (No cooking required) add seasonings of choice, I did 1 tsp garlic powder, salt, pepper, 1tsp onion powder and 1/2 tsp Italian herbs. 
✨Pour the mixture over the casserole, mix in some franks hot sauce for flavor. 
✨Top with 1.5 cups of shredded cheese of choice
✨Cover with foil
✨Bake at 380°F for 20 mins covered and 20 mins uncovered for a light golden top. 
✨You can also broil it for a few minutes to get more color. 
✨Enjoy (when slightly cooled)

Notes:
Can be prepared a day in advance
Use any pasta of choice. I like the spiral one and penne
Use any vegetable of choice. Carrots, peas, beans, mushrooms.
You can add a breadcrumb topping for a crispy top

caption:
Just 7 minutes for the perfect protein pakora. 💪🏼🚨
These Air-Fried Egg Pakodas are soft inside, crispy outside, and loaded with flavour and protein. 🔥 Perfect with a cup of chai or coffee in this rainy weather.

Ingredients (Makes 2 servings - 180 kcal | 16g protein | 8g fat | 10g carbs per serving)
	•	Egg whites – from 6 large eggs (~200g)
	•	Egg yolks – from 2 large eggs, mashed (optional)
	•	Onion – 40g, finely chopped (¼ cup)
	•	Ginger-garlic paste – 1 tsp (5g)
	•	Green chili – 1, chopped
	•	Curry leaves – 4–5, chopped
	•	Coriander leaves – 2 tbsp, chopped
	•	Besan – 20g (2 tbsp)
	•	Turmeric – ¼ tsp
	•	Red chili powder – ¼ tsp
	•	Pepper powder – ¼ tsp
	•	Chaat masala – ½ tsp + extra for garnish
	•	Salt – to taste
	•	Aromat powder – ¼ tsp (optional)
	•	Oil – 1 tsp in the mix + spray for air fryer
	•	Water – ~2 tbsp, as needed to bind

Method
	1.	Mix all ingredients in a bowl until you get a thick batter.
	2.	Lightly grease/spray your air fryer tray.
	3.	Drop spoonfuls of the mixture, flatten slightly.
	4.	Spray lightly with oil and air fry at 200°C for 6–7 min until golden.
	5.	Sprinkle extra chaat masala and serve hot with mint chutney.

.

caption:
Breakfasts that look, taste AND feel this good. 🤌🏼🤌🏼🤌🏼
If you've never smashed sweet potato with cheese in chili oil, today's the day. This is crunchy, creamy, spicy, comforting — and ready in minutes.

Savoury Sweet Potato Pancake
💥262 kcal • 10g protein • 17g carbs • 20g fat (per serving)
Ingredients (1 serving):
	•	1 tsp chili oil
	•	15g grated cheese (any melting cheese)
	•	Few large pieces of cooked sweet potato (approx. 100g)
	•	1 egg (or cooked chickpeas/grated paneer)
	•	Salt, to taste
	•	Chili flakes or extra chili oil (optional)
	•	Chopped spring onion, greens, or coriander (for garnish)

Method:
	1.	Heat 1 tsp chili oil in a non-stick pan.
	2.	Add grated cheese in the center and immediately place the sweet potato pieces on top.
	3.	Cover with baking paper and use something heavy (like a small pan or spatula) to press down and flatten the stack.
	4.	Once the base is crispy and the cheese is golden, remove the paper and sprinkle some salt.
	5.	Carefully flip the stack.
	6.	Crack an egg on top, sprinkle chili flakes or drizzle more chili oil, and top with chopped greens or coriander.
	7.	Cover the pan and cook until the egg yolk is done to your liking.
	8.	Serve hot and enjoy immediately.

.

caption:
Smoky Chipotle Chicken Power Skillet

If you want to make an exceptional easy weeknight meal, you need to give this a try. The chicken comes out juicy and goes perfectly with the creamy chipotle-cilantro sauce, crisp cucumber salad, and rice. I used my Kaizen protein rice here, but use whatever you like - quinoa, brown rice, regular rice, or cauli rice all work great!

Here's how I made it:

1.Place 5 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs in a bowl. (Skinless works too—I keep the skin on while cooking for max juiciness, then remove before eating.)

2.Drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil, season with a couple generous pinches of salt and fresh cracked pepper, 1/2 tbsp chipotle powder, 1 tbsp sweet paprika, 1 tbsp garlic powder, and 1 tbsp oregano or thyme. Mix really well and ideally let sit for a couple hours if you can. Or skip to the next step if you're tight on time and want a fast easy meal.

3.Grab your oven-safe pan. We're going to first do this on stovetop, and finish in the oven, so preheat oven to 400°F. Let chicken come to room temp for 30 mins. Then bring the pan to low-medium heat on the stovetop with 1 tbsp olive oil. Add the chicken thighs face down for 8 minutes, flip, then cook for another 5 minutes before transferring to the oven for 17-20 mins. Time depends on thickness.

4.Meanwhile, make a quick salad with: 1/2 finely diced red onion, 2–3 Persian cucumbers, 2–3 tbsp finely diced fresh cilantro, and salt.

5.Cook your favorite rice. I used my @kaizenfoodco Kaizen low carb rice to keep this low carb and high protein, but use whatever rice you prefer.

6.Then make the best part: the sauce. Process 3 tbsp Greek yogurt, 3 tbsp mayo, 1 clove garlic, 1/2 jalapeño, a large handful cilantro, the juice of 1 large lime, salt, and pepper. Process well, taste and adjust.

7. Remove the skillet from the oven, and plate it up, or add your toppings and other items here to serve it. Add the rice, salad, jalapeños, sliced avocado, cotija cheese, and drizzle on the sauce.

ENJOY! If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #highprotein #proteinrecipes #keto #ketorecipes #goodmoodfood #healthyrecipes #chickenrecipes
summary: A smoky chipotle chicken skillet recipe with crispy skin-on thighs, creamy chipotle-cilantro sauce, and customizable rice sides, optimized for low-carb and high-protein diets.

caption:
Try this delicious sweet snack for Janmashtami this year👍🏻👍🏻. You can make it using store bought rice flour. Would love if you take a moment to comment and also share the recipe💕. You are sure to receive loads of compliments. #masterchefmomrecipes #vellaseedai #vellaseedairecipe #traditionalindiansweet #indiansweet 

Vella Seedai| Sweet Seedai by Masterchefmom :
Recipe by Mrs. Prema 
1 Cup = 250 ml
Makes: 20-25 Vella Seedai
Ingredients :

1 Cup Rice Flour 
1/2 Cup powdered Jaggery
1/4 Cup water
2 teaspoon roasted Urad dal flour 
1 teaspoon Sesame seeds
1 teaspoon coconut pieces ( small size)
1 tablespoon unsalted butter
Oil for frying
METHOD :

1. Heat a pan and add the rice flour. Roast the flour for 2 minutes. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside. 

2. Melt the jaggery in 1/4 cup of water and filter impurities if any. Heat the jaggery mixture in a pan. Add the coconut bits. Switch off in the first boil.

3. Add this mixture to the rice mixture. Add  the Urad Flour,butter and sesame seeds and make a smooth dough. Grease your hands when you make the dough. Shape them into small balls .
4. Heat Oil in the wok and do the 'drop test' to check the right temperature.  Then drop the Vella seedai balls and fry in batches of 7 or 8 till they are done completely. Cook over low flame.

The 'Vella Seedai' will resemble Jamuns. That is the right colour you are looking for. 
Drain the seedai, and once cool, store them in an air tight container. Stays good for 10-12 days easily. 
Happy Cooking!
With love,
Masterchefmom
summary: A recipe for Vella Seedai, a traditional Indian sweet snack made with rice flour and jaggery, perfect for Janmashtami celebrations.

caption:
Mom's summer zucchini pie✨

Our go-to savory summer pie made with @tillamook Farmstyle Whole Milk Mozzarella Farmstyle Slices which are thick cut and melt into these little pockets of cheesy goodness. Recipe can be found below and on Tillamook.com #tillamookpartner 

Pie:▪️1 Store-bought Pie Crust▪️2 Eggs▪️6 Slices Tillamook Whole Milk Mozzarella Farmstyle Slices, cut in 3/4-inch squares▪️1 Cup 4% Cottage Cheese▪️2 Tbsp Chopped Fresh Basil▪️3 Tbsp Chopped Fresh Parsley, plus more for serving▪️1 Tbsp Dijon Mustard▪️

Zucchini + Onions:▪️2 Tbsp Tillamook Sea Salted Extra Creamy Butter▪️1/2 a Large Yellow Onion, diced small (1 Cup)▪️1 lb. Zucchini, sliced in thin rounds (2 Medium Zucchini)▪️2 Garlic Cloves, finely chopped▪️1/2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1/2 tsp Freshly Ground Pepper▪️1/2 tsp Dried Oregano▪️

1️⃣ Preheat the oven to 400F. Unroll the pie crust and press into a 9-inch pie dish, smoothing the bottoms and sides. Prick all over with a fork and crimp edges. Line with parchment (with an overhang) and fill with pie weights, dry beans, or rice to prevent puffing. Bake 10 mins, then lift out parchment with weights and bake uncovered until edges are golden, 5 to 8 mins more. Remove from the oven, reduce temp to 375F, and cool the crust while you prepare the filling.
2️⃣ Make the zucchini + onions: In a large pan over medium-high heat, melt the butter then add the onions. Cook, stirring often, until the onions are starting to become tender and translucent (3-5 mins), then add the zucchini, garlic, salt, pepper, and oregano. Cook, stirring often, for 6-8 mins until the zucchini is tender but not completely falling apart, then remove from the heat. 
3️⃣ In a large bowl, beat the eggs and add the Tillamook mozzarella, cottage cheese, basil, and parsley. Add the zucchini + onions and stir to combine. 
4️⃣ Brush the dijon mustard along the inside of the pie shell (this will add a nice tangy flavor!). Pour in the filling and spread into one layer. Option to arrange the zucchini rounds nicely on top.
5️⃣ Bake for 35-40 mins until a knife comes out clean from the center. Let cool for 5 mins, then sprinkle with parsley, slice and enjoy!
summary: Mom's summer zucchini pie with mozzarella, cottage cheese, and fresh herbs in a savory custard filling.

caption:
Recipe ⤵️ The Secret to the most beautiful Mexican rice 🍚🇲🇽

Ingredients:
- 2 c long grain rice 
- 1 roma tomato 
- 1/4 onion 
- 5-6 garlic cloves 
- 1/2 tbsp tomato paste 

Directions:
1. Add your oil to a hot skillet over medium heat. Add in your rice. Fry for 4-5 mins until a nice golden brown color. Make sure to stir often. 
2. While the rice fries, add 1 c water, tomato, garlic, 1 tsp salt, and onion to your blender. Blend until a smooth sauce. 
3. Once your rice is ready add in tomato paste, cook for a min, while mixing vigorously to make sure it's mixed into the rice.
4. Add in your sauce & mix well. 
5. Add 2 1/2 c of water to your blender, swirl it around, and then pour into your pan as well. Give it a good stir. Adjust salt to taste. 
6. DONT TOUCH IT FROM THIS POINT ON! 
7. Bring to a simmer, cover, and reduce heat to low. Set a timer for 15 mins. It's gonna take 15-20 mins, but I always check around 15. 
8. Once all the rice has evaporated & the rice is nice & soft it's done! 
9. Give it a good fluff, serve with your fav dishes, and enjoy babe!

#mexicanrecipes #easyrecipes #mexicanrice 

Are you ready to make beautiful mexican rice??
summary: Step-by-step recipe for traditional Mexican rice made with tomato sauce and fried rice base.

caption:
google "eatsbyramya chicken fry" for the recipe! this andhra style chicken fry is a spin off of my mom's go-to recipe to make for us growing up. it's light, packed with spices and pairs so well with some rasam rice.

What South Indian chicken fry different?
- This one is an Andhra style dry roast chicken fry! The onion-tomato masala is made with chicken thighs and loaded with garam masala, coriander powder, red chili powder and salt that coats the chicken with caramelised onions.
- Most of the Indians chicken curries people are used to in America are on the creamy, heavy side and take more inspiration from Punjabi cuisine. However, South Indian chicken dishes tend to be extremely different in spices, flavour profile and heaviness. Overall, they tent to be dry or even when there is a gravy, it's more like a stew so it's much lighter. 
- The curry leaves are truly the star of the show here! As someone who never understood why my mom threw those leaves into every South Indian dish she made, I can now say I rely on it as a staple of my cooking. It adds a really delicious flavor and aroma to the overall dish.
- It's pretty healthy! There's not a lot that goes Ito this other than the chicken, spices, veggies and oil. You cna totally cut down on some of the oil but for a "fry" it's actually not really heavy on the oil and turns out to new a pretty high protein dish!

#dinners #easyrecipes #indianfood #indianrecipes #chicken #chickenfry #butterchicken #chickentikkamasala #chickendinner #livingalone #20somethings #collegerecipes #easyrecipes #indiancurry
summary: Andhra-style chicken fry recipe with caramelized onions, garam masala, and curry leaves, lighter than typical creamy Indian curries.

caption:
Creamy chicken and broccoli sheet pan lasagna inspired by @giadadelaurentiis✨

▪️16 oz. Dry Lasagna Noodles▪️Olive Oil▪️6 Tbsp Butter▪️6 Tbsp Flour▪️6 Cups Milk▪️2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1/2 tsp Fresh Ground Black Pepper▪️1/4 tsp Nutmeg▪️1/8 tsp Cayenne Pepper▪️3 Cloves Garlic, finely chopped▪️16 oz. Broccoli, finely chopped▪️5 oz. Baby Spinach, roughly chopped▪️8 oz. Shredded Rotisserie Chicken Breast (2+1/2 Cups)▪️1 Cup Grated Parmesan Cheese, divided▪️

1️⃣ Preheat the oven to 425F. Bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil. 
2️⃣ Boil the lasagna noodles according to package directions, then drain and toss in olive oil to prevent them from sticking. Let cool then cut into ~3" squares with scissors. (Alternatively, you can break the noodles into pieces before boiling). 
3️⃣ Place the pot back on the stove and preheat it over medium-high heat. Add the butter, and once it's melted add the flour. Cook the flour for 1 min, whisking constantly, then start gradually adding the milk 1 cup at a time, whisking so that the milk gets fully incorporated before adding more. Once all of the milk is mixed in, add the salt, pepper, nutmeg, and cayenne. Cook, stirring often, until the white sauce starts to simmer and thicken (3-4 mins).
4️⃣ Add the garlic and broccoli and cook for 2 mins, then add the spinach, chicken, and 1/2 cup grated parmesan. Cook for 2-3 more mins until the sauce bubbles are veggies are tender, then turn off the heat and stir in the lasagna noodles pieces.
5️⃣ Transfer the mixture to a large baking sheet (or two small baking sheets) and spread into one even layer. Sprinkle 1/2 cup more parmesan cheese on top and bake uncovered for ~30 mins until golden brown. Enjoy!

⏲ 20 minute prep time / 1 hour 10 minute total time

Recipe serves 6
summary: Creamy chicken and broccoli sheet pan lasagna with béchamel sauce, served 6.

caption:
Thai Chicken Curry with Coconut Rice- this is so creamy, delicious and packed with an incredibly rich flavor! 
Ingredients: 
1.5 lbs chicken breast 
8 oz snap peas 
1 red bell pepper 
1 can coconut milk + the remainder from the can you used for coconut rice, about 1/2 cup 
2 tbs avocado oil 
1 inch knob fresh ginger, grated 
3 garlic cloves, crushed/grated 
2-3 tbs red Thai curry paste 
1 lime, juiced 
Basil leaves 
Cilantro 
1 tsp salt 
2 tsp fish sauce 
1 tbs coconut sugar or any 
2 tsp cornstarch + 2 tbs water 
Black pepper, to taste 

Coconut rice:
2 cups jasmine rice 
2 cups water 
1 cup coconut milk 
1 tsp salt 

Method: 
1. Add coconut rice ingredients to a rice cooker and set aside; 
2. Slice red pepper and clean snap peas; 
3. Thinly slice chicken breast and sauté in avocado oil, season with salt and pepper and cook until golden; set it aside; 
4. To the same pan, add more oil and quickly sauté ginger and garlic and add red curry paste and coconut milk, coconut sugar, fish sauce, snap peas, red pepperand cook for about 5 mins until softened; squeeze the juice of 1 lime, bring chicken back into the pan; pour cornstarch slurry; finish with crushed red pepper;
5. Serve with coconut rice, top with basil leaves, cilantro and enjoy! 
#curry #chickencurry #thairecipes #recipeshare
summary: Thai chicken curry with coconut rice featuring chicken breast, snap peas, and red bell pepper in a creamy coconut curry sauce.

caption:
Easy Chicken Tikka Kebab 

1. 2 pounds chicken breast 
2. Optional-Cilantro for garnish 
3. Wooden skewers - soaked in hot water 

Marinade: 
1. 3 tablespoons Greek plain yogurt 
2. 1/4 teaspoon turmeric powder 
3. 2 teaspoons garam masala 
4. 1 teaspoon cumin 
5. 1 teaspoon curry powder 
6. 1 teaspoon dried fenugreek or dried parsley 
7. 1/2 teaspoon cayenne - or Indian red chili powder 
8. 1 tablespoon paprika 
9. 1/2 teaspoon salt 
10. 1.5 tablespoons oil 
11. 1 tablespoon lemon juice 

1. Soak wooden skewers in hot water for at least 20 minutes.
2. cut chicken breast into medium size chicken- large enough to fit on skewers . 
3. In a large bowl add all of the marinade ingredients. Mix well. 
4. Add the chicken pieces. Gently mix. 
5. Thread chicken onto wooden skewers. 
6. Air fry at 390 for 11 minutes flipping half way through. 
7. You change temperature to 400 and cook 2 minutes longer to get a blackened char look. 
8. Be mindful and not overcook or chicken will dry out. 
9. For oven cooking . Cook at 400 degrees for 14-15 minutes, flipping halfway through. Don't overcook. 
10. Serve immediately. Over rice , salad , pita or wrap.

caption:
Cheesy chicken milanese✨

Chicken:▪️2 Chicken Breasts▪️Kosher Salt & Pepper▪️1/4 Cup Flour▪️1 Large Egg▪️1/4 Cup Panko Breadcrumbs▪️1/4 Cup Italian Breadcrumbs▪️1/4 Cup Grated Parmesan▪️Avocado Oil Spray or Olive Oil Spray▪️1 Cup Shredded Mozzarella▪️

Arugula Salad:▪️4 Cups Arugula▪️10 Cherry Tomatoes, sliced in half▪️1/4 Cup Shaved Parmesan▪️Freshly Squeezed Lemon Juice▪️Olive Oil▪️Kosher Salt & Pepper▪️

1️⃣ Preheat the oven to 425F convection (or 450F regular bake) and line a baking sheet with a wire rack. Spray the wire rack with oil. (If you don't have a wire rack, just oil the baking sheet.)
2️⃣ Working one at a time, place the chicken breast in between two pieces of plastic wrap and pound with the flat side of a meat mallet (or something heavy) until 1/4-inch thick. Season with salt and pepper on both sides. 
3️⃣ Set up your dredging station: Add the flour to a large shallow bowl, beat the egg in another large shallow bowl, and combine the panko, Italian breadcrumbs, and parmesan in a third large shallow bowl.
4️⃣ Coat both sides of each chicken breast in flour, then egg (letting excess drip off), then the breadcrumb mixture, pressing the breadcrumbs on with your fingers. Place the chicken on the greased wire rack on the baking sheet. 
5️⃣ Spray the top of the chicken cutlets generously with oil and bake for 12-15 mins until golden brown the internal temp reaches 165F. Remove the cutlets from the oven and sprinkle the mozzarella on top. Turn on the broiler and return the cutlets to the oven on the top rack. Broil for 2-3 minutes until the cheese is melted with golden brown spots.
6️⃣ Meanwhile, add the arugula, cherry tomatoes, and parmesan to a bowl. Dress to taste with lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. 
7️⃣ Serve the chicken with a generous mound of arugula salad on top and enjoy! 

⏲20 min prep time / 40 min total time

Recipe serves 2
