caption:
Easy One-Pot Chicken and Rice (Plow)🍗🍚🥕
This dish, known as plow in our home, was one of the first recipes I learned when I got married, and it's been a family favorite ever since. It's simple, filling, and packed with flavor. Even better? Leftovers are amazing! Perfect for school, work, or a no-stress second dinner.

Ingredients
Chicken & Rice:
* ¼ cup olive oil
* 1 large onion, chopped
* 1½ lbs boneless chicken (breast or thigh), cubed
* 4–5 carrots, freshly grated
* 2 cups basmati rice, rinsed
* 4 cups water
* 2 tsp turmeric
* 2 tsp curry powder
* 2 tsp salt
* 1 tsp black pepper
Arugula Salad:
* Arugula
* Cucumber, chopped
* Cherry tomatoes
Dressing:
* Juice of ½ lemon
* Drizzle olive oil
* Splash red wine vinegar
* Salt to taste

Instructions
1. In a large nonstick pot, heat olive oil. Add onions and sauté until soft and golden.
2. Stir in grated carrots and cubed chicken. Cook for 3–4 minutes.
3. Add turmeric, curry, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Add rinsed rice and water. Bring to a boil uncovered.
5. Once water reduces to rice level, stir, cover, and reduce to low. Simmer for 12–15 minutes, until rice is tender.
6. For the salad: Combine arugula, cucumbers, and tomatoes. Toss with lemon juice, olive oil, vinegar, and salt.
7. Fluff rice, serve warm, and enjoy with the fresh salad on the side.

#sivanskitchen #easyrecipes #onepotmeal #chickenandrice #explorepage
summary: Easy one-pot chicken and rice dish (plow) with turmeric and curry, served with fresh arugula salad.

caption:
CRISPY BAKED POTATO HALVES!

INGREDIENTS:
* 2 large Russet Potatoes 
* 1 - 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil
* 2 tablespoons salted butter
* 1/4 -1/3 cup shredded Parmesan 
* Kosher salt
* Ground black pepper
* Grated cheddar cheese
* Chopped scallions and chives
* (Can also add chopped cooked bacon or other toppings)

DIRECTIONS:
* Preheat oven to 425° .  Line half baker sheet with parchment paper.
* Scrub potatoes well to get them nice and clean. Cut length wise. Brush both sides of potato with olive oil. Sprinkle well with kosher salt (or garlic salt ) and black pepper. 
* On parchment paper lay down two small pats of butter per potato. Sprinkle area where potato will lie with shredded Parmesan cheese. Press down each potato, half onto butter and Parmesan. 
* Bake in preheated oven for 30 to 40 minutes until potatoes are tender and nice and golden crispy brown. Removed from oven, sliced lengthwise, and squeeze potato to loosen. Top with favorite toppings. Butter, sour cream, grated cheese, scallions, chives, cooked and chopped bacon, kosher salt and pepper, and any other toppings you like! So delicious and flavorful, including the skin.
* ENJOY!!

#bakedpotato #potato #foodie #deliciousfood #potatoes #baking #recipe #sidedish
summary: Recipe for crispy baked potato halves with butter, Parmesan, and customizable toppings.

caption:
Check out over 15 healthier fried chicken recipes on my feed! 🫰🏼❤️
Rainy day cravings but make it high-protein! ☔
These Air Fryer Chicken & Onion Pakodas are crunchy, spicy, and guilt-free. Perfect as an evening snack or appetizer. 
Would you try this instead of your regular pakora?

👉 Save this recipe for your next chai-time craving!

Air Fried Chicken and Onion Pakoda
Makes 4 servings of roughly 5 pakodas each - 360 kcal | 34 g protein | 10 g carbs | 12 g fat per Serving

Ingredients
	•	500 g boneless chicken thighs, cut into small cubes
	•	1 medium onion (about 80 g), thinly sliced
	•	6-8 cloves garlic, minced
	•	½ tsp turmeric powder
	•	½ tsp chili powder (adjust to taste)
	•	½ tsp coriander powder
	•	½ tsp pepper powder
	•	¼ tsp Aromat seasoning
	•	Salt, to taste
	•	3 tbsp besan (gram flour)
	•	2 tbsp cornstarch (or arrowroot)
	•	1 tsp oil
	•	2–3 tbsp water, as needed to bind

To Finish:
	•	½ tsp chaat masala
	•	Pinch of Aromat
	•	Fresh coriander leaves, chopped
	•	Squeeze of lemon juice

Method: 

1. Make the Mixture:
	•	In a large bowl, combine chicken cubes, sliced onion, minced garlic, turmeric, chili, coriander, pepper powder, Aromat, and salt.
	•	Add besan and cornstarch, drizzle in 1 tsp oil, and add a splash of water to bind everything together. The mixture should coat the chicken and onions without being too wet.

2. Air Fry:
	•	Preheat air fryer to 200°C (390°F).
	•	Grease the air fryer tray. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the tray (don't press too flat for a pakoda look).
	•	Air fry for 10-12 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden and cooked through OR bake at 220 C for 18-20 mins.

3. Finish & Serve:
	•	Sprinkle chaat masala and a pinch of Aromat over the hot pakodas.
	•	Garnish with coriander leaves and squeeze lemon juice on top. Serve immediately!

.
(air fryer chicken pakoda, healthy pakoda recipe, high protein snacks, Indian snack air fryer, baked chicken pakora, low oil Indian snacks)

.

#HealthySnacks #AirFryerRecipes #HealthyIndianRecipes #chaitime #friedchicken
summary: Air fryer chicken and onion pakoda recipe with nutritional breakdown, featuring a healthier take on the traditional Indian snack.

caption:
EASY and HEARTY one pot chicken and rice dish. 
Plow is a delicious dish made in under 30 minutes. You can use boneless chicken thighs, boneless chicken breasts, or even bone-in chicken pieces.
Add any cut up vegetables to a bowl and toss with fresh squeezed, lemon juice, olive oil and salt for the perfect side salad. 

Ingredients:
* 1 ½ pounds boneless chicken thighs, cut into strips or cubes
* 1 large onion, roughly chopped
* 5-6 carrots, peeled and cut into thick slivers
* 2 teaspoons turmeric powder (split: 1 tsp for chicken, 1 tsp for rice)
* 2 teaspoons curry powder (split the same way)
* 2 teaspoons black pepper (split the same way)
* 2 teaspoons salt (split the same way)
* ¼ cup olive oil (split)
* 2 cups raw basmati rice, washed and drained
* 3 cups chicken stock

Instructions:
1. In a bowl, season the chicken with half of the olive oil and 1 teaspoon each of turmeric, curry powder, black pepper, and salt. Mix well.
2. Heat a good nonstick pot over medium heat, add the chicken, and cook for about 5-7 minutes. Remove the chicken to a bowl, leaving the juices in the pot.
3. Add the chopped onions to the pot and sauté for 3 minutes. Then add the slivered carrots and the remaining spices, tossing everything together.
4. Stir in the washed and drained basmati rice, then return the cooked chicken to the pot. Mix everything together.
5. Pour in the chicken stock, cover, and bring to a boil. Once boiling, gently toss, lower the heat to a simmer, cover, and let cook for 20 minutes.
6. Uncover, fluff the rice, and enjoy!

Perfect on its own or served with a simple side salad. Enjoy this comforting and flavorful dish!

#sivanskitchen #reels #instagram #instagood #easy #easyrecipes #rice #chicken #chickenrecipes #quick #quickmeals #curry
summary: Easy one-pot chicken and rice curry dish made with basmati rice, chicken thighs, and warm spices in under 30 minutes.

caption:
Taco Shrimp Bowl 🦐🔥🌿

Quick, easy and packed with flavor using simple healthy ingredients... it doesn't get much better than that! Give this one a go for lunch, dinner, meal prep, date night, whatever you want.. regardless I bet you won't be disappointed! 

FULL RECIPE ⬇️

INGREDIENTS (2-3 servings)
- 1 lb XL peeled & deveined raw shrimp of choice.
- 2 tbsp of extra virgin olive oil 
- Taco seasoning of choice 
- Jasmine rice (cooked)

Corn & Black Bean Salsa 
(Combine all ingredients) 
- 1 cup roasted yellow corn (cooled) 
- 1 cup canned black beans (strained and rinsed)
- 1/2 cup finely diced red onion 
- 1/2 cup finely diced poblano pepper 
- 1/2 cup finely diced tomatoes 
- 1/2 cup fresh chopped cilantro 
- 2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil 
- Juice of 1 lime 
- Salt to taste 
- Garlic powder to taste 

Creamy Cilantro Lime Sauce 
(Blend all ingredients together) 
- ~1 cup light sour cream 
- ~1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil 
- Zest of 1/2 a lime 
- Juice of 1/2 a lime 
- 2 cloves of galric 
- 1/2 bunch of cilantro 
- Salt to taste 

Note(s): Measurements are estimated. Adjust ingredients to your liking. For the sauce, only add 1-2 tbsp of water at a time until you reach desired thickness.

DIRECTIONS 
1.  Prepare the corn and black bean salsa. Remove corn from cob and roast over high heat for 3-5 minutes mixing frequently to prevent burning, then add to a bowl and let cool. While corn is cooling, prepare other ingredients. Combine all and place in fridge.
2. Prepare the creamy cilantro lime sauce and place in fridge. 
3. Prepare the shrimp. Make sure they're clean and all the shell is removed then add to a large bowl with olive and taco seasoning. Mix till welll combined.
4. Cook shrimp in large greased skillet over medium high heat for 2-3 min per side. Be careful to not over cook. 
5. Assemble your bowl & ENJOY! 🙌🏻

caption:
Chicken avocado sandwich✨

Chicken + Marinade:▪️2 Large Boneless Skinless Chicken Breasts (1+1/4 lb. total)▪️1/2 a Lemon, juice▪️2 Tbsp Olive Oil, plus more for cooking▪️2 tsp Chopped Fresh Oregano (or 1/2 tsp Dried Oregano)▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1/2 tsp Pepper▪️

Lemon Garlic Aioli:▪️1/4 Cup Mayo▪️1/2 a Lemon, juice▪️1 Clove Garlic, grated or minced▪️Salt & Freshly Ground Pepper▪️

Onions:▪️1 Tbsp Butter▪️1/2 a Medium Sweet Onion, sliced in strips▪️Kosher Salt & Pepper▪️

Sandwiches:▪️2 Cups Baby Arugula▪️1 Avocado, sliced▪️4 Kaiser Rolls (or buns of choice)▪️

1️⃣ Pound the chicken breasts until 1/2-inch thickness then slice each breast into two pieces. Place in a bowl and add the lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, salt, and pepper. Mix, cover, and marinate for at least 30 mins at room temperature or up to 4 hours in the refrigerator. 
2️⃣ Make the lemon garlic aioli: In a small bowl, mix together the mayo, lemon juice, garlic, and a small pinch of salt and pepper. Set aside. 
3️⃣ In a large pan over medium-low heat, melt the butter then add the onions with a sprinkle of salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until the onions are tender and golden brown, 8-10 mins. Remove from the pan and set aside.
4️⃣ Add 1 Tbsp olive oil to the pan and turn up the heat to medium-high. Cook the chicken for 4-5 mins per side until internal temp reaches 165F, then transfer to a plate, cover, and let rest while you toast your buns. 
5️⃣ Turn on the broiler in your oven. Place the buns cut side up on a baking sheet and toast for 1 to 2 mins, or until golden and crisp. Keep a close eye so they don't burn. 
6️⃣ Spread aioli on the bottom bun and then layer on the arugula, sautéed onions, chicken, and avocado. Drizzle a little more aioli on top of the avocado and chicken, and enjoy!

⏲10 minute prep time / 50 minute total time 

Recipe serves 4

These cucumber tea sandwiches are the ultimate summer snack! Perfect for brunch, picnics, or afternoon tea. Made with herbed cream cheese, crisp cucumbers, and soft bread, they're elegant and addictive. Pinkies up for this easy entertaining classic! 💅🫖

Save this for your next garden party or snack craving! 

Ingredients:

* Pepperidge farm bread @pepperidgefarm 
* 1 English cucumber, peeled & sliced 
* 1/4 cup whipped cream cheese @phillycreamchs 
* 1/4 cup  sour cream 
* 1 tbsp Mayo @followyourheart 
* 1/2 tsp Dijon mustard @greypoupon_us 
* 1/4 tsp garlic powder 
* 2 tbsp dill chopped 
* 1 tbsp chives chopped 
* 1 tsp lemon juice 
* Cucumbers 
* Salt and pepper 

Directions:

1. Mix all the ingredients (besides bread & sliced cuckes) in a bowl. Set aside. 
2. Take the crust off the bread, spread the cream cheese mixture on both slices, top with cucumber slices, salt and pepper. 
3. Cut in triangles. Serve and enjoy!

caption:
Crispy avocado tostadas✨

Tostadas: ▪️2 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️6 Corn Tortillas (I use guerrero brand)▪️Kosher Salt▪️

Dressing:▪️1 Tbsp + 1 tsp Fresh Lime Juice▪️1 Garlic Clove, grated or minced▪️1 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️1/4 tsp Kosher Salt▪️ 1/4 tsp Pepper▪️

Salad:▪️2 Medium Ripe Avocados, peeled & diced▪️1/3 Cup Quartered Cherry Tomatoes▪️1/4 Cup Small Diced Red Onion▪️2 Tbsp Chopped Fresh Cilantro▪️Flaky Salt, for serving▪️

1️⃣ Make the tostadas: Preheat the oven to 400F on convection mode (or 425F regular bake) and drizzle the olive oil on a large baking sheet.
2️⃣ Rub both sides of each tortilla in the oil and sprinkle with salt. Bake for 6 minutes on the first side, flip and bake for 3-5 more minutes until deep golden brown and crispy.
3️⃣ Meanwhile, make the dressing:  In a small bowl, add the lime juice, garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Whisk until combined. 
4️⃣ Make the salad: In a medium bowl, add the avocado, tomato, onion, and cilantro. Pour on the dressing and gently mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed. 
5️⃣ Spoon the avocado salad onto the tostadas and sprinkle with flaky salt. Garnish with a few fresh cilantro leaves and enjoy!

⏲15 minute prep time / 30 minute total time

Recipe serves 2 as a light meal or 6 as an appetizer

caption:
Reshmi boti

Ingredients

Boneless chicken 1 kg
Vinegar 2 tablespoons
Water 1 litre

Yogurt 1/2 cup
Cream 2 tablespoon
Mayonnaise 2 tablespoon
Ginger garlic paste 1 tablespoon
Salt
Red chilli powder 1/2 teaspoon
Chilli flakes 1/2 teaspoon
Coriander powder 1 teaspoon
Turmeric powder1/4 teaspoon
Khatdi/amchoor 1 teaspoon
Roasted crushed cumins 1 teaspoon
Butter 1 tablespoon
Oil 1 tablespoon
Onions 1 cup
Capsicum 1/2 cup
Coal for smoke

Soak chicken in water and vinegar for 20 minutes, strain and marinate it for 15 minutes or over night, add the chicken in. Pan without any oil/water and let it cook on high flame once the water dries out take a tablespoon of oil in a pan and fry your chicken until their colour changes, you vcan even air fry or bake them(completely your choice)
Add butter an d veggies sauté on high flame and smoke them 
Drizzle lemon in the end that will just elevate the flavour

You can serve it all alone or with any daal, or rice.
Can be a perfect filling for your sandwiches, wraps, burgers our paratha rolls.
You can even shred it and fill it in samosas and rolls.

Follow @sarasimplepleasure

caption:
FOLLOW @kalejunkie for more recipes like my 30-MIN SAUCY CHICKEN NOODLES!✨ ie one of the best dinners I've made in so long. You guys are going to LOVE it.

Makes 4-6 servings
14 oz rice noodles (stir fry or pad thai noodles)
1 tb olive oil
1 lb boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite size pieces
2 tb low sodium soy sauce
1 cup bean sprouts
1 red bell pepper, seed removed and sliced thin
1 cup shredded carrots
3 cloves garlic, mashed 
2 eggs
1 cup green onions, sliced thin (this is ~1 bunch)
½ cup cilantro
1 lime, juiced
1/2 tsp red pepper flakes

SAUCE
1/2 cup low sodium soy sauce or tamari
2 tb toasted sesame oil
3 tb fish sauce
1/3 cup coconut sugar 
3 tb rice vinegar
1/4 cup creamy natural peanut butter
1 tsp ground ginger

GARNISH
1/3 cup chopped peanuts
1 lime, juiced and drizzled on top

Cook noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat, and once hot, add the chicken pieces and soy sauce. Cook for about 7-8 minutes, until browned on all sides and almost cooked through. Transfer the chicken from the pan to a plate, leaving the oil and juices from the chicken. Add the bean sprouts, bell pepper, carrots and garlic. Cook until the veggies have softened, about 4 minutes. While those are cooking, make the sauce. Add all sauce ingredients to a blender and blend until smooth and set aside.  Once the veggies are done, push them to the side of the pan. Crack both eggs in the pan and scramble them. Combine with the veggies. Add the chicken, drained noodles, green onions, cilantro, lime, pepper flakes, and sauce to the pan. Toss to combine. Plate and top with additional cilantro, chopped peanuts, and a squeeze of lime. Enjoy!
summary: A 30-minute saucy chicken noodle stir-fry with peanut sauce, vegetables, and eggs that serves 4-6.

caption:
Middle Eastern Chicken with Tomato Salad & Garlic Sauce

If you're looking for an easy summer recipe you'll want on repeat, that delivers on serious flavor, this is it. You can easily grill these, or if you dont have a BBQ or charcoal grill, you can pop these in your oven or air fryer. 

The chicken comes out juicy thanks to the marinade and its paired with a cool garlicky yogurt sauce, a bright tomato salad, and you can serve it over regular rice or over a bed of high-protein Kaizen rice. It's everything you want in a weeknight meal… or an outdoor BBQ. I used my @kaizenfoodco low-carb rice for 20g of protein and just 6 net carbs per serving but any rice or quinoa works great too.

Here's how I made it:

1.Cut 2.5 lbs chicken thighs into 1.5-2 inch pieces. Toss with 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp each of garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, Aleppo pepper,1/4 tsp cinnamon, 3 pinches of salt & pepper, plus 1.5 tbsp tomato paste, 2 tbsp plain yogurt, and juice of 1 lemon. Mix well and marinate for 2-6 hours, or overnight.

2.Skewer the chicken (and onions or peppers if you'd like) and grill over medium-high heat for 12–15 minutes, flipping halfway. You want a nice char and internal temp of 165°F. You can also pop these in the oven at 400F for 35 minutes, or airfare at 400F for 25 mins, flipping midway.

3.For the white Sauce, mix 4 minced garlic cloves, 2 tbsp mayo, 2 tbsp sour cream, juice of ½ lemon, lemon zest, 2 tbsp chopped parsley, salt & pepper. Thin with water if needed.

4.For the tomato Salad, toss half a pint halved cherry tomatoes, 1/3diced red onion, 3 tbsp fresh parsley, 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp sumac, and a pinch of salt.

5.Then build it up! sppoon your kaizen lowcarb rice, add one or two skewers, pile on the salad, drizzle with garlic sauce, sprinkle fresh parsley and sumac, and enjoy.

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS! And you can also always comment SHREDHAPPENS and I'll message you how to grab my new cookbook.

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #keto #ketorecipes #proteinrecipes #healthyrecipes #summerrecipes
summary: A low-carb Middle Eastern chicken skewer recipe with tomato salad and garlic yogurt sauce, cookable on grill, oven, or air fryer.

caption:
✨ Masala Fish Fry ✨ 🐟 — a simple but flavor-packed dinner that comes together in no time!

Ingredients:
	•	1/4 cup oil (plus more for frying)
	•	2 tbsp lemon juice
	•	1 tbsp garlic paste
	•	1 tsp ginger paste
	•	1 tbsp red chili powder
	•	1.5 tbsp coriander powder
	•	1 tbsp cumin powder
	•	1 tsp turmeric powder
	•	1 tsp chaat masala
	•	2 tsp amchoor powder
	•	2 tsp dry fenugreek leaves (kasuri methi)
	•	Salt to taste
	•	Fish fillets (I use Halibut or Tilapia)
	•	1-2 potatoes, thinly sliced

Instructions:
	1.	Salt fish and let sit for 20 mins. Rinse and pat dry.
	2.	Mix all spices + lemon juice + oil to form a marinade.
	3.	Coat fish in the marinade and let rest for 10–15 mins.
	4.	Fry on medium heat — 2 mins per side. Don't overcook!
	5.	Toss sliced potatoes in leftover marinade and fry until crisp.
	6.	Serve hot with chapatti or rice. 🔥

Tag someone who'd love this! 💛

Ingredients:
1.5lbs Diced Chicken Breast, boneless skinless
Salt & Pep, to taste
Garlic powder, 1 tsp
3 tbsp corn starch
Avocado oil spray, 3-4 seconds
Garlic, 3-4 cloves finely minced

White onions, cut into squares

4. Then add the sauce and cook for 3-4 more minutes until the sauce thickens. 
5. Add crispy chicken to the sauce, garnish with chilis and green onions (optional) and enjoy over some rice 
6. ENJOY you lil cutie pie 😍

caption:
HOT HONEY CHICKEN + SWEETCORN SALSA 

Sticky honey chicken thighs, a punchy sweetcorn salsa and chewy giant couscous to soak it all up. Sweet, spicy, salty & fresh - a summer banger.

Serves 3.
▫️ 600g chicken thighs
▫️ 1 tsp each of onion granules, garlic granules, smoked paprika
▫️ 300g giant couscous
▫️ 1/2 tbsp honey
▫️ 2 tsp crispy chilli oil
▫️ 1 tin sweetcorn
▫️ handful of cherry tomatoes, diced
▫️ 2 spring onions, finely sliced
▫️ 1 tbsp fresh coriander, finely diced
▫️ 1 tsp red wine vinegar
▫️ a handful of feta cheese, crumbled
also, @oilwell.co squeezy olive oil is my lifeline rn 🫒 

Method:
1. Season the chicken with the onion granules, garlic granules, smoked paprika, and a generous pinch of salt and pepper. Drizzle over some olive oil and toss to coat. 
2. Get the couscous on to boil and run under cold water once done.
3. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Once hot, add the chicken thighs and cook for 3 minutes per side, or until the chicken is almost cooked through. 
4. Lower the heat to medium and drizzle the honey and chilli oil over the thighs. Use tongs to ensure each piece is coated and allow to bubble away for a few more minutes until the chicken is fully cooked through and begins to caramelise in some places. 
5. Carefully remove the chicken from the pan to a clean board. Then, in the same pan (to use up the gorgeous flavour!) tip in the tin of sweetcorn. Whack the heat up to high and allow to cook for a few minutes, until charring in places. 
6. Now, we can make the salsa. In a bowl, add the tomatoes, spring onions, coriander, vinegar, feta, a good pinch of salt and pepper and the cooked sweetcorn. Gently stir to combine. 
7. I like to serve up the bowl with some diced cucumber for freshness, 2 thighs, couscous and a generous helping of salsa. 
ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
#highproteindinner #healthyrecipes #quickdinner #summerfood #mealprepideas #simplefood #easyrecipes #chickenrecipes #healthyfood #highprotein
summary: Pan-fried hot honey chicken thighs with sweetcorn salsa and giant couscous.

caption:
BLACKENED FISH TACOS
Serves 2 - SAVE THE RECIPE BELOW 

Light, fresh and flavoursome it's perfect for summer. Creamy avocado salsa. Crunchy lime slaw. Smoky, perfectly blackened cod. All wrapped in soft warm tortillas. This is your new go-to fakeaway.

Ingredients

For the salsa
1 avocado
1 garlic clove
4 tbsp olive oil
6 tbsp water
Juice of 1 lime
Pinch of salt
Small bunch of coriander

For the slaw
Half a sweetheart cabbage, finely sliced
1 carrot, grated
Juice of half a lime
Pinch of salt

For the fish
2 thick cod fillets
1 tbsp smoked paprika
1 tbsp garlic salt
1 tsp ground cumin

4 soft tortillas

Method
Add all the salsa ingredients to a blender and blitz until smooth. Add a little extra water to loosen if needed.

Mix the slaw ingredients together in a bowl and set aside.

Combine the smoked paprika, garlic salt and cumin in a bowl. 

Pat the cod dry with kitchen paper and coat it in the spice mix, pressing the spices in well so they stick.

Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Cook the fish for a few minutes on each side until blackened and crispy.

Warm your tortillas in a pan or microwave.

Spread a layer of salsa on each tortilla, top with slaw, then flake over the fish. Serve any extra salsa on the side as a dip.

Fresh, bold, full of flavour — this one's made to impress. Save it for later and tag someone who needs to try it. #tacos #salsa #recipes
summary: A recipe for blackened fish tacos with avocado salsa and lime slaw, serves 2.

caption:
Cheesy Chicken Sliders 🍔 

Ingredients:

For the Filling:

- 2 lb chicken breast/thighs, cubed
- Salt, to taste
- 1 tablespoon garlic powder
- 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
- 1 teaspoon red chili powder
- 1 teaspoon black pepper
- 1 cup mixed bell peppers, diced
- 1 red onion, diced
- 1 teaspoon garlic paste
- 2 tablespoons oil + more for cooking

For the Sauce:

- 1/2 cup mayonnaise
- 1 tablespoon garlic powder
- 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
- 2 tablespoons hot sauce

For Assembly:

- 18 slider buns
- 8 slices of Monterey Jack pepper cheese
- 1 cup cheddar cheese

For Glaze:

- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon freshly chopped parsley

Method:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine chicken, peppers, onion, garlic, salt, pepper, garlic powder, smoked paprika, and chili powder. Mix well.
3. Add oil to the mixture and mix until well combined.
4. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add the chicken mixture and cook for 15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
5. Make the sauce by mixing all the sauce ingredients in a bowl until smooth.
6. Assemble the sliders by spreading sauce on the bottom buns, followed by Monterey Jack pepper cheese, a layer of chicken, and a sprinkle of cheddar cheese. Top with the top bun.
7. Glaze the top bun with melted butter and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
8. Cover the tray from top with foil or parchment paper and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.

Notes:
- Customize the sauce to your taste by adjusting the ingredients.
- Use leftover chicken mixture to make additional sliders or freeze for later use.
- Consider using different types of cheese or adding diced veggies to the chicken mixture for added flavor.

#sliderbun #cheesychicken #snack #recipe #baking
summary: A recipe for baked cheesy chicken sliders with seasoned chicken filling, garlic-mayo sauce, and melted cheese on slider buns.

caption:
TEN MINUTE SPICY SESAME NOODLES! Full recipe below (apportioned for two) .

If you know, you KNOW this is my favourite noodle recipe (goodness knows I've shared it SO many times before!). Today we're giving it a quick twist by infusing the oil with scallions beforehand ( inspo @halfbakedharvest!) . And of course, there's a secret ingredient which sets apart these saucy noodles with sooo much complexity! And all you need is ten minutes for the most intensely-rich bowl of 🍜 bursting with nutty, creamy and umami-rich flavours specked with chopped cucumbers for that refreshing crunch 

Cook any noodles of choice; drain and reserve the starchy cooking water. Immediately toss the noodles with a splash of sesame oil to prevent it from clumping and set aside.

In a heat proof bowl, mix together:
- 2-4 cloves of garlic, minced
- Knob of ginger, finely grated
- 1 tbsp gochugaru (crushed red chilli flakes) or chilli flakes
- A handful of scallions/ spring onions, sliced
- 2-3 tsp sesame seeds.

Pour 1.5-2 tbsp hot sesame oil on top and let it sizzle. Give it a mix, then stir in: 
- 4 tbsp light soy sauce 
- 1.5 tbsp rice vinegar or lime juice
- 1.5 - 2 tbsp sesame paste or tahini 
- 1 tbsp peanut butter
- Hot sauce/ chilli oil (optional) 
- 1-2 tbsp black tea (optional but recommended for that deeper flavour!)

Stir it will, then add a splash of the starchy noodle water and a dash of brown sugar/ honey (optional for sweetness). Mix until your sauce comes together with a smooth consistency. 

Feel free to adjust according to preference, for instance adding more sesame or peanut butter for a nuttier sauce etc.

Pour the sauce over the noodles and serve it cold , garnished with sliced cucumbers, scallions and/or sesame seeds 

DIVE IN and don't forget to tag me when you try this at home!
#sesamenoodles #chillioil #spicynoodles #easyrecipesathome #hotoil #asmrcommunity
summary: A ten-minute spicy sesame noodle recipe with ginger, garlic, chili oil, and peanut butter sauce served cold with cucumber garnish.

caption:
Cowboy butter chicken pasta

1. 10 oz pasta or spaghetti 
2. 3-4 chicken thighs boneless skinless 
3. 1/2 teaspoon salt, black pepper , cayenne , chili flakes 
4. 1 heaping teaspoon garlic powder, onion powder, paprika , olive oil

1. 4 tablespoons butter 
2. 4-5 garlic minced 
3.  1/4 cup chicken broth , heavy whipping cream 
4. 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard 
5. 1/2 teaspoon chili flakes 
6. 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese 
7. Parsley chopped 
8. Squeeze of lemon juice about a tablespoon- less if you don't want to lemony 

1. Cut your chicken in season well. 
2. At a tablespoon of olive oil cook interior chicken undisturbed for 2 to 3 minutes on each side till you get a nice golden brown and then remove. 
3. In the same pan, add butter on very low heat. Let the butter slowly melt adding the garlic and let it cook in the butter.
4. Slowly, adding the chicken broth, heavy whipping cream and stir . 
5. Add in Dijon mustard,  chili flakes and mix. 
6. Add in your pasta, Parmesan cheese, parsley, lemon juice, and gently mix everything together. 
7. Add pasta water if your butter  sauce is too thick. 
8. Top with chicken and mix together.

caption:
Hummus Cups 🥒✨

I love how a simple delicious snack can turn into a fancy appetizer with a little twist! It's Made from crispy baked tortillas, hummus and cucumber ribbons😋.

Ingredients

Hummus
Cucumber
Basil leaves
Olive oil

caption:
Save this marinade for the juiciest, most flavorful chicken 🤍!

Juicy lemon oregano chicken✨

▪️1 - 1+1/2 lbs. Boneless Skinless Chicken Breast▪️1/4 Cup Olive Oil ▪️2 Tbsp Fresh Lemon Juice▪️1 Tbsp Finely Chopped Fresh Oregano (or 1+1/2 tsp dried), plus more for garnish ▪️2 Garlic Cloves, finely chopped▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt ▪️1/2 tsp Black Pepper▪️1 tsp Dijon Mustard▪️1 tsp Honey▪️Avocado Oil, for cooking▪️

1️⃣ Place the chicken breasts between two pieces of plastic wrap and pound them to an even 1/2-inch thickness to help tenderize the meat. If the breasts are large, cut each one in half.
2️⃣ In a medium bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, garlic, salt, pepper, dijon mustard, and honey. Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat each piece evenly in the marinade. Cover and marinate for at least 30 mins, or ideally 4–6 hours in the refrigerator.
3️⃣ Preheat the oven to 400F. Take the chicken out of the fridge 30 minutes before cooking to bring it to room temperature. Heat a grill pan (or any oven-safe pan) over medium-high heat for about 3 mins, then oil it with avocado oil. Add the chicken in a single layer and sear undisturbed for 2–3 mins until golden on the bottom. Flip the chicken, then transfer the pan to the oven and roast for 6–10 mins, or until the internal temperature reaches 165F. (To grill outdoors: Preheat a grill to medium-high heat. Grill the chicken for 3-4 mins per side, or until nicely charred and the internal temperature reaches 165F.)
4️⃣ Let rest for 5 mins then serve with some more fresh oregano sprinkled on top. Enjoy!

⏲10 min prep time + 30 min (or ideally longer) marinade time + 15 min cook time

Recipe serves 4

caption:
Zesty + Spicy Chicken Fusion Bowl

These chicken thighs come out so good & the tangy slaw, express pickled onions, and creamy zesty sauce takes it to the TOP! Use regular rice or my high protein low carb Kaizen rice for an additional 20g protein a serving!

Full recipe below! And, comment "COOKBOOK" below & I'll DM you the link to preorder my upcoming hardcover cookbook!

Here's how I made it:

1️⃣ Add 2 lb chicken thighs to a bowl, drizzle with 1 tbsp avocado or olive oil, 2 tbsp soy sauce, & 2 tbsp rice vinegar. Season with 2 generous pinches of salt & pepper, 1/2 tbsp each of 5 spice, garlic powder, onion powder, & chipotle powder, and finally, 1/2 tsp cayenne powder for a kick. Mix well & let marinate for 30mins.

2️⃣ While that's going, get the express pickled onions going. Thinly slice 1 red onion. Add it to a bowl with the juice of 2 limes, pinch of salt, & 1 tbsp chile lime seasoning. Mix well, let it sit, & stir every few mins.

3️⃣ Make your slaw by shredding 1/2 small purple cabbage and 3 carrots. thinly slice 3 Persian cucumbers, chop a large handful of fresh cilantro & dice 2 scallions. Add to a bowl.

4️⃣ For the slaw sauce, mix 5 tbsp mayo, 1.5 tbsp sriracha, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp honey or powdered monkfruit, 1 tsp minced garlic, & the juice of 1 lime. Toss most of the sauce into the slaw & save some for later.

5️⃣ Cook your chicken by heating a pan to medium. Add chicken & cook for 3 mins on the first side, flip, cover, & cook for another 7 mins. Flip again, cover, and turn off the heat. Let it sit for a few mins to so the juices distribute evenly 

6️⃣ Prepare your base. I used my @kaizenfoodco rice to keep this high-protein & low-carb, but regular rice, quinoa, or cauli rice work!

7️⃣ Now, assemble your bowls! Add your Kaizen rice base, some slaw, sliced chicken, pickled onions, drizzle with a spoon or two of reserved sauce, fresh cilantro, sesame seeds & avo.

If you try it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

caption:
HOW TO MAKE THE BEST EASY PAKISTANI ONE POT MIXED LAMB BIRYANI RECIPE 😍🇵🇰😍🇵🇰!!

This is without a doubt the easiest Lamb Biryani recipe out there—completely cooked in one pot, no separate rice boiling required. It's an absolute lifesaver when you're craving biryani but don't fancy all the extra steps.

In Pakistan, especially in Lahore, this style of biryani is a favourite at weddings because it's simple to make in large quantities yet still packed with all the same rich masalas and spices as a traditional biryani. It's often referred to as Tehri, pilau biryani, or mixed biryani—different names, same brilliant concept.

If we're being honest, most biryanis get so mixed up when serving that you rarely see the white rice grains anyway!

INGREDIENTS:

- 1/3 cup oil/ghee
- 1 kg lamb (boneless + chopped)
- 2 medium onions (1 is for garnish)
- 100g crushed tomatoes (or passata)
- 1/3 cup yogurt (preferably sour)
- 3/4 packet biryani masala (any mix is fine)
- 2 tbsp ginger-garlic paste
- 3 cups basmati rice (washed and soaked)
- 4.5 cups water

GARNISH:

- Chopped coriander (1/4 bunch)
- Chopped mint
- Fried onions
- Red/orange food colouring

STEPS:

1. Heat the oil in a deep pan over medium heat.
2. Add onions and shallow fry until brown and remove half for garnish.
3. Add lamb, cook for 1 min.
4. Add ginger garlic paste, biryani masala, tomatoes & yogurt. Cook on medium for 15 mins, till almost done.
5. Add water, boil till lamb is fully cooked and water is bubbling.
6. Add the rice (washed & soaked), cook for about 15 mins, till holes appear on top.
7. Add food colouring on top (optional).
8. Cover with foil and steam (dumm) on lowest heat 15 mins, till done.
9. Garnish with coriander, mint and fried onions.
10. Enjoy!

caption:
BETTER-FOR-YOU GENERAL TSO'S CHICKEN for ep. 5 of my "Made to Order" series✨ this saucy, sticky, subtly sweet General Tso's is even better homemade!

For the Chicken:
1 ½ lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite-sized pieces
1 egg
2 tablespoons coconut aminos (or gluten-free tamari)
⅔ cup arrowroot starch
¼ cup + 1 tablespoon coconut flour
½ teaspoon kosher salt
½ teaspoon black pepper
3-4 tablespoons avocado oil (for pan-frying)
For the General Tso's Sauce:
¼ cup coconut aminos (or gluten-free tamari)
2 tablespoons rice vinegar
2 tablespoons pure maple syrup
½ cup low-sodium chicken broth I tested with water bc I ran out of chicken stock and it was still delish!
1 teaspoon toasted sesame oil
2 teaspoons grated fresh ginger
2 cloves garlic, grated
½ teaspoon red pepper flakes
1 ½ teaspoon arrowroot starch + 1 tablespoon water
For serving: cooked rice, sliced green onion, sesame seeds

Prepare the Chicken:
In a bowl, whisk together the egg and coconut aminos. Add the chicken pieces and toss to coat.
In a separate shallow bowl, mix the arrowroot starch, coconut flour, salt, and pepper.
Remove the chicken from the egg mixture, letting excess drip off, then dredge in the flour mixture until well coated.
Cook the Chicken:
Heat the avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated chicken pieces in a single layer (cook in batches if needed). Pan-fry for 3–4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through. Transfer to a plate lined with paper towels.
Make the Sauce:
In a small bowl, whisk together the coconut aminos, rice vinegar, maple syrup, chicken broth, sesame oil, ginger, garlic, and red pepper flakes.
In a separate small bowl, mix the arrowroot starch with water to make a slurry.
Pour the sauce mixture into the same pan used for the chicken. Heat over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Stir in the arrowroot slurry and continue cooking for 1–2 minutes, until the sauce thickens slightly.
Coat the Chicken & Serve:
Add the crispy chicken back into the pan, tossing to coat evenly in the sauce.
Serve immediately, garnished with green onions and sesame seeds if desired.

caption:
Thai Style Chicken with Black Pepper and Basil – Recipe below – this is such a brilliant quick and easy stir-fry recipe to have when you get in after work. It's packed with flavour and the chicken has the best texture. Enjoy x JohnGS 

Serves 4
 
600g chicken breasts, sliced into very thin strips 
1 tbsp light soy sauce
The juice of ½ a lime
1 tbsp corn flour
½ tsp bicarbonate of soda
3 tbsp neutral oil
4 cloves garlic, finely chopped
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sriracha
1 tbsp fish sauce
2 tsp dark soy sauce
1 tsp freshly ground black pepper
A large bunch of roughly chopped Thai basil leaves

1. Pop the chicken into a mixing bowl and add light soy, lime juice, corn flour and bicarbonate of soda and mix well.
2. Heat the oil in a large frying pan over a high heat. Add the garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds until fragrant. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 5-6 minutes or until cooked through and a little golden.
3. Chuck in the oyster sauce, sriracha, fish sauce, dark soy, black pepper and basil. Stir-fry for a minute until the chicken is coated and serve immediately with rice.
summary: Thai-style stir-fried chicken with black pepper, basil, and aromatic seasonings served with rice.

caption:
California Avocado Crispy Rice✨

A crispy, creamy summer bite made with locally grown and sustainably farmed @ca_avocados #CaliforniaAvocados #ad

Crispy Rice:▪️1 Cup Sushi Rice, uncooked▪️1 Tbsp Rice Vinegar▪️1 Tbsp Sugar▪️3/4 tsp Salt▪️1/4 Cup Rice Flour, for dredging▪️1/3 Cup Peanut Oil, for cooking▪️ 

California Avocado Cucumber Salad:▪️1 ripe, Fresh California Avocado, peeled, seeded and diced small▪️1 Small Persian Cucumber, diced small▪️1 Scallion, sliced▪️1 Tbsp Rice Vinegar▪️2 tsp Sesame Oil▪️1 tsp Soy Sauce▪️1 tsp Sesame Seeds▪️

Garnish:▪️Sesame Seeds▪️Microgreens (optional)▪️

1️⃣ Rinse the rice until the water runs mostly clear, then cook according to package directions (you should end up with about 3 cups cooked rice). In a separate bowl, stir together the rice vinegar, sugar, and salt until dissolved. Pour over the rice and mix to combine.
2️⃣ Line a 9x9-inch (or similar) baking dish with plastic wrap. Spread the rice into an even layer, then cover with another sheet of plastic wrap. Use the bottom of a glass to firmly press the rice down until it's compact and evenly flattened. Remove the top layer of plastic wrap so the surface can dry out, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or ideally overnight, until the rice is cold, firm, and the surface is slightly dried out.
3️⃣ Remove the rice from the dish and slice into small rectangles (I cut 6 sections across one side and 4 across the other). Pour the rice flour into a small bowl and coat both sides of each rectangle. Place on a plate and set aside in the refrigerator.
4️⃣ To a medium bowl, add the avocado, cucumber, scallion, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and sesame seeds. Stir to combine and set aside in the refrigerator. 
5️⃣ Line a baking sheet with paper towels. Heat the peanut oil in a large heavy-bottomed pot until it reaches 350F on an instant-read thermometer. Working in batches and leaving space between each one, add the rice rectangles and fry for 2–3 mins per side until golden brown. Transfer to the prepared baking sheet.
6️⃣ Spoon the avocado cucumber salad over the crispy rice. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and top each piece with a few sprigs of microgreens, if using. Enjoy!
summary: A recipe for crispy fried rice cakes topped with avocado cucumber salad and sesame seeds.

caption:
Fruits are nature's powerful healers, each offering unique benefits for different ailments, especially when it comes to gut health. From the digestive enzymes in papaya that aid smooth digestion to the fiber-rich apples that promote a healthy gut microbiome, these natural wonders support overall wellness. 

According to Ayurveda, fruits are considered sattvic foods that balance the doshas and nourish the digestive fire (Agni), helping maintain harmony within the body.

Incorporating a variety of fruits into daily life not only enhances immunity but also soothes inflammation and detoxifies the system naturally. Pineapple's anti-inflammatory properties and bananas' ability to replenish electrolytes make them ideal for digestive comfort and energy restoration. 

Embracing fruit-based nutrition rooted in Ayurvedic wisdom can lead to vibrant health and a balanced mind-body connection.

caption:
Carrot Chickpea Burger 🍔

This burger is my go-to when I'm hosting. No potatoes, no breadcrumbs — just chickpeas, carrots, bold Indian spices, and that perfect pan-fried golden crust. It's juicy, flavourful, and truly hits the spot.

⸻

Ingredients (Makes 2 burgers)

For the Patty:
	•	½ cup boiled chickpeas
	•	½ cup boiled and mashed carrots
	•	1 tbsp chopped coriander
	•	1 garlic clove, grated
	•	¼ tsp red chili powder
	•	¼ tsp garam masala
	•	¼ tsp cumin (jeera) powder
	•	¼ tsp coriander powder
	•	¼ tsp amchur powder
	•	Salt to taste
	•	2 tbsp oat flour (or ground oats)

For the Coleslaw:
	•	½ cup shredded carrot
	•	¼ cup thinly sliced onion
	•	1½ tbsp mayonnaise
	•	1 tsp mustard sauce

Other:
	•	2 burger buns
	•	2 tsp mayonnaise (for toasting buns)
	•	1 tbsp sriracha mayo (for assembling)
	•	2–4 tomato slices
	•	Gochujang or sweet chili sauce (for brushing patties)

⸻

Method
	1.	Make the patties:
Mash chickpeas and carrots together. Add coriander, garlic, spices, oat flour, and salt. Mix into a soft dough. Shape into 2 patties.
	2.	Cook the patties:
Heat a non-stick pan with a little oil. Cook patties on both sides until golden and crisp. Once done, brush one side with gochujang or sweet chili sauce.
	3.	Make the coleslaw:
Mix shredded carrot, onion, mayo, and mustard sauce in a bowl. Set aside.
	4.	Toast the buns:
Spread a little mayo on the insides of each bun and toast on the pan until golden.
	5.	Assemble:
Spread sriracha mayo on the bottom bun, add coleslaw, patty, tomato slices, and top bun.

[juicy veggie burger, chickpea burger recipe, carrot recipes, Indian-style burger, no potato patty, healthy burger, gochujang burger, oat flour patty, meatless meal ideas, vegetarian comfort food]
summary: A spiced chickpea and carrot burger patty with Indian spices, coleslaw, and sriracha mayo.

Instructions:

caption:
CREAMY TUSCAN CHICKEN over PROTEIN PASTA

Cooking with stainless steel doesn't have to be intimidating. Use a great pan, learn the simple trick for the "water dance", and it's easy from there. 

👉🥘Comment "PANS" and I'll message you my favorite stainless steel pans.  I used my @madein Stainless Clad Frying Pan to make this one-pan meal. Made In designs professional-quality products for the home cook, and their cookware and kitchenware products are used by thousands of professional chefs.

This high-protein Tuscan chicken is WILD! I served it over Kaizen protein pasta, but use whatever pasta or base you like.

Here's how I made it:

1.Grab 1 lb of boneless, skinless chicken thighs and toss into a bowl. Drizzle with 1 tbsp avocado oil & season with salt, pepper, 1/2 tbsp garlic powder, 1/2 tbsp paprika, 1/2 tbsp oregano. Let it sit for 2 to 6 hours (or overnight), but you can make it right away if you'd like.

2.Grab your Made In stainless steel pan and heat it over medium. You want the pan to get HOT so it acts non-stick. You can check by splashing in a little water. If it sizzles and evaporates, it's not ready. If it dances across the surface like mercury, it's ready to go.

3.Add 1 tbsp oil, add the chicken with the smooth side down. Sear for 5 to 6 mins on each side, & set aside so it redistributes the juices. You'll slice into this later.

4.In the same pan, add 1 tbsp butter, 1/2 diced red onion & 4 sliced garlic cloves. Sauté for 1 to 2 mins.

5.Add 3/4 cup chopped cherry tomatoes (or sun-dried tomatoes) and cook for another 1 to 2 mins.

6.Add 2/3 cup white wine or chicken broth. Simmer for 1 min and scrape up the browned bits.

7.Add 1/2 cup cream and 1/4 cup grated parmesan. Stir well.

8.Slice the cooked chicken, return it to the pan, and coat it in the sauce.

9.Serve it however you like. I put my Kaizen protein pasta at the base and topped it with spoonfuls of the chicken, fresh basil, & more grated parmesan.

Comment PANS or checkout @madein Stainless Collection and Made In's other cookware with the link in my profile.

ENJOY!
.
.
.
#madeinpartner #tuscanchicken #highproteinmeals #lowcarbpasta #mediterraneanfood #healthyrecipes #healthyfoodshare
summary: One-pan Creamy Tuscan Chicken served over protein pasta with step-by-step cooking instructions and stainless steel pan tips.

caption:
Peri Peri Broccoli Bowl 🍲 If you are looking for a no-fuss meal, then this Peri Peri Broccoli bowl is going to be your new favourite 🫶🏻It's creamy, flavorful and a perfect delight to enjoy over a lazy weekend 🤌🏻💫

Ingredients : 
 •For the Herbed Rice : 
 •Short Grain Rice - 1 Cup
 •Butter - 1/2 Tbsp
 •Coriander - 1 Tbsp
 •Lime Juice - 2 Tsps

For the Sauce : 
 •Olive Oil - 2 Tbsps
 •Mushroom - 100g 
 •Garlic - 3 Cloves 
 •Butter - 2 Tbsps
 •AP Flour - 2 Tbsps
 •Milk - 1.5 Cups 
 •Salt & Pepper - to Taste
 •Peri Peri Pwd - 3-4 Tsps
 •Sugar - A pinch
 •Coriander - 1 Tbsp
 •Lime Juice - 2 Tsps 

For the Broccoli : 
 •Broccoli - 300g - boiled and smashed
 •Salt & Pepper - to Taste
 •Olive Oil - 2-3 Tbsps 
 •Peri Peri Powder - 1 tsp

Process 
- Cook the rice and add melted butter,lemon juice and chopped coriander to it and keep it aside.
- For the broccoli, boil it for 2-3 minutes until tender and smash it to make it flat
- Add some olive oil to a pan and charr the broccoli on both sides 
- Season it with salt ,pepper and peri peri powder as per taste
- Now for the sauce, Heat olive oil in a pan and sauté the mushroom and garlic 
- Add butter to the vegetables and let it melt
- Mix in some flour and keep on mixing so it doesn't get stuck to the pan
- Gradually add some milk while mixing it continuously to prevent the flour from clumping 
- Season the sauce with peri peri powder , salt and pepper 
- Top it off with some chopped coriander and lemon juice 
- For assembling press down the rice in a bowl with a small bowl in the centre to create a cavity, place the charred broccoli in the cavity and top it off with the peri peri sauce and enjoy!

caption:
DAY 13 Healthier Homemade | Higher protein alfredo 🤍
Follow along as I'm making our favorites, just at home or with healthier swaps. 

If you don't use cottage cheese, simply replace that amount with heavy cream. I wanted to try it simply for the added protein factor. 🙃 Traditional Alfredo is just butter or oil, heavy cream, garlic, seasonings, & Parmesan cheese. I've made it both ways and both are delish! Orrr add some fresh lemon juice also to give it a fresh taste. 🍋

Recipe:
1tbsp flour
4tbsp butter
2-3 garlic cloves minced 
3/4c chicken broth 
1/2c cottage cheese blended 
1/2c heavy cream
1c freshly grated Parmesan cheese 
1tsp Italian seasoning
Salt & pepper to taste

In your pan, melt butter, cook garlic for 1-2 minutes. Slowly whisk in flour then chicken broth, so it doesn't become lumpy. Continue to stir. Add in cottage cheese, heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Let that thicken and cook for 5-10 minutes on medium heat. Stir in freshly grated cheese. Toss in your noodles (leave some of the noodle water, the startch helps bind to the sauce and thicken it). Enjoy! Garnish with fresh parsley and add chicken or meat of choice.
summary: High-protein homemade alfredo sauce recipe using cottage cheese as a protein boost instead of traditional cream-only base.

caption:
These are going to be the juiciest, tastiest, one-pan chicken you'll ever make.

It all comes down to an amazing marinate, and pair it with my simple spicy everyday sauce that you'll want to slather on everything. The sauce is in my new cookbook! Just comment "SHREDHAPPENS" below and I'll message you how to grab yours.

I love using bone-in skin-on chicken thighs as they add lots of flavor and keep it juicy throughout the cooking process, and remember, you can always remove this after its done cooking or use skinless if you prefer.

I ended up having two thighs with my lowcarb @kaizenfoodco rice, and a simple cucumber salad for the perfect healthy meal with over 45g protein.

Here is how I made it (make more if you want more):

1.Add 4 skin-on bone-in chicken thighs to a bowl. Dab dry with a paper towel.

2.Grab a medium mixing bowl to make the marinade. Add 3 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp tomato paste, 4-5 minced garlic cloves, the zest and juice of 1 large lemon, two very generous pinches salt, pepper, 1 tbsp smoked paprika, 1 tbsp oregano, 1/4 to 1/2 tsp cayenne pepper. Mix very well.

3.Add marinade to the chicken and massage into the chicken, covering all sides. Let this soak up the flavors for 2-6hrs, but ideally overnight.

4.When you're ready to eat, remove chicken from fridge and let it come up to room temp before putting in the oven.

5.Place chicken on a wire rack pop into the oven at 425F for 37-40 mins. Time varies by oven.

6.While thats going, make your sauce. I processed 3tbsp thick greek yogurt (or labneh), a handful fresh mint (3 tbsp), 2 scallions, 1/2 large jalapeño, 1 tbsp olive oil, the juice of half a lemon, and a couple pinches of salt + pepper. Process well, taste, and adjust to your liking.

7.Plate up your chicken, and serve however way you wish. It goes amazing with regular rice, quinoa, or if you're lowcarb/keto my high protein kaizen rice along with a simple cucumber salad and lots of sauce.

ENJOY!
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #ketorecipes #keto #chickenrecipes #healthyrecipes #goodmoodfood #healthyfoodshare
summary: One-pan roasted chicken thighs with Mediterranean marinade and spicy yogurt-mint sauce.

caption:
🔥 430 Cal Chick-Fil-A Chicken SMASH Sandwich

📍 The BEST way to make a low calorie/high protein chicken sandwich. NO DEBATE!

✅ Macros for the WHOLE Sandwich:
430 Cals, 33g Carbs, 9g Fat, 53g Protein

✅ Macros per 2 Tbsp (32g) Low Cal Chick-Fil-A Sauce (makes 7.5 servings):
23 Cals, 2.5g Carbs, 0.25g Fat, 2.5g Protein

✳️ Ingredients (makes 4 Smash Sandwiches):
24oz Chicken Breast
75g Green Onion
50g Red Pepper
10g Parsley
4 Cloves Garlic
3 Big Pinches Sea Salt
2 Big Pinch Black Pepper
4 Brioche Buns (Just from Whole Foods)
84g 2% Colby Jack Cheese
Splash of Chicken Broth
Lettuce
Tomato
Red Onion

✳️ Ingredients for Low Cal Chick-Fil-A Sauce (make about 7.5 servings):
100g Plain Non Fat Greek Yogurt
80g 2% Cottage Cheese
30g Sugar Free Honey Mustard
25g Sugar Free BBQ Sauce
10g Djion Mustard
5g Pickle Juice (from jar)
2g Zero Cal Sweetener

❇️ Directions:
1️⃣ First make the sauce. Add all your ingredients into a small blender and blend till smooth. That simple!
2️⃣ Flatten your chicken breast (I used my fists lol) and then use a knife to chop to a fine mince. You could do this in your food processor but I like it better with the knife. Gives it a better consistency.
3️⃣ Then add the chicken mince to a bowl and add diced green onion, diced red pepper, finely chopped parsley, minced garlic, sea salt and black pepper. Mix to combine and form into 4 even size burgers.
4️⃣ Preheat your pan on a 7/10 heat. Add one of your patties to the pan and then press down with your burger press. Cook with the burger press on top for 3-4 minutes on that side. Then flip.
5️⃣ Then add your cheese on top and add a splash of chicken broth to the pan to help melt the cheese but also give the burgers a bit more juiciness. Add a cover on top to help with this.
6️⃣ Once cheese is melted, it's time to build the sandwich! Toasted brioche bottom bun, chick-fil-a sauce, lettuce, tomato, red onion, chicken smash patty, more sauce on top toasted brioche bun and enjoy!

#chickfila #chickensandwich #chickfilasauce #airfryer #healthy #mealprep #healthylunch #healthyrecipes #easylunch #quickrecipes #easyrecipes #lowcalorie #weightloss #fatloss #gymfood #foodie #highprotein #macrofriendly
summary: A 430-calorie homemade Chick-fil-A-style chicken smash sandwich with high protein macros and a low-calorie sauce recipe.

caption:
Our new favorite way to make egg salad thanks to @good_culture! We were inspired to try this out after visiting the Culture Counter pop up event in NYC where chefs brought their favorite Good Culture recipes to life. This is our green goddess egg salad protein packed with blended Good Culture and loaded with fresh herbs

Ingredients:
8 eggs, hard boiled 
1 and 1/2 cups Good Culture Cottage Cheese, blended 
Fresh herbs ~1-2 cups of basil, parsley, chives, dill, and tarragon (only a little)
1 small shallot, diced finely 
1 tbsp dijon mustard 
Zest and juice of 1/4 a lemon 
Salt & pepper 
Softened butter 
Japanese milk bread or soft white bread 

Recipe:
Drop eggs in cold water and bring to a boil then lower to a simmer for 7 minutes and transfer to ice bath 
Blanch herbs in boiling water for 2 minutes and transfer to ice bath 
Food process Good Culture Cottage Cheese until smooth then add herbs, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt & pepper
Separate yolks from whites and mix the cottage cheese mixture plus dijon mustard and shallots into the yolk mixture 
Chop the whites and slowly add back into the yolks - taste for seasoning!
Butter the inside of the bread, dollop a healthy serving of egg salad, remove crust (optional) and enjoy :) 

#goodculture #culturecounternyc
summary: Green goddess egg salad recipe made with blended cottage cheese, fresh herbs, and served on buttered bread.

caption:
marry me chicken pasta bake 🍝 This was so quick and easy, plus it has 45g protein per portion!

511 kcal (47.2g C, 15.7g F, 45.5g P) - serves 4

Sign up to my app @ell_evateapp from just £4.16 a month and get access to all of my recipes!

Ingredients for 4:
500g raw chicken breast seasoned with 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic salt, 1 tsp Italian herbs
250g dry pasta
1 onion
1 tbsp tomato puree
40g sun-dried tomatoes
20g parmesan
200ml chicken stock
200ml low fat cream 
Season pasta sauce with 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic salt, 1 tsp Italian herbs
80g grated mozzarella 
Handful of spinach 

method:
1. Pop the pasta onto boil for 12 minutes 
2. Season the chicken breast with 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic salt, 1 tsp Italian herbs and fry until brown then set aside
3. To the same pan fry onions until soft
4. Next add tomato puree, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic salt, 1 tsp Italian herbs, stock, low fat cream, parmesan. Leave to simmer for 5 minutes before adding the cooked chicken and spinach. 
5. Simmer until the sauce thickens then add in the drained pasta and coat
6. Pour into an ovenproof dish and bake in the oven for 20 minutes at 180 degrees C 
7. Divide into 4 portions

This will keep in the fridge for up to 3 days!

#healthyrecipe #onepandinner #easydinner #fakeaway #highproteinmeal
summary: High-protein chicken pasta bake with creamy tomato sauce, 45g protein per serving, ready in under an hour.

caption:
This is seriously one of the best appetizers I've ever made, and easy to throw together!

🔥 Roasted Tomato Burrata Dip with Garlic Bread Crostinis🍅🧄

Ripe bursted cherry tomatoes, stir in burrata or stracciatella, and scoop it all up with crispy garlic crostinis. A total flavor bomb… have the recipe ready, people WILL ask for it!

🛒You'll Need:
• cherry tomatoes
• Olive oil
• Salt, pepper, red pepper flakes
• Garlic, parsley, oregano
• Burrata or stracciatella (burrata filling)
• Fresh basil
• Parmesan
• French baguette
• Butter, garlic, salt, parm, parsley (for garlic butter)

🧈 How to Make:
	1.	Add cherry tomatoes to a baking dish and drizzle generously with olive oil (enough to coat the bottom of your dish).
	2.	Season with salt, pepper, red pepper flakes, garlic, parsley, and oregano.
	3.	Bake at 425°F for 20-30 mins until tomatoes burst (you can gently smash them halfway if they need some assistance in the 'bursting' process).
	4.	While that bakes, slice a French bread baguette, spread with garlic butter (butter, garlic, salt, parsley, parm), and toast 5–7 mins until golden.
	5.	Once you're ready to serve, top with parm, fresh basil, and burrata. Stir it all together and serve HOT.

Dip. Scoop. Repeat. This one is next level tasty 🤤  definitely a heavy appetizer, perfect to bring to a party or to serve at your next gathering. 

Everything was purchased at @aldiusa 🧡

caption:
3 CROCKPOT RECIPES🔽

Sick of eating healthy and working out at 40 and still seeing no change? Comment CORE and I'll send you my one week meal plan, grocery list, and recipes. 

🥙Crockpot Greek Chicken Gyros:
Ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breasts
2 tbsp lemon juice
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp dried oregano
1/2 tsp dried dill
Salt to taste
Pita bread (whole wheat or a gluten free tortilla, your choice), lettuce, tomatoes, tzatziki sauce for serving

Instructions: Combine chicken, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, and dill in crockpot. Cook on low for 4-6 hours. Serve in pita bread with lettuce, tomatoes, and tzatziki sauce.

🌯Crockpot Chicken Enchilada Casserole:
Ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breasts, shredded
1 can (10 oz) red enchilada sauce
1 can (4 oz) diced green chilies
1 cup shredded cheese
8 corn tortillas, torn into pieces

Instructions: Layer chicken, enchilada sauce, chilies, cheese, and tortillas in crockpot. Repeat layers. Cook on low for 4-6 hours.

Salt and pepper to taste
Serve over rice or potatoes and a side salad

Instructions: Place chicken in crockpot, pour lemon juice and butter, add garlic, thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook on low for 4-6 hours.

caption:
RECIPE ⬇️

Strawberry Chia Seed Jam

(Makes about 1 standard 300ml jar)

Ingredients:
2 cups fresh or frozen strawberries
(or raspberries, blueberries, blackberries, or a mix of berries)
2 tablespoons chia seeds
1–2 tablespoons honey (to taste)

Instructions:
1️⃣Heat the berries in a small saucepan over medium heat, stir until they break down and become syrupy (about 5–8 minutes). If using frozen berries like I did, no need to thaw just cook a bit longer.

2️⃣Mash the softened berries with a fork or potato masher to your desired texture (smooth or chunky).

3️⃣Remove from heat, stir in the honey and chia seeds.

4️⃣Let sit for 10–15 minutes to thicken as the chia seeds absorb the liquid.

5️⃣Transfer to a clean jar and put in the fridge. It will continue to thicken as it chills. Keeps for up to 1 week in the fridge.

caption:
Godna Folkart -Pen on paper -11x16
Godna art is an ancient and culturally significant form of body art practiced predominantly by tribal and rural communities in India, particularly in states like Chhattisgarh, Bihar, Jharkhand, Madhya Pradesh, and Uttar Pradesh. The word "godna" comes from the Hindi verb "godna", meaning "to pierce." It refers to the traditional tattooing of the skin using natural pigments

caption:

Creamy Tomato Chicken Bake (High Protein, 4 Serves)

Ingredients 
Chicken Breast 500 g
Mushroom 150 g
Onion, Brown, Raw 100g
Light Greek Yoghurt (Coles) 150 g
Long Grain White Rice (Coles) 160 g
Chicken stock (campbells) 250 ml
Pesto Sundried Tomato (Leggos) 47 g
Light cheese (coles) 25g
1/2 kewpie mayo (kewpie) 15g
25ml Light Sweet Chilli

Method
1. Preheat oven to 180°C 

2. In a large oven-safe baking dish, **combine** the following:

 * Uncooked rice
 * Chicken stock
 * Diced chicken breast
 * Low fat Greek yoghurt
 * Tomato basil pesto
 * Sliced mushrooms
 * Chopped onions

3. **Mix well** to evenly combine all ingredients.

4. **Cover tightly** with foil or a lid.

5. **Bake for 60 minutes**, or until the chicken is fully cooked and rice is tender.

6. **Remove from oven** top with kewpie and sweet chilli

373 Calories
37.4g Protein
7.3g Fat
41g Carbs

caption:
🔥🍋 One-Pan Lemony Chicken Bake 

This is what I like to call one of the confidence-builder meals in my cookbook. Like… make this once and you'll feel like a total superstar in the kitchen (I even wrote that in the book, page 119!).

The flavor combo is next level: lemony, garlicky and it makes your whole house smell like you did that thing. Serve it with salad, veggies, mashed potatoes, rice, or if you're watching carbs, I had mine with my Kaizen high protein, low carb rice.

📕 Comment SHREDHAPPENS below and I'll send you the link to my new cookbook with 100 high-protein, low-carb, Mediterranean-inspired recipes just like this.

Here's what you need:

2 pounds bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs
3 tbsp olive oil
Salt & pep
1 shallot, minced
3 tbsp fresh dill, finely chopped
5 garlic cloves, minced
1 tsp lemon zest
2 tbsp Dijon mustard
1/4cup grated pecorino
2 lemons
2 tbsp parsley, chopped (for garnish)
4 lemon wedges (for garnish)

Here's how I made it:

1.Preheat oven to 425°F.

2.Pat the chicken dry and place in a baking dish.

3.Massage with 2 tbsp olive oil, season with salt + pepper.

4.Add shallot, dill, garlic, lemon zest, mustard, pecorino, and 4 tbsp lemon juice.

5.Rub everything into the chicken. Let sit for 30 mins to 2 hrs if possible.

6.Pour the remaining 2 tbsp lemon juice over the top + drizzle with the last tbsp of olive oil.

7.Bake for 30-35 mins. Baste with pan juices, then bake 10-15 more until golden and cooked through.

8.Spoon the drippings over the top, garnish with parsley + lemon wedges, and serve!

ENJOY!
.
.
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #keto #ketorecipes #healthyrecipes #goodmoodfood #healthyfoodshare #chickenrecipes
summary: One-pan lemony garlic chicken thighs baked with fresh dill, Dijon mustard, and pecorino cheese.

caption:
LOWCARB AIRFRIED SPICY STICKY CHICKEN TENDERS

I've lost 100+lbs eating healthier versions of my favorite foods with more protein and fewer carbs, and its things like these lowcarb, high protein chicken tenders that keep me on track. If you love chicken tenders, these are an AMAZING healthier option and taste incredible.

To keep them lowcarb, I coated these in lowcarb almond flour bread crumbs (you can use cereal, crushed pork rinds, or regular crumbs, too) and used a low sugar honey instead of honey, but regular honey works, too!

If you haven't preordered my cookbook yet, you can always comment COOKBOOK below and I'll send you a DM with the link!

Chicken Ingredients:
1 pound chicken tenders or cut of choice, cut into thin strips
1 cup low-carb breadcrumbs (or crushed pork rinds)
2 large eggs
1 tsp smoked paprika
Pinch of salt & pepper

Sauce Ingredients:
1/4 cup low sugar or regular honey
2 to 3 tbsp sriracha
1 tbsp rice vinegar 
1 tbsp soy sauce
1/2 tsp garlic powder 

Directions:

1.In a bowl, whisk 2 eggs. In another bowl, combine the lowcarb breadcrumbs (or crumbs) with smoked paprika, a touch of salt & black pepper.

2. Dip each chicken tender into the whisked egg, allowing any excess to drip off, then coat it with the seasoned breadcrumbs.

3. Place the breaded tenders in a single layer in the air fryer basket. Spray them lightly with avocado oil for a crispy finish. Air-fry or bake for 12 mins, flip, and airfry for another 3-5 mins until golden brown and cooked through (internal temp should reach 165F - time varies by airfryer + thickness, so it may be longer for you.

4.While the tenders are going, bring a pan to LOW heat, add 1/4 cup low sugar honey or regular honey, 2 to 3 tbsp sriracha, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tbsp soy sauce, and 1/2 tsp garlic powder. Mix well.

5. Add the sauce into a bowl and carefully dip both sides of the tenders, or you can spoon it over. Top with sesame seeds. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce. I dipped them in my homemade ranch and they were spectacular.

ENJOY!

If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS
.
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #keto #ketorecipes #airfryerrecipes #chickenrecipes #healthyrecipes
summary: Low-carb air-fried spicy sticky chicken tenders with sriracha-honey glaze

caption:
Just got back from Italy and Amsterdam and ate some of the best food of my life. No rules, just enjoying every bite. Now I'm home and easing back into meals that fuel me. I've lost 100 pounds over the years, and what's helped most is finding meals that are simple, satisfying, and actually fun to eat.

Like this Chicken Bacon Ranch Wrap 🥬🥓

For a fun twist, I added a layer of thin rice paper on the outside (think giant spring roll). If you're super low carb or not feeling it, just use lettuce.

Here's how I made it:

1.Add 2 lbs chicken thighs to a bowl. Drizzle with 1 tbsp oil, a couple pinches salt, 1 tbsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tbsp garlic powder, 1/2 tbsp onion powder, 1/2 tbsp thyme, 1/4 tsp cayenne, 1/4 tsp cumin, and 1/2 tsp coriander. Mix well and let sit for 30 mins to come to room temp.

2.Grill, air fry, or pan-sear. I used a pan on medium heat for 3 mins, flipped, covered, and cooked for 6 more mins. Then turned off the heat and kept the lid on for 5 mins

3.Wash iceberg lettuce, shred cucumber, slice tomato and avocado, and chop chives.

4.Lay 8 oz bacon on a baking sheet and bake at 400°F for 20 mins or air fry. Cool on paper towels. I use 2 strips per wrap.

5.Mix 3 tbsp mayo, 3 tbsp sour cream, 1/3 cup buttermilk, 2 tbsp apple cider vinegar, juice of 1/2 lemon, 1/2 tbsp each dill, oregano, onion powder, 1/4 tbsp garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Taste and adjust.

6.Quickly dunk 3 thin rice paper sheets in warm water. Lay them out in a Venn diagram: 2 overlapping on the sides, 1 at the top. Add lettuce, 2 bacon slices, chicken, and veggies.

7.Fold the lettuce over the fillings, then fold the top rice paper sheet down. Tuck in the sides and roll it up burrito-style.

8. Add as much or little ranch as you like and enjoy.

If you make it, let me know what you think on SHREDHAPPENS!

#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #healthyrecipes #goodmoodfood #healthyfoodshare #ketorecipes
summary: Low-carb chicken bacon ranch wrap recipe with optional rice paper exterior and homemade ranch dressing.

caption:
This is a gem of a recipe that I've been devouring for many years! Hope you love it just as much as I do 😄 Chris x

THAI CASHEW CHICKEN | Serves 4

INGREDIENTS

600g / 1.3lbs boneless skinless Chicken Thighs, diced into bite-sized pieces
1 tsp White Pepper
1 tbsp + 2 tsp Light Soy Sauce
50g / 1/3 cup Plain Flour
120ml / 1/2 cup Veg Oil (for frying)
200g / 7oz Unsalted Cashew Nuts
2 medium White Onions, halved then diced into quarters (pull layers apart)
2 medium Peppers, I use 1 red 1 green (diced into pieces to similar size as the onion)
4 cloves of Garlic, finely diced
2 Red Chillies, deseeded if you want to reduce spice
3 Spring Onion, separated into firm white part and green part, then chopped into 2.5cm/1" pieces
1 1/2 tbsp Granulated Sugar
1 tbsp Oyster Sauce
Cooked Rice, for serving

METHOD

1️⃣In a large mixing bowl, combine the chicken with the white pepper + 2 tsp soy sauce. Mix in the flour until the chicken is fully coated.
2️⃣Heat the oil in a wok or large, deep frying pan/wok over a medium-high heat for a few mins. Once hot, add the cashews and fry until deep golden. Keep an eye on them, as they'll burn quickly. Remove with a slotted spoon and place in a bowl to one side, leaving the oil behind.
3️⃣Working in two batches, shake off any excess flour from the chicken and add it to the oil. Fry until golden and crisp on the outside and piping hot right through the centre (about 5 mins per batch). Remove each batch with a slotted spoon and set aside. Discard all but around 2 tbsp of oil (just eyeball it).
4️⃣Add the peppers, onions and garlic and fry for a couple of mins, then add the chilli and firm white parts of the spring onions and fry for a min longer. Stir in the chicken, then stir in the sugar, oyster sauce and remaining 1 tbsp soy sauce. Toss in the cashews and the rest of the spring onion. The sugar should have fully dissolved and the sauce should have a glossy texture that just lightly coats everything. Serve & enjoy!
summary: Thai cashew chicken recipe with fried cashews, peppers, onions, and a glossy soy-oyster sauce.

caption:
‼️ TRIGGER WARNING ‼️ 
•
My case, and point 😭 Trust me, I get no joy in being right. But I had a feeling things wouldn't end well for this father. 
•
CPS showed up one hour later with "reinforcements" and a warrant. That's their protocol when you refuse to "cooperate."
•
I knew I'd get a lot of blowback - look at comments in previous post - "So you just let them take your child?!" That's not what I said. I said you have to play their game. 
•
At the initial visit, where the social worker comes knocking on the door saying she "emailed him an order" he was absolutely correct to not let her in the house. Court orders are physical pieces of paper, which she should have shown him with the allegations stated and dated, signed by the judge. They are NEVER emailed. 
•
Once he knew she did not have a court order, he should have simply stated so and let her go. The LESS you talk, the better. He should have immediately called a DEPENDENCY attorney (not a civil rights attorney) and come up with a strategy. An experienced attorney would know that the social worker would immediately go to the court house and get a warrant. 
•
Again, I don't know the specifics of this case and I am not an attorney, so I can't comment extensively. But I do know that having a clear plan and strategy can be the difference between having your child removed for two days or two years. 
•
People still don't seem to understand your civil rights DO NOT MATTER in Family Court. The agency can do WHATEVER they deem is "in the best interest of the child." WHO determines that? The Court. 
•
Unless you've lived it, you will never understand what it's like to be up against this system. Why don't attorneys take CPS cases? Because they know it's a lawless system.
owner_name: Rachel Bruno | Author | Speaker | Family Advocate
summary: Rachel Bruno explains legal strategy for handling CPS involvement, emphasizing the importance of hiring a dependency attorney and understanding family court procedures.

caption:
Greek chicken bowl✨

Chicken + Marinade:▪️1+1/2 lb. Boneless Skinless Chicken Thighs (or sub breasts pounded 1/2" thick)▪️2 Cloves Garlic, minced▪️1/2 a Lemon, juice▪️1 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️1 tsp Oregano▪️1 tsp Paprika▪️1 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1/4 tsp Pepper▪️1 Tbsp Avocado Oil, for cooking the chicken▪️

Tzatziki: ▪️1/2 a Large Cucumber, grated▪️2 Cups Plain 2% Greek Yogurt▪️1 Clove Garlic, grated or minced▪️1 Lemon, juice▪️1 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️1/2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️

Lemon Dill Rice:▪️1 Cup Long Grain White Rice, uncooked▪️1+1/2 Cups Chicken Stock▪️1/2 tsp Kosher Salt▪️1 Clove Garlic, finely chopped▪️1 Medium Lemon, zest (~1 tsp)▪️2 Tbsp Chopped Fresh Dill▪️2 Tbsp Butter▪️

Salad:▪️2 Cups Romaine Lettuce, sliced in thin strips▪️1/2 a Large Cucumber (1+1/2 Cups)▪️1+1/2 Cups Cherry Tomatoes, sliced in quarters▪️1/4 of a Small Red Onion, sliced in thin strips▪️2 Tbsp Red Wine Vinegar▪️2 Tbsp Olive Oil▪️1/4 tsp Dried Oregano▪️1/4 tsp Pepper▪️1/4 tsp Kosher Salt▪️

Serving:▪️Grilled Pita (optional)▪️

1️⃣ Place the chicken in a bowl with the rest of the ingredients for the marinade. Cover and refrigerate while you prep the rest of the ingredients (at least 15 mins).
2️⃣ Mix together the ingredients for the tzatziki and set aside in the fridge.
3️⃣ Rinse and drain the rice. Transfer to a medium pot and add the chicken stock, salt, and garlic. (If you skipped washing the rice, add 2 more Tbsp stock). Bring to a  boil over high heat, then cover and simmer on low heat for 15 mins. Remove the pot from the heat and let rest covered for 10 mins, then stir in the lemon zest, dill, and butter.
4️⃣ To make the salad, place the romaine, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and red onion in a bowl. Whisk together the red wine vinegar, olive oil, oregano, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl and set aside until the chicken is done.
5️⃣ Preheat a pan over medium high and add the oil. Sear the chicken 5-6 mins per side (10-12 mins total) until internal temp reaches 165F. Remove from the pan, let rest for a couple mins, and slice.
6️⃣ Toss the salad with the dressing and serve it in a bowl with the lemon dill rice, chicken, tzatziki, and pita. Enjoy!

⏲25 min prep time + 30 min cook time

Recipe serves 4
summary: Greek chicken bowl recipe with marinated pan-seared chicken thighs, lemon dill rice, cucumber salad, and tzatziki sauce.

It's simple but so effective. Do this every morning. 
✅ 4 exercises, 2 rounds, I'm using 5 lb dumbbells:

1️⃣ Hip flexor knee raises - 12 reps each side
2️⃣ Elbow to knee lifts to the side - 12 reps each side

4️⃣ Squats 25 reps

caption:
Sheet Pan Fajita Chicken & Veggies

This one !! 🤩 

Ingredients:
	•	3 lbs boneless skinless chicken breast, cut into strips
	•	1 red bell pepper, sliced
	•	1 orange bell pepper, sliced
	•	1 yellow bell pepper, sliced
	•	1 yellow onion, sliced
	•	6 cloves garlic, smashed
	•	4 tbsp olive oil
	•	Juice of 1 lime
	•	2 tsp salt
	•	½ tsp black pepper
	•	2 tbsp garlic powder
	•	3 tbsp chili powder
	•	1 tsp paprika
	•	1 tsp onion powder

Instructions:
	1.	Preheat your oven to 400°F.
	2.	On a nonstick or parchment-lined baking sheet, lay the sliced peppers and onion in separate straight lines—do not mix them together.
	3.	Arrange the chicken strips on the sheet in their own section, keeping them separate from the vegetables.
	4.	Drizzle olive oil and lime juice evenly over the chicken and veggies.
	5.	Sprinkle all the spices and smashed garlic over everything, distributing them as evenly as possible.
	6.	Using your hands or tongs, mix the vegetables gently within their section, and do the same with the chicken—keep everything separated for even roasting.
	7.	Bake for 25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and slightly golden, depending on the thickness of the strips. Broil for 3 minutes to get some extra good color! 

Tip: Add lime slices to the pan before baking !

Serve with warm tortillas, rice, or a simple salad for a quick and colorful meal!
summary: A sheet pan fajita recipe with marinated chicken breast and sliced peppers and onions, baked at 400°F for 25 minutes.

caption:
Middle eastern chicken skewers in the oven (or air fryer!)

I've lost over 100lbs and love making high meals like this middle eastern chicken & rice. It's delicious, packs a ton of protein, it's lowcarb, and keeps me full + satiated. I used my @kaizenfoodco lowcarb rice here to stay lowcarb and add 20g protein a serving, but you can use regular rice or any alternative you prefer.

>Comment "COOKBOOK" & I'll message you a link to preorder my cookbook + a gift you a free ebook today with easy healthy recipes.

Here is how to make it:

1.Cut 2.5lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs in 1.5 inch pieces. Add to a bowl. Drizzle with 2 tbsp olive oil. Season with salt, pepper, 1 tbsp onion powder, 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tbsp Aleppo or chili flakes, & 1/4 tsp cinnamon. Add 2 tbsp tomato paste, 2 tbsp plain yogurt or sourcream, & the juice of 1 lemon. Give it a good mix $ & marinate for 2-6 hrs, but ideally overnight.

2.When you're ready to eat, remove chicken from the fridge and let sit for 30-60 mins to come to room temp. Skewer them or layout the chicken on a sheet pan. Add diced onions or peppers as you wish.

3.Preheat oven to 400F. Add skewers to a sheet lined with parchment paper & in the oven for 36-38 mins. If air frying, airfry for 25 mins at 400F.

4.While thats going , make a garlicky white sauce. Mix 4 minced garlic cloves, 2 tbsp mayo, 2 tbsp sour cream or thick yogurt, 1-2 tbsp finely chopped fresh flat parsley, zest & juice of a lemon, and a generous pinch of salt&pepper. Taste + adjust: if you'd like it more lemony, add more lemon or if you want to thin out the sauce, add 1-2 tbsp water.

5.Remove chicken from the oven, top with white sauce, fresh parsley, sumac, and whatever else you like.

6.I also made a quick and easy tomato red onion and parsley salad, then served it all over my kaizen lowcarb rice.

If you make it, let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

ENJOY
.
.
.
#lowcarb #lowcarbrecipes #ketorecipes #mediterraneanfood #middleeasternfood #keto #ketorecipes  #healthyrecipes #healthyfoodshare #chickenrecipes
summary: Middle Eastern chicken skewers with garlicky white sauce and tomato salad, optimized for low-carb and keto diets.
