caption:
If you've never tried tofu like this, now's the time. 
Wholesome, protein-packed, and full of flavor, these plant-based meatballs are a weeknight win.

Ingredients:
454 g firm tofu (1 packet) - 16 oz 
2 garlic cloves 
80 g breadcrumbs (1/2 cup + 2 tbsp)
basil + parsley
1 tsp paprika 
1.5 tbsp nutritional yeast (optional) 
Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions: 
1. Pat dry the tofu to remove excess moisture.
2. Add tofu, garlic, basil, parsley, breadcrumbs, paprika, nutritional yeast (optional), salt, and pepper to a food processor or blender.
3. Blend until a soft, moldable mixture forms. Add more breadcrumbs if needed.
4. Roll the mixture into small balls.
5. Lightly fry the balls in a bit of olive oil until golden about 5 minutes. 
6. Simmer them in tomato sauce for 10–15 minutes.
7. Serve warm and enjoy!

🏷️ #easyrecipes #tofurecipes #plantbasedfood #tofu #quickrecipes
summary: A recipe for crispy pan-fried tofu meatballs simmered in tomato sauce, made with breadcrumbs and herbs.

caption:
Send this to your mother now ❤️
.
.
If your mother has bigger arms than you…
but still can't lift a 2kg dumbbell without pain, it's because she's lost a lot of muscle.

After 50, especially post-menopause, women can lose up to 1–2% of muscle mass per year.
It's not fat, and it's not age. It's muscle loss.

Now send this to her before you forget.

Because that's why so many moms look "strong" — but feel tired, unstable, or in pain doing basic things.

This isn't about aesthetics.
It's about strength, balance, and independence.

Show her these 4 resistance band exercises that rebuild strength in a safe, joint-friendly way:
	1.	Banded Bicep Curls –
Strengthens the front of the arms, making it easier to lift bags, groceries, or heavy items.
It's a great starting point for rebuilding arm function without stressing the joints.
	2.	Overhead Press with Band –
Improves shoulder mobility and stability, essential for reaching, lifting overhead, or even combing hair without pain.
It also supports better posture and spinal alignment.
	3.	Banded Rows –
Targets the upper back and shoulders, helping reverse rounded posture from years of slouching.
This builds pulling strength and reduces neck and shoulder tension.
	4.	Tricep Extensions –
Tones the back of the arms and improves push strength, useful for getting up from chairs or supporting daily movement.
Also helps reduce that "flabby arm" feel many women notice after menopause.

Start with 2 sets of 12–15 reps, 3 times a week. No fancy equipment. No gym.
And no — walking and household chores aren't enough.

Help her rebuild what time, hormones, and neglect have quietly taken away.
Because muscle is truly medicine.
.
.
#mother #momhealth #womenshealth #menopause #strength #aginggracefully #strengthtraining #resistancetraining #parents 
.
.
[mother, resistance bands, arm]
owner_name: Navneeth Ramprasad | Fitness for All Ages
summary: Four resistance band exercises designed to help older women rebuild muscle mass and functional strength lost after menopause.

caption:
@kalejunkie ONE PAN MEDITERRANEAN ROASTED CHICKEN & LEMONY POTATOES, brought to you by @potterybarn :) If you are looking for an easy dinner for gatherings, make this! Juicy, perfectly seasoned chicken with crispy skin, served with lemony potatoes, ahhhh it's so good!

My seasonal dinnerware and cute easter goblets are @potterybarn! They not only have great furniture, they have great kitchen items too! Comment LINKS or SPRING and I will send you links!

Makes 8 -10 servings
8-10 bone in, skin on chicken thighs
3 tb olive oil
2/3 cup greek yogurt
1/4 cup tomato paste
1 tb cumin
1 tb paprika
1 tsp kosher salt
1 tsp ground black pepper
1 tsp coriander 
5 cloves garlic, mashed
6 potatoes of choice—I like yukon gold
2 lemons, 1 of which is zested
Garnish: chopped parsley

Preheat oven to 425F. Pat chicken dry. Add to a large bowl and toss very well with the olive oil, yogurt, tomato paste, seasonings and mashed garlic. The more you coat well, the better! Arrange chicken on a baking sheet/tray. Keep the bowl. Next, wash and cut potatoes. Add them to the bowl that the chicken was in and squeeze one lemon and add the zest of one lemon. Toss to coat well then add the potatoes to the baking sheet/tray. Cover with foil. Bake one hour and ten minutes. Remove foil. Then turn broiler on high and make sure the rack is high. Broil 3 minutes or so until the skin gets crispy. Remove from oven. Plate and drizzle juices from the chicken on top. Serve and enjoy! 

#mypotterybarn #roastedchicken
summary: One-pan Mediterranean roasted chicken thighs with lemony potatoes, a simple sheet pan dinner for gatherings.

caption:
Grilled Chicken Chipotle Bowls

For the Chicken:
	•	3 lbs boneless, skinless chicken breast, sliced thin
	•	1/4 cup olive oil
	•	1/2 lemon, juiced
	•	1.5 tsp salt
	•	2 tsp onion powder
	•	1 tbsp garlic powder
	•	1 tbsp chili powder
	•	1 tbsp paprika
	•	2 tsp oregano
	•	1/2 tsp black pepper
	•	Pinch of cayenne pepper (optional, for heat)

Instructions:
In a large bowl, add the chicken and combine the olive oil, lemon juice, and all seasonings and toss to coat well. Let marinate for at least 30 minutes (or longer for more flavor).
Grill on a barbecue or a hot cast-iron pan over medium-high heat for 4–5 minutes per side, or until beautifully charred and the internal temperature reaches 165°F. Let rest for a few minutes before slicing.

For the Rice:
	•	Jasmine rice (cooked according to package instructions)
	•	Pinch of salt
	•	Juice of 1 lime
	•	1–2 tsp dried parsley flakes (sub with fresh cilantro if preferred)

Instructions:
Once rice is fully cooked, fluff it with a fork and stir in salt, lime juice, and dried parsley (or cilantro if that's your thing).

To Build Your Bowls:
Layer the rice and grilled chicken, then top with your favorite fixings: black beans, corn, pico, guac, cheese, sour cream — whatever you'd load up at Chipotle.
summary: Recipe for grilled chicken chipotle bowls with seasoned chicken breast, lime-cilantro rice, and customizable toppings.

caption:
After 6 days a week of eating extra clean, working out, and fuelling up right, we just HAVE to celebrate right — cravings and all.

This Mughlai Chicken Handi is one of @aditya.bansal93 's  favourites. Creamy, rich, indulgent. 
I've reduced the quantity of ghee, cream and fried onions below for a healthier recipe for you, but if you're in the mood to go all out, please increase it to your heart's content. ❤️

⸻

Boneless Mughlai Chicken Handi – Serves 4

Macros per serving (approx): 295 kcal | 27g protein | 4g carbs | 19g fat

Ingredients:

For marinade:
	•	500g boneless chicken thigh or leg (cut into cubes)
 •. 1 cup thick/hung curd
	•	1 tbsp thick ginger garlic paste
	•	1 tsp Kashmiri red chili powder
	•	1.5 tsp coriander powder
	•	1 tsp kasuri methi
	•	1/2 tsp cumin powder
	•	2 tbsp chopped coriander stems
	•	Salt to taste
	•	2 tbsp fried onions (can air-fry or microwave instead of deep frying)

For cooking:
	•	1 tsp ghee
	•	2–3 whole spices (clove, cardamom, bay leaf)
	•	1/2 cup hot water
	•	Salt and a pinch of sugar to taste
	•	1/2 tsp garam masala
	•	1.5 tbsp fresh cream
	•	1 tsp slivered almonds
	•	Fresh coriander to garnish

👩🏽‍🍳 Method:
	1.	Mix all marinade ingredients with the chicken. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
	2.	Heat ghee in a handi or kadhai, add whole spices and let them sizzle.
	3.	Add the marinated chicken. Cover and cook on low for 10–15 minutes.
	4.	Add hot water, stir, cover again and simmer till chicken is tender.
	5.	Once cooked, season with salt, a pinch of sugar, and garam masala.
	6.	Stir in cream, slivered almonds, and garnish with coriander.
	7.	Serve hot with roti, paratha, or jeera rice.

.
 #HealthyCravings #SundayIndulgence #indianfood #fitnessmotivation
summary: A healthier version of Mughlai Chicken Handi with reduced cream and ghee, featuring macros and step-by-step cooking instructions.

caption:
STREET CORN PASTA SALAD! 🌽🌶️🥗😋 Completely Dairy-free, Vegan, GF & addicting! Save the recipe below!

Pasta Salad 
2 cups of your favorit small pasta, uncooked ( I'm using stelline from @jovialfoods )
1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil
5 cups frozen corn
1 green bell pepper, diced
1 jalepeno, diced (DON't ADD IF YOU DON"T LIKE SPICE)
1/2 cup plant-based feta
2/3 cup cilantro
2 avocados, diced

Chipotle Dressing
1/2 cup plant-based mayo
2 tbsp unsweetned plant-based yogurt
2 cloves garlic, grated or very finely chopped
3 tbsp chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, chopped
1/2 tsp salt
the juice from 1 lime
2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil

1. Bring a large pasta pot of water to a boil over high heat, then add a few pinches of sea salt to the water. Add the pasta, stir, and cook according to package instructions. When the pasta is cooked, drain and rinse with cold water.

2. Heat olive oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet. Add the corn and cook for 2-3 minutes undisturbed until charred. Stir and cook another 1-2 minutes until warmed through. Remove and set aside to cool.

4. Meanwhile, make the dressing by whisking or blending all ingredients until smooth and creamy.

5. Add the salad ingredients to a large salad bowl and toss in half of the dressing. Add the pasta and top with remaining dressing to serve.

caption:
One Pan Chicken Platter & Pita 🐓🫓 Chicken & Greek Yogurt with a Sides of Greek Yogurt 🤣 #chickenplatter #asmr #highprotein #greekyogurt #pita 

CHICKEN THIGH MARINADE
6 Chicken Thighs
3/4 cup greek yogurt
1 whole lemons zest
3 cloves garlic
Olive Oil
Seasonings: Garlic Powder, Onion Powder, Whole Foods 365 Peruvian Seasoning, Cumin, Cayenne, Paprika, Red Pepper Flakes, White Pepper, Salt & Pepper.

LET CHICKEN MARINADE FOR ATLEAST 30 MIN

BAKE AT 425 UNTIL 165 INTERNAL TEMP OR ABOVE (I do mine above for extra tenderness)

PITA
1 Cup Bread Flour (please add more if dough is too sticky should be smooth) + As needed for surface
1 Cup Plain Non-Fat Greek Yogurt
3 tsp baking powder
Seasonings: Garlic Powder & Salt (Parsley for topping)

COOKING PITA
1) Mix all ingredients together in a bowl 
2) Flour surface and kneed until smooth (add flour when necessary)
3) Split into 4 equal balls and roll out dough
4) Cook on medium heat until golden brown and flip when it starts to bubble (feel free to add parsley)

WRAP SAUCE
1/2 Cup Greek Yogurt
1/2 Cup Mayo
1/2 Lemon Juice
1 Tbsp Olive Oil
1-2 cloves garlic 
Seasonings: Fresh Cilantro, Onion Powder, Salt, Pepper
